name: Randy Villegas
subject: Will you personally endorse my campaign?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Villegas for Congress Villegas for Congress
body:
|
#
Friend, I’m proud to share that more than 25 local and elected leaders have endorsed my campaign to flip CA-22 and defeat David Valadao, including: |
* Chris Cruz-Boone, President, Bakersfield School Board of Education
* Bryan Osorio, Delano City Councilman
* Jose Gurrola, Former Mayor of Arvin
* Anthony Fuentes, Bakersfield School Board of Education President
* Brooke Malley Ault, Bakersfield School Board Area 5 Trustee
* Yvette Flores, Kern Voter Engagement Project Leader
* Chad Garcia, Bakersfield business leader and combat veteran
* Megan Russell, Kern County Advocate
* Joe Soria, Lindsay City Councilman
* Reuben Macareno, Tulare County Board of Education Area 2 Trustee
* Jevon Price, Tulare Local Healthcare District Board Area 3 Director
* Cathy Jorgensen, Kings County Democratic Central Committee Chair
* Connie Diaz, College of the Sequoias District Trustee Ward 4
* Socorro Santillan, CA Women’s Rights Leader
* Guadalupe Martinez, Delano Labor Leader
* Josh Evans, Tulare Democratic Central Committee Chair
* Jose Sigala, Tulare City Councilman
* Niessen Foster, Tulare Labor Leader

---
Their support is a clear sign of the momentum we’re building – but I need to show that this grassroots movement is just as strong.
[**Will you add your name alongside these local leaders to endorse my campaign, and then read why this race is so important?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107578785/545137378/1057587532?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTM4NTllMzctOGQyZi1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HFQT9lKwTi0nMh0mrxyQ5g8OJ1NkLbV1P00eBx9Qh1U=&emci=a080194f-6f2f-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=93859e37-8d2f-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=1120212)

Friend, CA-22 is one of the most competitive congressional districts in the country. President Biden won here in 2020 by double-digits, and Democrats outnumber Republicans in registration.
In fact, election analysts just downgraded my opponent’s chances of holding this seat. **We’re now just _one_ race rating away from a toss-up.**
If we’re going to put a real check on Trump, Musk, and the billionaire interests backing them, we need to flip seats like this.
That’s why I’m personally asking:
[**Will you sign on today to endorse my campaign? Every signature helps us show the strength of this grassroots movement.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107578787/545137392/1057587532?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTM4NTllMzctOGQyZi1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HFQT9lKwTi0nMh0mrxyQ5g8OJ1NkLbV1P00eBx9Qh1U=&emci=a080194f-6f2f-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=93859e37-8d2f-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=1120212)

| | 2025 has been a handful so far folks. Thankfully, we have opportunities on the horizon to fight back for our fundamental rights.

**There are upcoming elections in Virginia, Arizona, New Jersey, Pennsylvania, Texas, and more.**

This whirlwind of executive orders, legislation, and court cases showcase why we must do the work to connect with voters every day, not just during the time people consider to be “election season.” **There are no “off years” in our fight for voting rights.**

We must provide voters with resources to help them plan to vote, access sample ballots, find their polling locations, and learn what they need to make their voice heard. We’re counting on your help to reach as many people as we can to help stem this tide. [**Team, will you pitch in $22 (our average donation) to fuel our efforts? We have to pull out all the stops to inform and turn out voters across the country >>**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107578867/545138024/1723810624?am=22.00&contactdata=arrr8iQqetu4LAOYhqjOmG+k+CpPjf6hrRjUZtwpisEww3a84bhQs7KmR8pQYZWJ0lJH6Yl1Ex9IyfVoOwVo9OAQYcVqhUFhz31ZtgvFa98=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkyODU5ZTM3LThkMmYtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5ZaTCI19D2KKeL6ugp4tjbqjk2aT94jRQXWnvamCVXg=&emci=cfe83c07-522f-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=92859e37-8d2f-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=33603084)

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.

Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. [**Your support is crucial to our efforts. clean_body: Multiple states are giving us an opportunity to fight back and defend out right to vote| | | | | 2025 has been a handful so far folks. Thankfully, we have opportunities on the horizon to fight back for our fundamental rights. There are upcoming elections in Virginia, Arizona, New Jersey, Pennsylvania, Texas, and more. This whirlwind of executive orders, legislation, and court cases showcase why we must do the work to connect with voters every day, not just during the time people consider to be “election season.” There are no “off years” in our fight for voting rights. We must provide voters with resources to help them plan to vote, access sample ballots, find their polling locations, and learn what they need to make their voice heard. We’re counting on your help to reach as many people as we can to help stem this tide. If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. #### **Frozen Odds -**
**Alaska — vast, untamed, and unpredictable. Beneath its snow-covered peaks and icy rivers lies a political battlefield unlike any other. This is the story they didn’t want you to know.****Powerful names — Lisa Murkowski, Hansjörg Wyss, Arabella Advisors, and George Soros — echo through the corridors of influence, shaping the future of the Last Frontier. From the manipulation of Ranked Choice Voting to the backdoor funding of initiatives like the Minimum Wage Increase, Alaska has become a testing ground — a proving ground — for tactics designed to tilt democracy itself.****Groups like Salmon State, Outdoor Alliance, and the Alaska Venture Fund, Alaskans For Better Elections, No on 2, etc. have operated quietly, weaving a web of influence across the state's political landscape. What seemed like grassroots efforts were anything but — and the connections go far deeper than anyone imagined.****This isn't just about Alaska. It’s a warning to the rest of America.****Help bring this story to life, flying experts to Alaska, traveling the state for interviews. clean_body: ****** ************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************ ******** I just finished reviewing your previous survey submissions from 2024, and I have to say -- you really stood out. Your answers were always SPOT ON. It's clear you're a principled conservative who gets the stakes. But since we last heard from you, a lot has changed ... Despite winning back the White House, the fight is far from over. Kamala Harris and the Radical Democrats are already raising millions for their comeback in 2026. And the media? They're using that to try to crush our momentum before the midterms even begin! That's why we're opening the Republican Voter Sentiment Survey - to hear directly from grassroots leaders like YOU. ARE YOU STILL A REPUBLICAN? **** **** **** Thank you, Mary - Team GOP Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Jonathan Nez
subject: My endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jonathan Nez for Congress
body:
| Ya'at'eeh Peter, it's Jonathan Nez, former president of the Navajo Nation. Today, I am proud to endorse Democrat Deb Haaland for governor of New Mexico. Deciding to support Deb Haaland's campaign was an easy decision. We have a lot in common: we both value our Native heritage, our public service, and our deep roots in the Southwest--and we believe in fighting fiercely for the communities that have too often been left behind. [**I 'm about to tell you why I believe in Deb, but if you're short on time, she needs our help to build the kind of grassroots campaign that can overcome the right-wing megadonors lining up to stop her. Will you rush a split donation between our campaigns today?**](https://clicksp.jonathannezforaz.com/f/a/sDP7tiuCrWhfbtWit2pU1g~~/AAPPABA~/sFInCeTcxpRRlhkPLqEALm54sBceNmS0m0nrNK0lWlfaI0oq29s_F9UceOEEf3h6JUHi-vWia8B3pMGXa82is72iVnX5IYKKgYKWBwn2bKDkShUh8VRT-1OEmZ4rdfLDArcd409GAsz8-ztdfFSVOhgHaiNykjg1sbJqr71_gDX687y3REAYgkjQAUY7IKJAWBcz9VkJSRxXTp77hdGf6MVmTd8diDq6n9aZ3jm-xhYfe-cErLKHWyujijCwJAZfQiLFhYiruZ9gtvHMPXU4Twtxp7bp-uzfDwqqq-RCIOa71v3friXoyjXW2NS6RuvY_-jME4aM5Xo13ZeRQHd9OmKwtOLYR-mCxQqvie2QObYlbyoChKzkKO2A-QDnq9u_a3-BI3Nseu4PAb_BgjZf05bbV9l5Nw0lh6RQdGI_sSPusy0cYnGHEoXJIj40NUXq) I've had the honor of working alongside my good friend Deb Haaland and I know she's the experienced leader who will fight for the change that all New Mexicans need and deserve. Deb has the network, lived experience, and executive leadership to bring real change to New Mexico. A Laguna Pueblo woman, She was the first Native American to serve as cabinet secretary and her commitment to fight for every community has made us all proud. Over the years, she has worked tirelessly to make her home, New Mexico, stronger. From the halls of Congress to the Department of Interior, she has always remained committed to serving the people of New Mexico. Now, she's stepping up to lead once more. As the former president of the Navajo Nation, I know what it means to answer the call to serve. But Deb Haaland has never backed down from a tough fight, and she won't start now--not with the people of New Mexico counting on her. **I believe in Deb Haaland. But she can 't do it alone. **[**So I 'm asking you to split a donation between us to help build a people-powered movement strong enough to win this race and deliver a better future for New Mexico. >>**](https://clicksp.jonathannezforaz.com/f/a/sDP7tiuCrWhfbtWit2pU1g~~/AAPPABA~/sFInCeTcxpRRlhkPLqEALm54sBceNmS0m0nrNK0lWlfaI0oq29s_F9UceOEEf3h6JUHi-vWia8B3pMGXa82is72iVnX5IYKKgYKWBwn2bKDkShUh8VRT-1OEmZ4rdfLDArcd409GAsz8-ztdfFSVOhgHaiNykjg1sbJqr71_gDX687y3REAYgkjQAUY7IKJAWBcz9VkJSRxXTp77hdGf6MVmTd8diDq6n9aZ3jm-xhYfe-cErLKHWyujijCwJAZfQiLFhYiruZ9gtvHMPXU4Twtxp7bp-uzfDwqqq-RCIOa71v3friXoyjXW2NS6RuvY_-jME4aM5Xo13ZeRQHd9OmKwtOLYR-mCxQqvie2QObYlbyoChKzkKO2A-QDnq9u_a3-BI3Nseu4PAb_BgjZf05bbV9l5Nw0lh6RQdGI_sSPusy0cYnGHEoXJIj40NUXq)

name: The DC Bugle
subject: Maxine Waters had one public meltdown that left Donald Trump in shock

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: Let me lay this out
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
This is not a drill and it’s not a bad dream
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107579678/545154907/-476769103?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk503-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjQwYzg2Ny05MTJmLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0TcRoaoSkT8SM-FkfxhvjI0jOf5gTp5SP_8fgxD5Lzg=)
_Let me lay this out, clear as day:_

I am the only Democratic Senator up for re-election in a state Trump won in 2024.

This Senate race in Georgia will be the most competitive and most expensive in the nation.

If you’re outraged by what’s happening to our country — and you’re ready to fight –– [**please split $5 between my re-election campaign and Patty Murray today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107579679/545154908/-476769103?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk503-bu-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjQwYzg2Ny05MTJmLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0TcRoaoSkT8SM-FkfxhvjI0jOf5gTp5SP_8fgxD5Lzg=)
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107579680/545154909/-476769103?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk503-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjQwYzg2Ny05MTJmLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0TcRoaoSkT8SM-FkfxhvjI0jOf5gTp5SP_8fgxD5Lzg=)
---
Otherwise, let me remind you why I ran for Senate — and why this moment is just as urgent.

Before I was elected, I led investigations of corruption and human rights abuses worldwide. We exposed wrongdoing in countries where criticizing the government is dangerous, where whistleblowers and witnesses will only meet in secret, where protest carries the risk of prosecution.

More and more, the atmosphere under Trump reminded me of those places where dissent was silenced by intimidation.

Trump’s rise wasn’t just a crisis. It was a warning.

I ran for Senate because I saw the danger in electing someone so profoundly unfit for the presidency and I wanted to confront the corruption that made his rise possible.

I also ran — years before the _Dobbs_ decision — because it was already clear the GOP was coming for reproductive rights. I saw Georgia as the front line in that fight. With a six-week ban now in place here, and Republicans pushing for a national abortion ban, it still is.

**Now this President is staging a power grab unprecedented in our history. In his first 100 days:**
* He’s freed violent criminals who attacked the Capitol on his behalf.
* Purged independent watchdogs across government.
* Stacked key agencies with loyalists — and called on them to investigate his political opponents.
* Defied and threatened federal judges.
* Undermined the press.
* Handed sweeping, unaccountable power to the billionaire who spent $300 million to elect him.

Trump’s goal isn’t just revenge. He wants to use the government to crush the opposition. And now, Americans are living in fear of their own government.

This is not a drill and it’s not a bad dream. As citizens, it is the test of our lifetimes.

**In 2020, the pundits said flipping a Republican Senate seat in Georgia couldn’t be done. But we built one of the strongest voter mobilization programs in Senate campaign history—and we won. That victory won the Senate majority.**

Now we must win again. And we _will_ win again.

Just like last time, I can’t do it alone.

So I’m asking:

**[Please split a contribution between my re-election campaign and Patty Murray today, of $5 or any amount that works for you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107579681/545154910/-476769103?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk503-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjQwYzg2Ny05MTJmLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0TcRoaoSkT8SM-FkfxhvjI0jOf5gTp5SP_8fgxD5Lzg=)**

The average online donation to our campaign is around $30. Many give less. Some give more.

All that matters is that lots and lots of people are contributing what they can to power our grassroots campaign. Please, contribute today.
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107579682/545154911/-476769103?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk503-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjQwYzg2Ny05MTJmLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0TcRoaoSkT8SM-FkfxhvjI0jOf5gTp5SP_8fgxD5Lzg=)
---
Thanks for being part of this team.

As always,

Jon Ossoff
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/q9iNeaDCVUi-n6xIKf7j9g2?unsubscribedata=0Y24rH9Lagdcr%2FolViShsc9WHih4%2F5Xfe1%2B9%2FmR6Zm2I0AnZTSwHgBOhKhl%2BtCw2ur6U0XCR9KUZrEgfcgofzuglGnN4dfoEPBV4dGKJATQVhEquFkTIwfx4Ev43XmfbYTrM1Rq6CEJDaipD227hX8J2PZcHGr89ad4Q%2B2K6GRXWCYaDdFfLQwmT0Bgb4GfIdgHFESTtc2EYT3ZriYZEMLY4skDax5Y4Gg8tEUN4bAnb3ww7vfQpGFiPhvbJTuQUOGTYafXT6lH2IlL7GpwHk4xfdXldPTfuawi8tOG1rQ5kDSdGsFeQJjWAaHrIr0IHhc4wpnkqEI87fFyx%2BUDTfv4X4RbFNvE5Aoq0EVAtXJK3T93FJEDydODGhhA9UxxR41NuovX8lUXccevv3YPO%2FJ6oOCkWJaw6OwjgpnN7A6IrVGz%2BagIG1rhmOpilfQFb) People for Patty Murray

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Where should I go next?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8572%2E5257348%2E2FV0Cv)
Derek — Making sure folks like you stay up to date on my work in the Senate is something I take very seriously.
That’s why I strive to make these emails as informative as possible.
It’s why we’ve launched our “Ask Adam” email series to give members of this team the opportunity to ask me questions about anything that’s on their minds.
And it’s why I started my own YouTube channel — now one of the most highly watched of any Democratic elected official, spend significant time with nontraditional media (like influencers), go on news programs, appear on late-night shows and podcasts, travel around California, and so much more.
As a Senator for the most populous state in the country, it’s my job to meet voters where they are and communicate the work I’m doing to improve their lives and hold the Trump administration accountable.
I want to make sure I’m not leaving any stone unturned in getting my message out there, Derek — which is why I want to hear from you. Where should I go next? What digital platforms should I use to communicate? Whose show should I appear on?
**[If you have any ideas about where I should go next or how I can reach even more folks with my message, please use this link to share them with me >>](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=engagement-202505-digital-survey.d437vk&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20250512_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=8572%2E5257348%2E2FV0Cv)**

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: The one race MAGA is banking on
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
| | |
---
Derek —

This U.S. Senate race in Georgia isn’t just another election.

It’s the one race MAGA is banking on.

See, as the only Democratic Senator up for re-election in a state Trump won, I am, quite literally, their #1 target.

You know the stakes. And you know your support is crucial. If you are ready to make a donation today, please use this link to split a donation between my campaign and John Fetterman:
| | [Donate](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51050?refcode=jtk97-bu-fl&t=1&akid=10082%2E434096%2EB9Wt3I)
---
Otherwise, I hope you’ll give me a minute or two to explain why your support is so important.

They’re going to come after me with every dirty trick in the book and will spare no expense to defeat me.

That means we need to build the largest statewide campaign Georgia has ever seen.

That means more rallies. More organizers. More outreach — and early outreach — to voters in every corner of the state.

All of that takes resources. And it’s why donations from supporters like you are so important to our campaign.

The road ahead won’t be easy. But I know how to win tough fights. I’ve done it before.

I can’t do it alone, which is why I’m asking:

**_[Please, consider splitting a contribution between my re-election and John Fetterman ahead of our mid-month deadline. Every donation counts in a race as close as this one will be.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51050?refcode=jtk97-bu-fl&t=2&akid=10082%2E434096%2EB9Wt3I)_**
| | [Donate](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51050?refcode=jtk97-bu-fl&t=3&akid=10082%2E434096%2EB9Wt3I)
---
Thanks for all you do to support our campaign.

As always,

Jon

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-2025?refcode=jtk97-bu-fl-footer&t=4&refcode2=10082_434096_B9Wt3I&akid=10082%2E434096%2EB9Wt3I)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=5&akid=10082%2E434096%2EB9Wt3I)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=10082%2E434096%2EB9Wt3I)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

clean_body: You’re going to love what I’ve got in store for you. | | | | Friend, do you like upgrades? When someone earns it, I believe in rewarding them BIG LEAGUE. I upgraded Mike Waltz to be our next Ambassador to the United Nations – because he’s a fighter, a Patriot, and someone I trust to put America FIRST. Now, I’m doing something I’ve NEVER done before... I’m upgrading YOU to TOP WHITE HOUSE ADVISOR STATUS. That’s right, friend. You’ve shown loyalty, strength, and commitment to our movement. Now it’s time for your promotion. You’ve been chosen because YOU’VE EARNED IT. But like I always said on The Apprentice... You’re not getting promoted for sitting on the sidelines! Thank you and may God bless you, Donald J. name: Mikie Sherrill HQ
subject: BREAKING: Trump just endorsed our opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
All eyes are on Mikie and this team
Peter — moments ago, just as Mikie was preparing to take the debate stage, Donald Trump endorsed Mikie’s likely Republican opponent, Jack Ciattarelli.
This means that MAGA money is about to pour into Ciattarelli’s campaign from all across the country — likely millions of dollarsPeter. And we know that much of it is going to be used to directly attack Mikie, because she’s the Democrat that Trump and his allies fear the most.
**[We urgently need to step up our grassroots fundraising to avoid being swamped by Ciattarelli, Trump, and their billionaire allies like Elon Musk. Please rush a split donation to Heartland Patriots and Mikie’s campaign to make sure Trump’s handpicked candidate doesn’t get the power to bring the MAGA agenda here to New Jersey.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88512?refcode=em20250512-8933&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8933%2E614464%2E6xCkE_)**

Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida:
Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.
To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments
These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).

name: Steve Hilton
subject: Save California from Kamala
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE HILTON FOR GOVERNOR 2026
body:
Not on my watch.

| | |
---
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0p8no0888vpeqkrd2sbne2laobi6hhusqihpdjo_rp22sh2s8i6eob7chj60ob1cth2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, In November of 2024, the American people rejected the radicalism of the Democrats and saved our nation from four years of Kamala Harris.But now, Californians must take up the gauntlet—because Kamala is getting ready to run for Governor of California.She just kicked off her “comeback” tour with a speech to a room full of Democrat elites in San Francisco. And while she was cracking jokes and spewing her usual word salad nonsense, 35% of Californians are struggling just to afford the basics—**food, rent, medicine.** Kamala didn’t say a single word about that.Not one word about working families...
Not one plan to fix the mess her party created...
And not even a hint of humility... Just more preening, more posturing, and more political theater from someone who’s been a disaster in every job she has had.Let’s be clear: this isn’t just her comeback tour. It’s a coronation plan. The Democrat machine wants to hand Kamala the Governorship.**Not on my watch.** I’m Steve Hilton, and I’m running for Governor of California to bring back _freedom, opportunity, and common sense_ —to **Make California Golden Again**.[**Join my campaign today!**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6fhpidf50rf1ev33a0aif9148h7dpjknc2i6a80_rp22sh2s8i6eob7chj60ob1cth2bs) It does not have to be like this. Californians do not have to be the victims of failed Democrat policies any longer.California can still be the greatest state in the country. I truly believe that with all my heart. We are the home of innovation, creativity, and hard work. But radical democrats like Gavin Newsom, Kamala Harris and their elite allies have turned our state into a cautionary tale for the rest of America.
---
* Crime is up.
* Homelessness is exploding.
* Public schools are failing.
* Housing is unaffordable.
* Businesses and families are fleeing.

---
And Kamala? She wants more of the same. **Kamala Harris failed as a presidential candidate. She failed as Vice President. And she would be catastrophic as Governor.** But make no mistake—Kamala believes she can walk right into the Governor’s mansion. The elites are rallying around her. They think they can buy this race. They don’t believe someone like me—an outsider, a problem-solver, someone who speaks truth to power—can beat their broken machine.**[Let’s prove them wrong.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zi832c3lseqrmto6qfh3cc78sf35ofjs3s4v1upg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7chj60ob1cth2bs)** This race is going to come down to a clear choice: **_Fifteen more years of one-party rule from failed Democrats who wrecked this state_**
__**OR**__
** _A new era of bold, common-sense leadership that will make California golden again._** So I’m calling on every proud Californian who wants to turn things around: **[Will you chip in $25, $50, $100 or more to help me stop Kamala and Make California Golden Again?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zbqj6i4234n5cphsg5tm3qfnubpdrivjer8j9ng0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7chj60ob1cth2bs) **We don’t need another elitist who talks in circles and dodges accountability. We need real leadership. We need to talk about the real issues. We need to take our state back.Join me—and let’s get to work.
---
**Steve Hilton** Candidate for Governor of California
---
[ DONATE TODAY! ](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zi2m64kia2ap9ij78mtpue0uaukuupapgk4ltfp0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7chj60ob1cth2bs)
---
P.S. Kamala Harris doesn’t want a serious debate—because her ideas are the ideas that have led to this calamity. If you’re ready to fight back, I need you on this team. **[Chip in today and let’s end the one-party rule that’s destroying our beautiful Golden State.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zt84nj1o5dupa9775gl02sle5qu3lucc5k3gk0t8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7chj60ob1cth2bs)**
---
|
---
| | |
---

name: Steve Hilton
subject: Stand with Charlie Kirk, Vivek, and Kirk Cameron
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE HILTON FOR GOVERNOR 2026
body:
Let’s Make California Golden Again!

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn9313quo2c81gntibauiu8i8jlokgq5fbd6mh2o_rp22sh2s8i6eob7chj60ob3cth2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, I’m Steve Hilton, and I’m running to be the next Governor of California to bring back freedom, opportunity, and common sense. To make **_[_California Golden Again_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3jq352qv5ie8gnb1eeoe93e0t9rp2q0e46ug558_rp22sh2s8i6eob7chj60ob3cth2bs)_.** Our grassroots movement is already gaining steam, and some of the strongest leaders in the conservative movement have already endorsed my campaign.
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn14dh8hcv48dkr0nj70dir4qpiugjolikku4jjo_rp22sh2s8i6eob7chj60ob3cth2bs)
---
There’s nowhere better than California. But everyone can see how badly things have gone off track. We were once the land of opportunity but now we have America’s highest prices for gas, power outages are a regular occurrence, and almost a million Californians don’t have access to clean drinking water. Today we’re sadly famous for dystopian scenes of crime, chaos, and squalor. Let’s make California the land of opportunity again with:
---
# GREAT JOBS
---
# **GREAT HOMES**
---
# **GREAT KIDS**
---
We need to make California an inspiration again, not a warning of what not to do. There’s only one way to do it. We need to end the Democrat one-party rule that got us into this mess. California is ready for a change. In 2024 almost every county shifted away from the Democrats. Since Gavin Newsom took office, **one million new Republican voters** have registered. Earlier this year a poll found that **48%** of Californians would consider voting for a Republican governor. I’m honored to have strong conservative leaders like Vivek Ramaswamy, Charlie Kirk, and Kirk Cameron endorsing me, but your personal endorsement matters more to me.
---
[ **PLEASE ENDORSE MY CAMPAIGN TODAY!** ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z49i65qi4i95cj77jjm90im7d89mtsf659g57v6g_rp22sh2s8i6eob7chj60ob3cth2bs)
---
To win, we’re building a grassroots movement. I know what I believe and what it takes to save California. Your contribution of **$25** , **$50** , or **$100** will get our message to millions of voters. I’m the only candidate that can win and I promise _I will never bend the knee to the left_. I truly appreciate your help.
---
[ DONATE TODAY! ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvl2c6ckm2umsq5cp8idtuefij1vhjiptsl60nto_rp22sh2s8i6eob7chj60ob3cth2bs)
---
With your support, we’ll make **California Golden Again.**
---
Steve HiltonCandidate for Governor of California
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkqe98ncja681s97fvslogk859r0a2kar490qdv8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7chj60ob3cth2bs)
---
# Meet Steve Hilton
---
I love California so much. I moved to the Bay Area over a decade ago. I’ve raised my family here, taught at Stanford, started a business, written books, hosted a TV show ... lived the California dream. It’s my home, in the deepest sense. I’m a proud American, and an incredibly proud Californian too. But I’ve never forgotten where I came from. My parents were immigrants – they fled communism in Hungary to start a new life in England. In a free country. I appreciate exactly what that means.We didn’t have much money. My mother worked in a shoe store, my stepfather worked construction. My dad, who died when I was a kid, was the goalie for the Hungarian national ice hockey team. In 2012 we moved to California. I hosted a TV show — The Next Revolution with Steve Hilton — and podcasts: California Rebel Base, The Steve Hilton Show, Big Ideas Book Club. Through my policy organization, Golden Together, I’ve set out the changes we need to make to get this state back on track. Over the last few years, I’ve traveled the state, meeting people from all walks of life and backgrounds, in every part of California. I’ve spent time with business owners and workers in every industry, struggling with the absolute nightmare it’s become to start and grow a company here. I’ve seen the struggles so many Californians face raising a family given the unbelievable costs of living here. To make real change happen in government, you need the ability to think differently, the courage to challenge establishment groupthink and the conviction to follow through. That’s what I will bring to this job – to the urgent necessity of restoring the California Dream for everyone, and making this beautiful state, that we love so much, truly Golden Again.
---
[ **SUPPORT STEVE** ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z563lqvtc586vrsdlcscbj15clruqihdb02k7ai8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7chj60ob3cth2bs)
---

We were once the land of opportunity but now we have America’s highest prices for gas, power outages are a regular occurrence, and almost a million Californians don’t have access to clean drinking water. Today we’re sadly famous for dystopian scenes of crime, chaos, and squalor. Let’s make California the land of opportunity again with: GREAT JOBS GREAT HOMES GREAT KIDS We need to make California an inspiration again, not a warning of what not to do. There’s only one way to do it. We need to end the Democrat one-party rule that got us into this mess. California is ready for a change. In 2024 almost every county shifted away from the Democrats. Since Gavin Newsom took office, one million new Republican voters have registered. Earlier this year a poll found that 48% of Californians would consider voting for a Republican governor. I’m honored to have strong conservative leaders like Vivek Ramaswamy, Charlie Kirk, and Kirk Cameron endorsing me, but your personal endorsement matters more to me. To win, we’re building a grassroots movement. I know what I believe and what it takes to save California. Your contribution of $25 , $50 , or $100 will get our message to millions of voters. I’m the only candidate that can win and I promise I will never bend the knee to the left. I truly appreciate your help. With your support, we’ll make California Golden Again. Steve HiltonCandidate for Governor of California | | Meet Steve Hilton I love California so much. I moved to the Bay Area over a decade ago. I’ve raised my family here, taught at Stanford, started a business, written books, hosted a TV show ... lived the California dream. It’s my home, in the deepest sense. I’m a proud American, and an incredibly proud Californian too. But I’ve never forgotten where I came from. My parents were immigrants – they fled communism in Hungary to start a new life in England. In a free country. I appreciate exactly what that means.We didn’t have much money. My mother worked in a shoe store, my stepfather worked construction. My dad, who died when I was a kid, was the goalie for the Hungarian national ice hockey team. In 2012 we moved to California. I hosted a TV show — The Next Revolution with Steve Hilton — and podcasts: California Rebel Base, The Steve Hilton Show, Big Ideas Book Club. Through my policy organization, Golden Together, I’ve set out the changes we need to make to get this state back on track. Over the last few years, I’ve traveled the state, meeting people from all walks of life and backgrounds, in every part of California. I’ve spent time with business owners and workers in every industry, struggling with the absolute nightmare it’s become to start and grow a company here. I’ve seen the struggles so many Californians face raising a family given the unbelievable costs of living here. To make real change happen in government, you need the ability to think differently, the courage to challenge establishment groupthink and the conviction to follow through. That’s what I will bring to this job – to the urgent necessity of restoring the California Dream for everyone, and making this beautiful state, that we love so much, truly Golden Again. | | | PAID FOR BY STEVE HILTON FOR GOVERNOR 2026 FPPC ID#1480425 Please add mailto:info@stevehiltonforgovernor.com "info@stevehiltonforgovernor.com" to your email contacts to make sure our updates are making it into your inbox. name: Steve Hilton
subject: Stand with Charlie Kirk, Vivek, and Kirk Cameron
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE HILTON FOR GOVERNOR 2026
body:
Let’s Make California Golden Again!

| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z1lf78apu2ur3fhghacbpl38hrs54jl549u3u3d0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7chj68pj2chh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, I’m Steve Hilton, and I’m running to be the next Governor of California to bring back freedom, opportunity, and common sense. To make **_[_California Golden Again_](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z8idubkpsp4rjv1sptmffv3nqqaombk37aa637do_rp22sh2s8i6eob7chj68pj2chh2bs)_.** Our grassroots movement is already gaining steam, and some of the strongest leaders in the conservative movement have already endorsed my campaign.
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zlrgi2c64vnng7a7l86m29vcb14v2de19chp3lk8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7chj68pj2chh2bs)
---
There’s nowhere better than California. But everyone can see how badly things have gone off track. We were once the land of opportunity but now we have America’s highest prices for gas, power outages are a regular occurrence, and almost a million Californians don’t have access to clean drinking water. Today we’re sadly famous for dystopian scenes of crime, chaos, and squalor. Let’s make California the land of opportunity again with:
---
# GREAT JOBS
---
# **GREAT HOMES**
---
# **GREAT KIDS**
---
We need to make California an inspiration again, not a warning of what not to do. There’s only one way to do it. We need to end the Democrat one-party rule that got us into this mess. California is ready for a change. In 2024 almost every county shifted away from the Democrats. Since Gavin Newsom took office, **one million new Republican voters** have registered. Earlier this year a poll found that **48%** of Californians would consider voting for a Republican governor. I’m honored to have strong conservative leaders like Vivek Ramaswamy, Charlie Kirk, and Kirk Cameron endorsing me, but your personal endorsement matters more to me.
---
[ **PLEASE ENDORSE MY CAMPAIGN TODAY!** ](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z258egmonk6kehc9th30rnhtmt7o7it0dc1ecqj8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7chj68pj2chh2bs)
---
To win, we’re building a grassroots movement. I know what I believe and what it takes to save California. Your contribution of **$25** , **$50** , or **$100** will get our message to millions of voters. I’m the only candidate that can win and I promise _I will never bend the knee to the left_. I truly appreciate your help.
---
[ DONATE TODAY! ](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zl1eopd4gk58lj673pgugbbn1ukc5ajm5n2d61e8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7chj68pj2chh2bs)
---
With your support, we’ll make **California Golden Again.**
---
Steve HiltonCandidate for Governor of California
---
| | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zm8mhc0miobnffgj6prcbgp339uj58k43j1gc8o8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7chj68pj2chh2bs)
---
# Meet Steve Hilton
---
I love California so much. I moved to the Bay Area over a decade ago. I’ve raised my family here, taught at Stanford, started a business, written books, hosted a TV show ... lived the California dream. It’s my home, in the deepest sense. I’m a proud American, and an incredibly proud Californian too. But I’ve never forgotten where I came from. My parents were immigrants – they fled communism in Hungary to start a new life in England. In a free country. I appreciate exactly what that means.We didn’t have much money. My mother worked in a shoe store, my stepfather worked construction. My dad, who died when I was a kid, was the goalie for the Hungarian national ice hockey team. In 2012 we moved to California. I hosted a TV show — The Next Revolution with Steve Hilton — and podcasts: California Rebel Base, The Steve Hilton Show, Big Ideas Book Club. Through my policy organization, Golden Together, I’ve set out the changes we need to make to get this state back on track. Over the last few years, I’ve traveled the state, meeting people from all walks of life and backgrounds, in every part of California. I’ve spent time with business owners and workers in every industry, struggling with the absolute nightmare it’s become to start and grow a company here. I’ve seen the struggles so many Californians face raising a family given the unbelievable costs of living here. To make real change happen in government, you need the ability to think differently, the courage to challenge establishment groupthink and the conviction to follow through. That’s what I will bring to this job – to the urgent necessity of restoring the California Dream for everyone, and making this beautiful state, that we love so much, truly Golden Again.
---
[ **SUPPORT STEVE** ](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zjm7sunqirpj59dd9pbjt21uknt0a3ukcsns0tco_rp22sh2s8i6eob7chj68pj2chh2bs)
---

clean_body: Let’s Make California Golden Again! | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, I’m Steve Hilton, and I’m running to be the next Governor of California to bring back freedom, opportunity, and common sense. To make . Our grassroots movement is already gaining steam, and some of the strongest leaders in the conservative movement have already endorsed my campaign. There’s nowhere better than California. But everyone can see how badly things have gone off track. We were once the land of opportunity but now we have America’s highest prices for gas, power outages are a regular occurrence, and almost a million Californians don’t have access to clean drinking water. Today we’re sadly famous for dystopian scenes of crime, chaos, and squalor. Let’s make California the land of opportunity again with: GREAT JOBS GREAT HOMES GREAT KIDS We need to make California an inspiration again, not a warning of what not to do. There’s only one way to do it. We need to end the Democrat one-party rule that got us into this mess. California is ready for a change. In 2024 almost every county shifted away from the Democrats. Since Gavin Newsom took office, one million new Republican voters have registered. Earlier this year a poll found that 48% of Californians would consider voting for a Republican governor. I’m honored to have strong conservative leaders like Vivek Ramaswamy, Charlie Kirk, and Kirk Cameron endorsing me, but your personal endorsement matters more to me. To win, we’re building a grassroots movement. I know what I believe and what it takes to save California. Your contribution of $25 , $50 , or $100 will get our message to millions of voters. I’m the only candidate that can win and I promise I will never bend the knee to the left. I truly appreciate your help. With your support, we’ll make California Golden Again. Steve HiltonCandidate for Governor of California | | Meet Steve Hilton I love California so much. I moved to the Bay Area over a decade ago. I’ve raised my family here, taught at Stanford, started a business, written books, hosted a TV show ... lived the California dream. It’s my home, in the deepest sense. I’m a proud American, and an incredibly proud Californian too. But I’ve never forgotten where I came from. My parents were immigrants – they fled communism in Hungary to start a new life in England. In a free country. I appreciate exactly what that means.We didn’t have much money. My mother worked in a shoe store, my stepfather worked construction. My dad, who died when I was a kid, was the goalie for the Hungarian national ice hockey team. In 2012 we moved to California. I hosted a TV show — The Next Revolution with Steve Hilton — and podcasts: California Rebel Base, The Steve Hilton Show, Big Ideas Book Club. Through my policy organization, Golden Together, I’ve set out the changes we need to make to get this state back on track. Over the last few years, I’ve traveled the state, meeting people from all walks of life and backgrounds, in every part of California. I’ve spent time with business owners and workers in every industry, struggling with the absolute nightmare it’s become to start and grow a company here. I’ve seen the struggles so many Californians face raising a family given the unbelievable costs of living here. To make real change happen in government, you need the ability to think differently, the courage to challenge establishment groupthink and the conviction to follow through. That’s what I will bring to this job – to the urgent necessity of restoring the California Dream for everyone, and making this beautiful state, that we love so much, truly Golden Again. | | | PAID FOR BY STEVE HILTON FOR GOVERNOR 2026 FPPC ID#1480425 Please add mailto:info@stevehiltonforgovernor.com "info@stevehiltonforgovernor.com" to your email contacts to make sure our updates are making it into your inbox. PO Box 730,HILMAR, CA 95324 Pop Acta Media | Updates for Great Americans PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Steve Hilton
subject: Save California from Kamala
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE HILTON FOR GOVERNOR 2026
body:
Not on my watch.

| | |
---
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7fdta7ictre796b6l9ahiash0avjh0tk06nh1bg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7chj62o32cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, In November of 2024, the American people rejected the radicalism of the Democrats and saved our nation from four years of Kamala Harris.But now, Californians must take up the gauntlet—because Kamala is getting ready to run for Governor of California.She just kicked off her “comeback” tour with a speech to a room full of Democrat elites in San Francisco. And while she was cracking jokes and spewing her usual word salad nonsense, 35% of Californians are struggling just to afford the basics—**food, rent, medicine.** Kamala didn’t say a single word about that.Not one word about working families...
Not one plan to fix the mess her party created...
And not even a hint of humility... Just more preening, more posturing, and more political theater from someone who’s been a disaster in every job she has had.Let’s be clear: this isn’t just her comeback tour. It’s a coronation plan. The Democrat machine wants to hand Kamala the Governorship.**Not on my watch.** I’m Steve Hilton, and I’m running for Governor of California to bring back _freedom, opportunity, and common sense_ —to **Make California Golden Again**.[**Join my campaign today!**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zoauvhsr730d3nirengs564b8fnls37k84lg7nh8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7chj62o32cjh2bs) It does not have to be like this. Californians do not have to be the victims of failed Democrat policies any longer.California can still be the greatest state in the country. I truly believe that with all my heart. We are the home of innovation, creativity, and hard work. But radical democrats like Gavin Newsom, Kamala Harris and their elite allies have turned our state into a cautionary tale for the rest of America.
---
* Crime is up.
* Homelessness is exploding.
* Public schools are failing.
* Housing is unaffordable.
* Businesses and families are fleeing.

---
And Kamala? She wants more of the same. **Kamala Harris failed as a presidential candidate. She failed as Vice President. And she would be catastrophic as Governor.** But make no mistake—Kamala believes she can walk right into the Governor’s mansion. The elites are rallying around her. They think they can buy this race. They don’t believe someone like me—an outsider, a problem-solver, someone who speaks truth to power—can beat their broken machine.**[Let’s prove them wrong.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhdlmvq18n5n8ba5qk3inrk64qgrgo2sc6v1po0g_rp22sh2s8i6eob7chj62o32cjh2bs)** This race is going to come down to a clear choice: **_Fifteen more years of one-party rule from failed Democrats who wrecked this state_**
__**OR**__
** _A new era of bold, common-sense leadership that will make California golden again._** So I’m calling on every proud Californian who wants to turn things around: **[Will you chip in $25, $50, $100 or more to help me stop Kamala and Make California Golden Again?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvdmp7sbcteg2anhklb0rre2189b946e0ep8c228_rp22sh2s8i6eob7chj62o32cjh2bs) **We don’t need another elitist who talks in circles and dodges accountability. We need real leadership. We need to talk about the real issues. We need to take our state back.Join me—and let’s get to work.
---
**Steve Hilton** Candidate for Governor of California
---
[ DONATE TODAY! ](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4akhjbg0chom3m613lt1mlv6hli9c2cipr64478_rp22sh2s8i6eob7chj62o32cjh2bs)
---
P.S. Kamala Harris doesn’t want a serious debate—because her ideas are the ideas that have led to this calamity. If you’re ready to fight back, I need you on this team. **[Chip in today and let’s end the one-party rule that’s destroying our beautiful Golden State.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgrj82lpa2171s4a23mktujd6f0n0abtin496eqg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7chj62o32cjh2bs)**
---

name: Patriot Polls
subject: Do you still stand with President Trump?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
Can we have a minute of your time?

| | | Peter,

President Trump's powerful joint address to Congress left the Democrats **REELING.** Their behavior was a stark reminder that they are entirely out of touch with the American people.

As President Trump honored American heroes, the Democrats sat in stunned silence, refusing to applaud for the very people they claim to represent. Steelworkers, farmers, grieving mothers, and a young boy battling brain cancer - all ignored by the Democrats.

This shameful display exposed the Democrats' true priorities: **politics over people.**

The contrast between the two parties couldn't be clearer. President Trump and the Republicans lead with competence, sanity, and a pro-American agenda. Meanwhile, the Democrats are descending into chaos, driven by incompetence and irrationality.

Democrats simply cannot admit that President Trump's America First agenda is working, which is why we want YOUR opinion, Peter. [**Please take a minute to complete our Agenda 47 Survey and let us know if you still stand with President Trump:**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-ZZrZ0tGsz13A9rQFFq7oQ)
---
[ **TAKE THE AGENDA 47 SURVEY HERE**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)

Thank you for your continued support of the America First movement.

Best regards,

As President Trump honored American heroes, the Democrats sat in stunned silence, refusing to applaud for the very people they claim to represent. Steelworkers, farmers, grieving mothers, and a young boy battling brain cancer - all ignored by the Democrats. This shameful display exposed the Democrats' true priorities: politics over people. The contrast between the two parties couldn't be clearer. President Trump and the Republicans lead with competence, sanity, and a pro-American agenda. Meanwhile, the Democrats are descending into chaos, driven by incompetence and irrationality. Democrats simply cannot admit that President Trump's America First agenda is working, which is why we want YOUR opinion, Peter. Thank you for your continued support of the America First movement. Best regards, Patriot Polls | | | Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress Troy Downing is a former member of the U.S. Air Force/Air National Guard. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Air Force or the Department of Defense. Troy Downing For Congress P.O. | DEVELOPING: “Trump administration asks Supreme Court to let DOGE access Social Security data” – The Hill (05.02.2025)
---
| Peter, Trump and his unelected billionaire buddy Elon Musk are continuing to attack Americans’ rights. They’re trying to talk the Supreme Court into letting DOGE have access to millions of Americans’ personal info!! If the Supreme Court doesn’t REJECT Trump’s outrageous request, DOGE will be able to see EVERYTHING about people – even their: ❌ Private bank data & earnings history ❌ Social Security numbers ❌ Medical and mental health records Trump and his DOGE goons are trying to dig WAY too far into Americans’ personal lives – and we need to stand up against this MAJOR privacy violation right now. [Please sign our petition DEMANDING the Supreme Court block Trump’s request to invade Americans’ privacy. Trump needs to know the people will NOT accept government meddling in their personal lives, Peter, so please sign on now.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2bcfbb57-b8f2-42ae-adab-227856394b8d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. name: The Texas Flyover
subject: Cattle Imports Halted, Heat Wave, and 'Unexplained' Seaweed
body:
On Sunday, U.S. Secretary of Agriculture Brooke Rollins ordered a temporary pause on importing livestock, horses, and bison across the southern border ports due to the spread of the parasitic New World Screwworm (NWS) in Mexico.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO3CAQQL8Gd7YGMCYUFJFO213alAjDeI0ExoLZ3bu_j3yJ8gPXznuaGb3f7-7dp5yO-y9f0NLHVt2Br56RCJsLnihjKmdt1HefCeOOnl7eCRBqBDVy6aJP-dPNQ7QrRMMHtFzPmsuZCzHsFjbUIFcVhdwUGhWiAR7MwpdthTWqIdlrGSguOQeuzKRNVCasCwYf9QrAZsCYqLaJdiT88H3Ln_WJbQq1DNnuRGdn8icTNyZu6XhipylV8qGWcjkXkLcHFdfrowVk8g2LT5mJ5RoWjOlRmHw7fYrj6Rsd2Pqezn88-HL6dD--jP-Q_4BxBu3-RhBcL7BoaZQZmo3nK-Wc-qLZDPfr1Ner9L3ATyv-BAAA__-7k5AC) | |
# Tuesday, May 13, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1935, the first gusher at the [Seven Sisters oilfield](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGutCAQRp8GOw0DImtB8Td2-7e3NIOMKwmKwcm6vv2N-wq3OtV38uX8PMcnxhS3139cyfFnzuNG55GImco4IXOiuO658LFgYgoLIZ84KqlMLU0NegwY0zW2VXBehh4qcmBbC7oFparFzXMnO5TTo_NoPc2gDU6zb3VnrTJaVtHdMmlAA0gwfWP7YPrJdzRhsF5K0UoKkXNpeCGmDx5zuvKbSjPltUpuYd4Pof8JNQg1nOfZ3GfzluJGTS4voYbvqg541f66IdRAG5ebAI--Ki7sZ0wpHp0VrXytGNPXzn9r8nbqNwAA__-NGHZk) in Duval County came in. The town had a post office by 1940, but despite continued oil production, it closed in 1970. ## U.S. Halts Cattle Imports
On Sunday, U.S. Secretary of Agriculture Brooke Rollins [ordered a temporary pause](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGO4yAQBuCnsTsswMbEBcU16XLtlRaGIaADE8EkOG-_8mbfYKtpRr_-7_93W286xLDf_-oECg-X1x1ajYAIZTUaMUJIj1yweh0RrAeNTa-cckGoIGxcrQ7xvU69VRu1C-tBMTlJNk6M896rjV7kxYJ1I7-MnG1udgLYzECAWbQ0fVBnGBVsZIwysQxysWIx2wxGW7lR2k0UbMBcBvSAcOjq4ju_oAwmpz4qj_io3fin49eOX1trg8sHn31-Vsz7-dTx66n6HNJyiZZUU6C1XBJ5VnLayEdLfrjElZxIgiOYTJrXSP7vufVF2UcLMYY6y26i96RD_O6Bv1vvpfhXAAAA__-gY4go) on importing livestock, horses, and bison at southern border ports due to the spread of the parasitic New World Screwworm (NWS) in Mexico. Screwworm maggots feed on the flesh of live animals and even humans, and an infestation can be deadly. Over [the past two years,](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L-OszAQBPCngc7IfzB8FC6-hi7XXokWvATrlhh5NyF5-1NO9wZXjzSa33xepgskSrfrB-wY5Lnm6YYnE4pgmRYQIUz7kYvwBiQYNwQ5YbLaeqW9Mm6KkOg1tXUMs46DqTGYvu2Na4219Rbc2g99awAG623rEebOOVxW7BCd_2fqFN5l2htnjDZ-aPoh-mGZO1wg9rPWVasxJsmlkQ0Fn8ArvfIDS7PkvaawiRxcuf-VHSs7nufZrPn5Vrzzyo5HpiRp4cqOd1a83YUV57tsWG5qziViUZQeyJKXL_WrVSz5UHwUhKgiQqSXWikh1yXE40xEibu-avV1h0Q_S-Rv_z2C_Q4AAP__qZeJKA) they have been detected in increasing numbers in Mexico and Central America, prompting the U.S. to restrict cattle shipments last November. Imports were [resumed in February](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHO4yAQhJ8Gd0SA7TgpKK5x9197pbXAOqBbQwSbOH77k-_uDf5mpNFIn2bm19fyBYlSfvyEDS1_1rJk3BshM9bFAzNh2p6lcotAjCEi8A6LUWaUapS6XwIkOpahC9apcNcdWj0Nk-4HbUwXrRlcfxv7CW8Q1ID91YxqBacG791t1Ncu2ROmRt1rrfR4v0z3MN69u6KHMDmlxKAwJC71whEZP9BWOsob68WXrSMbmZ9N9D-EmYWZ932__PYunKEw88kWZlanaC3M3NBXZKiHrIUo5Sbbqz0xhyYpvVFCThuQ_D9acqzl9Yjyn8PM9ZBAJT9kKy-OWLN0pQasEtcVPZ-ItG0YEjDSIczcVRueeyJK7TqJQT02SPS3On_v8Lc1fwIAAP__NeSYkQ) after comprehensive health inspections were implemented, but the screwworm has continued to spread. It was recently detected at farms in Oaxaca and Veracruz, about 700 miles away from the border. Mexican officials [disagree with the move](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykUL0SnCAYfBrscADxlIIijd2lTel8wufJBMXhw-Pu7TNm8gZpttid2b9fz_kJIYbj9RN2tOWzpvnAShFLwTw7KCVi2M-UC20QC_oNoVSYlVA9Fz2X3ewhxO-sG28X4Y1s0MpBD7LTUqlmswa0EQ7FuPoRzcOP2o0rSL2AHDtpXBPsbSZ62UkpZG_awfjeuOWBDvywCMG0QB9Kym3ZsOAHaI3f9MbcurQ30W6lnMS6H0xNTE211vY3QblFpqblonAgEVPTHcPUJG6Qiqlpx09wiRN8iV_E6aITDwrp4GnlC-LK_03nCzq4CG-eXMZaU955IH4dK4TM1NRk688aYgz0GJgWrx1C_Nuv_N-rb6v-BAAA__-K642Z), but the Texas and Southwestern Cattle Raisers Association supports the closure. Steps to contain the screwworm include field surveillance, restrictions on animal movements, and the release of sterile flies.
## NRG Doubles Generation Capacity in $12B Deal
Houston’s NRG Energy announced yesterday it will acquire New York-based LS Power’s natural gas generation facilities and power plant platform in a $12 billion deal. The company’s stock [jumped over 26% to an all-time high](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2upDAMBeCnCV1QYsIwFCm2oZttt0QO8UCk8KPEMxnefsXu1X2BW9qfZPmcP4_xgSGGbf6NK1n-PPdxo5IjMVMaJ2SOFNZjT5wXjEx-IeSCIyhopWqlbkaPIZ6jqbx1yve6Iqs70-nGaIBqsbcJyTljOmPwTqRN14Omp78b1ytjqAr2OqZa3WitdNvXXe_bfnI3mtB3TilhFPnAe6p5IaYP5mc89zeletrXKtqF-cii-SVgEDCUUupEL6aULxcwuFcOG-UsYKCN0nwKGLY0y_-DdK9THnuhJOdrgxz2TWLOxFnG_EUapAsxXuQJo_zODwKGKll_lIvzrRNGzSuG-O85_lmlbwt_AwAA__--noyd) of $150.61 after the announcement. The acquisition doubles NRG’s generation capacity with [18 additional natural gas-fired facilities](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkMvOmzAQhZ8GdhP5RhwWLKKq7P5u_-7QYE_AkrGpPQnJ21f0Fbo9R-ei7_tr-sIQQ1p-4UYDvx95SnTUSMxUJofMkcK258J1xcjkV0I-cFJCdSA6kHryGOJnMq0fZuF72dIgrbFSG6lUuw5zf9O219bMQj-MFtrYq5uFsep2mzt5bcNwlolOaimF7PqL7X3Xu_lKDr2dhWiMIB84lwuvxPTG-oif_KJycXlr47Ay77XR90aNjRqP47hsNZ1eo0ZK8KyNGrec6NOo0eVtxxTo1FJZgBKV5QOcAd2fZygE8gYJ-VkwwoIV9nxQgT1i4gohgVQzeMJ4RiqVF4FHRnCUmEoFTB4yr1TOASxwv8ufP77V77YMfj9CjKFebWPEsmGI__7z_1F_DepvAAAA___O0JfV) across nine states. It also includes the CPower virtual power plant platform, which operates in all of the country’s deregulated energy markets. The transaction includes $6.4 billion in cash, $2.8 billion in stock, and $3.2 billion in net debt. The deal is expected to close in the [first quarter of 2026](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOgzAQRL8GOiOvwTEULq6hy7VXogUvYMlgZO_Fyd-fkl-4dmY0T3o_9-mOPvhz-8aDLD_XOJ1UciBmStOCzIH8ccXEecfA5HZCLjgpqbSQWkA7OfThNXW1s7N0A9RkwXQG2g6Uqnc7rPPstFtB9m4xutfYozG6XwFA9krW3r7PpIYWQIIeGjM4PSzzjRZ0Zpay6iQ5zzE1vBPTE_MaXvFBqVniUQe7M1-5ar8qNVZqLKU0VyyUDtzeg0qNZ9rE_Pvy5yZCFp9SbJjF6hM5cQU8OQt_ClBi9iH4eApHGCo11sm6q7yzfDNVJ7cDffhg-X-yHlb9BQAA__-hvH_C). Chief Executive Larry Coben said the deal [strengthens NRG’s credit profile and growth prospects](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkMGOrCAURL8GdxhAaeKCReflmcyiZztLc5WrkiA4cLtt_37i_MJs6ySVqvP1GB7gg4_LJ2xo6T2nIeJRAhJhHiYgCui3PWUqKwRCtyLQAYMSSnOhuWwGBz6cQ1s5OwrXyQqtNK2RTSuVqlYrzSi0FqCU0W0Dcm7NPOtGomhgBOEqb68yoWUjpZC6q03ndDeNN5zAmVEI1gp0nlKuaUXCN5Q5nOmFuZ7SVgW7Eu2FNXemeqb64zjqrcSLMdVj5M_CVL-liCdT_ZS2HaLHK4t54RgxLyenxGH6fvqMPBS-pwMzv07PKfjEfeRS8dGH4FPkDiEw1UPm97v8_098lCpbtx8XLjfDWrFs4MPvOPqb0pdVPwEAAP__xl6MKA). NRG beat analyst expectations with first-quarter profits of $750 million, or $3.61 a share, compared with $511 million, or $2.31 a share, in the same quarter last year.
## Heat Wave Could Set Records
Temperatures are expected to soar over 100 degrees across much of the state this week, [potentially setting records](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGuqzAQRVcDnZE9GAiFi9_Q5bevRAMegiWDkT2Jk90_OVt47RnN1bn35z7f0Xl3Pv7jQYbfW5hPyskTM8V5RWZP7rhC5LSjZ7I7IWecQUInZCdUO1t0_jPr2ppF2lHVZNSgB9VqBVDvRm8dabTjgj1qqxYA2vquvQ3b7UYjQO1MCZOdapWSqhubYbTduC49rWiHRcpKS7KOQ2x4J6Y3ps1_wotis4aj9mZnvlLV_qtgqmDKOTfnspYW5V4IIe8UK5iKfAUTYfQfkQhTOEVhIuOLRHbeiyW68yEirSFawXRcFJGfkZJI4cl7psTi6yDieiLIHtqhjsZe5dulfqi0fBzo_FeO_zbpy8BvAAAA__-SfI7O) for heat and electricity demand during the month of May. Austin is expected to see temperatures reach 102 degrees today, nearly two months earlier than the Texas capital has historically topped 100 degrees. Wednesday’s high in San Antonio could reach 108 degrees, and South Texas could see temperatures over 110 degrees—[hotter than the Sahara Desert](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLFugzAQhp_GbEa2wRAGD1QqW7p2RAc-YrcGI_sSkrevyCt0O_0nfXf_930dr-CD325fsKKh5xLHDY8ckAjTOANRQL_uMVF2EAitQ6ADRiWU5kJzWY0WfHiNdWHNJGwnCzSyrVtZ1VKpwhnQ-rIoba1FuFywaRtbw2QXMVdTVYmp8OaECS0rKYXUXdl2Vnfz1OAMtp2EYLVA6ymmkhwSPiEv4RUfmMo5rkUwjmjPrOqZGpgajuMo17ydO6YG3Pg9nykCOUxMDRT3TDF5PGPn3_PMz1r8gAfyw4fAV_hFnuOdHH8f5C6eQjg52Dg55BkcJOAWMyZiaoDE-15-fuw_fZGM3U-Kz03LanFbwYf3q_Q_wQ-j_gIAAP__s9KTkw) right now. Power grid operator ERCOT is forecasting peak demand of more than 84 gigawatts around 5 p.m. on Wednesday. The [record for May is 77 gigawatts](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OwyAQhJ8Gd7ZgwT8UFNe4y7VXWmvYBCQcLLyKk7c_JfcIV45G-kbz_VyWC6ac7rdv3Mjx81qWO51HJmaqi0fmTGnbS-UjYmYKkZBPXEBC38q-VXoJmPJrMU1wqwxWNeTUaEaljQJoooNpmDBouAacrB2GMBkwUo1BabWCl01yb5jslVZKqt52ow299etAHsO4SimMpJC41I4jMT3xuOZXeVDtfNma7CLzfgj9JWAWMJ_n2flYy_3dvjMhR6oCZqycfCYBM1VfuP2g2r9DD2pvNYUWpAawUnd73Jvqwn6mnNMxjMLI24Ypfzb5f6YeDn4DAAD__zc-fU4), while the all-time record is 85.5 gigawatts, set last August. ERCOT is expected to have [plenty of generation capacity](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLtyhCAUhp8GOx0uIrGgSGO3aVM6BziuZFAcOFl33z7jvkL6_zLf932bbxBT3O9fsKGl55LnHc-akAjL7IEoYdyOXKiukAjDikAnzJJL3XLdCjUHiOk1902wjodRNGiF6Y1QvZCyWa3W6MaBD06j94PDQXG3OOXQKN3DB2-ivca4FkoILvTYmTHo0bsBPQTjOGc9xxApl45WJHxCXdIrP7B0Pm9NsivRUZn6ZHJicjrPs1vy08BvpbhfESani4nJ6V1uL4QWi8_UHiX_oKeY99oUG44zphTrYFjP7xvE9H6g_3l5WPkXAAD__y0FeaQ) and has not issued a Weather Watch at this time.

Now I'm running for Governor of my home state - not to join the broken system, but to fundamentally change it.
But here's a hard truth: **[I need your help. We 're just days away from my May mid-month fundraising deadline and still short of our critical 5,000 donor goal.](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-9iCEPXwnkbW7VvO7IZQdQ)**

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 5/13/2025
body:
Pueblo D70 Schools handed kids’ emotional data to political NGOs without parental consent
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi folks!
Listen to today's **Mountain Minute Podcast** [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)! Here is a summary of today's top stories:
**🏛️ Colorado Legislative Session Updates...** ICYMI, here's our [full breakdown](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) of 2025 Legislative Session. We'll continue to keep you updated as Polis signs (or vetos) bills in the coming weeks!
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** In Pueblo’s D70 school district, emotional data from students was handed to political nonprofits—[without parental consent](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). In La Plata County, a [special election looms](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) as LPEA members express outrage over rising rates and questionable board spending.
Denver’s school superintendent is under fire after [delaying school closures](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), while Teller County’s commissioners have formally [backed lawsuits against Colorado](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) over gun and immigration laws. And with the legislative session over, the [2026 races are already heating up](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), with nearly every statewide office wide open—and both parties scrambling to shape the next chapter.
🇺🇸 **On the National Stage...** President Trump announced an executive order to [slash drug prices](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) by up to 80%, linking U.S. costs to the lowest global rates. The U.S. and China also agreed to a [90-day truce](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), cutting tariffs and restarting trade talks. And after 583 days in captivity, Hamas released the [last living American hostage](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), Edan Alexander, following high-level negotiations.
**🗣️ Commentary Spotlight...** Jon Caldara slams [“The Polis Process”](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) as a political balancing act that erodes liberty while avoiding accountability. With Polis eyeing higher office, Caldara urges Coloradans to demand real leadership—not more spin.
This is the Mountain Minute for Tuesday, May 13, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Notarfrancesco: Pueblo D70 Schools handed kids’ emotional data to political NGOs without parental consent](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY KELLY NOTARFRANCESCO, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
It is said there is no such thing as a free lunch. One small school district in Pueblo, Colorado, recently learned that a free lunch can be served with a side of community outrage.
When the Pueblo D70 Board of Education unanimously voted in March of 2024 to “accept” a significant in-kind gift of $700,000 from the organization TRAILS (Transforming Research into Action to Improve the Lives of Students), did they realize what they were implementing in district classrooms?
D70 accepted a “gift” of controversial psychosocial educational content, financed and promoted by multi-million-dollar non-governmental organizations dedicated to transforming the world through social change.
The “gift” unanimously accepted by the D70 Board of Education on March 5, 2024, prompted Pueblo D70 Superintendent Rhonda Rein to implement the TRAILS Social Emotional Learning (SEL) curriculum based on Collaborative for Academic, Social, and Emotional Learning (CASEL) standards throughout the district’s K-12 classrooms.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**

**[LPEA special election: Mail ballots due by May 20 as member frustrations grow](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* With four contested seats, LPEA’s board election is heating up. Members must return mail ballots by 4 p.m. on May 20 or vote online via SmartHub.
* Frustrations are mounting over rising rates, a $209M buyout from Tri-State, and a power deal with Swiss-based Mercuria. Critics say LPEA has strayed from its promise of local control.
* Net income is down over 60% since 2019, while executive pay and consulting costs rise. Members question where their money is going—and how leadership is steering the co-op’s future.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|

**[DPS Superintendent Marrero delayed closure list before bond vote—used September data anyway](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [DENVER GAZETTE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Denver Public Schools Superintendent Alex Marrero delayed releasing a school closure list, claiming he needed October enrollment data. However, internal documents revealed the district used September data, raising questions about the accuracy of his justification.
* The delayed closure list was presented just days after voters approved a nearly $1 billion bond measure. Critics suggest the delay was politically motivated to avoid jeopardizing the bond’s success, undermining public trust.
* The district excluded over 8,000 students—including 3,300 recent immigrants and 5,000 preschoolers—from public enrollment figures. A lawsuit argues this skewed data was used to justify closures and concealed the real impact on vulnerable communities.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**

__
**[Devotional: The Breastplate of Righteousness – Character that Covers the Heart](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY DRAKE HUNTER | COMMENTARY | MAY 11** _In our previous devotional, we explored righteousness as God’s unwavering standard for building just and right “equable” relationships—between us and God, and with all creation. Righteousness, in simple terms, is doing what is right in God’s eyes._
__
**[GOP Chair Horn: President Trump delivered in 100 days – now Colorado Conservatives must lead the charge](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY BRITA HORN | COMMENTARY | MAY 10** _"We will close the border. We will stop the invasion of illegals into our country,” President Trump said at an Aurora, Colorado, rally on October 12, 2024. That promise was central to his push for a second term. Now, just over 100 days in, he’s delivering – tightening the border and reversing years of neglect._ __

clean_body: Pueblo D70 Schools handed kids’ emotional data to political NGOs without parental consent | | | | PRESENTED BY | | Hi folks! Listen to today's Mountain Minute Podcast , or watch on or ! Here is a summary of today's top stories: 🏛️ Colorado Legislative Session Updates... ICYMI, here's our of 2025 Legislative Session. We'll continue to keep you updated as Polis signs (or vetos) bills in the coming weeks! 🏔️ Here in Colorado... In Pueblo’s D70 school district, emotional data from students was handed to political nonprofits—. In La Plata County, a as LPEA members express outrage over rising rates and questionable board spending. Denver’s school superintendent is under fire after , while Teller County’s commissioners have formally over gun and immigration laws. And with the legislative session over, the , with nearly every statewide office wide open—and both parties scrambling to shape the next chapter. 🇺🇸 On the National Stage... President Trump announced an executive order to by up to 80%, linking U.S. costs to the lowest global rates. The U.S. and China also agreed to a , cutting tariffs and restarting trade talks. And after 583 days in captivity, Hamas released the , Edan Alexander, following high-level negotiations. 🗣️ Commentary Spotlight... Jon Caldara slams as a political balancing act that erodes liberty while avoiding accountability. With Polis eyeing higher office, Caldara urges Coloradans to demand real leadership—not more spin. This is the Mountain Minute for Tuesday, May 13, 2025. – Team RMV | TODAY'S TOP STORIES BY KELLY NOTARFRANCESCO, It is said there is no such thing as a free lunch. One small school district in Pueblo, Colorado, recently learned that a free lunch can be served with a side of community outrage. When the Pueblo D70 Board of Education unanimously voted in March of 2024 to “accept” a significant in-kind gift of $700,000 from the organization TRAILS (Transforming Research into Action to Improve the Lives of Students), did they realize what they were implementing in district classrooms? D70 accepted a “gift” of controversial psychosocial educational content, financed and promoted by multi-million-dollar non-governmental organizations dedicated to transforming the world through social change. The “gift” unanimously accepted by the D70 Board of Education on March 5, 2024, prompted Pueblo D70 Superintendent Rhonda Rein to implement the TRAILS Social Emotional Learning (SEL) curriculum based on Collaborative for Academic, Social, and Emotional Learning (CASEL) standards throughout the district’s K-12 classrooms. | The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support! | With four contested seats, LPEA’s board election is heating up. Members must return mail ballots by 4 p.m. on May 20 or vote online via SmartHub. Frustrations are mounting over rising rates, a $209M buyout from Tri-State, and a power deal with Swiss-based Mercuria. Critics say LPEA has strayed from its promise of local control. Net income is down over 60% since 2019, while executive pay and consulting costs rise. Members question where their money is going—and how leadership is steering the co-op’s future. | | Denver Public Schools Superintendent Alex Marrero delayed releasing a school closure list, claiming he needed October enrollment data. However, internal documents revealed the district used September data, raising questions about the accuracy of his justification. The delayed closure list was presented just days after voters approved a nearly $1 billion bond measure. Critics suggest the delay was politically motivated to avoid jeopardizing the bond’s success, undermining public trust. The district excluded over 8,000 students—including 3,300 recent immigrants and 5,000 preschoolers—from public enrollment figures. A lawsuit argues this skewed data was used to justify closures and concealed the real impact on vulnerable communities. | ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ RMV EDITORIAL BOARD| COMMENTARY | MAY 11 The 2025 legislative session officially adjourned Wednesday evening after 120 days, leaving behind a flood of new laws, deep partisan divides, and a public increasingly skeptical of the pace and priorities of progressive lawmakers. DRAKE HUNTER | COMMENTARY | MAY 11 In our previous devotional, we explored righteousness as God’s unwavering standard for building just and right “equable” relationships—between us and God, and with all creation. Righteousness, in simple terms, is doing what is right in God’s eyes. BRITA HORN | COMMENTARY | MAY 10 "We will close the border. We will stop the invasion of illegals into our country,” President Trump said at an Aurora, Colorado, rally on October 12, 2024. That promise was central to his push for a second term. Now, just over 100 days in, he’s delivering – tightening the border and reversing years of neglect. __ Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share? We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\)) or send us a message on social media to chat! | | 🐾 DID YOU KNOW? Luna and Milo topped the charts as the most popular dog names of 2024, according to the American Kennel Club. Luna led for female dogs, with Bella close behind, while Milo took the top spot for males, followed by Max. Looks like Fido and Spot are officially old school! | CARTOON OF THE DAY | QUOTE OF THE DAY "Republicans believe every day is the Fourth of July, but the Democrats believe every day is April 15." – Ronald Reagan | | | | ---|---|--- Did a friend forward you this email? | A product of Rocky Mountain Voice, Inc. 8200 S Quebec St, STE A3601 Centennial, CO 80112 This message was originally sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com Be sure to put “RockyMountainVoice.com” on your safe-senders whitelist. # The Queen Accepts Her Crown
---
| |
---
| Perennial Tyranny Squad member Representative Donna Howard, a long-time **thorn in the side of TFVC** and a vocal barrier to the achievement of our goals, tried valiantly to pass a thinly veiled HPV vaccine bill through the House. Her hope was that we - YOU - wouldn’t notice that she was **asking for state agencies to promote and push Gardasil** on college campuses, a move that would easily evolve into a college mandate. But we are **always vigilant and worked tirelessly** to get the message out to our Representatives to vote NO when this bill hit the House floor on Thursday. But instead of putting the bill up for a vote, Rep. Howard chose to give an impassioned **speech about how effective TFVC has been** in the fight for medical liberty. Her first words were to accept her crown as the **“Reigning Queen of the Tyranny Squad,”** after which she waved our legislative one-pager around and complained about the onslaught of opposition emails and phone calls received by legislators. She concluded by nuking her bill by postponing it until after Legislative Session ends. **We thought it would be enough to kill HB 1787, but the real crowning achievement was the eulogy!**

---
|
