clean_body: | | | | | The Queen Accepts Her Crown | | | Perennial Tyranny Squad member Representative Donna Howard, a long-time thorn in the side of TFVC and a vocal barrier to the achievement of our goals, tried valiantly to pass a thinly veiled HPV vaccine bill through the House. Her hope was that we - YOU - wouldn’t notice that she was asking for state agencies to promote and push Gardasil on college campuses, a move that would easily evolve into a college mandate. But we are always vigilant and worked tirelessly to get the message out to our Representatives to vote NO when this bill hit the House floor on Thursday. But instead of putting the bill up for a vote, Rep. Howard chose to give an impassioned speech about how effective TFVC has been in the fight for medical liberty. Her first words were to accept her crown as the “Reigning Queen of the Tyranny Squad,” after which she waved our legislative one-pager around and complained about the onslaught of opposition emails and phone calls received by legislators. She concluded by nuking her bill by postponing it until after Legislative Session ends. We thought it would be enough to kill HB 1787, but the real crowning achievement was the eulogy! | | | | | | News | | | | | | Action Alert: Yes on SB 315 | SB 315 (Kolkhorst / Harris Davila) would establish that Texans have a property right for their DNA, making it illegal to alter or modify someone’s DNA without their consent and is being heard in the House TWEC Committee on Wednesday, May 14. | | | | | | ICYMI: Shot Callers | Hear from the filmmakers and the injured themselves behind the award-winning documentary Follow the Silenced , in a gripping conversation about truth in the face of corruption, the fight for accountability, and what justice truly means. | | | | | | Baby on the Way? | If you have a loved one with a baby on the way and have struggled to have ‘the talk’ with them about vaccine safety and exemptions, let Team TFVC do the heavy lifting by sending our ! | | | Upcoming Events | There are only a handful of VIP tickets for the of Follow the Silenced remaining. If you can't make it, we'd love to have you join us at a Watch Party at a location near you! All Watch Parties are free to attend. | | | | | | | | Committee Hearings | Two good bills were heard last week! | | | | | | | | | | | | TFVC In Action | | | | | | Capitol Lobby Day | Texans for Vaccine Choice filled legislator hallways at last week’s Capitol Lobby Day — championing informed consent, defending medical freedom, and demanding that every voice be heard. This is what grassroots courage looks like! | | | | Hamilton County | TFVC OC Amy shared her passion for medical liberty by providing legislative updates and vaccine safety information at the recent Hamilton County Republican Party meeting—sparking great conversations and strong support from attendees. Thank you, Amy! | | | | | Texans for Vaccine Choice 1540 Keller Parkway Ste 108 #166, Keller, TX 76248 United States | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- | You are receiving this email because you donated or signed up. |

name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: Trump to get $400 million airplane from Qatar as "gift." Demand he reject this unconstitutional bribe
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Trump to get $400 million airplane from Qatar as "gift." Demand he reject this unconstitutional bribe](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5f24682a-9f42-4186-a839-f3ec24449a69/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5c064d0a-b467-4cef-9d9e-4281da87e26a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | The ruling royal family of Qatar is gifting Donald Trump a super-luxury jet described as a "palace in the sky", and worth hundreds of millions of dollars. This is a blindingly obvious violation of the emoluments clause of the Constitution, which forbids such gifts, a naked attempt to curry favor with Trump, and there is no way he should be able to get away with this. [_**Demand that Trump reverse himself and reject this bribe NOW.**_](https://default.salsalabs.org/T41e6d61c-d24b-41fa-ba1e-597f09fe7d71/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) The plan calls for Trump to use this plane as Air Force One while president, and then take it with him when he leaves, as a "donation" to the Trump Library fund -- meaning he gets to keep it and use it for the rest of his life. This is a truly awful idea in so many ways. It violates the Constitution, the optics are terrible (every other country will wonder if they must also send supersized bribes to be treated equally), and it will cost the US government hundreds of millions more to take it apart to scan for surveillance devices, check the integrity of the plane, and upgrade the security to Air Force One standards. This is not normal, and we should not accept it as such. Trump gets a nearly half-billion dollar gift, the rest of us have to pay a fortune, and the Constitution is once again ripped to pieces by the man who took an oath to defend it. [_**Add your name: Demand that Trump reject this bribe NOW.**_](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2b4f4f8f-efe6-46c4-8cc5-672588a0cefa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: Friend – I’m counting on you right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
I was legally barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign

| | | [](http://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2za7di8hs6pd6891g2fp6va8c37m5ordcrvmfo54o_rp22sh2s8i6eob7chim4p72c5h2bs)
---
My situation is in your hands, Friend. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. _Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so _please_ read this message to the end._ My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. **But right now I have a few _SERIOUS_ challenges:**
---
**I was _legally_ barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session.** But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has been fundraising **_BIG TIME_** while I've been working hard in our capital. **Seriously,_a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response!_**
---
Now Spanberger has an _ENORMOUS_ fundraising advantage, Friend. Polls show this race is tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage. _If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission _will_ be cut short._ **Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; _please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign!_**
---
[ **DONATE TO SUPPORT WINSOME >>**](http://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z1mdpt9rs3sinjtpblponljnj0412uhkil1bbsa8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7chim4p72c5h2bs)
---
Without your support, we will fall even _further_ behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and our Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism!I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think it was worth it. And Friend, I **know** we will win if we hold strong and fight this battle together. __[_**I 'm not asking you to cut a big check, all I'm asking is that you send in a few dollars to help support me and my team in this crucial battle!**_](http://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zi00le5g2idd3d65kvs39sb6jaj65r35cua1cj20_rp22sh2s8i6eob7chim4p72c5h2bs "I’m not asking you to cut a big check, all I’m asking is that you send in a few dollars to help support me and my team in this crucial battle!")

clean_body: I was legally barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign | | | My situation is in your hands, Friend. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so please read this message to the end. My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. But right now I have a few SERIOUS challenges: I was legally barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session. But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has been fundraising BIG TIME while I've been working hard in our capital. Seriously,a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response! Now Spanberger has an ENORMOUS fundraising advantage, Friend. Polls show this race is tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage. If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission will be cut short. Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign! Without your support, we will fall even further behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and our Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism!I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think it was worth it. And Friend, I know we will win if we hold strong and fight this battle together. "I’m not asking you to cut a big check, all I’m asking is that you send in a few dollars to help support me and my team in this crucial battle!" If you can't afford to keep fighting for the future of our Commonwealth, our children, and our nation, "please keep me and my team in your prayers and add your endorsement today:" I am asking you from the bottom of my heart; please stick with me and help us keep the conservative movement thriving! Ever Forward,Lt. Governor Winsome Sears Immigrant Marine First black female Lt. Governor of VA | I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, Republican candidate running for Governor of Virginia. I broke records as the first black female Lieutenant Governor in Virginia, but my mission isn't over yet! name: Elizabeth Nader
subject: It’s 29 days away - have you made your plan?
body:
Peter, 29 days. That’s all the time we have left before the critical New Jersey Primary Election on June 10th. THIS Primary will determine if lemons
| | [ ]()
---
Peter, **29 days.** That’s all the time we have left before the critical New Jersey Primary Election on June 10th. THIS Primary will determine if _lemons_ or Common Sense candidates make it on our November ballots. This election is really half the ballgame when it comes to whether we take back Trenton from Leftist Lunatics in 2025. So I’m going to keep this short, sweet, and to the point. Your vote is _essential._ And voting EARLY couldn’t be more important this year. We cannot afford to leave it all til Election Day.
---
[ **PLEDGE to Vote in the June 10th Primary** ](https://xtz223.keap-link013.com/v2/click/3118abb7e3c5aff89484f2a52dc9827a/eJyNj8EKgkAQQP9lzqK4pZA3ERHRPESdQ3SgJd1d1jEz8d9bKzwVdJ1584Y3AaEoBaU1BHCnB2MbsEBjxRVHQZEUVFavLfO27sa1oOHimmjZKwimr8crsIy9ne9bQKNCgxwPYZSlRXLO0yIzpCq1-fGfx2Ns9cT7MM1hnn-KseUU34y7g4B0j0tRzU0VnXRj-AuRChxnGAZbCmyw6xpspbAr2Tom1xhKpVDUn_wMx7dnfgKBgGMp)
---
There are two ways to vote early. Choose the one that works best for your schedule and lifestyle.
* **1) Early In-Person (my personal preference!):**
* **When?** Tuesday, June 3, 2025 – Sunday, June 8, 2025
* **Times?** Tuesday-Saturday, 10:00 a.m.–8:00 p.m. and Sunday, 10:00 a.m.–6:00 p.m.
* **Do I need an appointment?** No appointment is necessary!
* **Where?** Details and locations by county [here.](https://xtz223.keap-link013.com/v2/click/f54b0e18d65c3d3c41c20bb369c688ae/eJyNkMGKAjEMht8l59Fi3Vl25yYiMozrQdazFCdotaaljcOOMu9udMWTgreQfPnCnzMwkiEuayjgj09aDyGDiGsbLBKPPbFZ36Y6_xgMBxk4S_tp9McAxfnp8gO4tvPvz68MuA0oyO9iNK7K-XQ1K-eVkMFEufGeJ9f64Zn8jMoZdN1LMR4sTxpxJyg4HvGaqLaSipfRCb9lDqlQinb9jW9UYsOo0Mncekqq8Yw9NNG1PSktbfppywcnYhMCUn3_SoXtv767ANvkbAs=)
* **2) By Mail:**
* **When?** Mail your application by June 3 or drop it off in-person by June 9 at 3 p.m.
* **Where do I get the application?** Get your application [here. ](https://xtz223.keap-link013.com/v2/click/957034a0384663f1b1eb8701ea07e582/eJyNkEFvwjAMhf-Ldy0NhFVovSGEUFXGAY3zlLUWZEuTKDHtCup_n2ETpyFxtN_n9_R8BkKrLBU15PBNJymnkEDASnuNlhbOkqquqsyeJ9NJAkbbr1VwRw_5-d_jG3BZZy-zcQLUe2TkbTtflMVm9b4uNiWTXgXOeMwnk_Lms3ydF2sYhrvG2GhatuwdIadwxEujWnMr2gXD_IHIx1yIrutS-5nuXSsiKUKBhhntbBStIxx99KNGaZPGAzXmSXlvdKWuOofwiLb--1CJ_W_U8AMDYXCL)

Together, we’re going to SAVE New Jersey from Left Wing Lunacy. But it only happens if we show up and VOTE. Counting on you. Let’s go! For New Jersey, Elizabeth Nader
---

Hello, and thank you for taking the time to read this email. This message is part of an ongoing conversation between us, and I want to take a moment to ensure you have full transparency about why you received this message, how your information is handled, and what to expect from future emails. Why You’re Receiving This Email You’re receiving this email because at some point, you opted in to receive updates, news, or information on a specific topic we’ve previously discussed or shared. Whether it was through a subscription, a form submission, or another form of communication, your information was shared willingly, and we respect your decision to connect with us. If you’re wondering about the nature of our correspondence, rest assured that we aim to keep all emails relevant, timely, and free from unnecessary clutter. This includes respecting your inbox and refraining from sending irrelevant messages. Your Privacy is Important We value your trust and take your privacy very seriously. The information you provide is securely stored and never shared, sold, or used outside the purpose for which you provided it. If you ever want to review how we handle your data, feel free to contact us directly. Transparency is our priority, and we’re happy to address any questions you might have. You are always in control of the information you share. If you feel that any part of your subscription or interaction needs clarification, let us know. We’re here to provide accurate answers and ensure your satisfaction. How to Unsubscribe or Manage Your Preferences We understand that everyone’s inbox is different. If you ever find our emails no longer relevant, there’s no hard feelings. You can easily manage your email preferences or unsubscribe using the link provided below. By clicking the unsubscribe link, you’ll be taken to a page where you can either adjust your communication preferences (such as receiving fewer emails or only on specific topics) or completely remove yourself from our list. The process is straightforward, and any changes will take effect promptly. We don’t use tricks or gimmicks to keep you subscribed. Our priority is to ensure that our emails add value to your day, and if they don’t, we respect your decision to part ways. Accessibility and Communication If you have any trouble accessing the unsubscribe page, managing preferences, or understanding why you’re receiving this email, you can reach out directly to our support team at info@commonsense.org. We aim to provide a response within a reasonable time frame and address your concerns effectively. Our communication is designed to be as inclusive as possible, but we know there’s always room for improvement. If you have any feedback on how we can make our emails more accessible or relevant, please don’t hesitate to share. A Commitment to Non-Intrusive Emails We aim to create a non-intrusive communication experience. This means we won’t overwhelm your inbox with excessive messages, and we work hard to ensure our content remains clear and concise. The purpose of this email is to stay connected with you and provide updates or information that we believe is meaningful. If we ever fail to meet these standards, we encourage you to let us know. Feedback, whether positive or constructive, is always appreciated. Your thoughts help us understand how we can do better and improve our communication approach. While we cannot guarantee every suggestion will be implemented, we will take the time to carefully review and consider your input. Contact Information If you’d like to get in touch with us outside of managing your preferences, here’s how you can reach us: Email: info@commonsense.org
Phone: (866) 916-3221 (please note this is a text-only line)
Mailing Address:
Common Sense Club
165 Route 35
Red Bank, New Jersey, 07701 We strive to ensure all communication channels are open and readily available to you. Whether it’s a question, comment, or concern, our team is ready to assist. Legal Information We comply with all applicable laws and regulations regarding email communication. This includes adhering to anti-spam laws and maintaining the highest standards for consent-based communication. Your trust matters, and we work diligently to ensure every email you receive meets these requirements. If you need further clarification on our compliance policies or legal obligations, please feel free to ask. Transparency and accountability are central to our communication strategy, and we’re happy to provide additional details if needed. A Final Note Emails are one of the many ways we stay connected, but we understand they aren’t perfect for everyone. If there’s another way you’d prefer to communicate or stay updated, let us know. Dear Peter,

As Glen Casada's trial continues, we see more evidence of the corruption that has plagued our state leadership for far too long. The “Casada Corruption Circus” is not just a trial; it’s a clarion call for all of us who care about the future of Tennessee.

We are on a mission to ensure that these alarming issues do not go unnoticed, but we cannot do it without your help.

[ Will you consider making a donation of $50, $100, or any amount that feels right for you? ](http://email.email.ourtenn.org/c/eJxMz71OwzAUxfGnsTdXyXW-GDykbSIhIAyFDiyRa98Qq6kdxTdBvD0qA2I9OsP_ZxVUaGTBUaVlVqZ5XhUZH5WurH0Y0JSFKbPBpDKVVZLkCNVwsZADd0obcpsmF7yYTzPFj65NxV4eDsW1Gl9FOO-bibSP4tSctyuM_p1libZbMNp8a7cz4cYnNRLNkcmaQcugjWjWBXfa0GVa8X5h0NrgNSGDNqyLIPQeY0QUw0rrgmLWRqRMtgsOJlhk8vjWdF3fvPSH-lQfawY5JNA_P3ZPfFF2_nLT5GJRsiz5vGk3_XbQfw3eZ07qz8I3BT8BAAD__zieX4U)Your contribution will support our outreach efforts, helping us to inform and mobilize voters across Tennessee.

Imagine the impact we can have together—accountability is just a donation away. With your support, we’ll ensure that every Tennessee voter knows the truth and the pressing need for reform.

Thank you for investing in a transparent and accountable government.

With gratitude,
Chris Mudock
Our Tennessee Future PAC

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: Friend – I’m counting on you right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
I was legally barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign

| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zq55nombbf888pedi7b4vbmiq64l11527h4ilcvg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7chimco72cph2bs)
---
My situation is in your hands, Friend. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. _Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so _please_ read this message to the end._ My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. **But right now I have a few _SERIOUS_ challenges:**
---
**I was _legally_ barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session.** But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has been fundraising **_BIG TIME_** while I've been working hard in our capital. **Seriously,_a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response!_**
---
Now Spanberger has an _ENORMOUS_ fundraising advantage, Friend. Polls show this race is tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage. _If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission _will_ be cut short._ **Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; _please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign!_**
---
[ **DONATE TO SUPPORT WINSOME >>**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ziakhcnavue62h1b1ujg986djau8ii3ienopg9o8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7chimco72cph2bs)
---
Without your support, we will fall even _further_ behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and our Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism!I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think it was worth it. clean_body: I was legally barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign | | | My situation is in your hands, Friend. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so please read this message to the end. My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. But right now I have a few SERIOUS challenges: I was legally barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session. But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has been fundraising BIG TIME while I've been working hard in our capital. Seriously,a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response! Now Spanberger has an ENORMOUS fundraising advantage, Friend. Polls show this race is tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage. If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission will be cut short. Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign! Without your support, we will fall even further behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and our Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism!I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think it was worth it. And Friend, I know we will win if we hold strong and fight this battle together. "I’m not asking you to cut a big check, all I’m asking is that you send in a few dollars to help support me and my team in this crucial battle!" If you can't afford to keep fighting for the future of our Commonwealth, our children, and our nation, "please keep me and my team in your prayers and add your endorsement today:" I am asking you from the bottom of my heart; please stick with me and help us keep the conservative movement thriving! Ever Forward,Lt. Governor Winsome Sears Immigrant Marine First black female Lt. Governor of VA | I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, Republican candidate running for Governor of Virginia. I broke records as the first black female Lieutenant Governor in Virginia, but my mission isn't over yet! It's going to take all of us conservatives working together to win. | | | | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Military disclaimer: Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. Charlie Kirk **[shut down a very disrespectful student](https://substack.com/redirect/247d7d89-e315-42ba-ad8d-b70a27b0abde?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** who walked up to the microphone and immediately insulted Kirk and members of President Trump's team during a Turning Point USA campus event.
**[Kirk had to put him in his place...](https://substack.com/redirect/247d7d89-e315-42ba-ad8d-b70a27b0abde?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/247d7d89-e315-42ba-ad8d-b70a27b0abde?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/247d7d89-e315-42ba-ad8d-b70a27b0abde?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"My question to you is, why are you so hypocritical in the way that you look at Trump and Biden?" the student asked Kirk. "Every time he announces a tariff the economy tanks,..."
"The stock market or the economy?" Kirk asked for clarification. **["The stock market is back up to even before the tariff announcement." ](https://substack.com/redirect/247d7d89-e315-42ba-ad8d-b70a27b0abde?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
"That's because he took away the tariffs,... Elon Musk isn't even on T.V. any more because he lost trillions in Tesla," the student alleged.
Kirk happily set the record straight, noting that Elon Musk appeared at a cabinet meeting just last week wearing several MAGA hats. "Did you see that? He said 'I wear many hats'" Kirk told the student.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/b2337886-a9c6-4388-add4-58e2a91f8cd6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**["Pete Hegseth is a moron!"](https://substack.com/redirect/247d7d89-e315-42ba-ad8d-b70a27b0abde?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** the student jumped topics to insult the Secretary of Defense.
"Hold on, let's pause at that," Kirk halted the student. "Is military recruitment up? Yes it is. Is military moral up? Military wargames up? So you called Pete Hegseth a moron but more people want to join our military and are happier fighting in our military with Pete Hegseth as Secretary of Defense. So that's really weird, why is he a moron exactly?"
Kirk continued to scorch the student for his comment, "You know that he served in the U.S. Military" Is that how you talk to veterans? You call them morons?!"
The student answered back, "No! and don't say that I do!"
Watch the fiery confrontation:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/247d7d89-e315-42ba-ad8d-b70a27b0abde?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

Rep. Nancy Mace **[got angry at a Democrat witness](https://substack.com/redirect/9769b199-4a4a-42d6-965d-4754f5ad374b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** who could not give a real answer when asked "what is a woman?" during a DOGE Committee hearing on the inclusion of transgender athletes in women's sports.
_**["You say you're here to defend women, shouldn't you be able to define one?!!" ](https://substack.com/redirect/9769b199-4a4a-42d6-965d-4754f5ad374b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_

body:
I’m running for the U.S. Senate in Georgia because President Trump needs backup and Jon Ossoff is AWOL The Federal Election Commission's filing deadline for the runoff is tomorrow ... we have LESS THAN 24 HOURS TO HIT OUR FUNDRAISING GOAL |
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=9fe1d85cf4a04bd4b2c70261187d485d&_e=xW9svY9NEVBUFp3i9RmrztmictukmLZuwSVglNeYEGk366wrh22hGEqj3KjSWsw7okuqJUsf8gIGrWxmS2sl2JTEM-G533n_Ceb7ll10QbMSsbJJkGiFFAsw0Di58EyHLr3s9xwocCsPUzM-feu2lu8_n4UI0i5KrvQ1732vOh6Xrpg02Mwy__qA1ukGIejr9XremBoIiKKaWhNhLFW6e6kGTFrJujCLj__UGiqPPc-6VdB5Z9bNUOw8ipTng8ds1rfxGm1LQWgJzFq7Fb9psl8NLZ7etUS-5F0IZEC8nJNPCn0dMbOduJ8g_L3u545iaLdBsicuZJDapg_NQd0B5Ts_iLuIZ_mRnYu-MEJGw8Gamc1R5Ggxuz-DwfKJfMUVmvby__e_6uQtu3hAg8QxWXChJ8ekqgcaApJ5igOsclg%3D)

Fellow Conservative, my name is John King.

[**I'm running for the U.S. Senate in Georgia because President Trump needs backup and Jon Ossoff is AWOL - I’m asking you to help me defeat him.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=9fe1d85cf4a04bd4b2c70261187d485d&_e=xW9svY9NEVBUFp3i9RmrztmictukmLZuwSVglNeYEGk366wrh22hGEqj3KjSWsw7okuqJUsf8gIGrWxmS2sl2JTEM-G533n_Ceb7ll10QbMSsbJJkGiFFAsw0Di58EyHLr3s9xwocCsPUzM-feu2lu8_n4UI0i5KrvQ1732vOh6Xrpg02Mwy__qA1ukGIejr9XremBoIiKKaWhNhLFW6e6kGTFrJujCLj__UGiqPPc-6VdB5Z9bNUOw8ipTng8dsd7laBAS_kMgSMu4hoiIYAlkJihfaXUbPPScwlUeDPC7bxMyEj7RPU2NBsyZD1TsmeRMiibBYQdPjJJGx3jD25Ec2DqFIHHTo_emyTJDo2Gbb-u_f5yFrA5x6wffD-IjRWXUfDY4IWR8TLZvIcmlwiX_IlfSH9yf2l9M8HZcVvpk%3D)

**Let me tell you more about myself.**

**I was born and raised in Mexico.** I came to America when I was 17. My story is only possible in this country.

**I enlisted in the Army as a private and retired as a two-star major general.** I deployed to Afghanistan, Iraq, Bosnia, Africa, and our southern border.

**I joined the Atlanta police as a beat cop and became a police chief.** I’ve locked up drug dealers, deported criminals here illegally, and I was shot in the line of duty.

[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=9fe1d85cf4a04bd4b2c70261187d485d&_e=xW9svY9NEVBUFp3i9RmrztmictukmLZuwSVglNeYEGk366wrh22hGEqj3KjSWsw7okuqJUsf8gIGrWxmS2sl2JTEM-G533n_Ceb7ll10QbMSsbJJkGiFFAsw0Di58EyHLr3s9xwocCsPUzM-feu2lu8_n4UI0i5KrvQ1732vOh6Xrpg02Mwy__qA1ukGIejr9XremBoIiKKaWhNhLFW6e6kGTFrJujCLj__UGiqPPc-6VdB5Z9bNUOw8ipTng8ds8BKV1tLebeWGA2OwPvl0zi9CEH897DJh62KopktTS_uAd1Dt5mIp6Fgj11DDoIgZAz5YlDML5XjP95rk-X3lIGv53fmo0E2304H3jd5L17KuhrvY_xzLpvS-J28KlKzIHF1taFWsaAlD2b9qi3PmKWH0xDKe7vb7OD0MqD8J8tI%3D)

Let me tell you more about myself. I was born and raised in Mexico. I came to America when I was 17. My story is only possible in this country. I enlisted in the Army as a private and retired as a two-star major general. I deployed to Afghanistan, Iraq, Bosnia, Africa, and our southern border. I joined the Atlanta police as a beat cop and became a police chief. I’ve locked up drug dealers, deported criminals here illegally, and I was shot in the line of duty. I'm proud to support President Trump. I co-chaired his Georgia campaign in 2020, spoke at rallies in 2024, and turned out Latinos to support Republicans across the state. body:
I know you get a lot of emails from me. But I want to take a few minutes to tell you about my decision to run for governor, and why your support is so critical to our success.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107599212/545211306/18178104?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-05-13_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTFlZWRhNDMtZmMyZi1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Onj48tG1DNmMGenC0sOy4YuTElvFX2AMRn94VQSHrGE=)

Peter —

I know you get a lot of emails from me. But I want to take a few minutes to tell you about my decision to run for governor, and why your support is so critical to our success.

**I was raised to believe that we have an obligation to our community and our country.** This country gave my family so much, and it’s always been obvious to me that I wanted to dedicate my life to public service.

It’s why I took my first oath to the Constitution as a teenager when I entered the Naval Academy.

It’s why I spent nearly a decade in the Navy as a helicopter pilot and Russian policy officer.

It’s why I went to law school, and became an Outreach and Reentry Coordinator and a federal prosecutor.

**Peter, it’s why I first decided to run for office.**

In 2017, I watched Donald Trump attack every value that I had spent my life fighting for. And as I thought about it, I realized I couldn’t ask someone to do my fighting for me – that if I wanted to defend the country I love then I had to run toward the crisis.

It was a long shot to run as a nobody in a district that had been held by an entrenched Republican for more than two decades.

**But I knew what was at stake and I knew what I had to do.**

I’m proud of the work I’ve done in Congress — work that earned me the distinction of being named the most effective member of the New Jersey House delegation in just my second term.

**But I know I can do more as your governor. And that’s why I decided to run.**

By winning this seat, we can build more homes to reduce mortgage and rental costs, crack down on shady middlemen making prescription medications more expensive, and bring down utility costs by bringing more clean, cheap power like solar onto the grid.

But the truth is that this is already the most expensive New Jersey gubernatorial race on record. And our opponents are benefiting from millions of dollars in spending from outside entities. So I am asking:

[_**Will you consider splitting $25 or whatever you can between my campaign and Abigail Spanberger as I head into the final stretch before the June 10 election?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107599213/545211307/18178104?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-05-13_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTFlZWRhNDMtZmMyZi1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Onj48tG1DNmMGenC0sOy4YuTElvFX2AMRn94VQSHrGE=)

clean_body: I know you get a lot of emails from me. But I want to take a few minutes to tell you about my decision to run for governor, and why your support is so critical to our success. | = Peter — I know you get a lot of emails from me. But I want to take a few minutes to tell you about my decision to run for governor, and why your support is so critical to our success. I was raised to believe that we have an obligation to our community and our country. This country gave my family so much, and it’s always been obvious to me that I wanted to dedicate my life to public service. It’s why I took my first oath to the Constitution as a teenager when I entered the Naval Academy. It’s why I spent nearly a decade in the Navy as a helicopter pilot and Russian policy officer. It’s why I went to law school, and became an Outreach and Reentry Coordinator and a federal prosecutor. Peter, it’s why I first decided to run for office. In 2017, I watched Donald Trump attack every value that I had spent my life fighting for. And as I thought about it, I realized I couldn’t ask someone to do my fighting for me – that if I wanted to defend the country I love then I had to run toward the crisis. It was a long shot to run as a nobody in a district that had been held by an entrenched Republican for more than two decades. But I knew what was at stake and I knew what I had to do. I’m proud of the work I’ve done in Congress — work that earned me the distinction of being named the most effective member of the New Jersey House delegation in just my second term. But I know I can do more as your governor. And that’s why I decided to run. By winning this seat, we can build more homes to reduce mortgage and rental costs, crack down on shady middlemen making prescription medications more expensive, and bring down utility costs by bringing more clean, cheap power like solar onto the grid. But the truth is that this is already the most expensive New Jersey gubernatorial race on record. And our opponents are benefiting from millions of dollars in spending from outside entities. So I am asking: = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Mikie * | | Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States | = =

subject: Breaking my silence . . .
body:
In the docuseries I’ll be releasing shortly, you’ll be able to see the first few chapters of the legal battle unfold, but the FULL TRUTH must he told and that will take our day in court.

| [****](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9afeeliqnqj1bl54507shufmb5n2bl71e7jd2ro_rp22sh2s8i6eob7chimaor2c1h2bs)
Dear Patriot,

The nightmare I could have never imagined has played out since February 2023, when my hand-selected board at Project Veritas **ousted me from the organization I founded** in a small room on top of a carriage house built by my grandfather.

As you know, Project Veritas sued me, and I counter-sued**. They are now on the run**.

**I 'm not seeking revenge or retribution . . . I'm seeking justice**, and [**I recently decided to tell the full, behind-the-scenes story**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrejd0mbuku1n3o9rsdtgrp32681pfeirfh5aeio_rp22sh2s8i6eob7chimaor2c1h2bs) of what has happened and is happening with Project Veritas and the board members behind the coup.

[****](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zksg9bl9l5e7gm702cfd591vcbus8ec7rtjuk6po_rp22sh2s8i6eob7chimaor2c1h2bs)
[**In the docuseries I 'll be releasing shortly**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z337jktk4saefcm1gn4vnvrpurrsebd2slj8p8og_rp22sh2s8i6eob7chimaor2c1h2bs), you'll be able to see the first few chapters of the legal battle unfold, but the FULL TRUTH must he told and that will take our day in court. To get there, **[**I need your help to cover the climbing costs.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zoskkfvuhgg9lau5l40dtjdn2qbtouh9qih4a69g_rp22sh2s8i6eob7chimaor2c1h2bs)**

**[**Watch the teaser for my docuseries on Project Veritas here, and help me seek justice.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgrdg0h7sjbg3fddlcssrjijlis4j3hhhpdvattg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7chimaor2c1h2bs)**

[**I sincerely need your help to keep fighting**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znkusr1adq3o2ja1a5mv0e0ivmiqst8ppngdt43o_rp22sh2s8i6eob7chimaor2c1h2bs)to expose the whole story and finally get my day in court. [**Will you donate today to help fund the remaining depositions?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6diee8adirs7kcomuevo5tkc4mr243mbr9ss6d8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7chimaor2c1h2bs)

My attorney will be working incredible hours this month with five more LENGTHY depositions that will cost around $18k each. **I have $7k left in the retainer account, so I have to raise over $85,000 this month alone.[**Please, will you help?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlsnagk200krjg8bljk1pa3g5blm9phi0aqr2kg8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7chimaor2c1h2bs)**

Before you do, [**watch the teaser for the docuseries**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6ecr6sg7q1v2r2h0av8bhe588fvuhitlfqq4j1o_rp22sh2s8i6eob7chimaor2c1h2bs). Yes, it's cryptic, but for reasons that I can disclose later.

Stay tuned, and please, [**donate as much as you can to my legal defense fund hosted by Liberty Guard**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3t6vnc3rutk7peh0bjie1t63dumkdtu9dre77go_rp22sh2s8i6eob7chimaor2c1h2bs). The funds are vitally needed to close this chapter of my life and **serve justice by telling the truth**.

With Respect and Gratitude,

James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

She is often the only Democratic member that can break through to Republican leadership to “make the bad bills better.”

Her Republican opponent in the General election will likely be a minion of Mitch McConnell – **the longest-serving Republican party leader in U.S. Senate history.**

McConnell developed a reputation as “Dr. No” during former President Obama’s term. He blocked Obama’s pick for a vacancy on the Supreme Court, paving the way for Roe v. Wade to be overturned. He unified Republicans against the Affordable Care Act, and then, after it passed, he sought to undo the law. He has voted against IVF. He has an A+ rating with the Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America scorecard for consistently voting against reproductive rights. He voted against the Family and Medical Leave Act, opposes same-sex marriage, voted against the Equal Pay Act, voted against raising the federal minimum wage... and so much more.

Mitch McConnell has been horrible for America, and after enduring him for decades, the people of Kentucky – and our country as a whole – deserve better. **This is truly a once-in-a-generation chance to elect someone amazing to replace him as his seat in Washington is FINALLY open.**

**That is where Col. Stevenson comes in.**

[**From negotiating hostage crises, prosecuting child sex criminals, violent crimes, and more, Colonel Stevenson has served this country with honor. clean_body: When we first sent this email out last week... | | | | | = Peter – We have a once-in-a-generation chance to elect someone amazing to replace Mitch McConnell now that he has announced he will NOT be seeking another term in the U.S. Senate. We are thrilled to share that Her Bold Move is officially the FIRST MAJOR ENDORSEMENT of Colonel Pam Stevenson , who will likely be the Democratic frontrunner for McConnell’s seat in the Senate. Col. Stevenson currently serves as House Minority Floor Leader in the Kentucky Legislature. She is often the only Democratic member that can break through to Republican leadership to “make the bad bills better.” When we first sent this email last week, many of you wrote to us that you were not sure a Democrat could win statewide elections in the state of Kentucky. But here’s the thing: Democrats have been elected to Statewide positions in Kentucky consecutively since 1983. This race is WINNABLE for a Democrat – and we know Col. Pam Stevenson is the perfect person to appeal to the widest range of voters in her state. = Together, Charlotte Bell Policy Researcher Her Bold Move \---------- Forwarded message --------- Hi Peter, As you may have heard, Senator Mitch McConnell will not be seeking reelection... A phenomenal woman named Colonel Pam Stevenson (D) is officially running for his seat in the US Senate, and Her Bold Move is THRILLED to be her FIRST MAJOR ENDORSEMENT. = After serving for 27 years in the Air Force, Col. Stevenson told us that she did not take an oath on the Constitution just to watch it be shredded by the current administration in Washington. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and automatically split between Her Bold Move and Pam Stevenson: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Colonel Stevenson serves as House Minority Floor Leader in the Kentucky Legislature. She is often the only Democratic member to break through to Republican leadership to make the bad bills better. Her Republican opponent in the General election will likely be a minion of Mitch McConnell – the longest-serving Republican party leader in U.S. Senate history. McConnell developed a reputation as “Dr. No” during former President Obama’s term. He blocked Obama’s pick for a vacancy on the Supreme Court, paving the way for Roe v. Wade to be overturned. He unified Republicans against the Affordable Care Act, and then, after it passed, he sought to undo the law. He has voted against IVF. He has an A+ rating with the Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America scorecard for consistently voting against reproductive rights. He voted against the Family and Medical Leave Act, opposes same-sex marriage, voted against the Equal Pay Act, voted against raising the federal minimum wage... and so much more. Mitch McConnell has been horrible for America, and after enduring him for decades, the people of Kentucky – and our country as a whole – deserve better. This is truly a once-in-a-generation chance to elect someone amazing to replace him as his seat in Washington is FINALLY open. That is where Col. Stevenson comes in. = Together, Charlotte Bell Policy Researcher Her Bold Move | | Her Bold Move is the fastest-growing support network for women running for political office in America. Fellow activist,

There is a major voter suppression bill continuing to make its way through the Pennsylvania House, and we are sounding the alarm.

**House Bill 771, which was introduced by Representative Thomas Mehaffie (R-Dauphin), aims to make it more difficult to vote by amending the PA Election Code to implement new restrictive voter ID requirements. **

As Representative Malcolm Kenyatta (D-Philadelphia) stated, _“If you want people to have faith in [the] election system, don’t lie about the election system”_(Politics PA). Pennsylvania's elections have been proven safe and secure for many years, yet some state lawmakers insist on making voting less and less convenient by imposing new, unnecessary voter ID provisions based on fabricated issues.

**Pennsylvania's current voter ID law is more than adequate to protect elections; new requirements won't do anything to improve that and will disenfranchise voters.**

**Once again, GOP leaders in PA are working to strip away voting rights from eligible voters. We must fight back:[As a voting rights organization, we are vehemently opposed to making it more difficult for voters to make their voices heard. Join us in protecting voting rights in the Commonwealth by pitching in $25 or more now →](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9Yr19exo8ATdRfiqRDml-2FPz5lM5B4-2FXq1Zv5A9UwINUXwz5yDfbea-2BhqkX-2Fa9Xu20TFOXQb5evlJy8clbWrd5WGSlJc5BF2tsXLS09KjzaRM81uKzyOmsY9CBhAR0-2F8FCLD7Q7mJKTkCqDotzKmemrfo-3DrIiN_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrYAtMfN5tlD-2BV-2FaLY4vq3b0LuM7CPUYz5s8Bv1dlH7Iquz9yTIx-2BOGw4IVfzEIi-2FpQjQ-2BjlSsi-2Bvk6W2owlsGtZBQeJE44D4XSTpFHAfWokYYYPUZBU95zTyYmZ-2BFzAZQzqtR7nMgJNa4M4aqGt6XXStIBjuMVlCS0QRwCltqc-2Fj7sNvWk6MS-2BQq05MbCywb5j)**

| | _The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. clean_body: | | | Fellow activist, There is a major voter suppression bill continuing to make its way through the Pennsylvania House, and we are sounding the alarm. House Bill 771, which was introduced by Representative Thomas Mehaffie (R-Dauphin), aims to make it more difficult to vote by amending the PA Election Code to implement new restrictive voter ID requirements. As Representative Malcolm Kenyatta (D-Philadelphia) stated, “If you want people to have faith in [the] election system, don’t lie about the election system”(Politics PA). Pennsylvania's elections have been proven safe and secure for many years, yet some state lawmakers insist on making voting less and less convenient by imposing new, unnecessary voter ID provisions based on fabricated issues. Pennsylvania's current voter ID law is more than adequate to protect elections; new requirements won't do anything to improve that and will disenfranchise voters. Once again, GOP leaders in PA are working to strip away voting rights from eligible voters. We must fight back: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ** | | | | | | | | Together, Team NPP Donations to the New Pennsylvania Project supports our staff’s community engagement efforts including; organizing and hosting town halls, educational webinars, community conversations, and creating digital content, bi-weekly blasts and social media to reach the communities we engage year-round. | | The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth. What you’re about to read almost got me _**blacklisted**_ from MSNBC.
My name is Byron Donalds, I’m President Trump’s right-hand Florida Man, and I’m the _Public Enemy #1_ of the Fake News.
What happened just the other day on primetime TV sent **[SHOCKWAVES](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zss68e3qi3eaq1l0sgf52uad5jtuu23ohvome9sg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7chim6pb2c9h2bs)** to every radical-leftist demanding that illegals BELONG in our country.
This is a Nuclear MAGA Truth Bomb that might have destroyed my chances of ever returning:
**Here’s my full statement:**
_“Due process is reserved for AMERICAN CITIZENS._
_Those who enter our country are GUESTS in the US._
_When you illegally enter our country, you aren't even our guest––you broke our law the minute you crossed our border, you are an ILLEGAL ALIEN, and you are subject to DEPORTATION.”_
Thank you for reading my critical message.
Ever since I told them the TRUTH, my campaign shot up to the TOP of their MAGA “Must Go” List.

subject: Breaking my silence . . .
body:
In the docuseries I’ll be releasing shortly, you’ll be able to see the first few chapters of the legal battle unfold, but the FULL TRUTH must he told and that will take our day in court.

| [****](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zt6p3nh50umhk9k09q9v7c5mpkh32rp239cpm9lg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7chim6pb2c9h2bs)
Dear Patriot,

The nightmare I could have never imagined has played out since February 2023, when my hand-selected board at Project Veritas **ousted me from the organization I founded** in a small room on top of a carriage house built by my grandfather.

As you know, Project Veritas sued me, and I counter-sued**. They are now on the run**.

**I 'm not seeking revenge or retribution . . . I'm seeking justice**, and [**I recently decided to tell the full, behind-the-scenes story**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2znp1n3hsndj018r4841425giblb84f9v8icfm8mg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7chim6pb2c9h2bs) of what has happened and is happening with Project Veritas and the board members behind the coup.

[****](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zrej5m9pj34fl0k36j6h6tnvegbijsr6c0sotajo_rp22sh2s8i6eob7chim6pb2c9h2bs)
[**In the docuseries I 'll be releasing shortly**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zs939kj0kp7ea8iett0rlt091ijbl7p72glptk8g_rp22sh2s8i6eob7chim6pb2c9h2bs), you'll be able to see the first few chapters of the legal battle unfold, but the FULL TRUTH must he told and that will take our day in court. To get there, **[**I need your help to cover the climbing costs.**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zts6ebi1adauv9h2u85fm7l3r2hnv8o9vgoufbi8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7chim6pb2c9h2bs)**

**[**Watch the teaser for my docuseries on Project Veritas here, and help me seek justice.**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z75bp1tj8ofn13e5d2poleiqoqcvhaanacgc4038_rp22sh2s8i6eob7chim6pb2c9h2bs)**

[**I sincerely need your help to keep fighting**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zdj52unnm15sqn1qkcurndcphit17r19ejmahu18_rp22sh2s8i6eob7chim6pb2c9h2bs)to expose the whole story and finally get my day in court. [**Will you donate today to help fund the remaining depositions?**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zhv99lndukp6pvb2998h38nbme311kdoc36lik10_rp22sh2s8i6eob7chim6pb2c9h2bs)

My attorney will be working incredible hours this month with five more LENGTHY depositions that will cost around $18k each. **I have $7k left in the retainer account, so I have to raise over $85,000 this month alone.[**Please, will you help?**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z80u28hf78jdsdn4ajhh8g15bm1futgp5focb8l0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7chim6pb2c9h2bs)**

Before you do, [**watch the teaser for the docuseries**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zol7g94s496lgu106hun08rg47bat8gbsf605flo_rp22sh2s8i6eob7chim6pb2c9h2bs). Yes, it's cryptic, but for reasons that I can disclose later.

Stay tuned, and please, [**donate as much as you can to my legal defense fund hosted by Liberty Guard**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z7ll3bqbqe5frpq41lkeg1neoseoun5necsvh0f0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7chim6pb2c9h2bs). The funds are vitally needed to close this chapter of my life and **serve justice by telling the truth**.

With Respect and Gratitude,

James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Why am I going on Fox News?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
It boils down to two reasons:

Team —
In a moment, I am going to do something I try not to do very often -- I am going to ask you to make a contribution to my PAC. Let me explain why.
Since the election ended, I have gotten a lot of questions like why am I talking to far-right Republicans like Charlie Kirk and Steve Bannon on my podcast? Why am I going on Fox News? Why am I running ads on Fox News? Why do I read so much right-wing news?
It boils down to two reasons:
First, I am trying to understand folks on the right -- and yes, even the far right. I want to know their motivations, their goals, how they operate and organize, what they are thinking, and most critically get a sense of what is coming next from them.
I can guess at that. I can wait to read someone else's opinion about that. Or I can talk to them and try to figure it out myself.
This is not trivial stuff. These are folks who, in the case of the cultural right, are leading the fight to take away abortion access, banning books, trying to radically transform our schools, and much more. And on the economic right, the chainsaw mafia at DOGE is cutting critical services that are a lifeline to so many people across this country.
It also helps me better understand the six million Californians (38%) who voted for Donald Trump.
Second, there is no persuading without talking to people you disagree with. This a divided country and the MAGA side is living in a filter bubble that locks out any dissenting point of view. They live in a world filled with conspiracy theories about the left and a media that tells them Trump can do no wrong.
Those folks need to hear other voices. They need to know why California is the largest manufacturing state in the country - by far - and that, on balance, we actually contribute tens of billions to the federal government while Texas takes tens of billions of dollars. They need to hear about the chaos Trump's tariffs are causing. They need to know that the Delta Smelt is not responsible for the LA wildfires and we did not reduce our firefighting budgets in California before they happened.
That is why I run ads on Fox News.
That is why I talk to people I disagree with, in the hope that some of their audience comes over to listen as well.
That is why, last year, I was taking trips and talking to people in deep red parts of the country like Mississippi.
That is why I was the first Democratic elected official to post FACTS on Truth Social.
That is why I helped raise hundreds of thousands of dollars for state Democratic parties in South Carolina, Florida, Tennessee, Mississippi, Arkansas, and more. Because people in those states need to hear from Democrats, as well.
A good portion of that work is possible thanks to the generous support of donors like you who believe Democrats need to take the fight DIRECTLY to Republicans and right-leaning independents, and to do it in all fifty states.
If you agree, I am asking:
[**Can you please make a donation to my Campaign for Democracy PAC - $3 or whatever you can afford -- and I will use those contributions to take the fight to red state authoritarian leaders and to tell the truth about California.**](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/donate/ggn-ak-em-npp/?source=em250513ab&akid=2337%2E4767699%2Ecv3FaZ)

clean_body: It boils down to two reasons: Team — In a moment, I am going to do something I try not to do very often -- I am going to ask you to make a contribution to my PAC. Let me explain why. Since the election ended, I have gotten a lot of questions like why am I talking to far-right Republicans like Charlie Kirk and Steve Bannon on my podcast? Why am I going on Fox News? Why am I running ads on Fox News? Why do I read so much right-wing news? It boils down to two reasons: First, I am trying to understand folks on the right -- and yes, even the far right. I want to know their motivations, their goals, how they operate and organize, what they are thinking, and most critically get a sense of what is coming next from them. I can guess at that. I can wait to read someone else's opinion about that. Or I can talk to them and try to figure it out myself. This is not trivial stuff. These are folks who, in the case of the cultural right, are leading the fight to take away abortion access, banning books, trying to radically transform our schools, and much more. And on the economic right, the chainsaw mafia at DOGE is cutting critical services that are a lifeline to so many people across this country. It also helps me better understand the six million Californians (38%) who voted for Donald Trump. Second, there is no persuading without talking to people you disagree with. | Good Morning,
Rob had a busy week in Washington but was able to come back to the district this weekend. Rob met with the PA Anesthesiologists, had a Press Conference with the Build America Caucus, and attended the Back Mountain Chamber’s Legislative Breakfast. Rob’s back in session, fighting for NEPA, but will be back home for the weekend. We hope to see you as we travel around PA-08!
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| Rob loves coming back to PA-08 on the weekend. We were able to make it to several community events and were happy to see everybody! We would like to pray for everyone who experienced flood damage in Wayne County. Flooding and other disasters can tear people apart, but we come together in NEPA. The emergency declaration has been extended and Rob is doing everything he can for the victims.
---
|

|

|
The Democrats are already coming after our Congressman for 2026! They’re gearing up to lie and slander Rob, and we need your help to put our side of the story out there. If you are able, please donate to our campaign to keep NEPA out of the grasp of the far-left.

name: James Carville
subject: As important as it gets
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9d96f9de-7629-42d7-b6dd-c07f45bf59cb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T483bdec8-c68f-43cb-845a-bdf0bfa1656c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, I’ve seen a lot of tough races in my time, but let me tell you: this one is as important as it gets. The Virginia Governor’s race isn’t just about the future of Virginia – it's a bellwether for the entire country. This will be the first major election after Trump’s inauguration, and it could set the stage for Democrats in 2026. If we don’t win big here, we’ll be facing a rough road ahead. [So, before I continue, can I count on you to split a contribution to Abigail Spanberger’s campaign for Governor of Virginia?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T355d3af6-209f-4987-9dd6-615d202532f9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3dbfe0df-82ae-4349-b7ce-ac1623031d74/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Here’s what’s got me terrified: The experts have called this race a TOSS-UP, and I couldn’t agree more. Polls are going to stay tight, and this race is going to be one of the hardest-fought in the nation. Republicans are going to flood the state with millions of dollars through their super PACs, trying to keep the Governor’s seat red. They know this race is everything to them – and we need to match their energy, their money, and their commitment. Remember, this race is the only opportunity to flip a Governor's office from red to blue in 2025. If we don’t win this one, we’ll be handing Republicans a major victory ahead of 2026, and trust me – we can’t let that happen. Right now, Democratic Governors are our last line of defense against the reckless policies coming out of the Trump administration, and Abigail Spanberger is the leader Virginia needs at this moment. That’s why I’m asking you to step up today. We can’t win this without your help. The money that’s coming from the other side is going to be massive, and we need to be able to push back. Every dollar you contribute will make a difference in keeping Virginia blue and in keeping the Democrats on track for victory in 2026.

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Roger Stone just called for me to be charged with treason and executed.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
I called out Trump for his blatant corruption... In response, they sent Roger Stone after me.
#
Trump’s longtime political advisor, Roger Stone, just called for me to be charged with treason and executed.
You heard me right.
I called out Trump for his blatant corruption — making millions of dollars from his own crypto coins — and I co-sponsored a bill to make it illegal for the President, the Vice President, administration officials, and members of Congress to do the same.
In response, they sent Roger Stone after me.
When I joined the Navy, I swore an oath to support and defend the Constitution. I did it again when I was sworn in as Arizona’s United States Senator. I will continue to uphold that oath, and because it matters to our democracy, I will do everything I can to stop the blatant corruption in Washington.
Guys like Donald Trump and Roger Stone are only looking out for themselves. And it’s clear they’re scared of the attention we’re bringing to them and their corrupt deeds.
I’ll be honest with you, though. If Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and now Roger Stone are all lining up against me, it’s going to take a big team to fight back.
So please: [**Please, if you can afford it, split a donation between my campaign and The Long Run as we take on the corruption in Washington and fight back against the Trump Administration. It adds up fast when lots of people are chipping in.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-kelly.j9iZht&refcode=em250512-1-360&t=1&akid=5547%2E196590%2EO_gnWF)

disclaimer_text: Paid For By John King For Senate Inc
body:
Today, I’m asking you to endorse our mission to win the most important Senate race in America. The Federal Election Commission's filing deadline for the runoff is tomorrow ... we have LESS THAN 24 HOURS TO HIT OUR FUNDRAISING GOAL |
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=8e0e7c20e1d24cecb799f7b0fdc88d7b&_e=ZUcIqNmYw_XP2X5WmR3t-GDlTIhKnP9cI64MBY0glEyjB5HNIvLCw04aEsBHXqZ5Q2Mrsjf1hfoEk85iSo3dgTKPhRKrQPnbmT3pt_eD_X1LVBN5qp7JHr4C2T_NzxIOmXEIVVYUj9kDT_heJSDzxxHnIKprD448ras_0tUkAA7qvQs0pBcM67y_Pjo4hDY-5xNLZdaOwX9CFG76MOIU8XsLe7TMZn71uCUz7Ox7rUl5_XFMklAb0asQduPfBdC9UoVo5z_p404QVkTXfRUirXGws8EQ0Pv9yoFyJ7--xkss-jsIl73JFl0MS2YKqQQqW3socfwgd1cl_gkUTmSwDZevxEMTccB0b7-ec2t_9C0q0XACeZWxCQ4z6ZwfyTnTDfH75j6G_9WJuNt6iE5ihQ9bMTScVVmeNaSmsEFvP5Aaj2-eX55TVUMAJDMwTvk_nEakNGNp-VqYKejaksFrJEL4HxQ_ahY8BG7ddTSHcV26jUq6W_vp2fT_gNhnDgA2OAw3grKVZmBY7Ym4ePKLniWxkHrcvuePlukCY7kQAFM3T_C3sRga6RevP5CjRQQ0)

---
Fellow Conservative,

I’ve led soldiers in war zones, put drug dealers behind bars, and deported criminals here illegally. **Now, I’m running for the U.S. Senate in Georgia and I need your help.**

[**A leader is only as strong as the men and women supporting him, and that’s why I’m personally asking you to become one of the first to endorse my campaign.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=8e0e7c20e1d24cecb799f7b0fdc88d7b&_e=ZUcIqNmYw_XP2X5WmR3t-GDlTIhKnP9cI64MBY0glEyjB5HNIvLCw04aEsBHXqZ5Q2Mrsjf1hfoEk85iSo3dgTKPhRKrQPnbmT3pt_eD_X1LVBN5qp7JHr4C2T_NzxIOmXEIVVYUj9kDT_heJSDzxxHnIKprD448ras_0tUkAA7qvQs0pBcM67y_Pjo4hDY-5xNLZdaOwX9CFG76MOIU8XsLe7TMZn71uCUz7Ox7rUl5_XFMklAb0asQduPfBdC9UoVo5z_p404QVkTXfRUirXGws8EQ0Pv9yoFyJ7--xkss-jsIl73JFl0MS2YKqQQqW3socfwgd1cl_gkUTmSwDZevxEMTccB0b7-ec2t_9C0q0XACeZWxCQ4z6ZwfyTnTDfH75j6G_9WJuNt6iE5ihSDJm-N_znnGR4t0LFs8GGOlnG8ffOpKRu2GsywBmH2D1t06sH7ZnhzqUP_0SLvIRGeg8UzcFhDx1m4BQtjrw6Bqoa9Dx18_WakdIg8jMeTNWC4ws-fHBMx3CShBpKeR_dc1vUDQUVLoqzwx01p-nSFE4Ru1btj9k4FSJwd2Nkc0)

[**Endorse General John King
for U.S. Senate**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=8e0e7c20e1d24cecb799f7b0fdc88d7b&_e=ZUcIqNmYw_XP2X5WmR3t-GDlTIhKnP9cI64MBY0glEyjB5HNIvLCw04aEsBHXqZ5Q2Mrsjf1hfoEk85iSo3dgTKPhRKrQPnbmT3pt_eD_X1LVBN5qp7JHr4C2T_NzxIOmXEIVVYUj9kDT_heJSDzxxHnIKprD448ras_0tUkAA7qvQs0pBcM67y_Pjo4hDY-5xNLZdaOwX9CFG76MOIU8XsLe7TMZn71uCUz7Ox7rUl5_XFMklAb0asQduPfBdC9UoVo5z_p404QVkTXfRUirXGws8EQ0Pv9yoFyJ7--xkss-jsIl73JFl0MS2YKqQQqW3socfwgd1cl_gkUTmSwDZevxEMTccB0b7-ec2t_9C0q0XACeZWxCQ4z6ZwfyTnTDfH75j6G_9WJuNt6iE5ihVZUYtscJ-ZZJIY7rYPLJhdvBnJtB1cliojCYmJpTJ2OdE54Vc_W3eNM76SPEN8Go0qLJRmrobyHsY-6jGZySy9CkIpaHpED4smvKTQFVlQuC4PaSCehKGhxkNkTUrYnIwsCO1NG-6y4XCFXStDi4oA1yfhbx9XgWc4SfdSOWOv5)
_Let me tell you more about why I’m doing this._

I was born and raised in Mexico, coming to Georgia when I was 17 years old.

I enlisted in the Army as a private. Two years ago, I retired as a major general after serving around the world in places like Iraq, Afghanistan, and even our southern border.

I also joined the Atlanta Police Department as a beat cop and went on to become Chief of Police in Doraville.

My story is only possible in this country. But, Fellow Conservative, my fear is that if President Trump doesn’t have a strong Senate Majority to deliver his agenda, those same opportunities won’t be here for future generations.

**I know this is going to be the toughest and most expensive Senate race in the country, but this is a fight we must have. And it’s a fight we must win.**

[**Endorse General John King
for U.S. Senate**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=8e0e7c20e1d24cecb799f7b0fdc88d7b&_e=ZUcIqNmYw_XP2X5WmR3t-GDlTIhKnP9cI64MBY0glEyjB5HNIvLCw04aEsBHXqZ5Q2Mrsjf1hfoEk85iSo3dgTKPhRKrQPnbmT3pt_eD_X1LVBN5qp7JHr4C2T_NzxIOmXEIVVYUj9kDT_heJSDzxxHnIKprD448ras_0tUkAA7qvQs0pBcM67y_Pjo4hDY-5xNLZdaOwX9CFG76MOIU8XsLe7TMZn71uCUz7Ox7rUl5_XFMklAb0asQduPfBdC9UoVo5z_p404QVkTXfRUirXGws8EQ0Pv9yoFyJ7--xkss-jsIl73JFl0MS2YKqQQqW3socfwgd1cl_gkUTmSwDZevxEMTccB0b7-ec2t_9C0q0XACeZWxCQ4z6ZwfyTnTDfH75j6G_9WJuNt6iE5ihcUMU2QYkugYKjoX7agSVvBCOouJjJoR4iaSNsVZpGsB8C6mQN8L-m81Bl-ww8aRmAzVdIJRVEY52g5BceeNLvmxfrUZBC1Azbmbc3dePi4USyy8oYe2O_wtzmSn27OshFjEJ6UjL-Syt_4e2RggFFEBMfRUHQ5xY2H04VDSZEk-)
Jon Ossoff has more than $11 million in the bank, he’s raising millions more, and the only thing he stands for is derailing President Trump’s agenda.

**We have to defeat him, and I’m counting on your help as we launch this campaign.**

[**Let’s restore America First leadership to Georgia’s Senate seat. Will you take the first step and endorse my campaign today?**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=8e0e7c20e1d24cecb799f7b0fdc88d7b&_e=ZUcIqNmYw_XP2X5WmR3t-GDlTIhKnP9cI64MBY0glEyjB5HNIvLCw04aEsBHXqZ5Q2Mrsjf1hfoEk85iSo3dgTKPhRKrQPnbmT3pt_eD_X1LVBN5qp7JHr4C2T_NzxIOmXEIVVYUj9kDT_heJSDzxxHnIKprD448ras_0tUkAA7qvQs0pBcM67y_Pjo4hDY-5xNLZdaOwX9CFG76MOIU8XsLe7TMZn71uCUz7Ox7rUl5_XFMklAb0asQduPfBdC9UoVo5z_p404QVkTXfRUirXGws8EQ0Pv9yoFyJ7--xkss-jsIl73JFl0MS2YKqQQqW3socfwgd1cl_gkUTmSwDZevxEMTccB0b7-ec2t_9C0q0XACeZWxCQ4z6ZwfyTnTDfH75j6G_9WJuNt6iE5ihbMeDt85ukOfc6o42vVYkWn2x2pSpBfVAgch-ygQ2brjWBF-AEYj8bVmWQeYUVC_GvmkgMNFLr1xr4oDEbIpe_BEKq7LBh7_HbCCalyPC4qy0QIwb-BPpELYlvURy4Q-X3PHW6tqFw-5cvq16z2we8SZvcCT00Uj64zpe-DlXFkT)

Thanks,
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=8e0e7c20e1d24cecb799f7b0fdc88d7b&_e=ZUcIqNmYw_XP2X5WmR3t-GDlTIhKnP9cI64MBY0glEyjB5HNIvLCw04aEsBHXqZ5Q2Mrsjf1hfoEk85iSo3dgTKPhRKrQPnbmT3pt_eD_X1LVBN5qp7JHr4C2T_NzxIOmXEIVVYUj9kDT_heJSDzxxHnIKprD448ras_0tUkAA7qvQs0pBcM67y_Pjo4hDY-5xNLZdaOwX9CFG76MOIU8XsLe7TMZn71uCUz7Ox7rUl5_XFMklAb0asQduPfBdC9UoVo5z_p404QVkTXfRUirXGws8EQ0Pv9yoFyJ7--xkss-jsIl73JFl0MS2YKqQQqW3socfwgd1cl_gkUTmSwDZevxEMTccB0b7-ec2t_9C0q0XACeZWxCQ4z6ZwfyTnTDfH75j6G_9WJuNt6iE5ihf3BDXxfFB01Yblkk93Ie5v6H9fR7mXOtWLtLq4asyTCajREpEmR2ok1UdTF_2tSQ3E_uQnBSt58cxIV-zs6bTSHIq7lpvqZ9dHyyY8IxdlaYqJKX_cOoIxI3w0vEn5LlmYd5CV3H07Kujh1zgVKcL7K9KSYywqaHOuy3R99GCZo)
Maj. Gen. John King (retd.)

[**Endorse General John King
for U.S. Senate**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=8e0e7c20e1d24cecb799f7b0fdc88d7b&_e=ZUcIqNmYw_XP2X5WmR3t-GDlTIhKnP9cI64MBY0glEyjB5HNIvLCw04aEsBHXqZ5Q2Mrsjf1hfoEk85iSo3dgTKPhRKrQPnbmT3pt_eD_X1LVBN5qp7JHr4C2T_NzxIOmXEIVVYUj9kDT_heJSDzxxHnIKprD448ras_0tUkAA7qvQs0pBcM67y_Pjo4hDY-5xNLZdaOwX9CFG76MOIU8XsLe7TMZn71uCUz7Ox7rUl5_XFMklAb0asQduPfBdC9UoVo5z_p404QVkTXfRUirXGws8EQ0Pv9yoFyJ7--xkss-jsIl73JFl0MS2YKqQQqW3socfwgd1cl_gkUTmSwDZevxEMTccB0b7-ec2t_9C0q0XACeZWxCQ4z6ZwfyTnTDfH75j6G_9WJuNt6iE5ihTQlnfiXxr_KfQKIFBDGqZwN1bCNUmVxy-Rp023VGALKXjrP4ToF96JJ6cptcilpP9lIJ2UACH09SFsQEW-Su5w2qbDSIBBPdvvnHaZRoGJXpeQ4HOKLeuZiLUnBcbFxoLX-fhyrseAYmgNimyG9rBXLTkdsPNrSx4nKcsO2Ab6b)

General John King is a soldier, lawman, and the first Hispanic elected statewide in Georgia history. clean_body: Today, I’m asking you to endorse our mission to win the most important Senate race in America. The Federal Election Commission's filing deadline for the runoff is tomorrow ... we have LESS THAN 24 HOURS TO HIT OUR FUNDRAISING GOAL | Fellow Conservative, I’ve led soldiers in war zones, put drug dealers behind bars, and deported criminals here illegally. Now, I’m running for the U.S. Senate in Georgia and I need your help. Let me tell you more about why I’m doing this. I was born and raised in Mexico, coming to Georgia when I was 17 years old. I enlisted in the Army as a private. Two years ago, I retired as a major general after serving around the world in places like Iraq, Afghanistan, and even our southern border. I also joined the Atlanta Police Department as a beat cop and went on to become Chief of Police in Doraville. My story is only possible in this country. But, Fellow Conservative, my fear is that if President Trump doesn’t have a strong Senate Majority to deliver his agenda, those same opportunities won’t be here for future generations. I know this is going to be the toughest and most expensive Senate race in the country, but this is a fight we must have. And it’s a fight we must win. - Jon Ossoff has more than $11 million in the bank, he’s raising millions more, and the only thing he stands for is derailing President Trump’s agenda. We have to defeat him, and I’m counting on your help as we launch this campaign. Thanks, Maj. Gen. John King (retd.) | General John King is a soldier, lawman, and the first Hispanic elected statewide in Georgia history. He’s running for the Senate now because Georgians need a leader who will fight for them, fight for President Trump’s agenda, and put America First. | | | Paid For By John King For Senate Inc. name: Dani Hupper, Evergreen
subject: FWD: GOP gutting vital programs to fund billionaire's tax cuts— Act NOW
disclaimer_text: paid for by Evergreen Action
body:
What you need to know and how you can help
| | |
---
| Hi—

Since I sent you this email yesterday, the House Ways and Means Committee [released their version](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3582429/87SdQ4wZ) of the Republican spending plan designed to bankroll _even more_ tax breaks for big corporations and billionaires.

It’s basically a backdoor, full repeal of the largest climate bill in U.S. history, torching clean energy tax credits that are fueling a nationwide manufacturing boom and taking billions of dollars in climate funding away from American households, workers, Tribal governments, and more.

🚨 **With the bill entering the most critical stages of debate before it goes to the full House for a vote, now is the best time for your representative to hear from you.**[**Give them a call right now to protect critical services and programs from getting cut.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3582430/87SdQ4wZ)

Thanks for your continued advocacy,
Dani

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Dani Hupper, Evergreen Action
Date: Mon, May 12, 2025
Subject: GOP gutting vital programs to fund billionaire’s tax cuts |
| [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3582431/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
| House Republicans are trying to take billions of dollars in climate funding away from households, workers, disadvantaged communities, businesses, cities, and more. We can’t let this happen. [TAKE ACTION](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3582432/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| We need your help now, friend.

We’ve been raising the alarm about Republican plans to attack essential programs like Medicaid, food assistance, and climate, clean energy, and environmental justice programs.

Last night, House Republicans made it official by releasing some of the actual text of their budget bill—**which means NOW is the time to act.**

The GOP Energy & Commerce Committee released a reckless spending plan that cuts essential, life-saving programs to fund a multi-trillion-dollar tax giveaway for billionaires, polluters, and big corporations.

We read through dozens of pages of bill text, [summarized and analyzed the impacts](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3582433/87SdQ4wZ), and have created a way for you to take action to defend these critical programs. |
---
[TAKE ACTION NOW](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3582434/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| So, what’s on the line?

In addition to their shameful cuts to critical health programs like Medicaid, Republicans are going after at least $6.5 billion in climate and clean energy funding. They’re also abusing the rules of reconciliation by attempting to: |
---
|
* Repeal Clean Air Act standards that limit the amount of pollution cars and trucks can spew
* Allow gas pipeline projects to bribe their way out of the normal permitting process with a $10 million payment
* Repeal cost-saving, pollution-reducing programs like the Greenhouse Gas Reduction Fund, Environmental Justice Community Change Grants, Climate Pollution Reduction Grants, and more

|
---
| The House is expected to vote on this **THIS WEEK** so there is still a small window of time to act, and **we need everyone stepping up.
**
Our families and communities deserve clean air, affordable energy, and a safer climate future. We’ve been warning for months that this Republican Congress would try to destroy so much of the progress we’ve made to tackle climate pollution, reduce toxic air pollution, and rising energy costs—well, **now they are** and **now we must act.**

[**Call your representatives today and tell them they cannot vote for a budget bill that repeals climate and clean energy programs, which protect our health, our pocketbooks, and our communities.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3582435/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
[CALL YOUR REPRESENTATIVE](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3582436/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Thank you for taking action today and for being with us in the fight ahead.

Onward, |
---
| | |
---
### Dani Hupper
Campaigns Director
Evergreen Action
---
---
* * *
---
| _Evergreen is building the ambitious, actionable policy roadmap for an all-out mobilization to defeat climate change—and to create millions of jobs in a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future. None of this would be possible without your support._ |
---
[DONATE](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3582437/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
---
| | [ ](https://evergreenaction.com/)
---
Follow Evergreen Action on Bluesky and LinkedIn.
---
[ ](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3582438/87SdQ4wZ) | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3582439/87SdQ4wZ)
---|---
And follow our new project, **Hope This Helps.**
---
[ ](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3582440/87SdQ4wZ) | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3582441/87SdQ4wZ) | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3582442/87SdQ4wZ) | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3582443/87SdQ4wZ)
---|---|---|---

Derek, I don’t like to ask for money just as much as you probably don’t like reading these emails. That’s why I work closely with my team to make sure that I’m only asking for what we need, and when we need it. So here’s the deal:
Hitting this fundraising goal helps ensure our team has the resources to fight back against Donald Trump’s dangerous agenda— _and the last few months have made it clear that fighting back is more important than ever._
Since taking office, Donald Trump has tried to gut the Social Security Administration—slashing staff by thousands and closing field offices, which could lead to longer wait times and delayed benefits. Now, he’s doing the same thing at the VA, pushing plans that would put the care millions of my fellow veterans rely on at risk.
And House Republicans have gone along with Trump’s agenda. They’re pushing a plan that would cut funding for Medicaid and leave millions of Americans without healthcare, while giving handouts to the ultra-wealthy.
Derek, folks in Western PA and across the country are continuing to see rising costs, but instead of delivering solutions, Trump and Republicans are too busy working to line the pockets of their big money backers.
I promise you that I’ll continue fighting to deliver for the good people of Western PA. I’ll stand up to Donald Trump and Republicans when they hurt the American people. But I need your help to continue this work.
**[So Derek, can I count on you to pitch in a few bucks in advance of our deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107610990/545241075/-1558066259?refcode=email_051325_personalmessage&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDkwMjVkOC0wNjMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P_MYL3KwsShYGXliiFYXm08ys-0Pt5aYxvSHwtkpleY=)**

| On Saturday, Sen. Chris Murphy and I packed the house for a town hall in Sarasota, FL, where the Republican representative has REFUSED to face his constituents. [ ](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/3nmlClG27h00P3Qm55B1BA~~/AAPPABA~/fpIRYECw9QNV6MdKWYgSbZDWoRiqVbFkUbXBTYnQWwWfo1Jnrmha6ssEDqS3MEnbRctbHyRTkxQP5iPtg33u5q4EcX0W7RI3eofdij00ketPD8F2Ka7zrikM_2VYsQcpwZFSZHa8lOU-4AmUXgItHd15n0SWtzjuAL4l1gxLC_lDikwumY6LoUvM8T1YbZ-aiNlDPW9dFDNsEGcOeSYoHLEx7vloyoefqPmfCor3uXGTxDLWvxk0Ea9iaWK5Aj45vqp44JG0_Jb2IvUwuI9lJ589Z6FZ0EZ2FXxrxOWdWIug3lVMabUDvrs6g2ZFvEw5Hsk26v7QGz03A5XbQ9qjdC8Q0iYGC3SSeFoZPQ6_hsw~) Everything I heard made it clear: people are pissed. And they should be. But they’re also not backing down - they’re getting louder. Because it doesn’t matter if your district is red or blue. Your elected officials should give a damn about you. It’s that simple. Well, I give a damn. That’s why I’m holding more town halls in red districts across the South. While Republicans are fanning the flames of fascism and voting to cut Social Security and Medicare, working people are uniting against these attacks. And thanks to you, I’m right there with them. But holding these events across different states takes major resources, so I need you with me so I can stay on the road and bring even more people into this fight for our country’s future. [**_Just one donation from you today will keep me on the road so I can bring even more people into this fight for our country’s future.
