clean_body: | ~ | On Saturday, Sen. Chris Murphy and I packed the house for a town hall in Sarasota, FL, where the Republican representative has REFUSED to face his constituents. ~ Everything I heard made it clear: people are pissed. And they should be. But they’re also not backing down - they’re getting louder. Because it doesn’t matter if your district is red or blue. Your elected officials should give a damn about you. It’s that simple. Well, I give a damn. That’s why I’m holding more town halls in red districts across the South. While Republicans are fanning the flames of fascism and voting to cut Social Security and Medicare, working people are uniting against these attacks. And thanks to you, I’m right there with them. But holding these events across different states takes major resources, so I need you with me so I can stay on the road and bring even more people into this fight for our country’s future. ~~ If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | ~~ Thank you so much, Maxwell Frost | ~ Maxwell Alejandro Frost is an organizer representing Florida's 10th Congressional District. name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: This is the most important email I've sent yet –
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | |
Hi friend, it's Senator Kirsten Gillibrand. This is one of the longest emails I've sent as DSCC Chair -- **but it's also the most important.**

**I hope you'll read every word, but if you can't, here's the top-line info:** [**The DSCC has their mid-month deadline coming up -- and without your help, we could fall _short_ of the $125,000 goal we need to raise to flip the Senate. Will you chip in $5 to make sure we hit it? Your gift will be tripled, but only until the deadline.**](https://go.dscc.org/go/21656?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250513-KirstenGillibrand-GillibrandLongForm-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250513-KirstenGillibrand-GillibrandLongForm-Pros-sl1&akid=20243%2E9716520%2Ep0uopg)

| | [DONATE $5 (BECOMES $15)](https://go.dscc.org/go/21656?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250513-KirstenGillibrand-GillibrandLongForm-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250513-KirstenGillibrand-GillibrandLongForm-Pros-sl1&akid=20243%2E9716520%2Ep0uopg)
---

Here are three things you need to know right now:

**DONALD TRUMP IS HURTING -- NOT HELPING -- HARDWORKING AMERICANS.**

Trump's second term is already as bad as we've feared. Worse, even. He's packing our government with MAGA loyalists, undermining our democracy, and grabbing unprecedented power and wealth for himself and billionaires like Elon Musk -- but he's done _nothing_ to tackle the issues that matter most, like lowering costs and protecting Social Security.

**SENATE REPUBLICANS ARE PUSHING TRUMP'S DANGEROUS AGENDA.**

On issue after issue, the Republican majority has moved in lockstep with Trump -- no matter how far he pushes our country in the wrong direction. They're rubber-stamping his radical, unqualified nominees and actually defending his pardoning of hundreds of January 6th insurrectionists!

Fortunately, we have an alternative path forward:

**DEMOCRATS HAVE A _REAL CHANCE_ TO TAKE BACK THE SENATE.**

With multiple special elections in key battlegrounds on the map and some of the most vulnerable Republicans up for reelection, we have no shortage of chances to flip seats blue. But to win back a majority and deliver on the issues that matter most, I'll need Democrats like you on my side.

[**So today, with our critical mid-month deadline approaching, I'm asking you to make a difference. Will you chip in $5 (becomes $15) to fight for a Democratic Senate majority that will fight for you?**](https://go.dscc.org/go/21656?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250513-KirstenGillibrand-GillibrandLongForm-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250513-KirstenGillibrand-GillibrandLongForm-Pros-sl1&akid=20243%2E9716520%2Ep0uopg)

We need your help to fight for the Senate. If you've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

| [Donate $5 (Becomes $15)](https://go.dscc.org/go/21656?amount=5&t=8&amount=5&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250513-KirstenGillibrand-GillibrandLongForm-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250513-KirstenGillibrand-GillibrandLongForm-Pros-sl1&akid=20243%2E9716520%2Ep0uopg)
---
| [Donate $10 (Becomes $30)](https://go.dscc.org/go/21656?amount=5&t=9&amount=10&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250513-KirstenGillibrand-GillibrandLongForm-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250513-KirstenGillibrand-GillibrandLongForm-Pros-sl1&akid=20243%2E9716520%2Ep0uopg)
---
| [Donate $20 (Becomes $60)](https://go.dscc.org/go/21656?amount=5&t=10&amount=20&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250513-KirstenGillibrand-GillibrandLongForm-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250513-KirstenGillibrand-GillibrandLongForm-Pros-sl1&akid=20243%2E9716520%2Ep0uopg)
---
| [Rush Another Amount](https://go.dscc.org/go/21656?amount=5&t=11&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250513-KirstenGillibrand-GillibrandLongForm-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250513-KirstenGillibrand-GillibrandLongForm-Pros-sl1&akid=20243%2E9716520%2Ep0uopg)
---

Thank you -- let's win this together!

With gratitude,

Kirsten

Kirsten Gillibrand
DSCC Chair

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/21656?amount=5&t=12&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250513-KirstenGillibrand-GillibrandLongForm-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250513-KirstenGillibrand-GillibrandLongForm-Pros-sl1&akid=20243%2E9716520%2Ep0uopg)

name: State Dems HQ (via DLCC.org)
subject: re: voting rights
disclaimer_text: paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005
body:
When voter suppression takes place in key battleground races, it doesn’t just reshape our state legislatures – it can change who’s in Congress and even who wins the White House. | | |
---
| |
---|---
Here’s the truth – state legislators have a huge say over how our elections are run, from how easy or hard it is to vote to how your vote is counted. And when extreme Republicans hold power in the states, they use it to suppress our votes and cement themselves into power. GOP controlled legislatures enact voter ID laws, ban ballot drop boxes, pass ultra-gerrymandered maps, and make it harder for working people, young voters, and communities of color to cast a ballot. [Will you chip in $3 now to help elect Democrats who will fight back against GOP voter suppression in our statehouses? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDT1TWpz2EbdEndyX3T6ox9daGjn4UWOZPFGSTrKEwuuJPODqGZ3tHbBl6WkkMAVQLuoDDW9tnJCDNOiyqb60_9C4XhKaZfm5HSQGxODi5_a2fVyBj-oifIH5mPzsj11x7dQNVyYj-0NCV2SGGxPiCFk67EI1sANb97q9I0Ghay8jyknbvKk5zNWwUzdOVSvzP29xkigy1nomRVupjxS79wZu-tnW_CeAMLAe14BZQbDSL6_14qVqFPBPdpNSNu8XsMqj6KSWxxci3LkbWxwr-LePI40oCFb0Bi179AqRr0p58UIIAkTOeXl_-0yrocN3yc7aOXq9C8TTqeOjx-azPLrTL-wIJHKK46EmqW6nRDA_Q0uwyPrLJxSaGyMgLC6ZU2snD77WWBYUiUShqlZp4DA/4gg/PteqNii5QJimqdABqYKa5A/h0/h001.wo6OLhSMEeGmiawIau0N9GsQlA5jgeodaI9miSMekw0) When voter suppression takes place in key battleground races, it doesn’t _just_ reshape our state legislatures – it can change who’s in Congress, who gets elected to the Senate, and even who wins the White House. **That’s why the DLCC is working to build strong Democratic majorities in the states. clean_body: When voter suppression takes place in key battleground races, it doesn’t just reshape our state legislatures – it can change who’s in Congress and even who wins the White House. | | | | | ---|--- Here’s the truth – state legislators have a huge say over how our elections are run, from how easy or hard it is to vote to how your vote is counted. And when extreme Republicans hold power in the states, they use it to suppress our votes and cement themselves into power. GOP controlled legislatures enact voter ID laws, ban ballot drop boxes, pass ultra-gerrymandered maps, and make it harder for working people, young voters, and communities of color to cast a ballot. When voter suppression takes place in key battleground races, it doesn’t just reshape our state legislatures – it can change who’s in Congress, who gets elected to the Senate, and even who wins the White House. That’s why the DLCC is working to build strong Democratic majorities in the states. When state Democrats hold power, we pass laws to protect access to the ballot and ensure our elections are free and fair for everyone. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | This fight is bigger than just one election, it’s about protecting democracy itself. We’ll get straight to the point, Peter: Our fundraising has fallen off recently. While it’s normal for fundraising to slow down during times like this, considering we’re just a few months removed from a competitive election cycle, our current situation is anything but normal. We have a president who’s dismantling our federal government, taking from working families to give to billionaires, and chipping away at our democracy by the day — and a Republican-controlled House that’s letting it happen. Becca is fighting against Trump’s reckless plans every day, but she needs folks like you to join her and use every single voice that we can muster to say no. **That’s why it’s so critical we hit our fundraising goals.** Right now, there’s nothing more important than building a strong base of grassroots supporters to stand up to Trump and billionaires. And the goals that we set ensure that Becca has the resources to meet with voters across Vermont, empower progressives in Congress, and fight for working families. **[To help us catch up, we've set a goal of raising 250 grassroots contributions before Thursday's mid-quarter deadline. If everyone reading this email chipped in any amount, we'd hit our goal before we know it. While it’s normal for fundraising to slow down during times like this, considering we’re just a few months removed from a competitive election cycle, our current situation is anything but normal. We have a president who’s dismantling our federal government, taking from working families to give to billionaires, and chipping away at our democracy by the day — and a Republican-controlled House that’s letting it happen. Becca is fighting against Trump’s reckless plans every day, but she needs folks like you to join her and use every single voice that we can muster to say no. That’s why it’s so critical we hit our fundraising goals. Right now, there’s nothing more important than building a strong base of grassroots supporters to stand up to Trump and billionaires. name: Trisha Calvarese
subject: I'm running to defeat Lauren Boebert
disclaimer_text: paid for by billionaires like Elon Musk, who are willing to do – and spend – whatever it takes to defeat us
body:
Lauren Boebert has failed the families in my hometown. I’m running to defeat her.

| |
---
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107612311/545245284/-526780539?amp;refcode=250512_tc_split_img&ms=250512_tc_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzc4ZjFlZDAtMDkzMC1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GH2F2x4dW9Gx9r44KToreNptCYJo5oBo9XUXmI9MYQE=)** Friend, my name is Trisha Calvarese (D), and Congresswoman Nellie Pou let me know I could reach out. I just launched my campaign for Congress to defeat Lauren Boebert (R), flip the House blue and stand up for working families in my hometown. **In a second, I want to tell you a little more about myself and why I’m in this race. But first, I need you to know that if we win here, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to take back the House.[So if you’re ready to join our movement, please split $10 or more now between my campaign and Nellie's to defeat Boebert and build a better future for our country.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107612312/545245285/-512365192?amp;refcode=250512_tc_split_l1&ms=250512_tc_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzc4ZjFlZDAtMDkzMC1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GH2F2x4dW9Gx9r44KToreNptCYJo5oBo9XUXmI9MYQE=)** My story begins in the rural Eastern Plains. My dad was a dedicated civil servant, and my mom was a child-care provider. From the beginning, they’ve been my models of what servant leadership means. When they both became terminally ill with cancer less than two years ago, I returned home to provide end-of-life care for them. It was the toughest thing I’ve ever done. It opened my eyes to how broken our systems are – and I couldn’t believe that our members of Congress weren’t doing more to fix them. **So that’s what I’m doing: I’m running for Congress to stand up for the dignity and care of families in my hometown.** That means protecting Social Security and Medicare. It means working to bring down the cost of everything from prescription drugs to groceries. It means creating good-paying jobs and opportunities right here at home. I know the road ahead won’t be easy. Lauren Boebert is bought and paid for by billionaires like Elon Musk, who are willing to do – and spend – whatever it takes to defeat us. But if there’s anything I’ve learned from growing up in Colorado, it’s this: There are things money can’t buy, greed can’t steal, and corruption can’t crush. It's us. We the people. clean_body: Lauren Boebert has failed the families in my hometown. I’m running to defeat her. | | = Friend, my name is Trisha Calvarese (D), and Congresswoman Nellie Pou let me know I could reach out. I just launched my campaign for Congress to defeat Lauren Boebert (R), flip the House blue and stand up for working families in my hometown. In a second, I want to tell you a little more about myself and why I’m in this race. But first, I need you to know that if we win here, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to take back the House.= My story begins in the rural Eastern Plains. My dad was a dedicated civil servant, and my mom was a child-care provider. From the beginning, they’ve been my models of what servant leadership means. When they both became terminally ill with cancer less than two years ago, I returned home to provide end-of-life care for them. It was the toughest thing I’ve ever done. It opened my eyes to how broken our systems are – and I couldn’t believe that our members of Congress weren’t doing more to fix them. So that’s what I’m doing: I’m running for Congress to stand up for the dignity and care of families in my hometown. That means protecting Social Security and Medicare. It means working to bring down the cost of everything from prescription drugs to groceries. It means creating good-paying jobs and opportunities right here at home. I know the road ahead won’t be easy. Lauren Boebert is bought and paid for by billionaires like Elon Musk, who are willing to do – and spend – whatever it takes to defeat us. But if there’s anything I’ve learned from growing up in Colorado, it’s this: There are things money can’t buy, greed can’t steal, and corruption can’t crush. It's us. We the people. This is our seat. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately. Thank you for your early support. There’s a lot of work ahead of us, but I’m so grateful to have you by my side. Together, I know we can win this thing. Trisha Calvarese | | | ---|---|--- About Nellie Pou Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. Nellie has dedicated her entire life to the community that raised her, and in Congress she will do the same. | = | = ---|--- Follow Nellie | | | ---|---|--- Checks may also be mailed to: Nellie Pou for Congress - PO BOX 2696, Paterson, NJ, 07509 Paid for by Nellie Pou for Congress Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . Nellie Pou for Congress PO Box 2696 Paterson, NJ 07509 United States

Mike and his Democratic colleagues will not stand for this abuse of power. **But they need your support in speaking out against this package.

From what we’ve seen, this package is going to make significant cuts to Medicaid, which include increasing obstacles for people to secure their coverage, freezing the provider tax that states depend on to pay for Medicaid programs, and destroying climate-change proposals.

This package is shameful and reckless. Millions of Americans will suffer at the hands of House Republicans while hospitals will close, senior citizens will lose coverage, and premiums will rise.

Mike is fighting hard in his role on the Ways and Means Committee against this harmful budget, but we need everyone to make their voices heard. Congressional Republicans will only back down if they know that voters will kick them out next November, so let’s make it clear that we won’t let them get away with it!

name: John Fetterman
subject: a reminder about today 🗳️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Hey, Derek, it's John.

I wanted to make sure you know about the upcoming Primary Election on May 20 – and that TODAY at 5pm is the deadline to request your ballot if you're voting by mail.

Even though presidential races usually get a lot of the attention, it's local races like these that really make a big difference. 💯

It's races like these that put the folks in charge who'll decide funding for our kids' schools, local roads, public safety, community parks – you name it.

And it's races like these that can be won or lost by a single vote. Believe me, I know. 👀

So as the mayor of Braddock for 13 years before serving as lieutenant governor and now senator, I had to reach out to make sure you have a plan to vote on or before May 20.

🗳️ If you need to request your ballot, check your voter registration, register to vote, or find your local polling place to vote in person on Election Day, make sure you're all set by using the buttons below:

Request your ballot
https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51088?t=1001&akid=10090%2E434096%2E2urSIt

Check your voter registration
https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47038?t=1002&akid=10090%2E434096%2E2urSIt

Register to vote
https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51089?t=1003&akid=10090%2E434096%2E2urSIt

Find your polling place
https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51090?t=1004&akid=10090%2E434096%2E2urSIt

Your vote is your voice, so make your plan, bring a friend, and vote. 🇺🇸

Democracy works best when we all show up – or, as the case may be, send in our mail-in ballot.

John ❤️

--------

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here: https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1005&akid=10090%2E434096%2E2urSIt

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1006&akid=10090%2E434096%2E2urSIt

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

As we approach November, grassroots donations from people like you are what’s going to help us power our voter outreach efforts across the state. **Breaking it down, we’ve set a goal of raising:**

* **$125k** for our Vote Local programs
* **$250k** for our Vote by Mail programs

body:
The White House is actively looking to suspend Habeas Corpus and due process.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107615730/545255490/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYmVmZDIwNC0wZDMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3dYdsT5vWm7QY6Z86QWhgpMa0SyycbRyKI0j0xhi998=&emci=047a37db-0530-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=2befd204-0d30-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=26261389)
---

| | Over the weekend, Stephen Miller said the White House was "actively looking at" options to suspend Habeas Corpus and due process in times of invasion or rebellion. Just hours later, Miller posts these lies, but look at how he's lying – saying that Members of Congress "riotously stormed and invaded." First, the Members of Congress were at the facility conducting an oversight inspection. They are permitted by law to do so (DHS Appropriations Act, 2020, Sec. 532). Here is ICE guidance that acknowledges that Members can visit for oversight. Unannounced visits happen regularly. The Members of Congress who showed up were given entry to the facility by ICE. They were already lawfully on the premises when the Mayor was arrested. They didn't break in or invade. They, in fact, did conduct an official oversight tour of the facility. So why is Stephen Miller lying? We need to see this for what it is. Miller is intentionally using language of rebellion and invasion to try and seed the ground to give them the pretext to violate the Constitution. What does that mean? If you're arrested or detained, Habeas Corpus allows you to challenge the legality of that arrest. It's the part of our law that helps prevent the government from just arresting whoever they want, whenever they want. If that security blanket is taken away, it allows Trump and Miller to expand actions against anyone who speaks out against them. It suppresses dissent and puts opposition into the shadows. Why do this? What Miller and Trump actually want is to clear opposition so they can act with absolute impunity. We've seen them bully Republicans in Congress into giving up their checks and balances power. We've seen them elevate a unitary executive theory that says that all power in the government falls within the president. They want absolute power – nothing less. In spite of these lies by Miller, we must all remember that the Constitution is clear that the power to suspend Habeas Corpus is in Article 1 (Congress), not Article 2 (the Executive). The President cannot do this on his own. Why even say it? Miller knows Trump can't do this. Miller talks about it in the context of immigration, but that's another part of their plan. They want you to focus on a broken immigration system that they continue to break instead of fixing it – not their lawlessness and power grabs. Certainly not their attempts to gut Medicaid and lower taxes for billionaires. Keep focus. We must not play into their hands. Trump and Miller's plans are to overwhelm. It's chaos with a purpose – their power and corruption. We need to keep our eye on the ball and keep our focus on keeping power in the hands of the people, not those who want it all for themselves. More soon, _Andy_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Andy Kim instantly:

body:
---

clean_body: = | A judge just paused part of Trump’s sweeping executive order on voting rights, but the rest of it still stands. This is a fight far from over. Here’s what you need to know: 🛑 Trump’s EO would force voters to show documentary proof of citizenship—something we know from Kansas would block seniors, students, and naturalized citizens from registering. ⚖️ The judge ruled Trump overstepped his authority by trying to implement the SAVE Act via executive order. 👥 Minnesota is leading a separate multi-state lawsuit to fully strike down this order —and protect voter access for millions. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed now. | **********=******** | ********=******** | ********=******** | ********=******** | ********=******** | ********=******** This ruling is a good step, but it doesn’t stop the attacks. ---
Team, I’m proud today to officially endorse Peggy Flanagan in the race for Minnesota’s open Senate seat. [**If you’re ready to help Peggy win this race and support our fight to get our government to work for working families, please split a donation between our campaigns now.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3002?t=8&akid=2543%2E4032634%2EC6H58V) _Listen_ : **Right now is when we need to build our power in the Senate with true fighters for the working class.** Billionaires like Elon Musk have taken over the government. Republicans in Congress won’t stand up as Donald Trump wrecks our economy. And working families who were already struggling to get by are now paying even more for the things they need every day. That’s why I’m proud to throw my support behind Peggy Flanagan to be the next senator for Minnesota. We need Democrats in the Senate who are going to fight with everything they've got for working people, and that’s exactly who she’s always been. From her early days on the Minneapolis School Board to now serving as Minnesota’s Lieutenant Governor, **Peggy is an organizer at heart.** She’s gutsy, smart, experienced, and ready to take on corrupt special interests in order to make life better for working people. She’s the daughter of a single mom who understands what it’s like to worry the bottom could fall out at any moment. That lived experience drove her fight to raise the minimum wage and make paid family leave a reality for Minnesota families. That’s the kind of fighter we need in Washington. Peggy is the partner I need to make real progress on the issues that matter — housing, child care, and the cost of living — and she’s the leader working families need right now. But this race isn’t going to be a walk in the park. Peggy’s running a grassroots campaign and not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. That means she needs this team — grassroots supporters — to contribute the resources she needs to win. [**Please, if you can, split a donation today to Peggy’s campaign and ours today to send a champion for working families to the Senate and keep up our fight to make our government work for everyone.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3002?t=9&akid=2543%2E4032634%2EC6H58V)

name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: Voter Rights Fumbled in Chester County
body:
Jaime Oliver | B+L Featured Columnist | | | |
---
| | |
---
| **__Jaime Oliver_ :__ Mistakes or incompetence in Chester County?_**
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a8d55ef4df&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
* * *
---
| "The mistakes or incompetence of the Chester County Department of Voter Services and the solicitor’s office are on full display. On Wednesday, April 23, 2025, the county notified officials from both major parties that the [county made a mistake in not putting the office of prothonotary on the Municipal Primary Ballot](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=c2b563f4b7&e=b7b3eddce2) for the May 20, 2025 election. The elected prothonotary, Debbie Bookman, was forced to resign in October 2024 due to “financial irregularities” that were discovered and investigated. Now, the nominations to replace her will run through party committees, not primary elections..."
---
| [Read More](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=8bfcee1fcc&e=b7b3eddce2 "Read More")

This is about ensuring Floridians have the property tax relief they need and deserve. | | | [](http://links.freedom.rondesantis.com/s/c/HhYhQATvBw40NWQiJzr8nnZTY-VAVZjR_77v6RvM4p1bUeHIrQTer7IZJNy3OnvQPJATA3gcepfyDDz_6AnRhB4kHr6VbKG6oRYmwG0nOyIoWoCJLTdcVdgZLwiBOnMMRrL2yHMzUWoQrCr30DVbINmWfywsr0wF4b1lTZ1s2aWBgk70YrieAkDJXoA-xYJRx34gRvrVVEyCI2AkYgDe8NZcCdV50i0XlP9f91PmcdZKleC8-sU45YczJNAbnP9ROQ09pdrsU0-va84s6ohFoGFrK4spAmZCjYp8nmqjYrU4Jw/eHPSzoyarqS21CtFfIZwsQgIJhbsZEGa/8)
---
Friend, Gov. Ron DeSantis has threatened to veto the Florida House’s $5 billion tax relief package (which would provide $1,000 in property tax rebates) – _and for good reason._ The House’s package focuses on reducing the sales tax rate from 6% to 5.25%, which would primarily benefit visitors and part-time residents, **rather than REAL relief for Florida homeowners.** [**Listen to the roundtable discussion Gov. DeSantis hosted on the need for property tax relief.**](http://links.freedom.rondesantis.com/s/c/evK6imRemqPNIfRnN-zkNNIHR_GBYpKmo11hEV1wmEHlJNpLJuj3zKPDZGyfJWWMSO2dzjpFZTHpEv2c0rvlkuF8NKRqB2okllx9MeeOCSe2I6W4xtWfokhnqdYx4ZI2uGcfsy2PiuinTh97oonIbEHI97jWdEaFSPxmfP9GGkGnX4gUDRCg55RLt2EttNob7-EKgTFaZ6ZibyouGyZUjmEU5xPfc6dJ7XDBwUH7b0x3cwaKtIZMa6_4AgtzQ4Y08OiMtj6xA0vBQGpPfMWmjAK4HmeEPLbb2Cp5Qan8Jeup5Q/fk0vAUUZg4DW1db52cirETAUnnqiv_rb/8)

The Equality Act is centered on one thing: freedom. It’s up to each of us to defend and ensure that right for every person. name: Hillsdale College via Victory Mailings
subject: Now Available: “Ancient Christianity” on DVD
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj204omsgarc4uakz65wvpqsg22zltenownyrx0l423jwc4eeig7qoprgx90wjw62oca11i7ykhuz5f65zopr&__stmp=sw7j8q&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sw7j8q&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6ja18i54m5qke7uzaaswgbmcr4244hj5nzpd2c6qumpdmxaf5b6hgp6047n253750p8wxbisg7itwt6jlkmelkrdrqi2ffhsjubi0vutginqlha2m6ymm4r99sc0rzqax3sswfoj4px648grnygx0&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sw7j8q&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sw7j8q&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sw7j8q&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sw7j8q&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6ja18i54m5qke7uzaaswgbmcrpb6x3b36rmkuroe5scp5rlv3rqv0vbsypg5gvew295yjcribmwnhfmzgdrihx2163ehecfdjrschq0ut8dsu6xdt8vpidqhv5zmp4885rc5jxfw48yhfcvuywv10&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sw7j8q&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sw7j8q&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Britney VanCitters
subject: The election is a week from today!
body:
| | |
---
Dear Peter, This is your friendly reminder that the upcoming election on Tuesday, May 20th is a week away! Have you made your plan to vote yet? If not, no worries! There are two ways to return your ballot:
1. Send it by mail! Your ballot must be _postmarked_ on or before May 20th, and arrive at your county elections office within seven days of election day. And postage is prepaid!
2. Use an [official dropbox](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107620320/545270146/719410068?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZiMjY3NTUzLTEzMzAtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eVCtGpB_kSra0yvTWP0Hmmny_0w_sO13aZlMJzXy51c=&emci=bf4eb46e-812f-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=fb267553-1330-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=2107230)! As long as you are in line at an official dropbox location by 8pm on May 20th, your ballot will be accepted.

**Unsure which candidates on your ballot will stand up for climate action, environmental protections, and public health?** We’ve got you! You can see all of [**OLCV’s endorsements here**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107620322/545270152/485439929?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZiMjY3NTUzLTEzMzAtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eVCtGpB_kSra0yvTWP0Hmmny_0w_sO13aZlMJzXy51c=&emci=bf4eb46e-812f-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=fb267553-1330-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=2107230)**** and check out what candidates said when asked about climate and environment with our [**Environmental Voter Guide**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107620324/545270154/-644473869?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZiMjY3NTUzLTEzMzAtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eVCtGpB_kSra0yvTWP0Hmmny_0w_sO13aZlMJzXy51c=&emci=bf4eb46e-812f-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=fb267553-1330-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=2107230). clean_body: | | | Dear Peter, This is your friendly reminder that the upcoming election on Tuesday, May 20th is a week away! Have you made your plan to vote yet? If not, no worries! There are two ways to return your ballot: 1. Send it by mail! Your ballot must be postmarked on or before May 20th, and arrive at your county elections office within seven days of election day. And postage is prepaid! 2. Use an ! As long as you are in line at an official dropbox location by 8pm on May 20th, your ballot will be accepted. Unsure which candidates on your ballot will stand up for climate action, environmental protections, and public health? We’ve got you! You can see all of **** and check out what candidates said when asked about climate and environment with our . For any questions you may have about voting, take a look at our . Voting and having your voice heard is your right, so please take part in our democracy and get your ballot in! Happy voting, Britney VanCitters (she/her) OLCV Political & Organizing Director | | | | | ---|---|--- Oregon League of Conservation Voters 1110 SE Alder Suite 220 Portland, OR 97214 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Team Keith
subject: Listening and taking action
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417
body:
Peter,

As the People’s Lawyer, Keith knows that real leadership starts with listening. That’s why he’s holding community forums in every region of the state.

At every stop, Keith invites Minnesotans to talk about the challenges they’re facing. Thousands of people have shared stories about struggling to afford their lives, worrying about cuts to services they count on, and facing threats to their ability to live with dignity, safety, and respect.

But Keith isn’t just listening. He’s taking action.

The stories Keith hears during these community conversations shape the work he does every day—from challenging unconstitutional orders issued by the Trump administration, to upholding state laws that protect trans students and other vulnerable communities, to preserving funding for education, public health research, clean energy, and more.

Thanks to Keith’s leadership, Trump and his fellow MAGA extremists have been forced to abandon or halt some of their most dangerous plans. Keith will continue doing everything in his power to protect us from Trump’s cruel agenda, but we need to help him keep up the fight.

Peter, will you chip in to support Keith as listens to Minnesotans and fights for our rights and freedoms in court?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
CHIP IN $10 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250513ke?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]

OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250513ke?refcode=other]

Thank you,

Team Keith

Minnesota's Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program reset on January 1. You can now use your 2025 PCR to contribute up to $75 (or $150 for couples) and receive a full refund from the State of Minnesota.

Please take advantage of your PCR and make a REFUNDABLE $75 DONATION so Keith can continue fighting to help people afford their lives and live with safety, dignity, and respect.

_**
Today, the party proudly supports socialism, with its most prominent members even calling themselves proud socialists who want to end capitalism.

_And the worst part is, our young people are falling for their lies._

If we’re going to stop the scourge of socialism in our country, we must all band together and take a stand - and that’s why I’m reaching out to you today. **I have a track record of fighting against the socialism that has infected our nation.**

Now, I want YOU to take a stand against socialism, so I put together a poll to show the world we will NEVER be a socialist country.

| | Fellow Conservative, By all accounts, President Trump's Senate majority is working at breakneck speed to make _history_ ... **" The Senate, by its own standards, [concluded] one of its most productive periods in recent history at the close of President Donald Trump's first 100 days."** [Source: _Fox News_] And the cherry on top? Our majority just dealt a humiliating blow to the failed Obama-Biden legacy. **_As of the close of President Trump 's first 100 days, our Senate majority is officially _OUTPACING_ the Obama Senate. _** But despite all this great news, Fellow Conservative, there's still one thing keeping me up at night... Our Party's **[Nationwide Conservative Voter Censu](http://trk.tedcruz._iHjUgg)[s](http://trk.tedcruz.) [](http://trk.tedcruz._DbJ5g)** is chock-full of unverified and unaccounted for voter profiles among likely GOP voters. **_And that means this census is the _LONE AREA_ where we're lagging behind the Democrats._** I fear that if this misstep isn't corrected soon, we could not only lose in the midterms, but lose all of our historic achievements in the blink of an eye. **[So please, take just a moment to privately complete (keep your screen out of sight) your Conservative Voter Questionnaire to VERIFY your profile for the GOP's Nationwide Census.](http://trk.tedcruz.)** **[[VERIFY NOW]](http://trk.tedcruz.)** Thank you, Ted Cruz **[[VERIFY NOW]](http://trk.tedcruz._2gBrKJrqWRlF1EPHqoA)**

Photo by [KWON JUNHO](https://substack.com/redirect/c3b23d2d-af68-43de-9d6c-99dcdfbf9d0c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on [Unsplash](https://substack.com/redirect/bf1da158-89d8-4236-8e71-edca3f995796?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The Department of Energy's recent reversal of Biden-era regulations on gas stoves, tankless water heaters, refrigerators, and other household appliances, announced on May 3, 2025, is a resounding victory for American consumers. As a conservative Republican who supports President Trump, I see this move as a bold affirmation of individual freedom, economic sensibility, and a pragmatic approach to environmental stewardship. By axing restrictive efficiency standards, the Trump administration is empowering families, reducing costs, and aligning with core conservative principles.
Under Biden, regulations imposed stringent energy and water efficiency requirements, effectively limiting consumer options. For instance, rules pushed for near-total bans on certain gas stoves and mandated low-water dishwashers and shower-heads. These policies, while cloaked in environmental rhetoric, often ignored the practical needs of American households. The Department of Energy estimates that reversing these rules will save consumers $24 billion annually. For a family in rural Mississippi, this could mean hundreds of dollars saved yearly on utility bills and appliance purchases. Lower costs enhance financial freedom, a cornerstone of conservative values, allowing families to allocate resources to education, healthcare, or savings.
Individual choice is another pillar restored by these changes. Biden's regulations effectively nudged consumers toward electric appliances, disregarding personal preferences or regional realities. Gas stoves, favored by 38% of U.S. households for their precision and reliability, faced potential phase-outs. By freeing gas stoves from restrictive rules, Trump's policy respects Americans' right to choose what works best for their homes. This is particularly crucial in areas with unreliable electric grids or high electricity costs, where gas appliances are both practical and economical. Similarly, scrapping water restrictions on dishwashers and showerheads ensures consumers can prioritize performance over arbitrary standards, enhancing daily quality of life.
Conservatives also value environmental responsibility, but we favor practical solutions over heavy-handed mandates. The Biden regulations often overstated their ecological benefits while ignoring trade-offs. For example, forcing a shift to electric appliances increases demand on coal- and gas-powered grids, potentially offsetting carbon reductions. Trump's approach allows market innovation to drive efficiency--historically, competition has spurred greener technologies without coercive rules. Consumers can now choose modern, energy-efficient gas or electric appliances that suit their needs, fostering a balance between environmental care and personal freedom.
Moreover, these reversals curb government overreach, a perennial conservative concern. Biden's rules exemplified bureaucratic meddling, dictating minutiae of household life. By rolling them back, Trump reaffirms that families, not Washington, should make decisions about their homes. This aligns with the conservative ethos of limited government, trusting individuals to act responsibly without top-down control.
In sum, the Department of Energy's actions are a triumph for consumers and conservative principles. They reduce costs, restore choice, and promote a sensible environmental approach, all while rejecting intrusive governance. As conservatives, we celebrate policies that empower Americans to live freely and prosperously.

clean_body: Go to work ✅ Sue Donald Trump ✅ | = Peter, the courts are one of our most powerful tools in fighting back against the Trump administration. And EMILYs List women are leading the charge: In the first 100 days of Trump's presidency, EMILYs List-endorsed Massachusetts Attorney General Andrea Campbell sued his administration more than a dozen times. **= | = AG Campbell's lawsuits challenge a pattern of blatantly unlawful actions by the Trump administration, including their federal funding cuts, diversity initiative restrictions, dismantling of the Department of Education, and more. Attorneys general play a crucial role in checking executive overreach, and we're proud to see EMILYs List women on the frontlines of this fight. From attorneys general to mayors to U.S. House representatives, Democratic pro-choice women are defending reproductive freedom, protecting our democracy, and advocating for real solutions that benefit everyone. We need more leaders who aren't afraid to stand up and defend our freedoms. =** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, the EMILYs List State & Local Campaigns team = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. It was an honor for Moms for America Podcast to receive an invitation to the White House for the celebration of President Trump's
first 100 days in office this year. Moms for America Vice President and podcast host, Debbie Kraulidis, interviewed several
officials in the administration. She has inside perspective to share with our listeners about what the President and his team have
accomplished and what is next.

In this episode, you'll hear from Senior Policy Advisor (and mom of two daughters) May Mailman and Principal Deputy Press
Secretary Harrison Fields, who has a special message for our moms. Like, subscribe and share.

impacted thus far. How would you grade their first 100 days?

clean_body: The Moms for America Podcast was honored to receive an invitation to the White House for the celebration of President Trump's first 100 days in office. If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] [] May 13, 2025 • Newsletter First 100 Days from the White House - Part 1 Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] [] Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] It was an honor for Moms for America Podcast to receive an invitation to the White House for the celebration of President Trump's first 100 days in office this year. Moms for America Vice President and podcast host, Debbie Kraulidis, interviewed several officials in the administration. She has inside perspective to share with our listeners about what the President and his team have accomplished and what is next. In this episode, you'll hear from Senior Policy Advisor (and mom of two daughters) May Mailman and Principal Deputy Press Secretary Harrison Fields, who has a special message for our moms. Like, subscribe and share. View the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast on Spotify [] Moms for America Weekly Blog [] [] Trump's First 100 Days - 12 Ways He's Making America Great Again Welcome to the first 100 days of the Golden Era in America! Trump's team hit the ground running and has made enormous progress, probably faster than any past administration in our nearly 250 years as a nation. We're looking at twelve areas the Trump team has impacted thus far. How would you grade their first 100 days? Read the Blog [] [] In Truth & Liberty, Kimberly Fletcher Founder and President Moms for America® The Mom View [] [] Empowering Conversations Start Here! From parenting to public policy, The MomView delves into the topics that shape our culture, impact our nation and influence our homes, because every issue is a mom issue. Season 2 Episodes on Mondays at 10am ET View on YouTube [] View on Rumble [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] Copyright © 2025 Moms for America, All rights reserved. body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107622971/545279830/753003349?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGY2OWM2Ni0xODMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Enrga31A7beLDplI0XzABTZfp78K_gtCep-W8dXA7HM=)
Friend,

I recently went on _Fox News_ to share my thoughts on House Republicans’ disastrous plan to give billionaires tax breaks on the backs of working people.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107622976/545279834/-803653937?v=NfXOgmR3OWU&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGY2OWM2Ni0xODMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Enrga31A7beLDplI0XzABTZfp78K_gtCep-W8dXA7HM=&emci=f72ef69a-1230-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=48f69c66-1830-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=13891387)
_Click**[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107622977/545279838/-803653937?v=NfXOgmR3OWU&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGY2OWM2Ni0xODMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Enrga31A7beLDplI0XzABTZfp78K_gtCep-W8dXA7HM=&emci=f72ef69a-1230-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=48f69c66-1830-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=13891387)** to watch the full segment._
What’s moving through Congress this week should concern everyone -- _Fox_ viewers included. Republicans are proposing up to $880 billion in Medicaid cuts and $230 billion in cuts to SNAP, which helps thousands of families put food on the table.

Families across our district need real relief -- and I know that in Southern and Central Illinois, folks from all political backgrounds agree: slashing Medicaid and food assistance just to hand out tax breaks to the wealthy is flat-out wrong.

I serve on the House Agriculture Committee -- the same committee debating these massive SNAP cuts. I want to be clear that I’ll be fighting them every step of the way.

**[Please take a minute to watch the interview, and if you’re with me, chip in $3 to help us keep IL-13 blue and fight back against these extreme attacks.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107622978/545279839/753003349?refcode=em-5.13.25-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGY2OWM2Ni0xODMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Enrga31A7beLDplI0XzABTZfp78K_gtCep-W8dXA7HM=)**

Thanks,

Nikki

name: Alea Nadeem
subject: Here’s my story from captivity to Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alea for Congress
body:
From being kidnapped to Iraq to the U.S. Air Force
| | | |

---
|
---
|

---
| | Patriot,
**I was just 8 years old when a trip to Iraq to visit family ended with me being held captive for years under Saddam Hussein’s regime.**
My name is Alea Nadeem. I’m a Lieutenant Colonel in the U.S. Air National Guard, and I’m running for the U.S. Congress.

body:
David wants to thank you for your support at this critical moment.

Peter, **David let us know that he wants to call grassroots donors** to thank them for supporting us during this critical moment for Leaders We Deserve.
**[Want a chance to get a call? Donate $5 now and you might be on the list.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250513_1_mm?refcode=em20250513-2123&amount=5&refcode2=2123_587540_Var2g7&akid=2123%2E587540%2EVar2g7)**

Right now, we’re laser-focused on launching our **$20 million investment** in a new generation of progressive leaders. We have some big plans for this election cycle:
🔴 Defeating vulnerable Republicans and flipping their competitive districts blue.
🔵 Challenging ineffective Democrats in safe-seats with young, bold candidates.
🟣 Running progressive champions for open seats and building a bigger bench.
But we also know that **this work is only possible with your support, Peter.** We aren’t funded by right-wing billionaires and corporate PACs. We rely on people just like you chipping in whatever amount makes sense for them, whenever they can.
Our mid-month fundraising deadline is coming up on Thursday and we need this team to ensure we don’t fall behind. If we don’t keep our fundraising on track, we risk needing to scale back on our plans for this election. _We can’t let that happen._
**[Peter, will you make a $5 contribution toward our $25,000 mid-month fundraising goal? Leaders We Deserve

name: MASSIVE PETITION ATTACHED [Democracy on the Line]
subject: STOP the attack on PBS and NPR
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC
body:
Your signature could stop this. Take 30 seconds now.

|
---
**BREAKING: Trump signs executive order to DEFUND PBS and NPR** Peter – this is outrageous:

**Trump just issued an executive order to HALT ALL FUNDING to PBS and NPR.**

That means:

❌Local public media stations across the country SHUT DOWN.
❌Trusted national programs like _PBS NewsHour_ GONE.
❌1,500 stations in all 50 states SILENCED.

_Why?_ Because Trump says public media is “radical left” – and wants to destroy one of the last bastions of independent journalism in America.

**We won’t let that happen. That’s why we’re launching an EMERGENCY PETITION to stop Trump’s authoritarian attack on public media.** **[We need 100,000 signatures by MIDNIGHT to show massive public opposition. Will you add your name now to SAVE PBS and NPR?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107623743/545282690/-33615004?refcode=DOTL_20250513_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk1MDMxNGZmLTFhMzAtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZCIsI6rb70pIEmZX_kPqrf_Csuup_1sT5JgLLPCU30U=&emci=fd0b71e6-e92c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=950314ff-1a30-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=14887570)** | **[→ SIGN THE PETITION ←](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107623744/545282691/-33615004?refcode=DOTL_20250513_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk1MDMxNGZmLTFhMzAtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZCIsI6rb70pIEmZX_kPqrf_Csuup_1sT5JgLLPCU30U=&emci=fd0b71e6-e92c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=950314ff-1a30-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=14887570)**

And just like his war on the free press, this is part of a broader assault on truth, accountability, and democracy.

**We’re fighting back with everything we’ve got – but we need YOU.**

That’s why we’re launching an EMERGENCY PETITION to stop Trump’s authoritarian attack on public media. | Here’s the deal, Peter – public media is a lifeline in rural, urban, and underserved communities alike. But Trump doesn’t care. He’s trying to wipe it out with the stroke of a pen. And just like his war on the free press, this is part of a broader assault on truth, accountability, and democracy. We’re fighting back with everything we’ve got – but we need YOU. Thank you for taking action, Democracy on the Line | | Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC (www.democracyonthelinepac.com) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 122 C Street NW, Suite 360, Washington, DC 20001 Please, consider making a =. Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and protect our fragile Democracy, make a=.

name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: MAGA just revealed their plans for Medicaid
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
On Sunday night, House Republicans released their newest budget proposal, and it confirms what Pramila has been saying all along.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250513-5040-footer&t=1&akid=5040%2E420207%2EpMU_tv)
Peter, we've known for months now that the MAGA budget is likely to include huge cuts to Medicaid, but they’ve been keeping the details under wraps — until now.
On Sunday night, House Republicans released their newest budget proposal, and it confirms what Pramila has been saying all along: **they’re trying to throw millions of working people off their health insurance to pay for tax cuts for billionaires like Elon Musk.**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250513-1?refcode=em20250513-5040&amount=3&refcode2=5040_420207_pMU_tv&akid=5040%2E420207%2EpMU_tv)
[**Will you rush an immediate $3 donation to help Pramila fight back, protect Medicaid, and push for REAL solutions like Medicare For All instead?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250513-1?refcode=em20250513-5040&amount=3&refcode2=5040_420207_pMU_tv&akid=5040%2E420207%2EpMU_tv)
Taking from the poor to give to the rich — that’s what the Republicans are proposing in their budget. They’re fine with:
**❌ Kids losing health coverage**
**❌ Seniors being priced out of care**
**❌ People with disabilities left without support**
All so that billionaires like Trump, Elon, and the rest of the administration’s backers can get a tax cut. It’s absolutely unacceptable — and Pramila will fight them every step of the way.
In the richest country in the world, _no one_ should die because they can’t afford health care. Instead of cutting Medicaid, **we should be moving forward with transformative policies like Medicare For All** that will guarantee _everyone_ can get the care they need without going into crushing lifelong debt.
[**Peter, if you agree, will you pitch in $3 or more today to support our progressive movement and help Pramila keep up the fight?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250513-1?refcode=em20250513-5040&amount=3&refcode2=5040_420207_pMU_tv&akid=5040%2E420207%2EpMU_tv)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250513-1?amount=3&refcode=em20250513-5040&refcode2=5040_420207_pMU_tv&akid=5040%2E420207%2EpMU_tv)**
In solidarity,
Team Pramila
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250513-5040-footer&t=2&refcode2=5040_420207_pMU_tv&akid=5040%2E420207%2EpMU_tv)**

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: Not Again…
body:
https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/america-first-majority-fund-/?utm_campaign=20250507&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A

Peter,

A new Fox News poll just dropped — and its bad news.

Democrats are in a stronger position heading into the 2026 midterms than they were in 2018 when they flipped 40+ seats and took back the House.

https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/america-first-majority-fund-/?utm_campaign=20250507&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A

We cannot let history repeat itself.

Because if Democrats seize the majority again, they won’t just raise taxes and open the border — it’ll be endless impeachment hearings, sham investigations, and non-stop political warfare aimed at one man: President Trump.

That’s why I’m stepping up to defend our majority — and launching my America First Majority Fund – but I can’t defend it alone.

[So please make a contribution to my America First Majority Fund so that we can defend the Republican House majority and continue delivering victories for President Trump and the American people.](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/america-first-majority-fund-/?utm_campaign=20250507&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A)

https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/america-first-majority-fund-/?utm_campaign=20250507&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A

[CONTRIBUTE $25 >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/america-first-majority-fund-/?utm_campaign=20250507&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A/&amount=25)

[CONTRIBUTE $50 >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/america-first-majority-fund-/?utm_campaign=20250507&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A/&amount=50)

[CONTRIBUTE $75 >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/america-first-majority-fund-/?utm_campaign=20250507&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A/&amount=75)

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/america-first-majority-fund-/?utm_campaign=20250507&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A&amount=other)

This isn’t just about winning re-election. This is about defending the entire America First agenda, and I’m ready for the fight!

I was just in Michigan, campaigning for one of the most critical toss-up races in the country — and that’s just the beginning. I’m taking the fight to every battleground district where the majority will be won or lost.

The Democrats have already lined up their donors, their attack ads, and their media allies.

But we’ve got something more powerful: the truth and millions of Americans behind us.

If we fail to defend the House, they’ll bury President Trump’s agenda and put America last once again.

We’ve got to fight like hell and hold the line.

So I’m asking — will you step up today and be one of the first supporters of my America First Majority Fund?

Let’s win this fight together.

In Service

Dan Crenshaw

Friend, I’m supporting Donavan McKinney for Congress, who’s running to represent the congressional district next to mine. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJ5jaT84RMjQmXQez5eyhs1ZvK-L_ZQ2M8wifHJYUrEBMycoZiKjBlZSnVkzTXbc83mJYXp8Q4qiY8zMJ3St7jLNRuDAdZV4jpDwKM_ev5WtM9zPJkNyVWg1O6dZi0Bn5yrkOfqAmec1F66GMFW7l02UM20svl36xCZgR9k6nmvjexO6GKuEbln9bVkdntIsiYRSQNMVs1700HZNc7G0hKg26j3VwXrIiH71r1bL95iq0AnZpVGs1KtRU9BDAJ6TFNWX-t8CnNxutmJHXQwbpoKdvFzVmLG7zUSeLpkLo2Aw0tLsVG5Sdypp6DHphFQ1IzgGl5jaCNEpmixgAg591sShFjsqZukEV7CDJC8QFwEPswDNRoLvHK3-5S3nXO1JHg/4gg/p5boSxdATlyYQmpCaQmJpg/h1/h001.maILy2ScrO-s81CI7w9wubX10me2BnGCnnM8Y6St4oA) _Here’s Donavan with his family_ Working at Michigan’s largest healthcare union and serving in Michigan’s State House, Donavan has led fights to secure workers’ rights, get big money out of politics, and ensure access to clean air and water. **Like me, he grew up in the shadows of corporate polluters in Detroit, and he’s fighting to replace the lead pipes that poison our children.** We’re demanding a democracy that’s of, by, and for the people, where the federal government stops spending so much taxpayer money on war crimes and prisons, and instead invests in our communities’ urgent needs. **Donavan knows how quickly we need to act because he has lived through struggles such as housing and food insecurity.** He puts the people first, and if elected to Congress, Donavan will provide working class representation for one of the poorest congressional districts in the country. This is quite a contrast to his opponent, a self-funded incumbent who spent over $17 million of his own wealth to bankroll his own Congressional campaigns. This incumbent also takes money from corporate PACs, and last year spent more taxpayer money than any other member of Congress on self-promoting ads. Meanwhile, **Donavan****isn’t taking a dime of corporate PAC money, and he has led policies to challenge corporate influence in politics.** We need him in Congress, and he needs grassroots support to get there. [**Will you join me in supporting Donavan McKinney for Congress by splitting a contribution between his campaign and mine today? Together, we’ll push for a government of, by, and for the people, not the billionaires.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJ5jaT84RMjQmXQez5eyhs1ZvK-L_ZQ2M8wifHJYUrEBMN8z_MS-jOYB2M5FaIB_MXHmxdoUV3bzWOdiwInhJ-X1lA5BOJjpLunvGU9XKzw9EKGXJkwPgtCzBlTLjZI8LMIg78zM6IIdjMoZOUNittDbcIaS7cG6zYqdnfD8pxbOwZUstxkUIh5VpXXfgrSv8GVzyzOCwDj6ZyA8PeOmRaZrPdLdgLQKB2xeNTdFDqL8pARbMUDMSVBTjSSpLGs262cBLvbaO3sQaafVjm0zwNJ99oTnjnYejcJt7mHqkjmWjcipnzHrhqu5KXgOER3gWXgIkG-pb9S9TNPXf9-i3fcP9spm40eEzGVXhp4bJ_dF-2RW_FzuQFhPMcRIp4JG7o/4gg/p5boSxdATlyYQmpCaQmJpg/h2/h001.98SbjoHkmyONoO41EpESW2vIY1gpuYCD6YNJQWTU2RM) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Rashida Tlaib and Donavan McKinney_ | | | [Chip in $15 now](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJ5jaT84RMjQmXQez5eyhs1VSBe7NWwVZTAyXXtl3dnraN8PR82JXP3hniOvxryJs-C4MTBpuGnhIEEEAsAi-6-M7besYmoyZUf7NwUKHq6GNqiX2rSiaLcCcImqG2KjJgThikigzW5VA883j9o9k7qV8R4igGrlS8xNWdEFbWi5p9BCkBHs-vxW9qGRU8baFYQ2vAKG4To0bBARLPCm7ReNMqSuCHbwu_VPB7AOS9jKtqECfsgwyxvJQa46fD3UPUDi7bn38ej4zzffU3flDKwcPLeXT7AWV3letEUby0J6ktInFFeSUn1T4w_r_f-1Fn96p_EZhWHHQqN_JfNwPUQxu_0_ZnsbXYaY02vBVwdB7FCDgjisBiPEWqdUeopQQE5zbtmBxxtUrSxmD0Aw7s6-TKQIC1IuBTq92-iQnHibk/4gg/p5boSxdATlyYQmpCaQmJpg/h3/h001.WPltYvBP64QUKOD_qAEW3y3kl6dwcyjopPGl3NDvtvQ)

Donavan said: _“I’m running for my baby boys, because the block you live on shouldn’t determine how far you go. I’m running for you, because I know we deserve better.”_
We do deserve better, and we deserve representatives who actually fight for their communities.
Donavan is a true public servant, and while in office he has secured real wins for the people—including over $600 million to replace lead pipes and more than $10 million in community violence intervention programs.
In Congress, he will keep fighting for public education, public transit, changes to our racist criminal legal system, affordable housing, universal healthcare, and more.
He’ll also be a partner in the fight for a universal basic income. I’ve led policies to send monthly direct payments to individuals and families, and as more Americans are struggling to pay bills and stay housed, we need more Congressional support for transformative anti-poverty programs.
[**Will you help me and Donavan McKinney fight for the society we all deserve by chipping into our campaigns for Congress today?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJ5jaT84RMjQmXQez5eyhs1ZvK-L_ZQ2M8wifHJYUrEBNojy4Dabs_fT3G1Yb1TZ3MFdCLDsUggfy7Q82qLZlWS3lrL-JI_EXWQxGuC4gjdTirDKCFmLou8OETS0nMFQpOZlrHHSrNgkmDZ6bJ0IwD35ViW4GykeU8JlvPK5LUtwcupUMA-jCPnXB5D46t-JYnVXcwCo7KwPgGVXlbCWCCJl6lImg8NT_SKGF2sSOeqwUHJDDq3a4frZOgtGCsxJ7llDUrXjQEn1k8mUonPmECsGlLkL30_V-aCGcgqxIzPCrGxJblGh02ie5MBZ0jyhaadDpVbMJJZ5QXpBLVLfbgaXvMjzXa6zaeRMS52cXJfMpC4H_Jq3dwr_VXf-VQpF58/4gg/p5boSxdATlyYQmpCaQmJpg/h9/h001.Qb08DGSdRc7eBNy4vmfjSLHhqNZXoJ6U_vu6B8y615U)

I’ve known Donavan since before he served in public office, and he always puts community at the center of his work. **He’s a true public servant who puts the people first.**
Like me, Donavan grew up in the shadow of corporate polluters in Detroit. After he and his family developed an asthmatic cough, he began advocating for environmental justice.
He said, _“Raising my two young boys in the same polluted air that I grew up in means that if I know one thing, it’s this: our kids deserve better.”_
Our kids **do** deserve better, and Donavan has fought hard in the State House to ensure families can breathe clean air and drink clean water—including funding over $600 million to replace lead pipes in Detroit and its suburbs.
I know he’ll join me in the crucial fight for environmental justice in Congress. And I know that if he makes it to Congress, Donavan McKinney will be a partner who will act with the urgency we need to meet this moment. **Can you chip in today?**
Donavan has also led fights for public education and public transit, as well as much-needed changes to transform our racist criminal legal system. He delivered more than $10 million in community violence intervention programs to our region. He’s also fighting for Black maternal health, housing protections, and universal healthcare. This is what true public safety looks like.
We need Donavan in Congress serving the people. His self-funded opponent doesn’t have to raise money for his election campaigns. But Donavan does.

clean_body: Donavan McKinney is running to represent my neighboring congressional district. | | | Friend, I’m supporting Donavan McKinney for Congress, who’s running to represent the congressional district next to mine. Here’s Donavan with his family Working at Michigan’s largest healthcare union and serving in Michigan’s State House, Donavan has led fights to secure workers’ rights, get big money out of politics, and ensure access to clean air and water. Like me, he grew up in the shadows of corporate polluters in Detroit, and he’s fighting to replace the lead pipes that poison our children. We’re demanding a democracy that’s of, by, and for the people, where the federal government stops spending so much taxpayer money on war crimes and prisons, and instead invests in our communities’ urgent needs. Donavan knows how quickly we need to act because he has lived through struggles such as housing and food insecurity. He puts the people first, and if elected to Congress, Donavan will provide working class representation for one of the poorest congressional districts in the country. This is quite a contrast to his opponent, a self-funded incumbent who spent over $17 million of his own wealth to bankroll his own Congressional campaigns. This incumbent also takes money from corporate PACs, and last year spent more taxpayer money than any other member of Congress on self-promoting ads. Meanwhile, Donavanisn’t taking a dime of corporate PAC money, and he has led policies to challenge corporate influence in politics. We need him in Congress, and he needs grassroots support to get there. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Rashida Tlaib and Donavan McKinney | | | | | | | | | | Donavan said: “I’m running for my baby boys, because the block you live on shouldn’t determine how far you go. I’m running for you, because I know we deserve better.” We do deserve better, and we deserve representatives who actually fight for their communities. Donavan is a true public servant, and while in office he has secured real wins for the people—including over $600 million to replace lead pipes and more than $10 million in community violence intervention programs. In Congress, he will keep fighting for public education, public transit, changes to our racist criminal legal system, affordable housing, universal healthcare, and more. He’ll also be a partner in the fight for a universal basic income. I’ve led policies to send monthly direct payments to individuals and families, and as more Americans are struggling to pay bills and stay housed, we need more Congressional support for transformative anti-poverty programs. Thank you for having our backs and keeping up the fight for a better future. We’ll keep fighting together. In solidarity, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Mon, May 12, 2025 Subject: We deserve a democracy that’s of, by, and for the people. To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, I’m honored to endorse Donavan McKinney, who’s running to represent my neighboring congressional district in Congress. Here’s Donavan at home with his two young sons and dog Donavan knows our communities’ struggles because he has lived them. Having grown up with housing and food insecurity, he worked with our state’s largest healthcare union to advocate for living wages. While serving in the State House, Donavan has led fights for workers’ rights, economic security, and clean air and water. This working class champion is running against an incumbent who: spent over $17 million of his own wealth to bankroll his own Congressional campaigns , spent more taxpayer money than any other member of Congress last year on ads to promote himself, and takes money from corporate PACs. Meanwhile, Donavan is pushing to get big money out of politics, and has led policies to challenge corporate PACs and lobbyists. Donavan just launched his people-powered, grassroots campaign—so now is a crucial time to demonstrate early support. I’ve known Donavan since before he served in public office, and he always puts community at the center of his work. He’s a true public servant who puts the people first. Like me, Donavan grew up in the shadow of corporate polluters in Detroit. After he and his family developed an asthmatic cough, he began advocating for environmental justice. He said, “Raising my two young boys in the same polluted air that I grew up in means that if I know one thing, it’s this: our kids deserve better.” Our kids do deserve better, and Donavan has fought hard in the State House to ensure families can breathe clean air and drink clean water—including funding over $600 million to replace lead pipes in Detroit and its suburbs. I know he’ll join me in the crucial fight for environmental justice in Congress. And I know that if he makes it to Congress, Donavan McKinney will be a partner who will act with the urgency we need to meet this moment. Can you chip in today? Donavan has also led fights for public education and public transit, as well as much-needed changes to transform our racist criminal legal system. He delivered more than $10 million in community violence intervention programs to our region. He’s also fighting for Black maternal health, housing protections, and universal healthcare. This is what true public safety looks like. We need Donavan in Congress serving the people. His self-funded opponent doesn’t have to raise money for his election campaigns. But Donavan does. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Rashida Tlaib and Donavan McKinney | | | | | | | | | Thank you so much for having our backs. Together, we’ll keep fighting for a future where everyone can thrive. In solidarity, Rashida * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . name: Eric Sorensen
subject: Working for us – not the elites
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107625369/545288609/-1812448514?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmM0MWMzMi0xZDMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RvPLVJSKLEarJYz0Xw6kylk587CVWGSu0CTB9rooB9A=)
Peter, Most folks don’t know this, but unlike a number of other members of Congress, I don’t come from big money. I’m okay with that. I don’t need the third house, or the fifth yacht. And neither do my neighbors. It’s the folks who sit around the kitchen table every week making sure the family budget works who need help. That’s a big reason I’m in Congress today. **It’s my job to make policy that works for us, the real people -- not the elites.** That’s why I’m working to:
* Stop Republicans from passing a $230 billion cut to SNAP, which would harm over 2 million people in our state alone
* Protect small businesses from Trump’s reckless tariffs that threaten their ability to stay afloat
* Pass a Farm Bill that works for our farmers
* And so much more

Ultimately, this is a campaign powered by the people and for the people of North and West Illinois, and together we can keep it that way. That’s why I’m asking: [**Will you consider chipping in a $3 contribution to help keep a real representative in Congress in IL-17? | | Dear Peter,
---
This week’s Hold the Line podcast comes from Atlanta, Georgia. During our Revive in ’25 weekend in the city, I had the opportunity to preach at Enlightened Christian Center.

I stood in the pulpit just hours after landing from the Middle East and shared stories from Iraq—cutting through some of the excuses we as Christians often face. I believe this is a timely message for the Church. _**🎧LISTEN ON ITUNES⬇︎⬇︎⬇︎**_

clean_body: | | | | | | Dear Peter, This week’s Hold the Line podcast comes from Atlanta, Georgia. During our Revive in ’25 weekend in the city, I had the opportunity to preach at Enlightened Christian Center. I stood in the pulpit just hours after landing from the Middle East and shared stories from Iraq—cutting through some of the excuses we as Christians often face. I believe this is a timely message for the Church. 🎧LISTEN ON ITUNES⬇︎⬇︎⬇︎ | | | | My heart is to see the next generation of leaders stand strong and stand tall. As always, listen, subscribe, rate, review, and share! Till all hear, Sean | | | | INTERNATIONAL DONORS— DONATE Donate by Check or Money Order Sean Feucht Ministries310 Third Street NEWashington, DC 20002 Contributions are tax-deductible. | | | | | ---|---|--- Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Hold The Line
