name: Team Baldwin
subject: Actions speak louder than words
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Tammy is fighting back.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4715%2E35263%2EmDL7e-)
Peter, Tammy hears from people every day who are worried about how Trump’s extreme agenda will hurt working families, children, veterans, small business owners, and other everyday Wisconsinites. One issue that comes up repeatedly in Tammy’s conversations with voters? **Health care.** Folks across Wisconsin are terrified that they’ll lose access to their health coverage because of Donald Trump and Republicans’ efforts to slash Medicaid and give billionaires a massive tax break. While Republicans _claim_ that they’re not going after Medicaid, actions speak louder than words. Case in point: **A new congressional analysis of the Republican tax bill shows that their plans to slash Medicaid spending to pay for billionaire tax cuts would result in millions of people losing their health insurance.** More than one million Wisconsinites rely on Medicaid for health care, Peter, and Tammy refuses to sit by while Republicans try to rip health coverage away from millions of people just to put money in the pockets of billionaires. **[Republicans are lying through their teeth about their plans to gut Medicaid, and Tammy is fighting back. If you’re with her, please chip in today:](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/4513?c0=stb-em-may25.qIHRRA&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250513_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4715%2E35263%2EmDL7e-)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3664?c0=stb-em-may25.N_R_0O&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250513_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=4715%2E35263%2EmDL7e-)

## This week on The Sean Spicer Show...
Next week we've got a lot to cover, Steve Moore tomorrow, tonight an update on MAHA with Senator Roger Marshall on the show and Steve Bannon on Friday. A great panel as always, Bradley Devlin, Steve Cortes, Grace Curley. Don't miss it!
[Subscribe now!](https://substack.com/redirect/762f1d97-35b2-40ca-ba90-93e7ba86fab9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## Trump's busy weekend...
Sometimes I feel like I didn't get enough checked off my weekend to-do list.
Errands, projects, you know the drill. There never seems to be enough hours in the day to get everything done.
Well after looking at Trump's weekend of progress, I feel _really_ lazy.
His administration has been going at breakneck speed since he took office for the second time in January, and this weekend was no exception.
The Trump admin has been working major overtime.
From a peace deal between India and Pakistan and a China trade deal, to bringing the last American hostage home, to an executive order finally lowering prescription drug prices, Trump is getting things done -- even on the weekend.
Let's break it down. ...

# [Today Marks 40 Years After the MOVE Bombing](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=163485119&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYzNDg1MTE5LCJpYXQiOjE3NDcxNTc3MjMsImV4cCI6MTc0OTc0OTcyMywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.FN0wUQ_GGD8iJSJJB4KuNkcW68DDabwz5jE3bdm0dwA)
### America Still Hasn't Reckoned with Its State Violence Against Black People
| | [Qasim Rashid, Esq.](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
| May 13
---
| [](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=163485119&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYzNDg1MTE5LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0NzE1NzcyMywiZXhwIjoxNzQ5NzQ5NzIzLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjU1MDIyMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.F2CPUXi_eo7ITtC-g9QDJWAEjGZ0d5QFT8sF6IaX3YA&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=163485119&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYzNDg1MTE5LCJpYXQiOjE3NDcxNTc3MjMsImV4cCI6MTc0OTc0OTcyMywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.FN0wUQ_GGD8iJSJJB4KuNkcW68DDabwz5jE3bdm0dwA&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=163485119&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYzNDg1MTE5LCJpYXQiOjE3NDcxNTc3MjMsImV4cCI6MTc0OTc0OTcyMywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.FN0wUQ_GGD8iJSJJB4KuNkcW68DDabwz5jE3bdm0dwA)
---
| | [](https://substack..K44hHyFhyH3baJCeWh3i9BPPTrrWtQ-4G9V9oA6zgFw?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/qasimrashid/p/today-marks-40-years-after-the-move?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Forty years ago today, on May 13, 1985, the United States government bombed a residential neighborhood in West Philadelphia. The Philadelphia Police Department, with full authorization from city officials, dropped a satchel bomb--military-grade explosives--onto the home of the Black liberation group MOVE. The bombing killed 11 people, including five children: Tree Africa, Netta Africa, Little Phil Africa, Delisha Africa, and Tomasa Africa. The adults who were murdered were John Africa, Rhonda Africa, Frank Africa, Raymond Africa, Conrad Africa, and Theresa Africa.
Why isn't this taught in history books nation wide, and why, by all probability, are you just now hearing about it for the first time?**Let 's Address This.**
**I am doing everything in my power to raise awareness on human rights and justice. I cannot do it alone. I hope you consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..K1D9mqKZnF7S-l6n54n1dmJeN4YaQGGiwRNFB6wTneI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=163485119)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/537b1324-d70d-4398-ae80-76d2c761a58d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The aftermath of the MOVE bombing
## An American Legacy of Atrocity
Perhaps just as atrocious, the MOVE bombing wasn't even the _first_ time the U.S. Government bombed its own citizens. Instead, it marked the second time in U.S. history that the government bombed its own citizens. The first was the 1921 Tulsa Massacre, where white mobs, backed by law enforcement, annihilated the prosperous Black neighborhood of Greenwood, killing up to 300 Black people. Both times, it was Black Americans who were bombed. Both times, it was the state that sanctioned the carnage. Both times, the state turned a blind eye to its agents who instigated violence.
In Philadelphia, the bomb ignited a massive fire that destroyed 61 homes and left 250 people homeless. But perhaps the greatest horror was this: the Philadelphia Police Department ordered firefighters to "let the fire burn." For 90 minutes, the flames raged uninhibited. The fire they started, then nurtured, continued to take innocent life as city officials watched and laughed. And when Black civilians tried to escape the fire, Philadelphia police opened fire on them.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/cd9a1f73-cb3e-4d29-8bb5-8e3722dc7101?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_MOVE in 1978,[Courtesy of Temple University Libraries's blog History News](https://substack.com/redirect/b45dfb16-4468-420e-8847-ef8e09c84a58?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_
**If you 're finding value in this piece, join our efforts and subscribe.**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..K1D9mqKZnF7S-l6n54n1dmJeN4YaQGGiwRNFB6wTneI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=163485119)
## Zero Accountability--Except One Person
It may not surprise you, therefore, to learn that no one was ever prosecuted. Not one city official. Not one police officer. Not the pilot who flew the helicopter. Not the police chief who gave the order. In fact, the only person who faced any consequences whatsoever was Ramona Africa--the one surviving adult member of MOVE. Africa exercised her 5th Amendment right to refuse to testify in court, was charged with riot and conspiracy, convicted on both counts, and spent seven years in prison. You read that correctly, the only person who faced accountability for being bombed, was a Black woman who was bombed as her family and loved ones were burned and killed before her very eyes.
The message was chillingly clear: Black life, Black children, Black families--~~were~~ are expendable.
The bombing was a gross violation of constitutional and human rights. The MOVE members were not tried in a court of law. They were not given due process. Instead, they were executed by a militarized police force, and their neighborhood was reduced to ashes in an act of state terrorism. The right to life, to be free from unlawful search and seizure, to a fair trial--all shredded in the fire and buried under the rubble.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6f372743-4e82-4488-88f2-f247084bb9ca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Photo of Ramona Africa by Dominique Di Prima
## 40 Years Later -- No Meaningful Progress
Indeed to this day, human remains of MOVE bombing victims continue to be used in universities and put on display in museums, as if they are props. The dehumanization of Black Americans continues, the lack of accountability screams at deafening decibels, and the injustices that enabled the bombing go unmitigated--all but ensuring future similar injustice. And whether you're Black or not, this affects you directly.
This is particularly relevant today as we see the Trump regime attempt to deny immigrants due process of law, disappear Black and brown people from the streets, and lock them in prisons hundreds, sometimes thousands of miles away, including in other countries. And yet, today, the same white supremacy that justified the MOVE bombing continues to metastasize in our systems. The Trump regime's attempts to erase Black history--from banning AP African American Studies to removing mention of slavery and civil rights from textbooks--is not about education. It is about erasure. It is about justifying past atrocities so they can recreate present and future atrocities. It is about ensuring the next MOVE bombing doesn't spark outrage--but apathy.
## Remember MOVE
Understand this fact: the MOVE bombing was not a mistake. It was a calculated act of domestic warfare against Black resistance, against Black humanity, by the government. It is not ancient history. It is contemporary reality. And it is censored from history books by the very people who see no problem with such atrocities being committed in the future. Therefore, unless we learn from this injustice, it will be repeated--just as MOVE was repeated after no one faced accountability for committing the Tulsa Race Massacre.
Forty years later, the fire of anti-Black hate still burns--because the flames of white supremacy continue to dominate state and national policy. History shows, if we do not stand up now, we may not get the chance to stand at all. Let us never forget the MOVE bombing. Justice demands accountability. And our collective humanity depends on it.

Judge Jeanine Pirro rose through the ranks at Fox News to become one of the network’s most popular hosts.

But Pirro’s career at Fox News just ended in an instant.

And now Judge Jeanine Pirro is quitting Fox News in this sudden move.

| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23058%2E4449941%2EkQG5T4) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23058%2E4449941%2EkQG5T4) | [**WOAH!!**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61147?t=3&akid=23058%2E4449941%2EkQG5T4)

Senators Amy Klobuchar and Chuck Schumer are trying to pass an AMAZING Constitutional Amendment...

[**It would END the influence of Dark Money and prevent Billionaires like Elon Musk from rigging elections for Republicans!**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61147?t=4&akid=23058%2E4449941%2EkQG5T4)

_This is so awesome!!_

[**_We need EVERY committed Democrat reading this to endorse Klobuchar and Schumer 's bill to hit 25,OOO signatures before 10:00 AM tomorrow >>_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61148?t=5&akid=23058%2E4449941%2EkQG5T4) | []()
---|---
| [SIGN YOUR NAME ->](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61147?t=6&akid=23058%2E4449941%2EkQG5T4)
---
Amy Klobuchar and Chuck Schumer's plan is vitally important.

Here's what it would do:

**FIRST:** It would overturn _Citizens United_ - which has ERODED our democracy for fifteen years.

**SECOND:** It would prevent Super PACs and Dark Money donors from flooding undisclosed funds into our elections.

**FINALLY:** It would stop Billionaires from EVER attempting to buy our elections again!!

This would be groundbreaking.

And it would give Democrats a HUGE opportunity to win the Midterms and take back our Majority in 2026 - fair and square!

[**_If you 're on board with Klobuchar and Schumer's Constitutional Amendment, please join 24,999 other good Democrats in signing our petition to give them the momentum they need!_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61147?t=7&akid=23058%2E4449941%2EkQG5T4)

HELP DEMS WIN TWO HOUSE SEATS IN FLORIDA >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida:
Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.
To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments
These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).
Flipping these suits blue IS possible - but only if we start preparing NOW. Will you help us build up a warchest of funding to rush to the Democrats who run for these seats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]

Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth on Friday sent a memo to West
Point, the U.S. Naval Academy and the U.S. Air Force Academy, saying
that all future admissions will be based solely on merit. He said the
secretaries of the military departments would have 30 days to certify
that there will be no consideration of race, ethnicity or sex in
applications and that they will be based on merit only.

clean_body: Background on Defense Secretary Hegeseth eliminating DEI in. service academy admissions [NEWSLINK] BREAKING NEWS... [image] [] RIGHTS AND FREEDOMS IN PERIL "When it comes to fighting for the American people’s ‘right to know,’ no one holds a candle to Tom Fitton and his team at Judicial Watch" - SEAN HANNITY Tom Fitton returns with an exhaustive investigation into the progressive movement’s efforts to dismantle the venerable institutions of American rights and freedoms. Order Tom Fitton's Must-Read Today! [] [600x300] [] Pete Hegseth directs military academies that all future admissions will be based solely on merit [] Source: Fox News [] Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth on Friday sent a memo to West Point, the U.S. Naval Academy and the U.S. Air Force Academy, saying that all future admissions will be based solely on merit. He said the secretaries of the military departments would have 30 days to certify that there will be no consideration of race, ethnicity or sex in applications and that they will be based on merit only. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] Background Notes from Judicial Watch [180x150x1] [] October 09, 2024 Judicial Watch Sues Department of Defense for Records on U.S. Air Force Academy’s Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion Plans [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Judicial Watch filed a FOIA lawsuit on behalf of Stand Together Against Racism and Radicalism in the Services, Inc. (STARRS) against the Department of Defense for records regarding the U.S. Air Force Academy’s diversity, equity, and inclusion (DEI) plans. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x2] [] July 25, 2024 Pentagon DEI Budget Surges for Military-Wide Woke Training to Root out “White Privilege” [] Source: Judicial Watch [] The Pentagon dedicates tens of millions of dollars annually to Critical Race Theory (CRT) and Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion (DEI) programs throughout the armed forces, and cadets at the nation’s military academies receive extensive training about racism, sexism, unconscious bias, and intersectionality. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x3] [] November 13, 2024 Judicial Watch Sues for Records on Rebranding of West Point’s DEI Office [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Judicial Watch sued the Department of Defense for information regarding the rebranding of West Point’s Diversity, Equity and Inclusion (DEI) office to “Office of Engagement and Retention.” “It seems games are afoot at West Point to disguise its radical DEI agenda,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. name: Rob Sand
subject: It’s Rob Sand! I’m running for Iowa governor.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T798440b2-0441-4730-9bf9-85f82941716b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T796152a4-3845-4905-9712-b68136d4b8f4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) 👋🏻 Hey Peter, it’s Rob Sand. I’m Iowa’s State Auditor, a father, husband, skateboarder, bowhunter, and a proud Hawkeye. AND NOW, I’m coming to you with an exciting announcement 🥁🥁🥁🥁: I’m running to be the next governor of the great state of Iowa! This is going to be one of the most competitive elections in the country. And with the Reynolds agenda unpopular and every Republican in lockstep with it, we’ve got an opportunity to do something truly special. [Before I dive into the nitty-gritty details of why I believe I’m the best candidate to lead Iowa forward, I’d like to ask you: Will you split a donation between my grassroots campaign and Blue Amp Action to become a Founding Donor today? I’d love to have you on board from the start, Peter.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6607ef05-79d2-48f3-bdaa-6a30ad3c9cec/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1f06fc56-6e0a-4427-9cff-cbe126287482/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Folks who know me know that I’m an open book, and that every chapter starts and ends with Iowa. I was born and raised in the small town of Decorah, and I’m proud to be raising my family in the greatest state in the country. Before I was elected State Auditor (twice), I worked as an Assistant Attorney General, where I uncovered and prosecuted the largest lottery scandal in American history. I’m currently the only statewide elected Democrat in Iowa, and I’m proud to also have the highest approval rating among all statewide officials. Now, I’m running for governor because for too long, partisan insiders have pushed Iowa in the wrong direction: Our schools are underfunded, jobs and opportunities are leaving the state, and we’re not growing and innovating the way we should be. I believe that together, we can take Iowa back and make our state a place where families thrive. I won re-election in 2022 by just a shade under 3,000 votes, so I’m not afraid of a tough race. But even with the winds changing in Iowa, this is going to be an incredibly competitive election. Recent special election results are proof that Iowans are eager for change and ready to listen. _Iowa has had 3 specials this year, and they are the top 3 over-performances by a Democrat in the nation. _ As a team, we are playing to WIN. But I need your help, Peter, plain and simple. Grassroots fundraising is the name of the game, so we need support early to kickstart this campaign and build out our network of supporters throughout Iowa and beyond! | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T908d0cc7-43e2-4878-8a40-f9c97e86288b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Voter Action Project Electoral College Team
subject: Our greatest democracy defender --
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=rnSdXioy5hTD1aGhhvj/sKzs4EICHebss5cL2DF01g0Z747cenlybR6QQoJwGOncNI/8OO/q7kHalqhAGZuA6cMV0O23GSa1ez8cQe3w4yo=]
MSNBC: Jamie Raskin thinks the Electoral College threatens democracy. He's right. [https://secure.everyaction.com/8dYLXPuc9ki9MWu8ArkS9w2?am=25.00&contactdata=rnSdXioy5hTD1aGhhvj/sKzs4EICHebss5cL2DF01g0Z747cenlybR6QQoJwGOncNI/8OO/q7kHalqhAGZuA6cMV0O23GSa1ez8cQe3w4yo=]
There's no greater defender of our democracy than Congressman Jamie Raskin -- and he knows the score, friend. Here's what he had to say:
“ I think that the Electoral College now, which has given us five popular vote losers as president in our history, twice in this century alone, has become a danger not just to democracy, but to the American people . It was a danger on January 6th, 2021. There are so many curving byways and nooks and crannies in the Electoral College that there are opportunities for a lot of strategic mischief. ”
The Electoral College isn’t just a vestige of the past; it is a ticking time bomb for exploitation in our democratic system. Congressman Raskin knows this, which is why he wanted the Jan. 6th Committee to propose getting rid of it. They didn't all agree, so it didn't make their list of final recommendations to Congress.
We know the vote suppressors will do anything in order to win. We have to remove this danger once and for all -- chip in $5, $15, $25 or more to help us end the Electoral College >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/8dYLXPuc9ki9MWu8ArkS9w2?am=25.00&contactdata=rnSdXioy5hTD1aGhhvj/sKzs4EICHebss5cL2DF01g0Z747cenlybR6QQoJwGOncNI/8OO/q7kHalqhAGZuA6cMV0O23GSa1ez8cQe3w4yo=]
If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/8dYLXPuc9ki9MWu8ArkS9w2?am=15.00&tknfa=MstHwAHWiqHvY3pqW3R6v-6te56O370Sy9W9y30O0g8=&contactdata=rnSdXioy5hTD1aGhhvj/sKzs4EICHebss5cL2DF01g0Z747cenlybR6QQoJwGOncNI/8OO/q7kHalqhAGZuA6cMV0O23GSa1ez8cQe3w4yo=] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/8dYLXPuc9ki9MWu8ArkS9w2?am=25.00&tknfa=MstHwAHWiqHvY3pqW3R6v-6te56O370Sy9W9y30O0g8=&contactdata=rnSdXioy5hTD1aGhhvj/sKzs4EICHebss5cL2DF01g0Z747cenlybR6QQoJwGOncNI/8OO/q7kHalqhAGZuA6cMV0O23GSa1ez8cQe3w4yo=]
GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/8dYLXPuc9ki9MWu8ArkS9w2?am=50.00&tknfa=MstHwAHWiqHvY3pqW3R6v-6te56O370Sy9W9y30O0g8=&contactdata=rnSdXioy5hTD1aGhhvj/sKzs4EICHebss5cL2DF01g0Z747cenlybR6QQoJwGOncNI/8OO/q7kHalqhAGZuA6cMV0O23GSa1ez8cQe3w4yo=] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/8dYLXPuc9ki9MWu8ArkS9w2?am=100.00&tknfa=MstHwAHWiqHvY3pqW3R6v-6te56O370Sy9W9y30O0g8=&contactdata=rnSdXioy5hTD1aGhhvj/sKzs4EICHebss5cL2DF01g0Z747cenlybR6QQoJwGOncNI/8OO/q7kHalqhAGZuA6cMV0O23GSa1ez8cQe3w4yo=]
GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/8dYLXPuc9ki9MWu8ArkS9w2?am=250.00&tknfa=MstHwAHWiqHvY3pqW3R6v-6te56O370Sy9W9y30O0g8=&contactdata=rnSdXioy5hTD1aGhhvj/sKzs4EICHebss5cL2DF01g0Z747cenlybR6QQoJwGOncNI/8OO/q7kHalqhAGZuA6cMV0O23GSa1ez8cQe3w4yo=] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.everyaction.com/8dYLXPuc9ki9MWu8ArkS9w2?am=35.00&contactdata=rnSdXioy5hTD1aGhhvj/sKzs4EICHebss5cL2DF01g0Z747cenlybR6QQoJwGOncNI/8OO/q7kHalqhAGZuA6cMV0O23GSa1ez8cQe3w4yo=]
We don’t necessarily have to wait for Congress to act, either. Movements like the one in favor of the National Popular Vote Interstate Compact (NPVIC) -- an agreement among a group of U.S. states and the District of Columbia to award all their electoral votes to whichever presidential candidate wins the overall popular vote in the 50 states and the District of Columbia -- might end the Electoral College without a constitutional amendment.
16 states plus DC have already joined the NPVIC, accounting for 206 electoral votes and 76% of the states needed to essentially make the popular vote the law of the land. Maine is also moving a bill through their state legislature to join.
Whether it's the NPVIC or something else, it's clear that the Electoral College needs to go.
Help us end the Electoral College forever with $25 or more today! >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/8dYLXPuc9ki9MWu8ArkS9w2?am=25.00&contactdata=rnSdXioy5hTD1aGhhvj/sKzs4EICHebss5cL2DF01g0Z747cenlybR6QQoJwGOncNI/8OO/q7kHalqhAGZuA6cMV0O23GSa1ez8cQe3w4yo=]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=rnSdXioy5hTD1aGhhvj/sKzs4EICHebss5cL2DF01g0Z747cenlybR6QQoJwGOncNI/8OO/q7kHalqhAGZuA6cMV0O23GSa1ez8cQe3w4yo=]

Fellow Conservative,

I’ve led soldiers in war zones, put drug dealers behind bars, and deported criminals here illegally. **Now, I’m running for the U.S. Senate in Georgia and I need your help.**

The Federal Election Commission's filing deadline for the runoff is tomorrow ... we have LESS THAN 24 HOURS TO HIT OUR FUNDRAISING GOAL | Fellow Conservative, I’ve led soldiers in war zones, put drug dealers behind bars, and deported criminals here illegally. Now, I’m running for the U.S. Senate in Georgia and I need your help. Let me tell you more about why I’m doing this. I was born and raised in Mexico, coming to Georgia when I was 17 years old. I enlisted in the Army as a private. Two years ago, I retired as a major general after serving around the world in places like Iraq, Afghanistan, and even our southern border. I also joined the Atlanta Police Department as a beat cop and went on to become Chief of Police in Doraville. My story is only possible in this country. But, Fellow Conservative, my fear is that if President Trump doesn’t have a strong Senate Majority to deliver his agenda, those same opportunities won’t be here for future generations. I know this is going to be the toughest and most expensive Senate race in the country, but this is a fight we must have. And it’s a fight we must win. Jon Ossoff has more than $11 million in the bank, he’s raising millions more, and the only thing he stands for is derailing President Trump’s agenda. We have to defeat him, and I’m counting on your help as we launch this campaign. Thanks, Maj. Gen. John King (retd.) | General John King is a soldier, lawman, and the first Hispanic elected statewide in Georgia history. body:
According to a new ABC News/Washington Post/Ipsos poll, Donald Trump has the lowest 100-day job approval rating of any president in 80 years.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107629657/545304443/-107464461?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2025-05-13_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjgyODUyMS0yNzMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E2I1iTRsoCebsMqckKjCzPUjwmJY0nJvVHrOFTC2vHs=)

| Peter,

In just 100 days, Donald Trump has done real damage:

🚨 Crashed markets
🚨 Gutted consumer confidence
🚨 Attacked Social Security
🚨 Triggered a global trade war
🚨 Sent us careening toward a recession

And the American people are paying attention.

According to a new ABC News/Washington Post/Ipsos poll, **Donald Trump has the lowest 100-day job approval rating of any president in 80 years.**

That’s not just a number — it’s a signal. Voters are feeling the impact of Trump’s economic chaos and extremist agenda in _their everyday lives._

As a member of the House Ways and Means Committee, I’ve seen firsthand how his policies have undermined working families — from empty ports to rising prices to slashing the safety nets people rely on.

**We have to be loud. We have to be bold. And we have to organize NOW to take back the House and stop this dangerous agenda in its tracks.**

name: Team Heartland Patriots
subject: Working families shouldn’t struggle to survive in America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
#
This is a simple fact, Peter:
**Working families shouldn’t have to struggle to survive in America.**
Housing should be available and affordable. Feeding your family shouldn’t cost an arm and a leg. And one unexpected emergency shouldn’t leave you bankrupted by medical bills.
**But apparently, to some politicians, that’s a controversial statement.**
Instead of fighting to make lives better for the people who elected them, these spineless politicians help massive corporations and industries literally strip our communities for parts. And they get rich doing it.
**We need leaders who know what it’s like to live as an everyday person in this country.** We need people who will actually fight for working families during these uncertain times. But that work can’t start tomorrow. It must start TODAY.
**So we’re asking:[Will you support our efforts to elect real working people to office up and down the ballot by chipping in $10 or whatever you can today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88538?refcode=em20250513-8935&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8935%2E614464%2EsfKaQj)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88539?refcode=em20250513-8935&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=2&akid=8935%2E614464%2EsfKaQj) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88539?refcode=em20250513-8935&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=3&akid=8935%2E614464%2EsfKaQj) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88539?refcode=em20250513-8935&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=4&akid=8935%2E614464%2EsfKaQj) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88539?refcode=em20250513-8935&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=5&akid=8935%2E614464%2EsfKaQj) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88539?refcode=em20250513-8935&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=6&akid=8935%2E614464%2EsfKaQj) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88539?refcode=em20250513-8935&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=7&akid=8935%2E614464%2EsfKaQj) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88538?refcode=em20250513-8935&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=8935%2E614464%2EsfKaQj)
---
Thanks for being part of this movement, Peter.
Team Heartland Patriots

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hp-email-footer?refcode=em20250513-8935-footer&t=9&refcode2=8935_614464_sfKaQj&akid=8935%2E614464%2EsfKaQj)**

name: Trump Jet Alert via Our Revolution
subject: Stop Trump’s flying palace
disclaimer_text: paid for by a foreign government
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Donald Trump is once again cashing in on the presidency – and now we
FINALLY have a chance to stop him.

News reports just revealed that Trump is poised to accept a $400 million
private ultra-luxury jet as a personal "gift" from the nation of Qatar – a
blatant signal that Trump's corruption has no limits.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/27881?source=email-20250513&t=1017&akid=8455%2E5885482%2EZpYhcU ]Bernie tweet calling on Congress to stop this 'over-the-top
kleptocracy'

Senate Democrats are stepping up by forcing an urgent vote to block
Trump's obscene new toy paid for by a foreign government. Let's help them
succeed.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/27882?source=email-20250513&t=1018&akid=8455%2E5885482%2EZpYhcU ]Tell Congress now: Draw a line in the sand and shut down Trump's
corrupt $400 million private jet gift from Qatar!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/27882?source=email-20250513&t=1019&akid=8455%2E5885482%2EZpYhcU ]ADD YOUR NAME

This shameless stunt comes just days ahead of Trump's flashy "crypto
gala," a lavish dinner event where he's literally auctioning away access
to himself – letting whoever buys the most of his corrupt meme coins join
him for dinner.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/27882?source=email-20250513&t=1020&akid=8455%2E5885482%2EZpYhcU ]Headline: Trump's Crypto Dinner Auction was a Massively Corrupt Success

The auction for spots just raised a shocking $148 MILLION – and now 220
holders of his cryptocurrency get what Trump called the "most EXCLUSIVE
INVITATION in the world."

One thing is clear: Trump has reduced our democracy to a bidding war of
cryptocurrencies and a foreign-funded private jet to pamper his ego. It
COMPLETELY undermines any standard of ethical conduct.

Foreign governments flooding American politicians with extravagant gifts
sends a clear message: political influence can be bought by the highest
bidder. And when foreign powers can openly buy influence, we're no longer
governed by democracy – we're owned by oligarchs.

We CANNOT allow this blatant corruption to become normalized. And Our
Revolution isn't going to sit back and let Trump get away with it.
Thousands of us contacted our members of Congress to stop Trump's crypto
bill and we're bird-dogging on Capitol Hill to keep up the pressure.

And that's just the beginning. Right now, public outcry is deafening –
Democratic lawmakers have pledged to force a vote on Trump's $400 million
flying palace giveaway and even MAGA Republicans are speaking out against
it!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/27882?source=email-20250513&t=1021&akid=8455%2E5885482%2EZpYhcU ]NOW is the time to OVERWHELM Congress with demands for immediate
action. Let's stand united and send Congress a clear message: Trump's
corruption ends here: Reject Qatar's $400 million payoff jet now!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/27882?source=email-20250513&t=1022&akid=8455%2E5885482%2EZpYhcU ]ADD YOUR NAME

When we organize, we win,

Our Revolution

One thing is clear: Trump has reduced our democracy to a bidding war of cryptocurrencies and a foreign-funded private jet to pamper his ego. It COMPLETELY undermines any standard of ethical conduct. Foreign governments flooding American politicians with extravagant gifts sends a clear message: political influence can be bought by the highest bidder. And when foreign powers can openly buy influence, we're no longer governed by democracy – we're owned by oligarchs. We CANNOT allow this blatant corruption to become normalized. And Our Revolution isn't going to sit back and let Trump get away with it. Thousands of us contacted our members of Congress to stop Trump's crypto bill and we're bird-dogging on Capitol Hill to keep up the pressure. And that's just the beginning. Right now, public outcry is deafening – Democratic lawmakers have pledged to force a vote on Trump's $400 million flying palace giveaway and even MAGA Republicans are speaking out against it! [ ]NOW is the time to OVERWHELM Congress with demands for immediate action. Let's stand united and send Congress a clear message: Trump's corruption ends here: Reject Qatar's $400 million payoff jet now! name: Roy Beck
subject: Trump can’t fix this alone — he needs backup
body:
Birthright Citizenship was never meant for illegal aliens | | |
#
---
---
| | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=94dee7c9f83f4e05a3754d87adde928a&_e=AAI7HgICPZFjGExdCRqtPaxmXbqFVX4ncnQl0vCt7H6IR7moAdNKNAbiK6z5fVDJtBmBUp_xkyqGTxI4glOZp6n39ofieE6Zhzo3bXaTphrtJBFXaoVB1hVWeVUa0xB3LPBo4Wt2Q_PnLCI4Hk-IU8PgJd27nImslje0RVK4IKyKnfU8b3oD_ju6X6bnuZZQQqBcrRwYTNZ4K-ADSugPNP_4G8cLpOxYOo01GIaTbqldwJv5fB8V5J5Z3JzF5_t1b0hluR5A7QW-EwLEiOuvQ34AnZN02PK5w8deVK9txggqAtcidqTUFEvHaPMdgVB6l56zzfUd7d7LKAPpTv0IuZwFpyNwKA25X02y2ePOho0%3D)
---
My Fellow Fighter, I’m writing to you today because I believe you’re an America First Patriot who’s sick of the open borders madness.** ****And that’s exactly who I’m hoping to reach with my _Birthright Citizenship Survey_. ** **[**Would you be able to set aside five minutes to fill out the survey linked here?**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=94dee7c9f83f4e05a3754d87adde928a&_e=AAI7HgICPZFjGExdCRqtPaxmXbqFVX4ncnQl0vCt7H6IR7moAdNKNAbiK6z5fVDJtBmBUp_xkyqGTxI4glOZp6n39ofieE6Zhzo3bXaTphrtJBFXaoVB1hVWeVUa0xB3LPBo4Wt2Q_PnLCI4Hk-IU8PgJd27nImslje0RVK4IKyKnfU8b3oD_ju6X6bnuZZQQqBcrRwYTNZ4K-ADSugPNFbvpUYk6YI_YG1b5cz2LF0C2xn78yomZr35Y7UIhTug7FspHtDgqSIeC7U8hB51ZiS95YsHy1oIpBQx2rux1Sfh7OhibTtmyJKRwXiqbLP56kBPx54B8haqcxRzH5NwrBIrVXihazXRtE5Gktq6Enw%3D)** We’re launching a nationwide campaign to educate and activate American patriots on the real intention of Birthright Citizenship... ...and the real disaster it has become for American workers and American citizens.**[And that all starts with this Birthright Citizenship Survey that I’m asking you to complete today.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=94dee7c9f83f4e05a3754d87adde928a&_e=AAI7HgICPZFjGExdCRqtPaxmXbqFVX4ncnQl0vCt7H6IR7moAdNKNAbiK6z5fVDJtBmBUp_xkyqGTxI4glOZp6n39ofieE6Zhzo3bXaTphrtJBFXaoVB1hVWeVUa0xB3LPBo4Wt2Q_PnLCI4Hk-IU8PgJd27nImslje0RVK4IKyKnfU8b3oD_ju6X6bnuZZQQqBcrRwYTNZ4K-ADSugPNPl4LFoUwE5kehTefiyqbJqc-aIHDGvHKzHcT50HOJjvLBv9q2iiiWuY3Q-HS_K7dUPCPWEwjRlJkSSoTWc1863auTz_J_k0tFdY7wfphlnsH9rSke-AibrnXWcPurzBJz3OkSfzZYNeQqeaga8R0PE%3D)** Despite what the mainstream media and too many low-level judges are saying, Birthright Citizenship for tourists and illegal aliens is not written into the Constitution.Rather, the 14th Amendment that contains Birthright Citizenship was enacted to grant full citizenship to the slaves freed by Abraham Lincoln — along with their children and their children’s children. It was not meant to apply to foreign visitors...**And it was _definitely not_ for illegal aliens.**In fact, the text of the 14th Amendment clearly states that it only applies to “persons born or naturalized in the United States, **_AND_** subject to the jurisdiction thereof.” But over time, government bureaucrats stretched the 14th Amendment and automatically gave U.S. citizenship to every birth to illegal aliens, and even to foreign nationals vacationing in the United States.Now, the situation has gotten completely out of hand...**In 2023 alone, there were roughly 350,000 births to illegal aliens in the U.S. Tourists gave birth to another 40,000.** These so-called “anchor babies” can keep illegal alien parents from getting deported and give a legal basis for a whole chain of migrants to push their way into America.Is it any surprise that human traffickers and even high-end birth tourism companies are making billions of dollars?This is not by accident – it’s by design. In fact, the Obama State Department changed U.S. visa rules to explicitly allow women to travel to America for the purpose of giving birth in 2015!Thankfully, the Trump administration overturned this rule and pushed back on illegal immigration on a number of fronts.**_But Trump can’t do it alone._**
---
[ **Take the Survey** ](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=94dee7c9f83f4e05a3754d87adde928a&_e=AAI7HgICPZFjGExdCRqtPaxmXbqFVX4ncnQl0vCt7H6IR7moAdNKNAbiK6z5fVDJtBmBUp_xkyqGTxI4glOZp6n39ofieE6Zhzo3bXaTphrtJBFXaoVB1hVWeVUa0xB3LPBo4Wt2Q_PnLCI4Hk-IU8PgJd27nImslje0RVK4IKyKnfU8b3oD_ju6X6bnuZZQQqBcrRwYTNZ4K-ADSugPNMFL7VYd3KfkBELOepRWOckSgE6o_haqRfFLZulEPABrkHSJVfPsTFW6A3Itl2h7dFxYYKmGgUmng7du-TAuCfXrfBPlq-NpDaVknwSEcRuVZsAKKHfRdLwX67zBxTsrb6TW-_JaUhdye3EJCa0MQzA%3D)
---
**Fortunately, grassroots organizing is what NumbersUSA does best.** Over the past thirty years, we’ve grown from a small staff into the largest single-issue advocacy group in the United States.Back in 1996, we pioneered the tactic of masses of grassroots voters faxing elected officials directly.In 2007, when Ted Kennedy (remember him?) was trying to grant amnesty to millions of illegal aliens, NumbersUSA mobilized citizens in such numbers that they shut down the Congressional switchboard. The New York Times “blamed” NumbersUSA as the key factor in blocking Kennedy’s decades-long mass amnesty dream.It was a real David-and-Goliath struggle, and we won.Fast forward to 2025, and our populist immigration position is gaining traction in Washington.The DC power brokers are now calling us when they need to mobilize America-First patriots across the country. To be clear, that’s not because they want to talk to me, Roy Beck.It’s because they know that NumbersUSA is the connection point for 8 million members who understand how our immigration system is utterly broken......and what it will take to fix it. We’ve never had a President like Donald Trump who gets this issue on such a visceral level.But it takes more than just one man to reverse this open borders insanity. He needs a lot of congressional action to back him up and to make improvements permanent.**In our decades on Capitol Hill, we have learned that nothing grabs attention like fired-up American patriots just like you.** And there’s no denying the impact when a mountain of responses pours in from across the country.It proves that the immigration action we’re calling for isn’t just coming from me and the great folks at NumbersUSA—**no, it’s the unmistakable _DEMAND_ of the American people.**And at that point, a politician doesn’t need one ounce of courage.Just a pinch of common sense will be enough to realize that voting against the American people is a “one-way ticket to Palookaville.”That’s how you take a nationwide network of Patriots and turn it into victories at the ballot box, in Congress, and for generations of Americans to come.That’s what NumbersUSA is all about. We have the experience, we have the playbook, but we need your help to execute on Birthright Citizenship and many other key immigration issues.Since we don’t take a penny from dark money, corrupt NGOs, or the government, we rely on patriots just like you to transform our vision into concrete action. **[**So after you fill out your survey, please make a generous donation of $35, $50, $100 or even as much as $500 or $1,000.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=94dee7c9f83f4e05a3754d87adde928a&_e=AAI7HgICPZFjGExdCRqtPaxmXbqFVX4ncnQl0vCt7H6IR7moAdNKNAbiK6z5fVDJtBmBUp_xkyqGTxI4glOZp6n39ofieE6Zhzo3bXaTphrtJBFXaoVB1hVWeVUa0xB3LPBo4Wt2Q_PnLCI4Hk-IU8PgJd27nImslje0RVK4IKyKnfU8b3oD_ju6X6bnuZZQQqBcrRwYTNZ4K-ADSugPNN1jOTL3F02z5qca5Hd42Hbzr7QSJxZ_UBkqoP3JuAP-hHmA6s3hSjbhkJStH8nDy4o7jNmS4eDMlKJArivvJpYuYaebw-T19xxzBC5ONyMHLVT6jNuTBpfRg4L7gjIDMgQj8X-vVoPWJN_IGpRj_vk%3D)****If you can’t make a larger donation at this time, I hope you’ll just cover the cost to process your survey—$3.91.** We’ve run enough of these campaigns on Capitol Hill to know that it takes a veritable army of American patriots to get through to these elected officials.And the only way to assemble an army is with a call that goes out all across the nation. **[**Your completed survey and your donation will be an indisputable sign that the time for change has come.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=94dee7c9f83f4e05a3754d87adde928a&_e=AAI7HgICPZFjGExdCRqtPaxmXbqFVX4ncnQl0vCt7H6IR7moAdNKNAbiK6z5fVDJtBmBUp_xkyqGTxI4glOZp6n39ofieE6Zhzo3bXaTphrtJBFXaoVB1hVWeVUa0xB3LPBo4Wt2Q_PnLCI4Hk-IU8PgJd27nImslje0RVK4IKyKnfU8b3oD_ju6X6bnuZZQQqBcrRwYTNZ4K-ADSugPNDFIl6PsWxr7YjlrB2FGYjbjX0Z6jUFoXBImBzNyt29A6rL1HcFJTTVeX-0hGEf2rXlnAOVObGt0FTkBiAubryXqK7ZsOkIMlfQNQdDKUMcHspfCTX14gtZPW49MG4o2Smb0N_2hPZG2DFy5DH6Jzo0%3D)**
---
Thank you and God bless you today!
---
| | Roy Beck

clean_body: Birthright Citizenship was never meant for illegal aliens | | | | | My Fellow Fighter, I’m writing to you today because I believe you’re an America First Patriot who’s sick of the open borders madness. And that’s exactly who I’m hoping to reach with my Birthright Citizenship Survey. We’re launching a nationwide campaign to educate and activate American patriots on the real intention of Birthright Citizenship... ...and the real disaster it has become for American workers and American citizens. Despite what the mainstream media and too many low-level judges are saying, Birthright Citizenship for tourists and illegal aliens is not written into the Constitution.Rather, the 14th Amendment that contains Birthright Citizenship was enacted to grant full citizenship to the slaves freed by Abraham Lincoln — along with their children and their children’s children. It was not meant to apply to foreign visitors...And it was definitely not for illegal aliens.In fact, the text of the 14th Amendment clearly states that it only applies to “persons born or naturalized in the United States, AND subject to the jurisdiction thereof.” But over time, government bureaucrats stretched the 14th Amendment and automatically gave U.S. citizenship to every birth to illegal aliens, and even to foreign nationals vacationing in the United States.Now, the situation has gotten completely out of hand...In 2023 alone, there were roughly 350,000 births to illegal aliens in the U.S. Tourists gave birth to another 40,000. These so-called “anchor babies” can keep illegal alien parents from getting deported and give a legal basis for a whole chain of migrants to push their way into America.Is it any surprise that human traffickers and even high-end birth tourism companies are making billions of dollars?This is not by accident – it’s by design. In fact, the Obama State Department changed U.S. visa rules to explicitly allow women to travel to America for the purpose of giving birth in 2015!Thankfully, the Trump administration overturned this rule and pushed back on illegal immigration on a number of fronts.But Trump can’t do it alone. Fortunately, grassroots organizing is what NumbersUSA does best. Over the past thirty years, we’ve grown from a small staff into the largest single-issue advocacy group in the United States.Back in 1996, we pioneered the tactic of masses of grassroots voters faxing elected officials directly.In 2007, when Ted Kennedy (remember him?) was trying to grant amnesty to millions of illegal aliens, NumbersUSA mobilized citizens in such numbers that they shut down the Congressional switchboard. The New York Times “blamed” NumbersUSA as the key factor in blocking Kennedy’s decades-long mass amnesty dream.It was a real David-and-Goliath struggle, and we won.Fast forward to 2025, and our populist immigration position is gaining traction in Washington.The DC power brokers are now calling us when they need to mobilize America-First patriots across the country. To be clear, that’s not because they want to talk to me, Roy Beck.It’s because they know that NumbersUSA is the connection point for 8 million members who understand how our immigration system is utterly broken......and what it will take to fix it. We’ve never had a President like Donald Trump who gets this issue on such a visceral level.But it takes more than just one man to reverse this open borders insanity. He needs a lot of congressional action to back him up and to make improvements permanent.In our decades on Capitol Hill, we have learned that nothing grabs attention like fired-up American patriots just like you. And there’s no denying the impact when a mountain of responses pours in from across the country.It proves that the immigration action we’re calling for isn’t just coming from me and the great folks at NumbersUSA—no, it’s the unmistakable DEMAND of the American people.And at that point, a politician doesn’t need one ounce of courage.Just a pinch of common sense will be enough to realize that voting against the American people is a “one-way ticket to Palookaville.”That’s how you take a nationwide network of Patriots and turn it into victories at the ballot box, in Congress, and for generations of Americans to come.That’s what NumbersUSA is all about. We have the experience, we have the playbook, but we need your help to execute on Birthright Citizenship and many other key immigration issues.Since we don’t take a penny from dark money, corrupt NGOs, or the government, we rely on patriots just like you to transform our vision into concrete action. you can’t make a larger donation at this time, I hope you’ll just cover the cost to process your survey—$3.91. We’ve run enough of these campaigns on Capitol Hill to know that it takes a veritable army of American patriots to get through to these elected officials.And the only way to assemble an army is with a call that goes out all across the nation. Thank you and God bless you today! | | Roy Beck Founder and President NumbersUSA | | | P.S. I need to hear what you’re seeing where you are — and how you’re thinking about Birthright Citizenship and immigration as a whole. Take the Survey | | | NumbersUSA is a nonpartisan, nonprofit organization that believes better immigration policy is possible and needed. As America’s largest single-issue advocacy group, NumbersUSA is focused exclusively on immigration reform. NumbersUSA empowers over 8 million grassroots supporters spread across every congressional district to impact immigration policy with information, tools, access, and influence. | | | ---|---|--- NumbersUSA Education & Research Foundation1201 Wilson Blvd 25th FloorArlington, VA 22209

name: Team Bennet
subject: A $400 million plane for Trump, Medicaid cuts for millions of Americans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250513_medicaidmaralago_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250513_medicaidmaralago_act]
Hi folks,
This week, Republicans dropped the details of President Trump’s plan to gut Medicaid and strip millions of Americans of their health insurance—so that he can pay for trillions of dollars in tax cuts for the wealthy and corporations.
https://thehill.com/policy/healthcare/5294994-house-republicans-medicaid-bill/ [https://thehill.com/policy/healthcare/5294994-house-republicans-medicaid-bill/]
At the same time, Trump's chaotic tariffs continue to hurt the retirement accounts of hard-working Americans and force small business owners to make tough decisions about their futures.
All the while, Trump is cashing in.
This weekend, the Qatari government offered to "gift" Trump a $400 million private jet for his personal use in office and after his term ends.
Next week, Trump will host a private gala for the winners of his meme coin contest, who spent an estimated $148 million to meet the president at his private golf club.
And Trump and his friends at Mar-a-Lago are about to get a huge tax cut, while nearly 14 million Americans lose their health care.
Michael knows this isn’t what Americans voted for. Michael will do everything in his power to stop Trump and the GOP from slashing Medicaid and giving tax breaks to the wealthy.
As your Senator and your next Governor, Michael will always fight for the interests of Coloradans. If you’re with us, consider chipping in a few bucks today. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250513_medicaidmaralago_act]

Uncertainty. Chaos. Rising prices. Threats to Social Security and Medicare. Attacks on civil liberties. And a $6 trillion tax in the form of tariffs.
**These are the hallmarks of the Trump administration – and they’re policies that are directly harming people here in Michigan and all around the country.**
That’s why Democrat Haley Stevens is running to be Michigan’s U.S. senator and help Democrats take back the Senate majority – to serve as a check on Trump and his MAGA allies like Elon Musk.
Without a win in Michigan, there is no Senate majority for Democrats. Plain and simple. And without that majority, we cannot stop Trump and Musk. **That’s why, in the early stages of Haley’s Senate campaign, we’ve set an ambitious goal to build up the early resources it will take to compete against the GOP’s war chest and win.**
**[So will you please rush a gift of $5 or whatever you can spare to help us hit this goal, win in Michigan, and take back the Senate for Democrats?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/2593?t=2&akid=123%2E49239%2E5a6AKs)**

Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you chip in now to keep Michigan blue and take back the Senate for Democrats?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/2592?t=7&akid=123%2E49239%2E5a6AKs) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/2592?t=8&akid=123%2E49239%2E5a6AKs)

That’s why Democrat Haley Stevens is running to be Michigan’s U.S. senator and help Democrats take back the Senate majority – to serve as a check on Trump and his MAGA allies like Elon Musk. Without a win in Michigan, there is no Senate majority for Democrats. Plain and simple. And without that majority, we cannot stop Trump and Musk. That’s why, in the early stages of Haley’s Senate campaign, we’ve set an ambitious goal to build up the early resources it will take to compete against the GOP’s war chest and win. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Thanks so much, Team Haley | A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. | | | You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign. Thank you, Haley

# **[Inflation Report For April Has Been Released](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
The April inflation report delivered a mild surprise: despite expectations that President Trump’s new tariffs would begin pushing prices higher, the latest Consumer Price Index (CPI) shows that inflation actually cooled, marking a significant moment in the unfolding post-tariff economic narrative. The headline CPI rose just 0.2% from March to April, slightly below economists’ forecast [...]

# **[Plouffe Gives Statement In New Book](http://trk.libertyledger._f_Xqw)**
---
The post-election autopsy of the 2024 Democratic catastrophe has taken a new, deeply personal turn—with former Obama adviser David Plouffe delivering a blistering indictment not just of Joe Biden’s failed reelection bid, but of the entire Democratic establishment’s complicity in propping up a candidacy that was, by all accounts, politically—and perhaps physically—untenable.
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger._f_Xqw)
[](http://trk.libertyledger.)
# **[Survey From Group In Battleground States Reports Some Interesting Results](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
For a party that built its modern identity around moral high ground and anti-corruption crusades, the Democratic establishment is discovering—painfully—that their playbook on Trump is no longer working. The same lines that once electrified their base and rattled independents are now falling flat in focus groups. In battleground states, voters aren’t buying what the Democrats [...]
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger.)
[](http://trk.libertyledger.-F3gf-oAfA)
# **[DNC Holds Leadership Vote](http://trk.libertyledger.-F3gf-oAfA)**
---
David Hogg came to the Democratic National Committee with a mission—tear down the house, and rebuild it in his image. And for a moment, it looked like he just might do it. But now, the young firebrand who once turned trauma into political stardom finds himself on the brink of being ejected from the very [...]
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger.-F3gf-oAfA)
[](http://trk.libertyledger.)
# **[Kayla Tausche, Leaves CNN](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
In a surprise announcement, Kayla Tausche, CNN’s senior White House correspondent, is parting ways with the network just two years after being recruited from CNBC in what was once hailed as a major journalistic coup. Her departure adds to a growing list of high-profile exits from the embattled network, which is grappling with plummeting viewership, [...]
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger.)
[](http://trk.libertyledger.)

body:

| Folks, Hakeem Jeffries just revealed the GOP’s DISASTROUS plan to cut Medicaid ⬇️ [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/save-medicaid?source=VPP_20250513_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=6&akid=19847%2E878179%2EqTuDwB) | [[TIME SENSITIVE] ADD MY NAME: SAVE MEDICAID FROM MAGA CUTS »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/save-medicaid?source=VPP_20250513_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=7&akid=19847%2E878179%2EqTuDwB)
---
_Here’s what you need to know, folks:_

**1:** Republicans are set to vote on these DRASTIC cuts TODAY. (!!!)

**2:** House Republicans have one of the SLIMMEST majorities in history... _If we ALL step up, they won’t have the votes needed to pass this disastrous legislation!_

**3:** [**We need 25,000 grassroots Democrats to sign onto our time-sensitive petition to SAVE MEDICAID and STOP MAGA »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/save-medicaid?source=VPP_20250513_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=8&akid=19847%2E878179%2EqTuDwB)

The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19847%2E878179%2EqTuDwB). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19847%2E878179%2EqTuDwB).**

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: Let me lay this out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107632731/545314736/-80226044?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.05.13_Ossoff-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC-ND_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjViODY2Ny0yZTMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w7K_H-BKjKhU3pYhr5m8XzgmbPuL3ydkvHrkGWvrwZQ=) _Let me lay this out, clear as day:_

I am the only Democratic Senator up for re-election in a state Trump won in 2024.

This Senate race in Georgia will be the most competitive and most expensive in the nation.

If you’re outraged by what’s happening to our country — and you’re ready to fight –– [**_please split $10 between my re-election campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand today._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107632732/545314737/-80226044?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.05.13_Ossoff-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC-ND_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjViODY2Ny0yZTMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w7K_H-BKjKhU3pYhr5m8XzgmbPuL3ydkvHrkGWvrwZQ=) | | [SPLIT A DONATION >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107632733/545314739/-80226044?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.05.13_Ossoff-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC-ND_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjViODY2Ny0yZTMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w7K_H-BKjKhU3pYhr5m8XzgmbPuL3ydkvHrkGWvrwZQ=)
---
Otherwise, let me remind you why I ran for Senate — and why this moment is just as urgent.

Before I was elected, I led investigations of corruption and human rights abuses worldwide. We exposed wrongdoing in countries where criticizing the government is dangerous, where whistleblowers and witnesses will only meet in secret, where protest carries the risk of prosecution.

More and more, the atmosphere under Trump reminded me of those places where dissent was silenced by intimidation.

Trump’s rise wasn’t just a crisis. It was a warning.

I ran for Senate because I saw the danger in electing someone so profoundly unfit for the presidency and I wanted to confront the corruption that made his rise possible.

I also ran — years before the Dobbs decision — because it was already clear the GOP was coming for reproductive rights. I saw Georgia as the front line in that fight. With a six-week ban now in place here, and Republicans pushing for a national abortion ban, it still is.

**Now this President is staging a power grab unprecedented in our history. In his first 100 days:**
* He’s freed violent criminals who attacked the Capitol on his behalf.
* Purged independent watchdogs across government.
* Stacked key agencies with loyalists—and called on them to investigate his political opponents.
* Defied and threatened federal judges.
* Undermined the press.
* Handed sweeping, unaccountable power to the billionaire who spent $300 million to elect him.

Trump’s goal isn’t just revenge. He wants to use the government to crush the opposition. And now, Americans are living in fear of their own government.

This is not a drill and it’s not a bad dream. As citizens, it is the test of our lifetimes.

**In 2020, the pundits said flipping a Republican Senate seat in Georgia couldn’t be done. But we built one of the strongest voter mobilization programs in Senate campaign history — and we won. That victory won the Senate majority.**

Now we must win again. And we will win again.

Just like last time, I can’t do it alone.

So I’m asking:

[**_Please split a contribution between my re-election campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand today, of $10 or any amount that works for you._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107632734/545314740/-80226044?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.05.13_Ossoff-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC-ND_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjViODY2Ny0yZTMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w7K_H-BKjKhU3pYhr5m8XzgmbPuL3ydkvHrkGWvrwZQ=)

The average online donation to our campaign is around $30. Many give less. Some give more.

All that matters is that lots and lots of people are contributing what they can to power our grassroots campaign. Please, contribute today.
| [SPLIT A DONATION >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107632736/545314741/-80226044?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.05.13_Ossoff-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC-ND_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjViODY2Ny0yZTMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w7K_H-BKjKhU3pYhr5m8XzgmbPuL3ydkvHrkGWvrwZQ=)
---
Thanks for being part of this team.

As always,

clean_body: = Let me lay this out, clear as day: I am the only Democratic Senator up for re-election in a state Trump won in 2024. This Senate race in Georgia will be the most competitive and most expensive in the nation. If you’re outraged by what’s happening to our country — and you’re ready to fight –– = | | = Otherwise, let me remind you why I ran for Senate — and why this moment is just as urgent. Before I was elected, I led investigations of corruption and human rights abuses worldwide. We exposed wrongdoing in countries where criticizing the government is dangerous, where whistleblowers and witnesses will only meet in secret, where protest carries the risk of prosecution. More and more, the atmosphere under Trump reminded me of those places where dissent was silenced by intimidation. Trump’s rise wasn’t just a crisis. It was a warning. I ran for Senate because I saw the danger in electing someone so profoundly unfit for the presidency and I wanted to confront the corruption that made his rise possible. I also ran — years before the Dobbs decision — because it was already clear the GOP was coming for reproductive rights. I saw Georgia as the front line in that fight. With a six-week ban now in place here, and Republicans pushing for a national abortion ban, it still is. Now this President is staging a power grab unprecedented in our history. In his first 100 days: He’s freed violent criminals who attacked the Capitol on his behalf. Purged independent watchdogs across government. Stacked key agencies with loyalists—and called on them to investigate his political opponents. Defied and threatened federal judges. Undermined the press. Handed sweeping, unaccountable power to the billionaire who spent $300 million to elect him. Trump’s goal isn’t just revenge. He wants to use the government to crush the opposition. And now, Americans are living in fear of their own government. This is not a drill and it’s not a bad dream. As citizens, it is the test of our lifetimes. In 2020, the pundits said flipping a Republican Senate seat in Georgia couldn’t be done. But we built one of the strongest voter mobilization programs in Senate campaign history — and we won. That victory won the Senate majority. Now we must win again. And we will win again. Just like last time, I can’t do it alone. So I’m asking: = The average online donation to our campaign is around $30. Many give less. Some give more. All that matters is that lots and lots of people are contributing what they can to power our grassroots campaign. Please, contribute today. | = Thanks for being part of this team. As always, Jon Ossoff * = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I am truly honored to have won reelection, and I promise to continue the critical work toward bipartisan solutions for New Yorkers as we enter this new term. While we had many victories in New York this election season, our fight to retake control of the Senate is far from over. = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

Dear Fellow American, Some elected officials can't take a joke.

And unfortunately, they think they have the power to do something about it.

After the governor of California saw a video parody of a politician, he responded by saying the video should be "illegal." Then the California legislature fast-tracked and passed two bills, banning certain political speech.

_The Babylon Bee_ and other plaintiffs filed a lawsuit against California officials because the bills censor free speech and punish people for posting certain political content online, including political memes and parodies of politicians.

Your voice today can tell government officials you believe the Constitution protects humor whether or not they find it funny.

Will you stand with _The Babylon Bee_?

| Peter,

A U.S. Court of Appeals upheld Massachusetts’s ban on assault weapons — a victory that marks a major step forward in the fight for common-sense gun safety regulations that protect our communities.

Thanks to Emerge alum Massachusetts AG Andrea Campbell’s leadership, this law, which bans military-style firearms like AR-15s and other semiautomatic weapons, will remain in place. That means safer schools, safer neighborhoods, and a stronger sense of security for families.

clean_body: A U.S. Court of Appeals upheld Massachusetts’s ban on assault weapons — a victory that marks a major step forward in the fight for common-sense gun safety regulations that protect our communities. | = | Peter, A U.S. Court of Appeals upheld Massachusetts’s ban on assault weapons — a victory that marks a major step forward in the fight for common-sense gun safety regulations that protect our communities. Thanks to Emerge alum Massachusetts AG Andrea Campbell’s leadership, this law, which bans military-style firearms like AR-15s and other semiautomatic weapons, will remain in place. That means safer schools, safer neighborhoods, and a stronger sense of security for families. = This is what happens when Emerge women lead! Our alums like AG Andrea Campbell are on the frontlines every single day, fighting to protect our communities, stand up to extremists who threaten our rights, and build a future where everyone can live free from fear. Our team is working to recruit, train, and support the next generation of Democratic women from all different backgrounds to run for office and win elections. Every woman we train brings us one step closer to securing representation for the New American Majority and building a government that works for us. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Team Emerge * | | = Paid for by Emerge America Emerge America 818 Connecticut Avenue NW, Suite 450 Washington, DC 20006 United States | = =

name: Jeff Stump
subject: We’re stumped, what would you name this ancient redwood?
body:
A storied tree like this one deserves a name 🌲

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107632888/545315155/-1299648888?contactdata=v7nneLWoGMA+thwfvOsvf6fd0Ut8w4Qeza8sfSpZJdJbudSTGMV8LgZOmHH1EW2U9R9xhMUyJgtLIuQpxAV9/W7VoxjGV1ketBpmf4FPM3JDkZScDTmQpG0Dd1Zgya3VKzj/3li9ugZu+V8fpgWELfFiIfRAIM63ElzwpPf51Ko=&sourceid=1166936&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNkMzIxMTYzLTJmMzAtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=iW44CQweaMWxCGpuDKZtvD2hapgiOECrGbcBOl5mrMM=&emci=06b38229-4220-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=3d321163-2f30-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=1504551)
---
Dear Peter,
Within the mystical, fog-shrouded forests of Monte Rio Redwoods is an ancient redwood, one that has lived _for nearly 1,500 years_.
This tree has a particularly gnarly past, having survived fires, multiple lightning strikes, and the ongoing effects of climate change. Every year of history it has borne witness to is etched on its trunk.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107632889/545315156/1080163704?contactdata=v7nneLWoGMA+thwfvOsvf6fd0Ut8w4Qeza8sfSpZJdJbudSTGMV8LgZOmHH1EW2U9R9xhMUyJgtLIuQpxAV9/W7VoxjGV1ketBpmf4FPM3JDkZScDTmQpG0Dd1Zgya3VKzj/3li9ugZu+V8fpgWELfFiIfRAIM63ElzwpPf51Ko=&ms=MonteRio1_Image&sourceid=1166936&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNkMzIxMTYzLTJmMzAtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=iW44CQweaMWxCGpuDKZtvD2hapgiOECrGbcBOl5mrMM=&emci=06b38229-4220-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=3d321163-2f30-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=1504551)
Photo credit: Justin Lewis, Coldwater Collective
**When visiting the property, I realized a storied tree like this one deserves a name.** Some giants serve as a living reminder of the resilience of nature during the tests of time, and that we are guests in their cathedral. Despite the adversity, this tree stays standing, stubborn and glorious, watching over Monte Rio.
I’m fascinated by this old giant. You simply can’t look away from it. We are an integral part of nature, and it is our duty to care for it. Allow its beauty and complexity to inspire creativity.
[ Name That Redwood ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107632890/545315157/1080163704?contactdata=v7nneLWoGMA+thwfvOsvf6fd0Ut8w4Qeza8sfSpZJdJbudSTGMV8LgZOmHH1EW2U9R9xhMUyJgtLIuQpxAV9/W7VoxjGV1ketBpmf4FPM3JDkZScDTmQpG0Dd1Zgya3VKzj/3li9ugZu+V8fpgWELfFiIfRAIM63ElzwpPf51Ko=&ms=MonteRio1_Button&sourceid=1166936&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNkMzIxMTYzLTJmMzAtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=iW44CQweaMWxCGpuDKZtvD2hapgiOECrGbcBOl5mrMM=&emci=06b38229-4220-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=3d321163-2f30-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=1504551)
We’re curious, what would you name this old-growth redwood, and why? Maybe a name that’s uniquely Californian! Or perhaps a name that pays tribute to the land this tree stands on, which is the ancestral land of the Kashia Band of Pomo Indians and the Southern Pomo territory of the Federated Indians of Graton Rancheria.
[**I want to know: what would YOU name this ancient redwood?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107632891/545315158/1080163704?contactdata=v7nneLWoGMA+thwfvOsvf6fd0Ut8w4Qeza8sfSpZJdJbudSTGMV8LgZOmHH1EW2U9R9xhMUyJgtLIuQpxAV9/W7VoxjGV1ketBpmf4FPM3JDkZScDTmQpG0Dd1Zgya3VKzj/3li9ugZu+V8fpgWELfFiIfRAIM63ElzwpPf51Ko=&ms=MonteRio1_Link1&sourceid=1166936&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNkMzIxMTYzLTJmMzAtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=iW44CQweaMWxCGpuDKZtvD2hapgiOECrGbcBOl5mrMM=&emci=06b38229-4220-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=3d321163-2f30-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=1504551)

No matter what you call this redwood, it is an important piece of our environment, and something that should be safeguarded and respected for generations to come. On that, I think we can all agree!
Sincerely,
| Jeff Stump
Director of Land Protection

clean_body: A storied tree like this one deserves a name 🌲 Dear Peter, Within the mystical, fog-shrouded forests of Monte Rio Redwoods is an ancient redwood, one that has lived for nearly 1,500 years. This tree has a particularly gnarly past, having survived fires, multiple lightning strikes, and the ongoing effects of climate change. Every year of history it has borne witness to is etched on its trunk. Photo credit: Justin Lewis, Coldwater Collective When visiting the property, I realized a storied tree like this one deserves a name. Some giants serve as a living reminder of the resilience of nature during the tests of time, and that we are guests in their cathedral. Despite the adversity, this tree stays standing, stubborn and glorious, watching over Monte Rio. I’m fascinated by this old giant. You simply can’t look away from it. We are an integral part of nature, and it is our duty to care for it. Allow its beauty and complexity to inspire creativity. We’re curious, what would you name this old-growth redwood, and why? Maybe a name that’s uniquely Californian! Or perhaps a name that pays tribute to the land this tree stands on, which is the ancestral land of the Kashia Band of Pomo Indians and the Southern Pomo territory of the Federated Indians of Graton Rancheria. No matter what you call this redwood, it is an important piece of our environment, and something that should be safeguarded and respected for generations to come. On that, I think we can all agree! Sincerely, | Jeff Stump Director of Land Protection ---|--- | | | | ---|---|---|--- Save the Redwoods League 111 Sutter Street, 11th Floor San Francisco, CA 94104 United States |

Well folx, it's only Tuesday, but it has already been a long week covering the Trump regime's antics. ## **Trump 's Drug Pricing Executive Order: Smoke and Mirrors**
Trump's latest executive order revives his 2020 "most-favored-nation" drug pricing stunt. It promises lower prices by matching U.S. costs to those in other developed countries but leaves out any actual enforcement. Pharma giants are already prepping lawsuits. Sound familiar?
## **[Trump's Drug Pricing Executive Order, Explained (Again)](https://substack.com/redirect/e330a8fc-f6a8-4c55-9924-5c02e1a2d123?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
**[Team Coffman Chronicle](https://substack.com/profile/332546850-team-coffman-chronicle)**
