---|---|---
Next week, President Donald Trump is expected to sign a new executive order to lower prescription drug prices for Medicare recipients. The order, which revives the so-called "Most Favored Nation" model, would peg the cost of certain medications to what other wealthy nations pay. Administration officials are calling it bold. They say it delivers on Trump...
**[Read full story](https://substack.com/redirect/e330a8fc-f6a8-4c55-9924-5c02e1a2d123?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
* * *
## **Trailer Bros and Ghetto Guys Have More in Common Than They Might Think**
When billionaires need a smokescreen, they reach for the culture war playbook. This deep dive exposes how the right stokes social division to keep Americans fighting each other while corporate donors get richer and working families get left behind.
## **[Poor on Purpose: How Class War Became a Culture War Distraction](https://substack.com/redirect/81f77a3a-500e-4463-903b-511482329b15?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
**[General Azmundus](https://substack.com/profile/116943496-general-azmundus)**
**May 8**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b06a8bc1-6898-405a-8e75-69e77ddf6e80?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
If you listen to the loudest voices in politics or cable news, you'd think America is being torn apart by a culture war: rural conservatives clinging to tradition, urban liberals pushing social change. It's red hats versus rainbow flags. Guns versus drag queens. School boards versus woke mobs.
**[Read full story](https://substack.com/redirect/81f77a3a-500e-4463-903b-511482329b15?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
* * *
## **Boomers and Gen X are Learning the Hard Way: Growing Old Sucks**
From crumbling nursing homes to gutted healthcare programs, this sobering piece lays out the brutal reality for millions of aging Americans. Our social safety net isn't fraying; it's being shredded on purpose, and seniors are paying the price. Part 3 of a series on the gutting of health resources.
## **[Disposable America: Growing Old Without Dignity](https://substack.com/redirect/db9bf18c-3236-4a6f-ae8d-787f7d99b239?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

---|---|---

Step into the right-wing strategy chamber, where chaos is king. This article breaks down the manufactured disorder and nonstop grievance politics fueling the MAGA machine, and how executive orders are being used as reality TV scripts, not policy tools.

body:
Let me be clear: We won't!
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107633441/545317199/-1997846894?refcode=jtk1868-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDU1MjUwZi0zMjMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lLh_NUAlAC8QywZrkkbfIigCuVjyDk4rHJqNARRmL2M=)
---
Peter, what Donald Trump wants is for all of us to be so confused and exhausted by the chaos that we just lose track or give up altogether.
He wants us to stop fighting. He wants us to stop paying attention. And he wants us to stop holding him and his minions accountable.
No. Not now. Not ever.
**As your attorney general, I refuse to stand idly by while our rights, our freedom, and our Constitution are undermined.[And if you're with me, I hope you'll contribute $5 to my campaign today so that we can fight back.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107633442/545317201/-2022258813?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1868-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDU1MjUwZi0zMjMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lLh_NUAlAC8QywZrkkbfIigCuVjyDk4rHJqNARRmL2M=)**
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107633443/545317202/-2022258813?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1868-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDU1MjUwZi0zMjMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lLh_NUAlAC8QywZrkkbfIigCuVjyDk4rHJqNARRmL2M=)
---
If you’re an immigrant trying to build a better life for your children:**I’ve got your back.**

If you’re a working parent doing everything you can to put food on the table and keep your family safe:**I’ve got your back.**

And if you're fighting for justice in your community: **I’ve got your back.**
This is not the time to be silent. This is the time to speak up.
That's why attorneys general like me are on the front lines – taking this administration to court to challenge unconstitutional policies and defend the people who need us most.
We’re going to keep standing with immigrant communities.

We’re going to keep standing with working families.

And we’re going to keep defending our rights – in the streets, in the courts, and at the ballot box.

**Trump is counting on us to back down.

But we need to show him loud and clear that we won’t!

[Help me keep up the fight – chip in what you can today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107633445/545317203/-2022258813?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1868-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDU1MjUwZi0zMjMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lLh_NUAlAC8QywZrkkbfIigCuVjyDk4rHJqNARRmL2M=)**

clean_body: Let me be clear: We won't! | | | = Peter, what Donald Trump wants is for all of us to be so confused and exhausted by the chaos that we just lose track or give up altogether. He wants us to stop fighting. He wants us to stop paying attention. And he wants us to stop holding him and his minions accountable. No. Not now. Not ever. As your attorney general, I refuse to stand idly by while our rights, our freedom, and our Constitution are undermined.= | | = If you’re an immigrant trying to build a better life for your children:I’ve got your back. If you’re a working parent doing everything you can to put food on the table and keep your family safe:I’ve got your back. And if you're fighting for justice in your community: I’ve got your back. This is not the time to be silent. This is the time to speak up. That's why attorneys general like me are on the front lines – taking this administration to court to challenge unconstitutional policies and defend the people who need us most. We’re going to keep standing with immigrant communities. We’re going to keep standing with working families. And we’re going to keep defending our rights – in the streets, in the courts, and at the ballot box. Trump is counting on us to back down. But we need to show him loud and clear that we won’t! = | | = In strength and solidarity. – Letitia James | With so many tough and crucial fights ahead, I am counting on people like you to fuel my fight for justice, progress, and true equality. Will you make a monthly donation to make sure I can continue using the full power of the Attorney General's office to make a difference for everyday people and families? | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James for NY 2026 PO Box 20656 Brooklyn, NY 11202 United States | | Paid for by James for NY 2026

name: Roy Beck
subject: Birthright Citizenship was never meant for illegal aliens
body:
This is not by accident—it’s by design | | |
#
---
---
| | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3e53ef7223d540b98b74ba2e90866f2d&_e=54V9OCQNd1ZWGuPyoNTD1kher_HgF5cKu25WdeRuDi3GkPQOcjr-iaETUonUnAGfvaWAeiuy3xiIiFWdGVfi9p1eye_dEEpiTtlXElOw_7_oiz46znur3iGmA-amliP8yw9j7Aojm8_OiobikEcDEGiZgvGqeh5Mv6Ftrh4GtO_Tx0JnfWeXPRPcB8nkX9bIUhwAGSfgdtOPnocTqAOOy0bERHuXAyBOJ5smBafbGbxtyif4WARIYXXa-EcbZrWHl4QvbZsbf5Y5cV8LnKp9d100vQcm5CrcnUJEie3_VmcMNwcJUVsxlSWi4-1yJoiv0UUhRoPJwfMZIlzxu1nV3oYJaGtroSSoyXUHaQD153c%3D)
---
My Fellow Fighter, I’m writing to you today because I believe you’re an America First Patriot who’s sick of the open borders madness.** ****And that’s exactly who I’m hoping to reach with my _Birthright Citizenship Survey_. ** **[**Would you be able to set aside five minutes to fill out the survey linked here?**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3e53ef7223d540b98b74ba2e90866f2d&_e=54V9OCQNd1ZWGuPyoNTD1kher_HgF5cKu25WdeRuDi3GkPQOcjr-iaETUonUnAGfvaWAeiuy3xiIiFWdGVfi9p1eye_dEEpiTtlXElOw_7_oiz46znur3iGmA-amliP8yw9j7Aojm8_OiobikEcDEGiZgvGqeh5Mv6Ftrh4GtO_Tx0JnfWeXPRPcB8nkX9bIUhwAGSfgdtOPnocTqAOOy-tmG6uubi69mcTy8Ze7FhagCQknpvhyFccQ7BDw5kAtijiYqa3T7f2IYO73KuBw_2R4C47pMkTRwa8A8SU9aVy1_jmTfCozK0slhXxUBsVCDsS-PckOtMdvXvcA95x76TuXrts2mJ3RGjYE7soSBnM%3D)** We’re launching a nationwide campaign to educate and activate American patriots on the real intention of Birthright Citizenship... ...and the real disaster it has become for American workers and American citizens.**[And that all starts with this Birthright Citizenship Survey that I’m asking you to complete today.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3e53ef7223d540b98b74ba2e90866f2d&_e=54V9OCQNd1ZWGuPyoNTD1kher_HgF5cKu25WdeRuDi3GkPQOcjr-iaETUonUnAGfvaWAeiuy3xiIiFWdGVfi9p1eye_dEEpiTtlXElOw_7_oiz46znur3iGmA-amliP8yw9j7Aojm8_OiobikEcDEGiZgvGqeh5Mv6Ftrh4GtO_Tx0JnfWeXPRPcB8nkX9bIUhwAGSfgdtOPnocTqAOOy1SFl0wXlBonj7xQeECKcT2Xn5gKy0p0iuyIW1o4_ksRyqR2JFSu848YF9pZ9vLPGI0aldYF5dOsB4D2CeP-l6t4hfN29fZJIf2mNBT6lGYOaSN66io66VW7p706K1Np8RbUKJy_mbE99Xs0--B326g%3D)** Despite what the mainstream media and too many low-level judges are saying, Birthright Citizenship for tourists and illegal aliens is not written into the Constitution.Rather, the 14th Amendment that contains Birthright Citizenship was enacted to grant full citizenship to the slaves freed by Abraham Lincoln — along with their children and their children’s children. It was not meant to apply to foreign visitors...**And it was _definitely not_ for illegal aliens.**In fact, the text of the 14th Amendment clearly states that it only applies to “persons born or naturalized in the United States, **_AND_** subject to the jurisdiction thereof.” But over time, government bureaucrats stretched the 14th Amendment and automatically gave U.S. citizenship to every birth to illegal aliens, and even to foreign nationals vacationing in the United States.Now, the situation has gotten completely out of hand...**In 2023 alone, there were roughly 350,000 births to illegal aliens in the U.S. Tourists gave birth to another 40,000.** These so-called “anchor babies” can keep illegal alien parents from getting deported and give a legal basis for a whole chain of migrants to push their way into America.Is it any surprise that human traffickers and even high-end birth tourism companies are making billions of dollars?This is not by accident – it’s by design. In fact, the Obama State Department changed U.S. visa rules to explicitly allow women to travel to America for the purpose of giving birth in 2015!Thankfully, the Trump administration overturned this rule and pushed back on illegal immigration on a number of fronts.**_But Trump can’t do it alone._**
---
[ **Take the Survey** ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3e53ef7223d540b98b74ba2e90866f2d&_e=54V9OCQNd1ZWGuPyoNTD1kher_HgF5cKu25WdeRuDi3GkPQOcjr-iaETUonUnAGfvaWAeiuy3xiIiFWdGVfi9p1eye_dEEpiTtlXElOw_7_oiz46znur3iGmA-amliP8yw9j7Aojm8_OiobikEcDEGiZgvGqeh5Mv6Ftrh4GtO_Tx0JnfWeXPRPcB8nkX9bIUhwAGSfgdtOPnocTqAOOy9mNMVTwvGAePNmUQaYbDN7v7ctoUW1lwb-NA1bkos_pQkRDoW7IeDzGgGoQtcx3QH_lD5ZW2-57m5pURSyEtBeQFFbeeULVQUHIKNkRUpKo5CfbZbm4cFuhixwYp5ANrabeBrNpyNuHYC8urbG-U2o%3D)
---
**Fortunately, grassroots organizing is what NumbersUSA does best.** Over the past thirty years, we’ve grown from a small staff into the largest single-issue advocacy group in the United States.Back in 1996, we pioneered the tactic of masses of grassroots voters faxing elected officials directly.In 2007, when Ted Kennedy (remember him?) was trying to grant amnesty to millions of illegal aliens, NumbersUSA mobilized citizens in such numbers that they shut down the Congressional switchboard. The New York Times “blamed” NumbersUSA as the key factor in blocking Kennedy’s decades-long mass amnesty dream.It was a real David-and-Goliath struggle, and we won.Fast forward to 2025, and our populist immigration position is gaining traction in Washington.The DC power brokers are now calling us when they need to mobilize America-First patriots across the country. To be clear, that’s not because they want to talk to me, Roy Beck.It’s because they know that NumbersUSA is the connection point for 8 million members who understand how our immigration system is utterly broken......and what it will take to fix it. We’ve never had a President like Donald Trump who gets this issue on such a visceral level.But it takes more than just one man to reverse this open borders insanity. He needs a lot of congressional action to back him up and to make improvements permanent.**In our decades on Capitol Hill, we have learned that nothing grabs attention like fired-up American patriots just like you.** And there’s no denying the impact when a mountain of responses pours in from across the country.It proves that the immigration action we’re calling for isn’t just coming from me and the great folks at NumbersUSA—**no, it’s the unmistakable _DEMAND_ of the American people.**And at that point, a politician doesn’t need one ounce of courage.Just a pinch of common sense will be enough to realize that voting against the American people is a “one-way ticket to Palookaville.”That’s how you take a nationwide network of Patriots and turn it into victories at the ballot box, in Congress, and for generations of Americans to come.That’s what NumbersUSA is all about. We have the experience, we have the playbook, but we need your help to execute on Birthright Citizenship and many other key immigration issues.Since we don’t take a penny from dark money, corrupt NGOs, or the government, we rely on patriots just like you to transform our vision into concrete action. **[**So after you fill out your survey, please make a generous donation of $35, $50, $100 or even as much as $500 or $1,000.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3e53ef7223d540b98b74ba2e90866f2d&_e=54V9OCQNd1ZWGuPyoNTD1kher_HgF5cKu25WdeRuDi3GkPQOcjr-iaETUonUnAGfvaWAeiuy3xiIiFWdGVfi9p1eye_dEEpiTtlXElOw_7_oiz46znur3iGmA-amliP8yw9j7Aojm8_OiobikEcDEGiZgvGqeh5Mv6Ftrh4GtO_Tx0JnfWeXPRPcB8nkX9bIUhwAGSfgdtOPnocTqAOOy057CmLZ7mS41iZ0Vgzq6HTBO_GqiPjaaVeckQuVXrmmV2cfGyLEyB5ARW2knWv58mL3fE1hG7Rs1ye02USxqjGQqO93qYO7z6Uav0KhEFYys-Kfva1nyJWjvuBXJ7MLjLuAiYcgiQAzG6pcdRu6vOU%3D)****If you can’t make a larger donation at this time, I hope you’ll just cover the cost to process your survey—$3.91.** We’ve run enough of these campaigns on Capitol Hill to know that it takes a veritable army of American patriots to get through to these elected officials.And the only way to assemble an army is with a call that goes out all across the nation. **[**Your completed survey and your donation will be an indisputable sign that the time for change has come.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3e53ef7223d540b98b74ba2e90866f2d&_e=54V9OCQNd1ZWGuPyoNTD1kher_HgF5cKu25WdeRuDi3GkPQOcjr-iaETUonUnAGfvaWAeiuy3xiIiFWdGVfi9p1eye_dEEpiTtlXElOw_7_oiz46znur3iGmA-amliP8yw9j7Aojm8_OiobikEcDEGiZgvGqeh5Mv6Ftrh4GtO_Tx0JnfWeXPRPcB8nkX9bIUhwAGSfgdtOPnocTqAOOy_COGosqEOPf14zaioReS_58esWDji3PiwGwTfSTCmUSRYeX3RdUOzYhIMGLKP_1NaP0dLyl5E_yB86Ml0WSTQnWvxX8U5etRukMJ0odeaTtfyuEv-HBRhwIt0XZmRqj2TrIxK9seY0PAoY5LoZnC1Y%3D)**
---
Thank you and God bless you today!
---
| | Roy Beck

clean_body: This is not by accident—it’s by design | | | | | My Fellow Fighter, I’m writing to you today because I believe you’re an America First Patriot who’s sick of the open borders madness. And that’s exactly who I’m hoping to reach with my Birthright Citizenship Survey. We’re launching a nationwide campaign to educate and activate American patriots on the real intention of Birthright Citizenship... ...and the real disaster it has become for American workers and American citizens. Despite what the mainstream media and too many low-level judges are saying, Birthright Citizenship for tourists and illegal aliens is not written into the Constitution.Rather, the 14th Amendment that contains Birthright Citizenship was enacted to grant full citizenship to the slaves freed by Abraham Lincoln — along with their children and their children’s children. It was not meant to apply to foreign visitors...And it was definitely not for illegal aliens.In fact, the text of the 14th Amendment clearly states that it only applies to “persons born or naturalized in the United States, AND subject to the jurisdiction thereof.” But over time, government bureaucrats stretched the 14th Amendment and automatically gave U.S. citizenship to every birth to illegal aliens, and even to foreign nationals vacationing in the United States.Now, the situation has gotten completely out of hand...In 2023 alone, there were roughly 350,000 births to illegal aliens in the U.S. Tourists gave birth to another 40,000. These so-called “anchor babies” can keep illegal alien parents from getting deported and give a legal basis for a whole chain of migrants to push their way into America.Is it any surprise that human traffickers and even high-end birth tourism companies are making billions of dollars?This is not by accident – it’s by design. In fact, the Obama State Department changed U.S. visa rules to explicitly allow women to travel to America for the purpose of giving birth in 2015!Thankfully, the Trump administration overturned this rule and pushed back on illegal immigration on a number of fronts.But Trump can’t do it alone. Fortunately, grassroots organizing is what NumbersUSA does best. Over the past thirty years, we’ve grown from a small staff into the largest single-issue advocacy group in the United States.Back in 1996, we pioneered the tactic of masses of grassroots voters faxing elected officials directly.In 2007, when Ted Kennedy (remember him?) was trying to grant amnesty to millions of illegal aliens, NumbersUSA mobilized citizens in such numbers that they shut down the Congressional switchboard. The New York Times “blamed” NumbersUSA as the key factor in blocking Kennedy’s decades-long mass amnesty dream.It was a real David-and-Goliath struggle, and we won.Fast forward to 2025, and our populist immigration position is gaining traction in Washington.The DC power brokers are now calling us when they need to mobilize America-First patriots across the country. To be clear, that’s not because they want to talk to me, Roy Beck.It’s because they know that NumbersUSA is the connection point for 8 million members who understand how our immigration system is utterly broken......and what it will take to fix it. We’ve never had a President like Donald Trump who gets this issue on such a visceral level.But it takes more than just one man to reverse this open borders insanity. He needs a lot of congressional action to back him up and to make improvements permanent.In our decades on Capitol Hill, we have learned that nothing grabs attention like fired-up American patriots just like you. And there’s no denying the impact when a mountain of responses pours in from across the country.It proves that the immigration action we’re calling for isn’t just coming from me and the great folks at NumbersUSA—no, it’s the unmistakable DEMAND of the American people.And at that point, a politician doesn’t need one ounce of courage.Just a pinch of common sense will be enough to realize that voting against the American people is a “one-way ticket to Palookaville.”That’s how you take a nationwide network of Patriots and turn it into victories at the ballot box, in Congress, and for generations of Americans to come.That’s what NumbersUSA is all about. We have the experience, we have the playbook, but we need your help to execute on Birthright Citizenship and many other key immigration issues.Since we don’t take a penny from dark money, corrupt NGOs, or the government, we rely on patriots just like you to transform our vision into concrete action. you can’t make a larger donation at this time, I hope you’ll just cover the cost to process your survey—$3.91. We’ve run enough of these campaigns on Capitol Hill to know that it takes a veritable army of American patriots to get through to these elected officials.And the only way to assemble an army is with a call that goes out all across the nation. Thank you and God bless you today! | | Roy Beck Founder and President NumbersUSA | | | P.S. I need to hear what you’re seeing where you are — and how you’re thinking about Birthright Citizenship and immigration as a whole. Take the Survey | | | NumbersUSA is a nonpartisan, nonprofit organization that believes better immigration policy is possible and needed. name: Andrea Salinas
subject: this is important
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
Extreme weather and natural disasters are only getting worse with climate change—and Oregon’s farmworkers are some of the hardest hit.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107633810/545318409/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzdhMGVlNS0zMzMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2XkPnqpXL3LvTWF7COSpo0-1Ls6Ghz-d69TtL4t7os8=) Extreme weather and natural disasters are only getting worse with climate change— _and Oregon’s farmworkers are some of the hardest hit._ When disaster strikes, farmers can lose out on wages and even their jobs—leaving them facing housing and food insecurity. Without federal relief, many of Oregon’s farmers are left to fend for themselves when extreme weather disrupts their ability to work. **That’s why I’m proud to reintroduce the _Disaster Relief for Farm Workers Act_ to provide direct support for farmworkers who lose wages— _or even their jobs_ —due to extreme weather or other disasters beyond their control.** **This legislation is long-overdue.** Oregon alone is home to over 100,000 essential farmworkers who grow and harvest Oregon’s food, powering the state’s 42 billion dollar farm industry. They’ve always had our backs. It’s time we’ve had theirs. I will never hesitate to stand up for the brave men and women who feed America’s families— _and I’m asking you to stand with me:_ **[Please, will you sign my petition and call on Congress to pass the Disaster Relief for Farm Workers Act?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107633811/545318410/-71602030?refcode=email_051325_farmers&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzdhMGVlNS0zMzMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2XkPnqpXL3LvTWF7COSpo0-1Ls6Ghz-d69TtL4t7os8=&emci=ac8e7e9a-2530-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=377a0ee5-3330-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=5643047)** | | **[SIGN YOUR NAME →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107633812/545318411/-71602030?refcode=email_051325_farmers&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzdhMGVlNS0zMzMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2XkPnqpXL3LvTWF7COSpo0-1Ls6Ghz-d69TtL4t7os8=&emci=ac8e7e9a-2530-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=377a0ee5-3330-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=5643047)**

name: Ritchie Torres
subject: To the GOP: NO CUTS TO MEDICAID!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107634215/545319965/1654258770?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTY4NjVkYS0zNDMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ut49xEME4PDdnJr78ML2pZbX5RG9WS0syuVTgAjPPl0=)
---
Today, House Republicans will vote on making $880 billion in budget cuts that would devastate Medicaid.

**NY-15 is the top Democratic district with Medicaid enrollment in the country. 1 in 5 Americans are in whole or in part covered by Medicaid.**

_If Republicans pass this legislation, it will be one of the largest attacks on American healthcare in _history.__

**This means hardworking Americans have to foot the bill for tax cuts for Trump and his billionaire friends**

It’s reckless and wrong, Peter — and it is a total betrayal to all Americans.

[That’s why I’m calling on the Senate to ensure this legislation does NOT pass. Will you join me by signing my petition to demand NO cuts to Medicaid? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107634216/545319966/-978719866?refcode=RTFC_20250513_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTY4NjVkYS0zNDMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ut49xEME4PDdnJr78ML2pZbX5RG9WS0syuVTgAjPPl0=&emci=724382b0-1c30-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=b96865da-3430-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=34594689) | [NO CUTS TO MEDICAID: ADD YOUR NAME »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107634217/545319967/-978719866?refcode=RTFC_20250513_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTY4NjVkYS0zNDMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ut49xEME4PDdnJr78ML2pZbX5RG9WS0syuVTgAjPPl0=&emci=724382b0-1c30-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=b96865da-3430-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=34594689)

Peter, unlike many of my colleagues, the importance of social safety nets like Medicaid and SNAP is _not abstract_ to me.

Growing up in public housing in the Bronx, it was _these_ programs that kept me and my neighbors alive. My mom worked multiple jobs on minimum wage to provide for our family. We relied on programs like public housing and government assistance to get by.

**I know firsthand what these cuts mean for many Americans, and I’m disgusted that my Republican colleagues voted to hurt so many families.**

But Peter, I refuse to sit back and watch the GOP destroy the livelihoods of some of the hardest working people in America. That’s why I want to know if you’re with me: [Will you add your name to say NO CUTS to Medicaid? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107634218/545319968/-978719866?refcode=RTFC_20250513_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTY4NjVkYS0zNDMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ut49xEME4PDdnJr78ML2pZbX5RG9WS0syuVTgAjPPl0=&emci=724382b0-1c30-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=b96865da-3430-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=34594689)
[NO CUTS TO MEDICAID: ADD YOUR NAME »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107634219/545319969/-978719866?refcode=RTFC_20250513_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTY4NjVkYS0zNDMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ut49xEME4PDdnJr78ML2pZbX5RG9WS0syuVTgAjPPl0=&emci=724382b0-1c30-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=b96865da-3430-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=34594689)

We’re in this together,

_Ritchie_
| | Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
www.torres.nyc

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

Peter, please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107634220/545319970/1654258770?refcode=footer-lnk-single&amount=25&recurring=0&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTY4NjVkYS0zNDMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ut49xEME4PDdnJr78ML2pZbX5RG9WS0syuVTgAjPPl0=). **To make the most powerful lasting impact and to join Ritchie in the fight for progressive values in Congress, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107634221/545319998/1654258770?refcode=footer-lnk-recur&amount=25&recurring=1&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTY4NjVkYS0zNDMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ut49xEME4PDdnJr78ML2pZbX5RG9WS0syuVTgAjPPl0=).**

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: “It’s time to usher in a new generation.”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Our fight to transform the Democratic Party is surging, and the media is
actually paying attention. The Hill just published a story highlighting
our progressive movement’s push to move on from the corporate,
out-of-touch incumbents holding our party back.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250513?refcode=em20250513-36673&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36673_1203867_Jq4rk3&akid=36673%2E1203867%2EJq4rk3 ]The Hill: Liberals rail at establishment: ‘Too many corporate,
establishment politicians’

Our communications director, Usamah Andrabi, made our case clear:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250513?refcode=em20250513-36673&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36673_1203867_Jq4rk3&akid=36673%2E1203867%2EJq4rk3 ]“Voters are fed up with this entire class of incumbents,” said Usamah
Andrabi, spokesperson for Justice Democrats, a liberal group advocating
for a new crop of younger progressives. “There are too many corporate,
establishment politicians who they feel like are do-nothing Democrats in
the face of this existential threat,” he added. “And it’s time to usher in
a new generation.”

While Donald Trump is set on making the rich even richer off the backs of
working families while eroding our most basic rights, too many Democrats
are content with protecting the status quo and refusing to fight back.

That failed playbook won’t save us, and our base knows it. Young people
and working-class families across the country are disillusioned with this
party, because they realize they deserve better.

That’s why Justice Democrats is leading the charge to clean house. We’re
taking on do-nothing Democrats bankrolled by corporate cash in next year’s
primary elections – and we have a plan to win.

We’ve already endorsed Donavan McKinney – running against multimillionaire
incumbent Rep. Shri Thanedar – in Michigan’s 13th district, and more
endorsements are on the way.

For years, Justice Democrats has been unafraid to take on the Democratic
establishment and build progressive power in Congress by helping elect
bold leaders like the Squad, and we’re ready to grow our bloc even more
this cycle. But we can’t do it alone,
Peter.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250513?refcode=em20250513-36673&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36673_1203867_Jq4rk3&akid=36673%2E1203867%2EJq4rk3 ]If you’re tired of do-nothing Democrats in Congress, donate to Justice
Democrats today. We’ll put your money straight to work taking on the
out-of-touch old guard of the Democratic Party and securing wins for the
working class.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250513?refcode=em20250513-36673&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36673_1203867_Jq4rk3&akid=36673%2E1203867%2EJq4rk3 ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250513-36673-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36673_1203867_Jq4rk3&akid=36673%2E1203867%2EJq4rk3

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36673%2E1203867%2EJq4rk3

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

SB 315 by Senator Lois Kolkhorst, sponsored in the House by Representative Caroline Harris Davila, would establish that Texans have a property right for their DNA, making it illegal to alter or modify someone’s DNA without their consent. name: Marina Jenkins, All On The Line
subject: This isn’t history. It’s happening right now in the present.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
With your support, we can continue the fight for fair maps and fair representation
|
---

Hi Peter,
This week, a federal appeals court will hear oral argument in a case that could determine not only the fate of Georgia’s legislative and congressional maps, but also a key aspect of enforcement of the Voting Rights Act (VRA).
**In a moment, I’ll share more details about this case, the broader pattern it fits into, and how anti-democracy forces are desperately trying to hold on to power by going after the VRA. [But first, I’m asking you to make a donation to help fight for equal representation in Georgia and nationwide.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107634316/545320389/-766669670?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_GATrial_email_20250513-AOTL-Tier1-GATrial-MJ_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250513-AOTL-Tier1-GATrial-MJ_&utm_campaign=GATrial&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJiNjg2NWRhLTM0MzAtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=urb3SGlfxcpCESqMtjJpbC3inVxIx5yBL-6j5M2wHuE=)**

[DONATE $250](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107634321/545320394/-766669670?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_GATrial_email_20250513-AOTL-Tier1-GATrial-MJ_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250513-AOTL-Tier1-GATrial-MJ_&utm_campaign=GATrial&express_lane=true&amount=250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJiNjg2NWRhLTM0MzAtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=urb3SGlfxcpCESqMtjJpbC3inVxIx5yBL-6j5M2wHuE=) | [Another Amount](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107634322/545320395/-766669670?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_GATrial_email_20250513-AOTL-Tier1-GATrial-MJ_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250513-AOTL-Tier1-GATrial-MJ_&utm_campaign=GATrial&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJiNjg2NWRhLTM0MzAtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=urb3SGlfxcpCESqMtjJpbC3inVxIx5yBL-6j5M2wHuE=)
This case traces back to Georgia’s 2021 redistricting cycle. Data from the 2020 Census showed that the state’s Black population had grown by more than 15 percent, while the white population had decreased by over 4 percent. But anti-democracy legislators enacted a congressional map that overrepresented the state’s white population and diluted Black voting power.
Our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation (NRF), sprang into action to initiate a legal challenge, arguing that Georgia’s congressional and state legislative maps all violated Section 2 of the VRA, which protects against vote dilution.
**The court agreed. Following the NRF’s win at the U.S. Supreme Court in the 2023 landmark decision _Allen v. Milligan_ , which upheld Section 2, a Georgia federal court ordered the state to draw new maps in November 2023. The state’s new maps failed to provide the additional representation ordered, however, and Georgia further pursued an appeal to the 11th Circuit in an effort to go back to its gerrymanders.**
Georgia’s arguments throughout the case are part of a larger, concerted effort by anti-democracy forces to use the courts to undermine Section 2 of the VRA. We’re seeing these same types of arguments in states like Louisiana and Alabama to make inadequate “fixes” count or overturn newly enacted fair maps — which all deprive Black voters of their rightful and hard-fought representation.
**Black Georgians continue to be underrepresented politically to this current day. This is not a question of distant history — this is happening now and still impacting voters. All On The Line will keep fighting for fair representation in Georgia and across the nation. And with your support, we’ll keep mobilizing to defend our democracy from extremists who want to undo our progress.**
[**Peter, with the basic principle of equal representation under attack, we need your ongoing support. Please make a donation to power All On The Line’s work for a stronger, truly representative democracy.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107634323/545320396/-766669670?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_GATrial_email_20250513-AOTL-Tier1-GATrial-MJ_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250513-AOTL-Tier1-GATrial-MJ_&utm_campaign=GATrial&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJiNjg2NWRhLTM0MzAtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=urb3SGlfxcpCESqMtjJpbC3inVxIx5yBL-6j5M2wHuE=)
We’ll keep you posted on the outcome of this case.
Sincerely,
Marina
Marina Jenkins
Executive Director, All On The Line

clean_body: With your support, we can continue the fight for fair maps and fair representation | Hi Peter, This week, a federal appeals court will hear oral argument in a case that could determine not only the fate of Georgia’s legislative and congressional maps, but also a key aspect of enforcement of the Voting Rights Act (VRA). In a moment, I’ll share more details about this case, the broader pattern it fits into, and how anti-democracy forces are desperately trying to hold on to power by going after the VRA. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = This case traces back to Georgia’s 2021 redistricting cycle. Data from the 2020 Census showed that the state’s Black population had grown by more than 15 percent, while the white population had decreased by over 4 percent. But anti-democracy legislators enacted a congressional map that overrepresented the state’s white population and diluted Black voting power. Our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation (NRF), sprang into action to initiate a legal challenge, arguing that Georgia’s congressional and state legislative maps all violated Section 2 of the VRA, which protects against vote dilution. The court agreed. Following the NRF’s win at the U.S. Supreme Court in the 2023 landmark decision Allen v. Milligan , which upheld Section 2, a Georgia federal court ordered the state to draw new maps in November 2023. The state’s new maps failed to provide the additional representation ordered, however, and Georgia further pursued an appeal to the 11th Circuit in an effort to go back to its gerrymanders. Georgia’s arguments throughout the case are part of a larger, concerted effort by anti-democracy forces to use the courts to undermine Section 2 of the VRA. We’re seeing these same types of arguments in states like Louisiana and Alabama to make inadequate “fixes” count or overturn newly enacted fair maps — which all deprive Black voters of their rightful and hard-fought representation. Black Georgians continue to be underrepresented politically to this current day. This is not a question of distant history — this is happening now and still impacting voters. All On The Line will keep fighting for fair representation in Georgia and across the nation. And with your support, we’ll keep mobilizing to defend our democracy from extremists who want to undo our progress. = We’ll keep you posted on the outcome of this case. Sincerely, Marina Marina Jenkins Executive Director, All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. Text FAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. name: Roy Beck
subject: Birthright Citizenship was never meant for illegal aliens
body:
[https://numbersusa.revv.co/donate1776brcsps1wma?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=20250512_BDG_NUSA_BRCS_REV_WAMA-WAMA&utm_term=lrm-active]

My Fellow Fighter,

I’m writing to you today because I believe you’re an America First
Patriot who’s sick of the open borders madness.

AND THAT’S EXACTLY WHO I’M HOPING TO REACH WITH MY _BIRTHRIGHT
CITIZENSHIP SURVEY_.

WOULD YOU BE ABLE TO SET ASIDE FIVE MINUTES TO FILL OUT THE SURVEY
LINKED HERE?
[https://numbersusa.revv.co/donate1776brcsps1wma?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=20250512_BDG_NUSA_BRCS_REV_WAMA-WAMA&utm_term=lrm-active]

We’re launching a nationwide campaign to educate and activate
American patriots on the real intention of Birthright Citizenship...

...and the real disaster it has become for American workers and
American citizens.

AND THAT ALL STARTS WITH THIS BIRTHRIGHT CITIZENSHIP SURVEY THAT I’M
ASKING YOU TO COMPLETE TODAY.
[https://numbersusa.revv.co/donate1776brcsps1wma?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=20250512_BDG_NUSA_BRCS_REV_WAMA-WAMA&utm_term=lrm-active]

Despite what the mainstream media and too many low-level judges are
saying, Birthright Citizenship for tourists and illegal aliens is not
written into the Constitution.

Rather, the 14th Amendment that contains Birthright Citizenship was
enacted to grant full citizenship to the slaves freed by Abraham
Lincoln — along with their children and their children’s children.

It was not meant to apply to foreign visitors...

AND IT WAS _DEFINITELY NOT_ FOR ILLEGAL ALIENS.

In fact, the text of the 14th Amendment clearly states that it only
applies to “persons born or naturalized in the United States, _AND_
subject to the jurisdiction thereof.”

But over time, government bureaucrats stretched the 14th Amendment and
automatically gave U.S. citizenship to every birth to illegal aliens,
and even to foreign nationals vacationing in the United States.

Now, the situation has gotten completely out of hand...

IN 2023 ALONE, THERE WERE ROUGHLY 350,000 BIRTHS TO ILLEGAL ALIENS IN
THE U.S. TOURISTS GAVE BIRTH TO ANOTHER 40,000.

These so-called “anchor babies” can keep illegal alien parents
from getting deported and give a legal basis for a whole chain of
migrants to push their way into America.

Is it any surprise that human traffickers and even high-end birth
tourism companies are making billions of dollars?

This is not by accident – it’s by design.

In fact, the Obama State Department changed U.S. visa rules to
explicitly allow women to travel to America for the purpose of giving
birth in 2015!

Thankfully, the Trump administration overturned this rule and pushed
back on illegal immigration on a number of fronts.

_BUT TRUMP CAN’T DO IT ALONE._

TAKE THE SURVEY
[https://numbersusa.revv.co/donate1776brcsps1wma?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=20250512_BDG_NUSA_BRCS_REV_WAMA-WAMA&utm_term=lrm-active]

FORTUNATELY, GRASSROOTS ORGANIZING IS WHAT NUMBERSUSA DOES BEST.

Over the past thirty years, we’ve grown from a small staff into the
largest single-issue advocacy group in the United States.

Back in 1996, we pioneered the tactic of masses of grassroots voters
faxing elected officials directly.

In 2007, when Ted Kennedy (remember him?) was trying to grant amnesty
to millions of illegal aliens, NumbersUSA mobilized citizens in such
numbers that they shut down the Congressional switchboard.

The New York Times “blamed” NumbersUSA as the key factor in
blocking Kennedy’s decades-long mass amnesty dream.

It was a real David-and-Goliath struggle, and we won.

Fast forward to 2025, and our populist immigration position is gaining
traction in Washington.

The DC power brokers are now calling us when they need to mobilize
America-First patriots across the country.

To be clear, that’s not because they want to talk to me, Roy Beck.

It’s because they know that NumbersUSA is the connection point for 8
million members who understand how our immigration system is utterly
broken...

...and what it will take to fix it.

We’ve never had a President like Donald Trump who gets this issue on
such a visceral level.

But it takes more than just one man to reverse this open borders
insanity. He needs a lot of congressional action to back him up and to
make improvements permanent.

IN OUR DECADES ON CAPITOL HILL, WE HAVE LEARNED THAT NOTHING GRABS
ATTENTION LIKE FIRED-UP AMERICAN PATRIOTS JUST LIKE YOU.

And there’s no denying the impact when a mountain of responses pours
in from across the country.

It proves that the immigration action we’re calling for isn’t just
coming from me and the great folks at NumbersUSA—NO, IT’S THE
UNMISTAKABLE _DEMAND _OF THE AMERICAN PEOPLE.

And at that point, a politician doesn’t need one ounce of courage.

Just a pinch of common sense will be enough to realize that voting
against the American people is a “one-way ticket to Palookaville.”

That’s how you take a nationwide network of Patriots and turn it
into victories at the ballot box, in Congress, and for generations of
Americans to come.

That’s what NumbersUSA is all about.

We have the experience, we have the playbook, but we need your help to
execute on Birthright Citizenship and many other key immigration
issues.

Since we don’t take a penny from dark money, corrupt NGOs, or the
government, we rely on patriots just like you to transform our vision
into concrete action.

clean_body: [] My Fellow Fighter, I’m writing to you today because I believe you’re an America First Patriot who’s sick of the open borders madness. AND THAT’S EXACTLY WHO I’M HOPING TO REACH WITH MY BIRTHRIGHT CITIZENSHIP SURVEY. WOULD YOU BE ABLE TO SET ASIDE FIVE MINUTES TO FILL OUT THE SURVEY LINKED HERE? [] We’re launching a nationwide campaign to educate and activate American patriots on the real intention of Birthright Citizenship... ...and the real disaster it has become for American workers and American citizens. AND THAT ALL STARTS WITH THIS BIRTHRIGHT CITIZENSHIP SURVEY THAT I’M ASKING YOU TO COMPLETE TODAY. [] Despite what the mainstream media and too many low-level judges are saying, Birthright Citizenship for tourists and illegal aliens is not written into the Constitution. Rather, the 14th Amendment that contains Birthright Citizenship was enacted to grant full citizenship to the slaves freed by Abraham Lincoln — along with their children and their children’s children. It was not meant to apply to foreign visitors... AND IT WAS DEFINITELY NOT FOR ILLEGAL ALIENS. In fact, the text of the 14th Amendment clearly states that it only applies to “persons born or naturalized in the United States, AND subject to the jurisdiction thereof.” But over time, government bureaucrats stretched the 14th Amendment and automatically gave U.S. citizenship to every birth to illegal aliens, and even to foreign nationals vacationing in the United States. Now, the situation has gotten completely out of hand... IN 2023 ALONE, THERE WERE ROUGHLY 350,000 BIRTHS TO ILLEGAL ALIENS IN THE U.S. TOURISTS GAVE BIRTH TO ANOTHER 40,000. These so-called “anchor babies” can keep illegal alien parents from getting deported and give a legal basis for a whole chain of migrants to push their way into America. Is it any surprise that human traffickers and even high-end birth tourism companies are making billions of dollars? This is not by accident – it’s by design. In fact, the Obama State Department changed U.S. visa rules to explicitly allow women to travel to America for the purpose of giving birth in 2015! Thankfully, the Trump administration overturned this rule and pushed back on illegal immigration on a number of fronts. BUT TRUMP CAN’T DO IT ALONE. TAKE THE SURVEY [] FORTUNATELY, GRASSROOTS ORGANIZING IS WHAT NUMBERSUSA DOES BEST. Over the past thirty years, we’ve grown from a small staff into the largest single-issue advocacy group in the United States. Back in 1996, we pioneered the tactic of masses of grassroots voters faxing elected officials directly. In 2007, when Ted Kennedy (remember him?) was trying to grant amnesty to millions of illegal aliens, NumbersUSA mobilized citizens in such numbers that they shut down the Congressional switchboard. The New York Times “blamed” NumbersUSA as the key factor in blocking Kennedy’s decades-long mass amnesty dream. It was a real David-and-Goliath struggle, and we won. Fast forward to 2025, and our populist immigration position is gaining traction in Washington. The DC power brokers are now calling us when they need to mobilize America-First patriots across the country. To be clear, that’s not because they want to talk to me, Roy Beck. It’s because they know that NumbersUSA is the connection point for 8 million members who understand how our immigration system is utterly broken... ...and what it will take to fix it. We’ve never had a President like Donald Trump who gets this issue on such a visceral level. But it takes more than just one man to reverse this open borders insanity. He needs a lot of congressional action to back him up and to make improvements permanent. IN OUR DECADES ON CAPITOL HILL, WE HAVE LEARNED THAT NOTHING GRABS ATTENTION LIKE FIRED-UP AMERICAN PATRIOTS JUST LIKE YOU. And there’s no denying the impact when a mountain of responses pours in from across the country. It proves that the immigration action we’re calling for isn’t just coming from me and the great folks at NumbersUSA—NO, IT’S THE UNMISTAKABLE DEMAND OF THE AMERICAN PEOPLE. And at that point, a politician doesn’t need one ounce of courage. Just a pinch of common sense will be enough to realize that voting against the American people is a “one-way ticket to Palookaville.” That’s how you take a nationwide network of Patriots and turn it into victories at the ballot box, in Congress, and for generations of Americans to come. That’s what NumbersUSA is all about. We have the experience, we have the playbook, but we need your help to execute on Birthright Citizenship and many other key immigration issues. Since we don’t take a penny from dark money, corrupt NGOs, or the government, we rely on patriots just like you to transform our vision into concrete action. SO AFTER YOU FILL OUT YOUR SURVEY, PLEASE MAKE A GENEROUS DONATION OF $35, $50, $100 OR EVEN AS MUCH AS $500 OR $1,000. [] IF YOU CAN’T MAKE A LARGER DONATION AT THIS TIME, I HOPE YOU’LL JUST COVER THE COST TO PROCESS YOUR SURVEY—$3.91. We’ve run enough of these campaigns on Capitol Hill to know that it takes a veritable army of American patriots to get through to these elected officials. And the only way to assemble an army is with a call that goes out all across the nation. YOUR COMPLETED SURVEY AND YOUR DONATION WILL BE AN INDISPUTABLE SIGN THAT THE TIME FOR CHANGE HAS COME. [] Thank you and God bless you today! Roy Beck [] Founder and President NumbersUSA [] P.S. I need to hear what you’re seeing where you are — and how you’re thinking about Birthright Citizenship and immigration as a whole. name: Team Bell
subject: First the cuts. Then the chaos. Now he’s doubling down.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
What’s next? Peter, Donald Trump took office earlier this year, and it didn’t take long for his administration to show us exactly where their priorities were.

**FIRST:** In his first 100 days as president, Trump has slashed vital funding for programs working families depend on — from Meals on Wheels to after-school programs for our kids.

**THEN:** They attacked the Department of Education, undermining our public schools and pushing policies that left behind the students who needed support the most. At the same time, Trump reinstated cruel, chaotic immigration orders that tore families apart and betrayed the values we hold as a nation.

**NOW:** Trump is promising to finish what he started.

They’re gutting our public schools, targeting our immigrant communities, tanking our economy, attacking reproductive freedom, and turning our democracy over to extremist cronies. And not a single Republican in Congress is holding Trump accountable. We can’t afford to sit on the sidelines. Not now, **not ever.**

Wesley is fighting every single day for fully funded public schools across St. Louis, humane and just immigration policies, and a government that puts working people first — not wealthy donors and extremist politics. But he's counting on all of us to help keep up his momentum.

name: Squad Victory HQ
subject: JD Vance
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250513-1349-foote&t=1001&akid=1349%2E342411%2EhjmbFh ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

JD Vance went after Ilhan on social media in an attempt to rile up the
far-right against her and our progressive movement.

Here’s what happened: The video which JD Vance amplified was put out by a
fear-mongering, conspiracy-peddling account.

They selectively cut the video and took Ilhan’s words completely out of
context. She was having a nuanced and important conversation surrounding
the fact that white supremacists were responsible for 78% of
“extremist-related murders.”

Let’s be real: Trump and MAGA Republicans have been targeting our Squad
for years. We know by now they’re not interested in honest debates or real
policy discussions.

These smear campaigns are only going to get worse as Trump’s four-year
term unfolds. That’s why we have to be ready — and we have to stand
together.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250513-movement.JrqarX&refcode=em20250513-1349&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1002&akid=1349%2E342411%2EhjmbFh ]These attacks are only going to ramp up as we get further into Trump’s
four-year term. If you can, will you donate $3 to help us
fight back against their attacks and smear campaigns?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250513-movement.JrqarX&refcode=em20250513-1349&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1021&akid=1349%2E342411%2EhjmbFh ]Donate $3

Thank you for helping us fight back,

Team Squad Victory

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1349%2E342411%2EhjmbFh

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: The one race MAGA is banking on
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
This U.S. Senate race in Georgia isn’t just another election.
| Peter —

This U.S. Senate race in Georgia isn’t just another election.

It’s the one race MAGA is banking on.

See, as the only Democratic Senator up for re-election in a state Trump won, I am, quite literally, their #1 target.

You know the stakes. And you know your support is crucial. If you are ready to make a donation today, please use this link to split a donation between my campaign and Fight For Progress today:

[_**LINK**_](https://fight4progress.org/ossoff?t=oFbHw0QiBbht&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-05-13_1&amount=25)

Otherwise, I hope you’ll give me a minute or two to explain why your support is so important.

They’re going to come after me with every dirty trick in the book and will spare no expense to defeat me.

That means we need to build the largest statewide campaign Georgia has ever seen.

That means more rallies. More organizers. More outreach — and early outreach — to voters in every corner of the state.

All of that takes resources. And it’s why donations from supporters like you are so important to our campaign.

The road ahead won’t be easy. But I know how to win tough fights. I’ve done it before.

I can’t do it alone, which is why I’m asking:

[_**Please, consider splitting a contribution between my re-election and Fight For Progress. Every donation counts in a race as close as this one will be.**_](https://fight4progress.org/ossoff?t=E3kW3SPaN2DW&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-05-13_1&amount=25)
---

Thanks for all you do to support our campaign.

As always,

Jon

name: Sarah McBride
subject: “Gulf of America”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
I’m sick and tired of Republicans wasting time with silly stunts.
#
Last week, House Republicans decided to address what they think is the most pressing issue facing Americans: **Renaming the Gulf of Mexico to the “Gulf of America.”**
[****](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250513-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250513-1993&refcode2=1993_21716_1Zyk2n&akid=1993%2E21716%2E1Zyk2n)
That’s right. With families struggling to afford child care, seniors rationing medication, and folks paying even more for groceries, they spent hours on _this._
As if that wasn’t ridiculous enough, when I called them out for wasting our time, they started having a meltdown over people changing their names.
My constituents are counting on me to lower costs, and I’m sick and tired of Republicans wasting time with silly stunts to distract from the fact that they’re working to gut Medicaid, SNAP, and other essential programs.
**Amid all the chaos, I continue fighting to tackle the real issues. That’s why I’ve called on Speaker Johnson to bring real legislation to the floor, so we can actually get to work.**
[**I’m counting on your support to stay focused on legislating. Can you pitch in $5 so we can cut through the noise and deliver real solutions to the challenges facing all of us?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250513-1?refcode=em20250513-1993&amount=5&refcode2=1993_21716_1Zyk2n&akid=1993%2E21716%2E1Zyk2n)

In service,
Sarah

clean_body: I’m sick and tired of Republicans wasting time with silly stunts. Last week, House Republicans decided to address what they think is the most pressing issue facing Americans: Renaming the Gulf of Mexico to the “Gulf of America.” That’s right. With families struggling to afford child care, seniors rationing medication, and folks paying even more for groceries, they spent hours on this. As if that wasn’t ridiculous enough, when I called them out for wasting our time, they started having a meltdown over people changing their names. My constituents are counting on me to lower costs, and I’m sick and tired of Republicans wasting time with silly stunts to distract from the fact that they’re working to gut Medicaid, SNAP, and other essential programs. Amid all the chaos, I continue fighting to tackle the real issues. That’s why I’ve called on Speaker Johnson to bring real legislation to the floor, so we can actually get to work. In service, Sarah

name: Ben Ray, EMILYs List

First: Donald Trump endorsed incumbent Derrick Van Orden , the anti-choice Republican Rebecca Cooke is running to unseat. Trump's focus is on boosting vulnerable Republicans, so this endorsement means he thinks Van Orden needs help. Then: The Cook Political Report shifted WI-03's race rating from Lean Republican to TOSS-UP! = | = This is a must-win race if we want to take back the U.S. House, and we need the full strength of the EMILYs List community to make it happen. When we say this movement is powered by grassroots supporters like you, we mean it. Your support is what enables us to train and deploy staff to Rebecca's campaign, connect with voters, and fund the strategic investments that win elections. EMILYs List is already working hand-in-hand with Rebecca's team to build a winning campaign, but we can't do it without you. The EMILYs List community has helped elect and reelect hundreds of Democratic pro-choice women up and down the ballot. name: Team Nickel
subject: Washington Republicans’ dangerous new tactic
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for North Carolina**
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107637182/545330526/-1960556440?refcode=AU_GWN_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250513_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGI4YzJlZC0zZDMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xkRSWsC5S_pnt95tgks1L7vgpjeLl0idp0aGZEdd1yo=)
---
Peter, The anti-abortion movement has recently adopted a dangerous new tactic: weaponizing unreliable reports to deliberately inflate safety risks and block access to mifepristone, an FDA-approved medication, trusted in healthcare settings worldwide for its safety and efficacy. In fact, rigorous studies and decades of research have consistently shown mifepristone to be a safe and necessary medication for reproductive health care. Washington Republicans are using misleading reports riddled with scientific inaccuracies and lacking credible sources to unjustly claim mifepristone is unsafe — only to introduce legislation to ban it outright. **But here’s the truth:_it’s yet another step toward a national abortion ban and another law stripping away women’s rights to make their own health care decisions_.** They’re relying on shady tactics to undermine and erode reproductive freedoms, advancing their agenda to impose restrictions on personal health choice. We must rely on science, not scare tactics, to guide health care policies and protect access. Throughout his career, Wiley has fought for reproductive rights and access to health care. As your U.S. Senator, he will continue advocating for science-based health policies, challenging misinformation, and ensuring people have the information and freedom to make their own health care choices. **[Team Wiley is committed to protecting reproductive rights and ensuring access to accurate information. Will you join us in demonstrating your commitment? Add your name alongside Wiley's to stand for truth and defend the right to bodily autonomy for all.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107637183/545330527/2047215218?refcode=AU_GWN_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250513_PM1_V1_S1&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGI4YzJlZC0zZDMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xkRSWsC5S_pnt95tgks1L7vgpjeLl0idp0aGZEdd1yo=&emci=a7b8c2ed-3d30-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=a8b8c2ed-3d30-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=28008880)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107637184/545330528/2047215218?refcode=AU_GWN_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250513_PM1_V1_S1&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGI4YzJlZC0zZDMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xkRSWsC5S_pnt95tgks1L7vgpjeLl0idp0aGZEdd1yo=&emci=a7b8c2ed-3d30-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=a8b8c2ed-3d30-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=28008880)

name: Deb Haaland
subject: Pathetic, but not surprising
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
In the United States of America, we don’t bow to kings, tyrants, or dictators.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=1923%2E400544%2E7EunZq)
In the United States of America, we don’t bow to kings, tyrants, or dictators.
That’s why I’m asking you to join me in loudly opposing Donald Trump’s plan to hold a massive military parade through the streets of Washington D.C. on the day of his 79th birthday.
[**Add your name to say NO to Trump’s shameful birthday parade. The brave men and women of our military deserve better than to be used as props in Trump’s egotistical birthday parade.**](https://act.debhaaland.com/sign/em_ms_dh_20250513_1_militaryparade?source=em20250513-1923&akid=1923%2E400544%2E7EunZq)
**[Add Your Name »](https://act.debhaaland.com/sign/em_ms_dh_20250513_1_militaryparade?source=em20250513-1923&akid=1923%2E400544%2E7EunZq)**
**I’m the proud daughter of a military family, and I grew up going to military parades.** My dad was a drill instructor. And on the weekends, he’d take us kids to the parades to watch the marching bands. I hold those memories close, and I still love to go hear the music the Marine Corps bands play.
But the parades I grew up going to were always about honoring the service and sacrifice of our military – _not about inflating the ego of a draft-dodging wannabe dictator._
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/sign/em_ms_dh_20250513_1_militaryparade?source=em20250513-1923&akid=1923%2E400544%2E7EunZq) [](https://act.debhaaland.com/sign/em_ms_dh_20250513_1_militaryparade?source=em20250513-1923&akid=1923%2E400544%2E7EunZq)
_My father was a U.S. Marine Corps and combat veteran. My mother served in the Navy._
It’s pathetic, but not surprising, that Trump would take what should be a prideful celebration of service and co-opt it into a forty-five-million-dollar birthday celebration for himself.
**Especially while he and Elon Musk hollow out the VA and threaten essential health care and housing services for veterans and their families.**
My parents taught me the meaning of service to our country and to our Constitution, and I’ve spent my entire life striving to honor those lessons. **That’s why I’m asking you to join me in speaking out against Trump’s selfish military parade.**
[**Add your name to oppose a military parade honoring Trump’s birthday.**](https://act.debhaaland.com/sign/em_ms_dh_20250513_1_militaryparade?source=em20250513-1923&akid=1923%2E400544%2E7EunZq)
Be fierce,
Deb
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250513-1&t=2&refcode2=1923_400544_7EunZq&akid=1923%2E400544%2E7EunZq)**

I’m the proud daughter of a military family, and I grew up going to military parades. My dad was a drill instructor. And on the weekends, he’d take us kids to the parades to watch the marching bands. I hold those memories close, and I still love to go hear the music the Marine Corps bands play. But the parades I grew up going to were always about honoring the service and sacrifice of our military – not about inflating the ego of a draft-dodging wannabe dictator. My father was a U.S. Marine Corps and combat veteran. My mother served in the Navy. It’s pathetic, but not surprising, that Trump would take what should be a prideful celebration of service and co-opt it into a forty-five-million-dollar birthday celebration for himself. Especially while he and Elon Musk hollow out the VA and threaten essential health care and housing services for veterans and their families. My parents taught me the meaning of service to our country and to our Constitution, and I’ve spent my entire life striving to honor those lessons. That’s why I’m asking you to join me in speaking out against Trump’s selfish military parade. Be fierce, Deb

| | Dear Friend, In November of 2024, the American people rejected the radicalism of the Democrats and saved our nation from four years of Kamala Harris.But now, Californians must take up the gauntlet—because Kamala is getting ready to run for Governor of California.She just kicked off her “comeback” tour with a speech to a room full of Democrat elites in San Francisco. And while she was cracking jokes and spewing her usual word salad nonsense, 35% of Californians are struggling just to afford the basics—**food, rent, medicine.** Kamala didn’t say a single word about that.Not one word about working families...
Not one plan to fix the mess her party created...
And not even a hint of humility... Just more preening, more posturing, and more political theater from someone who’s been a disaster in every job she has had.Let’s be clear: this isn’t just her comeback tour. It’s a coronation plan. The Democrat machine wants to hand Kamala the Governorship.**Not on my watch.** I’m Steve Hilton, and I’m running for Governor of California to bring back _freedom, opportunity, and common sense_ —to **Make California Golden Again**.[**Join my campaign today!**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=1c905e97c2a0495d8d80bcb7ce1779b3&_e=X3SlxvHsw2dJfE8WYcTxQ3wn1aeFmTmz9YOMP2tCiWdp0IPK0exdCsvA-cv9eKGOsbyZjiALYAv7wRYtGPLKdNn1NCJpDDOZ1ZpnwMRfU92kREPN1kT0KJ0qiTbgWVBw9cZ2c5cmpMHevg8IHC1JiCA8Q6KXS0Yy_p9u3El2OskSppv1KShCL94AVgijn9z9OTW1WuihvCcdozyUBxdODvr6UDH1HtLU_UhGIlA-J0ZdqZR2kbq26R5F5PFuG3JZGizf6G-Ask69GZsy9k2DuqIEwq4n3oINpogU1BXhdOAJ2XW7MifwUWLgXihWnVUCJTKzO7luPE8bJ55Dj3omsEKsfQWr_rqUpbi5capnLUoRWAeANz6MmcKQ-BwpIAAkWLDIQA_AfNXAyjef0zZ3ifvIsmJaSOTEpnhARgAlFjk%3D) It does not have to be like this. Californians do not have to be the victims of failed Democrat policies any longer.California can still be the greatest state in the country. I truly believe that with all my heart. We are the home of innovation, creativity, and hard work. But radical democrats like Gavin Newsom, Kamala Harris and their elite allies have turned our state into a cautionary tale for the rest of America.
---
* Crime is up.
* Homelessness is exploding.
* Public schools are failing.
* Housing is unaffordable.
* Businesses and families are fleeing.

---
And Kamala? She wants more of the same. **Kamala Harris failed as a presidential candidate. She failed as Vice President. And she would be catastrophic as Governor.** But make no mistake—Kamala believes she can walk right into the Governor’s mansion. The elites are rallying around her. They think they can buy this race. They don’t believe someone like me—an outsider, a problem-solver, someone who speaks truth to power—can beat their broken machine.**[Let’s prove them wrong.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=1c905e97c2a0495d8d80bcb7ce1779b3&_e=X3SlxvHsw2dJfE8WYcTxQ3wn1aeFmTmz9YOMP2tCiWdp0IPK0exdCsvA-cv9eKGOsbyZjiALYAv7wRYtGPLKdNn1NCJpDDOZ1ZpnwMRfU92kREPN1kT0KJ0qiTbgWVBw9cZ2c5cmpMHevg8IHC1JiCA8Q6KXS0Yy_p9u3El2OskSppv1KShCL94AVgijn9z9OTW1WuihvCcdozyUBxdODvr6UDH1HtLU_UhGIlA-J0ZdqZR2kbq26R5F5PFuG3JZGizf6G-Ask69GZsy9k2DuuC5-dk1YR_sCE87V90nrCYi3qic8XGRNZmx8yf4fK7YZ9uchHB0Jgtd96Xfe0uL2FufJc8KEXNn7KQpx5t3o6wEbCKxxayfwx4_24cRfVcq-Ndt-3VWMXpgYhVORM6y_woQblFjZBpEuqvAIqgvfAU%3D)** This race is going to come down to a clear choice: **_Fifteen more years of one-party rule from failed Democrats who wrecked this state_**
__**OR**__
** _A new era of bold, common-sense leadership that will make California golden again._** So I’m calling on every proud Californian who wants to turn things around: **[Will you chip in $25, $50, $100 or more to help me stop Kamala and Make California Golden Again?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=1c905e97c2a0495d8d80bcb7ce1779b3&_e=X3SlxvHsw2dJfE8WYcTxQ3wn1aeFmTmz9YOMP2tCiWdp0IPK0exdCsvA-cv9eKGOsbyZjiALYAv7wRYtGPLKdNn1NCJpDDOZ1ZpnwMRfU92kREPN1kT0KJ0qiTbgWVBw9cZ2c5cmpMHevg8IHC1JiCA8Q6KXS0Yy_p9u3El2OskSppv1KShCL94AVgijn9z9OTW1WuihvCcdozyUBxdODvr6UDH1HtLU_UhGIlA-J0ZdqZR2kbq26R5F5PFuG3JZGizf6G-Ask69GZsy9k2DuirXn56PfdJNs00ChDCRNJzQ25QgKEuf1o59xZStXoPpHTXIIReVmbqoLjCza1rTtJ7hTssI-7xXXCJ2Tz68EoCgrvmtadmkKejffG9_WFMJ48CbceL3E-TJXUXgNx-_WwJoLcQDK8hqZrw4doi9Mvw%3D) **We don’t need another elitist who talks in circles and dodges accountability. We need real leadership. We need to talk about the real issues. We need to take our state back.Join me—and let’s get to work.
---

clean_body: She’s back...| | | | | | | Dear Friend, In November of 2024, the American people rejected the radicalism of the Democrats and saved our nation from four years of Kamala Harris.But now, Californians must take up the gauntlet—because Kamala is getting ready to run for Governor of California.She just kicked off her “comeback” tour with a speech to a room full of Democrat elites in San Francisco. And while she was cracking jokes and spewing her usual word salad nonsense, 35% of Californians are struggling just to afford the basics—food, rent, medicine. Kamala didn’t say a single word about that.Not one word about working families... Not one plan to fix the mess her party created... And not even a hint of humility... Just more preening, more posturing, and more political theater from someone who’s been a disaster in every job she has had.Let’s be clear: this isn’t just her comeback tour. It’s a coronation plan. The Democrat machine wants to hand Kamala the Governorship.Not on my watch. I’m Steve Hilton, and I’m running for Governor of California to bring back freedom, opportunity, and common sense —to Make California Golden Again. It does not have to be like this. Californians do not have to be the victims of failed Democrat policies any longer.California can still be the greatest state in the country. I truly believe that with all my heart. We are the home of innovation, creativity, and hard work. But radical democrats like Gavin Newsom, Kamala Harris and their elite allies have turned our state into a cautionary tale for the rest of America. Crime is up. Homelessness is exploding. Public schools are failing. Housing is unaffordable. Businesses and families are fleeing. And Kamala? She wants more of the same. Kamala Harris failed as a presidential candidate. She failed as Vice President. And she would be catastrophic as Governor. But make no mistake—Kamala believes she can walk right into the Governor’s mansion. The elites are rallying around her. They think they can buy this race. They don’t believe someone like me—an outsider, a problem-solver, someone who speaks truth to power—can beat their broken machine. This race is going to come down to a clear choice: Fifteen more years of one-party rule from failed Democrats who wrecked this state OR A new era of bold, common-sense leadership that will make California golden again. So I’m calling on every proud Californian who wants to turn things around: We don’t need another elitist who talks in circles and dodges accountability. We need real leadership. We need to talk about the real issues. We need to take our state back.Join me—and let’s get to work. Steve Hilton Candidate for Governor of California P.S. Kamala Harris doesn’t want a serious debate—because her ideas are the ideas that have led to this calamity. If you’re ready to fight back, I need you on this team. ** | | | | | | ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY STEVE HILTON FOR GOVERNOR 2026 FPPC ID#1480425 Please add mailto:info@stevehiltonforgovernor.com "info@stevegarvey.com" to your email contacts to make sure our updates are making it into your inbox. PO Box 730,HILMAR, CA 95324

name: GIFFORDS
subject: Some difficult decisions
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We are nearing the halfway mark for the quarter.
#

Team,
Thursday marks our halfway point for this quarter — the first full quarter since Donald Trump took office.
When it's over, we'll take stock of our resources and make some difficult decisions about where we can afford to make investments... and where we can't.
That's why we're asking you to donate today. $10. That's the ask.
$10 to help us expand strong gun laws in states where Democrats have the numbers to act.
$10 to help us fight back against Republican attempts to erode our gun laws in Congress or in states across the country.
$10 to help us elect a Congress that will stand up to Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and those who prioritize the profits of gun manufacturers over the safety of our communities.
We know that $10 may not seem like it can do all of those things. But when so many people are chipping in what they can, it adds up fast. So please:
[**Make a contribution — $10 or whatever you can afford — to GIFFORDS and we will put your donation to work in the fight to make our communities safe from gun violence.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may25.7MLdP7&refcode=em250513-1-b&t=1&akid=10428%2E3935704%2EdzULOi)
