body:
KING 5: The Trump administration is withholding funding for trailblazing breast cancer researcher with UW. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107637514/545331584/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzNlOWUyZi0zZjMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BsFdO1CSJ6wZuVss5MQbLzqKZ12F0xK0pr9LRGjWEFs=&emci=f16e5cfd-0830-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=b73e9e2f-3f30-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=15820338)
---

Peter,

When Congress allocates funding— _for medical research, for our schools, for our Veterans_ —it isn’t a suggestion.

**It’s the law.**

And yet time and time again, we’ve seen President Trump and his allies treat those commitments like optional guidelines.

Here in Washington State, vital research dollars have been stalled and withheld—funds that support life-saving work at our hospitals, universities, and research centers like Fred Hutchinson. As a doctor, I know this is the work that leads to new treatments, new cures, and new hope for families.

But it goes deeper. When these research institutions lose funding, so do their biotechnology graduate students—leaving no path for a new generation of scientific investigators. It cuts off American leadership in cutting edge science.

Here’s one example: Diabetes researchers are looking for ways to prevent diabetes. As someone with T1D, I am excited that there may be ways to prevent or delay T1D for future generations. They are also investigating connections between all types of diabetes and dementia, like Alzheimer’s. Just imagine having research that could help prevent Alzheimer’s!

These cuts are outrageous and stupid, and cede American leadership in biotechnology. **And that’s exactly why Democrats have been sounding the alarm.**

Let me be clear: The Constitution matters. Checks and balances are there for a reason, and right now, our president needs a serious check on his actions. But the only way to do that and to restore normalcy to Congress is with a Democratic House who will stand up, fight back, and say NO to Trump's reckless and extreme agenda that will raise healthcare prices for all Americans, cost real people their lives, and abandon our nation’s scientific leadership.

**[That’s why I’m fighting every day to keep WA-08 blue—and it’s why this mid-month fundraising deadline matters so much. Will you chip in today to help us hit our goal and prepare for the road ahead?>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107637515/545331586/-1351093942?refcode=em25_250513_MM1_fndd_gq_act___DKS_ettx&&&&utm_campaign=em25_250513_MM1_fndd_gq_act___DKS_ettx&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&refcode2=b73e9e2f-3f30-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&refcode2=b73e9e2f-3f30-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzNlOWUyZi0zZjMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BsFdO1CSJ6wZuVss5MQbLzqKZ12F0xK0pr9LRGjWEFs=)**

name: Fair Fight
subject: A defining moment in the fight against modern-day voter suppression and intimidation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight
body:
We’re going back to court. Here’s why. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107637924/545332780/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250513_f_TrueTheVoteNOR_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzFjYTQxYy00MDMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oKbHRDDPqIXanfJ5xDFyyI75juXupxr0A-USxMlVDII=&emci=7362f67e-3830-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=ac1ca41c-4030-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=1037277)

| | Team, A student who was getting ready to vote said he felt “accused of doing something wrong” and feared he wouldn’t be able to cast his ballot. A veteran described experiencing “[p]ossible PTSD.” Other Georgians reported feeling “overwhelmed” and “isolat[ed].” And a woman testified that she was discouraged from voting. All because they’d had their voter eligibility formally challenged ahead of the 2021 U.S. Senate runoff elections in Georgia — thanks to a far-right group called True the Vote. Remember the context of that time period: A massive, multiracial coalition of Americans had just turned out to elect Joe Biden and Kamala Harris as president and vice president after Georgia had gone blue in a presidential election for the first time in 28 years. The upcoming runoffs would now decide control of the Senate. Right-wing, anti-voter extremists had just seen the power of the people, and they were determined to snuff it out. **True the Vote announced that they would challenge the eligibility of over 364,000 Georgians, ultimately challenging over 250,000 voters — disproportionately people of color.** **Mass challenges intimidate eligible voters into silence, and this was the largest known incident of its kind in Georgia’s history.** **The Voting Rights Act makes it illegal to intimidate or attempt to intimidate voters — so we sued True the Vote for violating this bedrock law.** Brave Georgians testified about how True the Vote’s challenges had a chilling effect on their ability to exercise the right to vote. A federal judge said that True the Vote’s information “utterly lacked reliability” and “verged on recklessness.” **And earlier today, we were back in court for our appeal in Fair Fight v. True the Vote** — because this case is a defining moment in the fight against modern-day voter suppression and intimidation, and we’re not backing down. Mass challenges may be more subtle than literacy tests or poll taxes, but they’re Jim Crow 2.0. They cause confusion, create fear, and suppress participation in our democracy. And Georgia law allows unlimited challenges by private citizens — a dangerous endorsement of a tactic used to target Black and brown voters without real evidence. Now, this fight isn’t just about Georgia — since 2020, voter suppression activists have initiated mass voter challenges in at least 9 states. And this fight isn’t just about one court case — it’s part of our broader strategy to protect the freedom to vote, from grassroots organizing to public education. In addition, our case sends a message to other groups planning future mass challenges: we won’t let up in our fight to ensure voters can enjoy all the protections the law provides. We won’t let reckless, racially targeted voter suppression tactics go unchallenged. And we’ll keep shining a light on this key tool in the national voter suppression agenda — because that’s key to dismantling the anti-voter playbook. In solidarity, The Fair Fight Team | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107637925/545332781/1297451850?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250513_f_TrueTheVoteNOR_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzFjYTQxYy00MDMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oKbHRDDPqIXanfJ5xDFyyI75juXupxr0A-USxMlVDII=)

clean_body: We’re going back to court. Here’s why. | | | Team, A student who was getting ready to vote said he felt “accused of doing something wrong” and feared he wouldn’t be able to cast his ballot. A veteran described experiencing “[p]ossible PTSD.” Other Georgians reported feeling “overwhelmed” and “isolat[ed].” And a woman testified that she was discouraged from voting. All because they’d had their voter eligibility formally challenged ahead of the 2021 U.S. Senate runoff elections in Georgia — thanks to a far-right group called True the Vote. Remember the context of that time period: A massive, multiracial coalition of Americans had just turned out to elect Joe Biden and Kamala Harris as president and vice president after Georgia had gone blue in a presidential election for the first time in 28 years. The upcoming runoffs would now decide control of the Senate. Right-wing, anti-voter extremists had just seen the power of the people, and they were determined to snuff it out. True the Vote announced that they would challenge the eligibility of over 364,000 Georgians, ultimately challenging over 250,000 voters — disproportionately people of color. Mass challenges intimidate eligible voters into silence, and this was the largest known incident of its kind in Georgia’s history. The Voting Rights Act makes it illegal to intimidate or attempt to intimidate voters — so we sued True the Vote for violating this bedrock law. Brave Georgians testified about how True the Vote’s challenges had a chilling effect on their ability to exercise the right to vote. A federal judge said that True the Vote’s information “utterly lacked reliability” and “verged on recklessness.” And earlier today, we were back in court for our appeal in Fair Fight v. True the Vote — because this case is a defining moment in the fight against modern-day voter suppression and intimidation, and we’re not backing down. Mass challenges may be more subtle than literacy tests or poll taxes, but they’re Jim Crow 2.0. They cause confusion, create fear, and suppress participation in our democracy. And Georgia law allows unlimited challenges by private citizens — a dangerous endorsement of a tactic used to target Black and brown voters without real evidence. Now, this fight isn’t just about Georgia — since 2020, voter suppression activists have initiated mass voter challenges in at least 9 states. And this fight isn’t just about one court case — it’s part of our broader strategy to protect the freedom to vote, from grassroots organizing to public education. In addition, our case sends a message to other groups planning future mass challenges: we won’t let up in our fight to ensure voters can enjoy all the protections the law provides. We won’t let reckless, racially targeted voter suppression tactics go unchallenged. And we’ll keep shining a light on this key tool in the national voter suppression agenda — because that’s key to dismantling the anti-voter playbook. In solidarity, The Fair Fight Team | = | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2025 Fair Fight - All rights reserved. Closing the curtains on my campaign.

I'm at my wits' end, Peter.

The Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their war chest.

**[Now they're raising $50 MILLION to flip my seat blue.](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/yFWaXSdpPtAojW4zQOEcgLOZ5XMCVV6FwrbenCyYEZtFpKi28pRs2M27eikRRh8HsZ05bPVYwTdthBOrwhhgfRkpY9rkjAT78tiwZDjvxNgkqT2VFSZbwGvSa6otdE3oTG7nDqn1Nn_C8hvFWtURQrEuQubiU7caJC5P-FFXYfFdokRd5WS_q1wWI-leT7DxWzFVMu3bVOxQ3WpipjoljhUN1V4EFZ4OuqppMPmdQj18RSVCXnHaO5q0-xEWPup9U5wlZcLHtIULjQgOPJlxHAwKuz9kVnyrCii6VSDvQOk-Ip3GxGefCcdy37r-j5288Y98-zaiIoGqbYPO1NI49Nwb2Sz57Apcwtvdy5UE6q4tq7fBQ_g5iijtFZ85VrbVAE-pqqEZWyDe_A4ySrFmz_bfkeiX4kxncw7mLqRw8Gp3yPQq-IOjVT0_JDadkMvV4UDoej1pIOobHysKDPhhaH3xKdaTLVSGLoLmRJ0IYZ4Q7P6ZB0NZ/0fWVGonRkeUhuoEm4uVeFpRDvZ7zu3Bu/8 "Now they're raising $50 MILLION to flip my seat blue.")**

In 2024, I was outspent 3 to 1 by the Democrats trying to buy my seat, and the DC Democrat machine has already pledged even more against my reelection.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will we lose my House seat, but Republicans WILL lose the House. It'll be Democrat impeachments and stonewalling the AMERICA FIRST agenda all over again.
Peter, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as Secretary of the Interior starting in 2017 and I was a ground forces commander at SEAL Team 6.
In 2022, I led the team of Navy SEALs that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in our party.

If the Democrats destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.

**[But if you can chip in just $5 right now, I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin the Democrats' plan to destroy our nation.](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/KQ9a8eGND1UY0N-gT3z_AWHDRk9hGhUXZIHUyTNBGMXBdpLHAEepcRdzDFGbeeUhwnfGCYbFCgm7PuvpEj2hEH1RQwDImfh4O0lgjcmwCs0gYOu81jR8uyCv877o7Nh0VjXFrcRaw7DoswSeeZ1dcQUU1_re2l2PC9TIJEAgz14bIb6aq6OdDJAEBAeRWI2tVR3TAEjJShLBwf2s0yxjbNdJan7XCYVx4vQjeM7BYV8c8brzgO9ZVCTUuf717FFjPHZ8RlmXCPCzXYvPDtWHHgpkCpnSMNRChMuzR4ecVl18lJSRO254lEJLvqorDCTFAGTF1Xy2Fzn7dfwM_AONOtXeMFN4MquyYUIQrNUn5DGuAIuWVT4Ue2_NAkoqd00H_HCFbfO1z8N5Kn7NmSz2ENq5ZGDjs6mgg5XuU834mhjepVNFkxH_ZLO7aNaWkZXogOzgMyVXCHyPRhLpsc8jxJnzxvaBAEMmeWPkYB4dzMvBbpCEE6cW/HsvH_bACOoi93T-2oPYykL3lkZ59Fuxr/8 "But if you can chip in just $5 right now, I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin the Democrats' plan to destroy our nation.")**

I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation my entire life, will you help me out?

name: Emily Feiner via Working Families Party
subject: SIGN THE PETITION: Our representatives have a responsibility to answer us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Peter, Last week, I was physically dragged out of a town hall hosted by New York Republican Rep. Mike Lawler: [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRIewuyjyAfuswR9y9SJ-tpLxBPPhg2GQPAiB_KjR30x0MC3F2fOwlOtWDRPJe0gfLN88MFeVqELtIPTV4IHDp9Sm_s_tjJtWM00HLushk0dP4cCbEYRv-lQij2dmOn4_f2Tu5ZAgyDrgyRgCRXXbvCN5ApwPCZ55c16sC9BX0w2ibHcTqXXCoQHXU3fsIl5tKpM-x1T6pz5SnX5r-K5_nVRYb7Seuy-wOeH0AGFVJ7qQx9ZBMp_-gsRkHpFBZDS6k8oS-p5YcBp5Axk6-cBUhZMI2Cz9-Vvq44Tvh4KeE9wgXqH_9ecCojRDQ2g7JoyPHGrXA7m1FDXkiOrBVyCmSLYWsFqlq56Qb06s4cm71mh-zBGamEKRsUKDvsleMuaL6d5Q_GMWygLYWKM35YJjQpp68cmgHat5nv2AOG-jqiYjQ/4gg/EwYu8aexT7CPEZ6R5_dxlQ/h0/h001.fCKkYZj-CgKBFTZ3WXp3O8SA8HJViJs921ixcS2DVfw) What was my offense? **Asking my own member of Congress what red line Donald Trump would need to cross for him to finally stand up to Trump’s attacks on our Constitution.** If Mr. Lawler and other Republicans in Congress have a red line — a point where they are willing to publicly oppose Mr. Trump — I believe they should say so. And when they don’t respond to us, **I believe we should stand our ground and keep demanding answers.** **That’s why I stood up and asked my question last weekend. And that’s why regular people across the country are showing up in growing numbers at town halls and Congressional offices and demanding to be heard.** **[If you agree, please add your name now to demand Republican members of Congress answer to their constituents, not their billionaire donors. The more people who stand up in this moment, the more pressure we will be able to put on Republicans in Congress at this critical moment.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRIewuyjyAfuswR9y9SJ-tpLxBPPhg2GQPAiB_KjR30x0MC3F2fOwlOtWDRPJe0gfLN88MFeVqELtIPTV4IHDp9Sm_s_tjJtWM00HLushk0dP4cCbEYRv-lQij2dmOn4_f2Tu5ZAgyDrgyRgCRXXbvCN5ApwPCZ55c16sC9BX0w2ibHcTqXXCoQHXU3fsIl5tKrSDF2o0uSA96flPpjWnXqNOIquZtPkvcFiNIKGcXR4kuojvSsopJkPW6fjsn2F21FVG5gS3IenheIaJ44Jei9A4XtqOG3sgkrkNvxP-4DjH0x9M0rYE0EyrLxonj8JQIvB0G_dTd0UEqASu17-i0lZPTMO1ZQX-eLe2A_F2GqU1BZ0yxYhIaf3a6g9Uzm0lZAP24URzXyJ-mfcjvySsQPjpOUB5wvHiYwmMaTbIIstPw/4gg/EwYu8aexT7CPEZ6R5_dxlQ/h1/h001.5ZWj-baStSjHivVzHRfZ20zN0mh_6JiEi0JtsE2Hiuo)** **[Sign the petition](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRIewuyjyAfuswR9y9SJ-tpLxBPPhg2GQPAiB_KjR30x0MC3F2fOwlOtWDRPJe0gfLN88MFeVqELtIPTV4IHDp9Sm_s_tjJtWM00HLushk0dP4cCbEYRv-lQij2dmOn4_f2Tu5ZAgyDrgyRgCRXXbvCN5ApwPCZ55c16sC9BX0w2ibHcTqXXCoQHXU3fsIl5tKr9z3fMWfNORZrqGZ-0fBxkHKftTPxN0j2__MZWD_K4q4YmRC6U2aSARtRlSD6WHJg5PMwOck7UqOMsfI0K57BVzRAXyrERTIqim9BmwFzE3Sz-h944Kg0VhTIGIGOdGKh7tt_4LGMebYdchjtiWXc4JX59ZFazmni4QmoJXhItRt7udHg_02Wkv1_mQorXYGw5yN3YqaPfYJPZiBUK75WqbUvQNr0zOrZcH7G4X7rdgQ/4gg/EwYu8aexT7CPEZ6R5_dxlQ/h2/h001.9nCyFb0z7oYUVR1SXA1t4ZveK04HwZV1mlpyoCZQZSw)** My name is Emily Feiner. I’m a retired social worker and a peace activist living in New York’s 17th Congressional District. I didn’t attend the town hall meeting expecting to be forcibly removed. I didn’t expect to have my image plastered all over the internet. **But right now, Rep. Lawler and his Republican colleagues are trying to claim ignorance in the face of a barrage of attacks on the Constitution from Donald Trump.** Republican politicians like Mike Lawler like to describe themselves as “moderate.” They like to tell us they’re standing up to Trump behind closed doors. **But all we’ve seen from Republicans in Congress is fear and complicity, even as Trump engages in brazen corruption and tries to destroy the country for his own benefit.** If my own Congressman can’t tell me where his red line is, at what point he’s willing to say _enough,_ then I can only conclude that he has no red line, and that he will let democracy crumble before he so much as says one cross word about Trump. In 1949, my own father was arrested for making a speech on a street corner in opposition to racial segregation. The police ordered my father to stop speaking, claiming that he was trying to incite a riot. When he refused, they arrested him. His free speech case went all the way to the Supreme Court, where the justices voted 6-3 to uphold his conviction. Though he suffered personal and professional consequences for his convictions, ultimately, he was vindicated by history. **My parents taught me to stand up for what’s fair and just, even if what’s fair and just is unpopular, and to use my voice to speak up for those who are unable to speak for themselves.** If that somehow makes me a “radical” activist — in Rep. Lawler’s words — so be it. I would choose my father’s legacy of moral courage over the GOP’s cowardice every day. **[If you believe that our elected officials should show even a tiny amount of the same moral courage by answering their constituents’ questions, then sign the petition now. Demand that Republican members of Congress answer to their constituents, not billionaire donors.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRIewuyjyAfuswR9y9SJ-tpLxBPPhg2GQPAiB_KjR30x0MC3F2fOwlOtWDRPJe0gfLN88MFeVqELtIPTV4IHDp9Sm_s_tjJtWM00HLushk0dP4cCbEYRv-lQij2dmOn4_f2Tu5ZAgyDrgyRgCRXXbvCN5ApwPCZ55c16sC9BX0w2ibHcTqXXCoQHXU3fsIl5tKpzNjVVsU2-KM7lPjcM4aJPsU223yV8nnV6HdIIi9YYYzO1Wy4paok5ATf0pG4ISZWENBywBmKplXhyBNm7bQE2P9GHOITxPGQarVD9rW2GCN-PVutnEDc1dSKVdxUHcRmaOJMmqbRgt98JE0xrWFC08QswKOkhBAI1C90TEZtQ7k1ZbFN9Mo5Zm0eNZTAkky9wS9FiExRq8aE4Q9it_0czHkkvaSQxX4LgV1xKy0meag/4gg/EwYu8aexT7CPEZ6R5_dxlQ/h3/h001.uu8LGChphLlg1miX9zFoJcqu8jYguRxh_6o6PvdIUtQ)** clean_body: | | | Peter, Last week, I was physically dragged out of a town hall hosted by New York Republican Rep. Mike Lawler: What was my offense? Asking my own member of Congress what red line Donald Trump would need to cross for him to finally stand up to Trump’s attacks on our Constitution. If Mr. Lawler and other Republicans in Congress have a red line — a point where they are willing to publicly oppose Mr. Trump — I believe they should say so. And when they don’t respond to us, I believe we should stand our ground and keep demanding answers. That’s why I stood up and asked my question last weekend. And that’s why regular people across the country are showing up in growing numbers at town halls and Congressional offices and demanding to be heard. My name is Emily Feiner. I’m a retired social worker and a peace activist living in New York’s 17th Congressional District. I didn’t attend the town hall meeting expecting to be forcibly removed. I didn’t expect to have my image plastered all over the internet. But right now, Rep. Lawler and his Republican colleagues are trying to claim ignorance in the face of a barrage of attacks on the Constitution from Donald Trump. Republican politicians like Mike Lawler like to describe themselves as “moderate.” They like to tell us they’re standing up to Trump behind closed doors. But all we’ve seen from Republicans in Congress is fear and complicity, even as Trump engages in brazen corruption and tries to destroy the country for his own benefit. If my own Congressman can’t tell me where his red line is, at what point he’s willing to say enough, then I can only conclude that he has no red line, and that he will let democracy crumble before he so much as says one cross word about Trump. In 1949, my own father was arrested for making a speech on a street corner in opposition to racial segregation. The police ordered my father to stop speaking, claiming that he was trying to incite a riot. When he refused, they arrested him. His free speech case went all the way to the Supreme Court, where the justices voted 6-3 to uphold his conviction. Though he suffered personal and professional consequences for his convictions, ultimately, he was vindicated by history. My parents taught me to stand up for what’s fair and just, even if what’s fair and just is unpopular, and to use my voice to speak up for those who are unable to speak for themselves. If that somehow makes me a “radical” activist — in Rep. Lawler’s words — so be it. I would choose my father’s legacy of moral courage over the GOP’s cowardice every day. In solidarity, Emily Feiner Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . _Let me lay this out, clear as day:_
I am the only Democratic Senator up for re-election in a state Trump won in 2024.
This Senate race in Georgia will be the most competitive and most expensive in the nation.
If you’re outraged by what’s happening to our country – and you’re ready to fight – [**_please split a donation of $5 between Senator Durbin's Prairie PAC and my re-election campaign today._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107638273/545333879/-806856115?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.05.13_Ossoff_B1_F1_S1_C1_15OP_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTRhZDc2Yy00MTMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QQmzmJF6K98ovL-iqIzPlh3DDxHjKlyF18Y55I738A4=)
******[DONATE →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107638275/545333881/-806856115?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.05.13_Ossoff_B1_F1_S1_C1_15OP_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTRhZDc2Yy00MTMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QQmzmJF6K98ovL-iqIzPlh3DDxHjKlyF18Y55I738A4=)******
Otherwise, let me remind you why I ran for Senate — and why this moment is just as urgent.
Before I was elected, I led investigations of corruption and human rights abuses worldwide. We exposed wrongdoing in countries where criticizing the government is dangerous, where whistleblowers and witnesses will only meet in secret, where protest carries the risk of prosecution.
More and more, the atmosphere under Trump reminded me of those places where dissent was silenced by intimidation.
Trump’s rise wasn’t just a crisis. It was a warning.
I ran for Senate because I saw the danger in electing someone so profoundly unfit for the presidency and I wanted to confront the corruption that made his rise possible.
I also ran — years before the _Dobbs_ decision — because it was already clear the GOP was coming for reproductive rights. I saw Georgia as the front line in that fight. With a six-week ban now in place here, and Republicans pushing for a national abortion ban, it still is.
**Now this President is staging a power grab unprecedented in our history. In his first 100 days:**
* He freed violent criminals who attacked the Capitol on his behalf.
* Purged independent watchdogs across government.
* Stacked key agencies with loyalists — and called on them to investigate his political opponents.
* Defied and threatened federal judges.
* Undermined the press.
* Handed sweeping, unaccountable power to the billionaire who spent $300 million to elect him.

Trump’s goal isn’t just revenge. He wants to use the government to crush the opposition. And now, Americans are living in fear of their own government.
This is not a drill and it’s not a bad dream. As citizens, it is the test of our lifetimes.
**In 2020, the pundits said flipping a Republican Senate seat in Georgia couldn’t be done. But we built one of the strongest voter mobilization programs in Senate campaign history — and we won. That victory won the Senate majority.**
Now we must win again. And we _will_ win again.
Just like last time, I can’t do it alone.
So I’m asking:
[**_Please make a split contribution between Senator Durbin's Prairie PAC and my re-election campaign today, of $5 or any amount that works for you._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107638278/545333883/-806856115?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.05.13_Ossoff_B1_F1_S1_C1_15OP_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTRhZDc2Yy00MTMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QQmzmJF6K98ovL-iqIzPlh3DDxHjKlyF18Y55I738A4=)
The average online donation to our campaign is around $30. Many give less. Some give more.
All that matters is that lots and lots of people are contributing what they can to power our grassroots campaign. Please, contribute today.
******[DONATE →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107638279/545333886/-806856115?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.05.13_Ossoff_B1_F1_S1_C1_15OP_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTRhZDc2Yy00MTMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QQmzmJF6K98ovL-iqIzPlh3DDxHjKlyF18Y55I738A4=)******
Thanks for being part of this team.
As always,
Jon Ossoff

So I’m asking: = The average online donation to our campaign is around $30. Many give less. Some give more. All that matters is that lots and lots of people are contributing what they can to power our grassroots campaign. Please, contribute today. **=** Thanks for being part of this team. As always, Jon Ossoff Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin Emails like these are an important aspect of our strategy to keep in touch with our supporters. If you want to receive fewer emails, click If you want to unsubscribe, click Friends of Dick Durbin 101 W. Grand, Suite 200 Chicago, IL 60654 United States

name: Voter Action Project
subject: Sign on before it's too late to stop them
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
“ There’s never been an attack on voting rights out of Congress like this ,” said Alexander Keyssar, a professor of History and Social Policy at the Harvard Kennedy School, and a leading historian of voting rights.
That's exactly why we need to tell the Senate loud and clear: REJECT the anti-voter SAVE Act! Add your name today >> [https://act.commoncause.org/petitions/tell-the-senate-reject-the-anti-voter-save-act-2?source=041625swap-ifvap&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.everyaction.com%2F9bivrSvjFEim0QMMvgcQrA2]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://act.commoncause.org/petitions/tell-the-senate-reject-the-anti-voter-save-act-2?source=041625swap-ifvap&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.everyaction.com%2F9bivrSvjFEim0QMMvgcQrA2]
Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=Tmz1fBA28JfmRnwMMgmvilnsZujiN3D8HNNPle62PUZ7zqXv7MiXNETWB/sCDRTk8l7mNyGcYeGBuUfyjimdNMPedFPDszvvdRuSz9G1vQc=]
Folks -- Every eligible American deserves the freedom to vote without jumping through impossible hoops.
The SAVE Act would scare newly naturalized citizens out of voting and make it harder for millions of eligible voters to cast a ballot – especially seniors, women, students, veterans, and rural voters.
The House of Representatives has passed the SAVE Act – a cruel, calculated attack on every American’s right to vote. The Senate must REJECT the anti-voter SAVE Act and protect our right to vote.
We’ve all seen what happens when voting rights are stripped away. People lose their voice, communities lose power, and elections no longer belong to We The People – they belong to those who make the rules.
Add your name to our petition urging the Senate to REJECT the SAVE Act >> [https://act.commoncause.org/petitions/tell-the-senate-reject-the-anti-voter-save-act-2?source=041625swap-ifvap&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.everyaction.com%2F9bivrSvjFEim0QMMvgcQrA2]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://act.commoncause.org/petitions/tell-the-senate-reject-the-anti-voter-save-act-2?source=041625swap-ifvap&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.everyaction.com%2F9bivrSvjFEim0QMMvgcQrA2]
It’s designed to effectively block millions of eligible Americans from casting a ballot – especially women, seniors, students, and rural voters.
Here’s how the “SAVE” Act puts your vote at risk: [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/save-the-usps-3/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.everyaction.com%2F9bivrSvjFEim0QMMvgcQrA2]
* Prove your citizenship – again: Even if you’re a lifelong voter, if you move across town, change your last name when getting married, or switch parties, you’d have to provide your passport or birth certificate with your current legal name – in person at your local elections office – just to stay registered.
* Get stuck in long lines: Election officials would face impossible workloads, causing confusion and delays.
* Lose your right to vote – without warning: If outdated records can’t verify your status, you could be purged from the rolls without even knowing it.
We still have time to pressure the Senate to stop this – but only if we speak out NOW.
Let’s show the Senate just how many of us are paying attention and demanding they protect our freedom to vote. Sign on today! >> [https://act.commoncause.org/petitions/tell-the-senate-reject-the-anti-voter-save-act-2?source=041625swap-ifvap&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.everyaction.com%2F9bivrSvjFEim0QMMvgcQrA2]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://act.commoncause.org/petitions/tell-the-senate-reject-the-anti-voter-save-act-2?source=041625swap-ifvap&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.everyaction.com%2F9bivrSvjFEim0QMMvgcQrA2]
https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=Tmz1fBA28JfmRnwMMgmvilnsZujiN3D8HNNPle62PUZ7zqXv7MiXNETWB/sCDRTk8l7mNyGcYeGBuUfyjimdNMPedFPDszvvdRuSz9G1vQc= [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=Tmz1fBA28JfmRnwMMgmvilnsZujiN3D8HNNPle62PUZ7zqXv7MiXNETWB/sCDRTk8l7mNyGcYeGBuUfyjimdNMPedFPDszvvdRuSz9G1vQc=]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2]
Donate Now [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=Tmz1fBA28JfmRnwMMgmvilnsZujiN3D8HNNPle62PUZ7zqXv7MiXNETWB/sCDRTk8l7mNyGcYeGBuUfyjimdNMPedFPDszvvdRuSz9G1vQc=]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.

Portland, OR 97280
United States
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=uLgLcKgBAUSX4e2Qb3aL61MFndyeRL82W8zyNPbq48G4YvSyYK%2BU7UyDIF3ctOz9bbMkxWJp4Ht2WqinHuyFxCm%2Bw6c4nb%2B9LjwqNQ1OzIUBXO1gwAKzirQ6hcvO6rhjtqJFYa%2FIRmubmxU6%2Bpy6HoMwHXHNYkc4kOtV89tBA5b2DAA0AE4XuP6vlZ%2FVx0mCHvB006GTGIJrWExgA1dTOppy91xuKU9Q21crrCaDYkSCOOVkmJyttsNvowTRu%2BKuXS2bNMLQFXcuVkOFNZ%2FmhHhkv9fxb3SCeDL3MmbDdo%2BKZ7ZPa5hX9mVR8rXYhGN1gK1PLNtPO2xbrW%2BaY3R5Y%2B3%2BrWJNGbOyo2laflucPcvTb6BfkhSb4PfBDJE9qhCPIKHSb6emKzuT9hGdg2VktlSdkf4jL%2FJkfYQEtFZNwlQ%3D .

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Elect a clown, expect a circus
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| Trump has chosen a cabinet full of corrupt, extreme, and incompetent loyalists who will follow his every word and help him subvert the rule of law.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8576%2E5257348%2EnhH_V8)
Derek,
After Donald Trump was elected, I went on _MSNBC_ to share some thoughts about his cabinet nominees.
While we all hoped that he would act differently in his second term, his cabinet picks suggested otherwise. His choices were far more extreme than anyone he nominated the first time around.
**You know the saying — choose a clown, expect a circus.** Trump has chosen a cabinet full of corrupt, extreme, and incompetent loyalists who will follow his every command and help him subvert the rule of law.
**[I’m working every single day to hold them accountable and stop the damage they seek to cause to our country. Pitch in to help with that work.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q22025_abs_em.gs9A_9&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20250513_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=8576%2E5257348%2EnhH_V8)**

First, Trump announced Matt Gaetz as Attorney General. That didn’t last long, but his replacement, Pam Bondi, is not much better. At Trump’s direction, she launched a sham investigation into ActBlue in an attempt to silence grassroots donors and give even more power to Elon Musk and billionaires who seek to sway elections by making massive contributions.
Kash Patel has been a disaster as the FBI director. He claimed ignorance (under oath) about plans to purge FBI agents — then we found out he was directing them. Add in foreign business ties and murky entanglements with the CCP and the Kremlin, and it’s clear: this isn’t just a lack of leadership, it’s corruption.
And we can’t forget Pete Hegseth, Derek — Trump’s Secretary of Defense, who shared sensitive information about an impending military operation in Yemen in two separate unsecured group chats that included a reporter, his wife, and his brother.
The list of dangerous and incompetent deeds is endless, and with no accountability coming from within the Trump administration, it is up to people like me and my Democratic colleagues to hold them responsible to the rule of law.

subject: “morally opposed”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
Winsome Earle-Sears has made her position clear, and if she becomes Virginia’s next Governor, she won’t just be writing notes. She’ll be signing bills into law that strip away our fundamental freedoms.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107638563/545334867/-735451259?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-05-13_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzFjYzIyZWEtNDIzMC1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4Q0mGYegxjcqhaVwrSnoAur7E-nt6Vm_AvEmiOaxshQ=)

| Peter,

Last week, we found out that my opponent, Winsome Earle-Sears, left a note on the legislature's proposed constitutional amendment to protect reproductive freedom — a handwritten message that tells you _everything_ about where she stands on the issue (mind you, she’s not required to leave any comments).

**Above her signature, she wrote:_“I am morally opposed to this bill.”_**

Let’s be clear: this bill would protect access to abortion, contraception, and IVF in Virginia. That’s what she’s “morally opposed” to.

Winsome Earle-Sears has made her position clear, and if she becomes Virginia’s next Governor, she won’t just be writing notes. She’ll be signing bills into law that strip away our fundamental freedoms.

_We’re not going to let that happen._

I’m running for Governor because Virginians deserve leaders who will protect their rights, not undermine them. But I need your help to show we have the grassroots strength to flip this seat.

name: Team Gottheimer
subject: did you watch?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [#] Did you watch last night’s debate, team?

YES [https://secure.ngpvan.com/JcKdD-Q5sEmr2Bb9s_L8tg2?amount=10]

NO [https://secure.ngpvan.com/JcKdD-Q5sEmr2Bb9s_L8tg2?amount=10]

Josh made it clear last night that fighting for the hardworking people of Jersey is his number one priority.

As Governor, he’ll take on the problems that the naysayers argue are impossible to fix, like our high taxes and Jersey’s affordability crisis. Josh will:

* Cut property taxes by 15%
* Give renters an annual rent rebate
* Lower state income taxes and make it easier for seniors to get by
* Fight to get rid of the cap on the State and Local Tax (SALT) Deduction that has hurt so many Jersey families
* Protect abortion rights and reproductive freedoms from far-right attacks
* Clean up our water and air, and combat the effects of climate change
* Not stop until everyone can get—and afford—the health care that they need
* Refuse to take “NO” for an answer

But, we need your help to make sure every voter in Jersey knows what Josh stands for. Last night was only the beginning.

CHIP IN TO HELP >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/JcKdD-Q5sEmr2Bb9s_L8tg2?amount=10]

Thank you,

Team Gottheimer
Josh is running to be the next Governor of New Jersey in 2025 – the “Lower Taxes, Lower Costs Governor.” Since 2016, his campaign lawn signs have always said the same thing: “Lower Taxes. Jersey Values” – and that’s what he’s done, from expanding the Child Tax Credit to fighting to restore SALT to clawing dollars back to Jersey for first responders. Make checks payable to Josh Gottheimer for Governor PO Box 201 Hackensack, NJ 07602 [] [] []

name: Team Kaptur
subject: Over 100 days of Trump in the White House. Zero results for the Heartland.
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/95655/images/kaptur-email-header-2.png]

Friend, April 30th marked 100 days of Trump in the White House.

What do our communities have to show for it? Zero results.

Trump's mismanagement of the economy has led to trillions of dollars in lost wealth for Americans. The volatile stock market is terrible news for workers' pensions and retirement funds, and prices are skyrocketing due to Trump's reckless tariffs.

Instead of making life better and more affordable for working families, the administration is busy fighting culture war battles and rolling back civil rights protections.

Unless you're one of the 1,500 January 6th insurrectionists that Trump has pardoned, Trump's first 100 days have probably made things worse for you, not better.

Friend, Northwest Ohio communities deserve better. We deserve a government that actually works for working people, not just the wealthy and well-connected.

That's what Marcy is fighting for in Congress. Will you chip in to support that fight? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaptur25_em?refcode=250513_team_100days_l1]Contribute [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaptur25_em?refcode=250513_team_100days_b1]

Thank you so much, friend.

— Team Kaptur
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/95655/images/kaptur-email-headshot.jpg]

About Marcy Kaptur
Marcy Kaptur is a fighter for high-wage jobs, growing a workforce to meet the needs of the 21st century, and protecting our region’s most vital natural resource, the Great Lakes. She’s worked with both parties to secure investments in our communities and has been a true friend of veterans, seniors, first responders and working people. She’s a voice for us all in the People’s House.

name: Katie Porter
subject: How I see the job of an elected official
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39719%2E3422442%2EfgXRyw)
Dear Derek,
When a lot of people think about what an elected official does, they might think the job is just about passing laws.
I see things a little differently. **Fundamentally, I think that representing people is a teaching and learning job.**
You can’t be an effective representative without understanding the actual problems people are facing and prioritizing the right solutions. You have to learn from families, experts, and stakeholders.
Touring local businesses, hosting town halls, and bringing all groups together in roundtables—all of this is about teaching and learning.
When I first got to Congress after over a decade in the classroom, people asked me if it was an adjustment. While the 19 hour weekly commute was not fun, to say the least, I found the work familiar, and I loved it.
When politicians don’t value teaching and learning, we get elected officials who are out of touch. They focus on giving tax breaks to billionaires, instead of delivering lower costs on families’ essentials, like housing, health care, and child care. And they skip town halls, because they don’t think they have to explain themselves to their constituents.
That’s not the kind of governor I’ll be. Californians can count on me to learn from them and to share their experiences at the highest levels of our government.
**[Will you chip in $5 today, so I can take my passion for and track record of teaching and learning to make our politics better?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250513_1_ak?refcode=em20250513-39719&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39719_3422442_fgXRyw&akid=39719%2E3422442%2EfgXRyw)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250513_1_ak?refcode=em20250513-39719&refcode2=39719_3422442_fgXRyw&akid=39719%2E3422442%2EfgXRyw)
—Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250513-39719&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39719_3422442_fgXRyw&akid=39719%2E3422442%2EfgXRyw)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4g-emails?source=39719&t=4&akid=39719%2E3422442%2EfgXRyw)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4g-em-update-info-footer?source=39719)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=39719&t=5&akid=39719%2E3422442%2EfgXRyw)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)

Saudi Arabia rolled out the red carpet for President Trump. It was a celebration between the two countries as President Trump brought back the respect and reverence for America as he took the stage with Crown Prince and Prime Minister Mohammed bin Salam. The Saudis pledged to invest $600 Billion into the U.S. economy, including $142 Million in American made military equipment plus multi-billion dollar deals with Amazon, Oracle and A.M.D. With President Trump's "most favored nation" policy on drug prices, media outlets, funded by pharma, are downplaying the impact it will have on the consumer. Senator Roger Marshall walks us through PBMs (Pharmacy Benefit Manager) in the pharmaceutical market and how they profit as middlemen between drug manufacturers and healthcare companies. PMBs are the reason a drug like Wegovy is over $1,000 a month in the U.S. and $59 in Germany. Senator Marshall unpacks the GOP budget bill, including his championing of no tax on overtime wages. As an obstetrician, Dr. Marshall has known President Trump's cabinet to make America healthy again and is confident they can get the job done in removing processed foods and chronic diseases.
Featuring:
**Senator Roger Marshall**
U.S. Senator | Kansas
https://www.marshall.senate.gov/

subject: 100 for 100
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman
body:

body:
That’s the number of Americans who will lose health care coverage under this Republican plan.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107639433/545338095/684585806?refcode=EM_F_250513plan_N_SB_90DO_5_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTA2N2E5Yi00NTMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M73SHzuQoqZeuzVRCUWG2XX-C-_V-4_iacfYCeYzRIw=) Peter,

House Republicans want to make at least **$880 BILLION in cuts to Medicaid** under Trump’s big, _corrupt_ bill. **Once again, Republicans want to cut critical, life-saving programs for hardworking Americans in order to fund tax breaks for the wealthy.**

According to an estimate by the nonpartisan Congressional Budget Office, if this bill becomes law, **8.6 million Americans will lose health care over the next decade** , with low-income and disabled Americans bearing the brunt of this attack.

**288,000 Ohioans in OH-11 alone rely on Medicaid** – _these cuts would be shameful._

From slashing Medicaid to cutting billions of dollars in funding to SNAP, infrastructure funding, school meals, and more, Republicans will stop at nothing to ensure their pals at Mar-A-Lago can afford another yacht. We must fight back.

---

GOP congressman and Marine Corps veteran Rep. Rich McCormick **[went toe-to-toe with CNN's Kaitlan Collins](https://substack.com/redirect/580bed18-a1d3-4729-b499-50cb20ce16fa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** about President Donald Trump's plan to accept a $400 million aircraft from Qatar.
He lost his patience with her...
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/580bed18-a1d3-4729-b499-50cb20ce16fa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/580bed18-a1d3-4729-b499-50cb20ce16fa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Although historically presidents **[have received gifts from foreign leaders](https://substack.com/redirect/e1b79606-a57e-408c-b6ce-6db3f91eedd7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , Democrats are criticizing Trump's welcoming of Qatar's $400 million gift which reportedly may replace Air Force one.
"Do you think it's ethical to for the president to accept a $400 million plane from the Qataris who you heard, in his first term, accused them of sponsoring terrorism?" Collins asked McCormick.
The congressman said it wasn't up to him to decide, but rather for President Trump to decide if it was unethical to accept the gift. "It's a matter of if it's illegal" he added.
Collins pressed McCormick on if he would vote in support of the U.S. accepting the gift if the matter came up for a vote in congress.
"I don't think it's going to come down to a vote,... congress is in charge of the budget, not which gifts the president can accept," he answered. "That's for a lawyer, I'm not a lawyer, I'm a doctor."
Collins sited the The Emoluments Clause in the Constitution, which bars federal officials from accepting gifts from foreign governments without the consent of congress. "It does directly have to do with the consent of congress sir,... typically presidents are not supposed to accept gifts from foreign leaders," Collins pressed again.
**["If it's illegal we won't do it," McCormick said.](https://substack.com/redirect/580bed18-a1d3-4729-b499-50cb20ce16fa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** "We got bigger problems in the middle east, I promise you."
Collins, still not satisfied with his answer, again asked, "My question is are you okay with it?"
"I think I answered that question pretty clearly," McCormick said growing annoyed. He reiterated that the legality of accepting the gift will have to be evaluated and a decision will be reached. "It's an expensive gift, I get it, but it's not on the taxpayers. Is it something that's going to have nefarious software on it, that's going to have to be evaluated," he explained.
He couldn't believe it when Collins again asked, "Is that a concern that you have?"
Watch McCormick go off at Collins for probing too far to try to get him to criticized the President:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/580bed18-a1d3-4729-b499-50cb20ce16fa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

Ever since Elon Musk started DOGE, the radical left has viciously targeted his car company, Tesla.

# Trump closes the door on decades of Neo-con "nation builders" once and for all
President Trump strongly criticized his predecessors as "neo-conservative nation builders" for wreaking havoc in the middle east rather than helping it during a speech in Saudi Arabia, Tuesday.
"The so-called 'nation builders' wrecked far more nations than they built and the interventionists were intervening in complex societies that they did not even understand themselves," Trump said bluntly.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/17a0155f-aa62-4cff-ac6a-1a87dd934dbf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Trump's populist agenda for the United States has been marked by a peace through strength foreign policy, aiming to end conflicts rather than starting them and focussing on building and investing in nations rather than bombing them, unlike several of the President's predecessors.
Trump had nothing but words of kindness and support for the Saudi leaders during his speech at the Saudi-U.S. Investment Forum, as he aims to secure $1 trillion in U.S. investment from the Gulf nations after successfully landing a $600 billion investment from Saudi Arabia this week.
"Peace, prosperity and progress ultimately came not from a radical rejection of your heritage but rather from embracing your national traditions and embracing that heritage you love so dearly," Trump continued.

clean_body: "How many times are you gonna ask me the same question?!!" | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? "How many times are you gonna ask me the same question?!!" May 13 | | | | | | | | | | | GOP congressman and Marine Corps veteran Rep. Rich McCormick about President Donald Trump's plan to accept a $400 million aircraft from Qatar. He lost his patience with her... Although historically presidents , Democrats are criticizing Trump's welcoming of Qatar's $400 million gift which reportedly may replace Air Force one. "Do you think it's ethical to for the president to accept a $400 million plane from the Qataris who you heard, in his first term, accused them of sponsoring terrorism?" Collins asked McCormick. The congressman said it wasn't up to him to decide, but rather for President Trump to decide if it was unethical to accept the gift. "It's a matter of if it's illegal" he added. Collins pressed McCormick on if he would vote in support of the U.S. accepting the gift if the matter came up for a vote in congress. "I don't think it's going to come down to a vote,... congress is in charge of the budget, not which gifts the president can accept," he answered. "That's for a lawyer, I'm not a lawyer, I'm a doctor." Collins sited the The Emoluments Clause in the Constitution, which bars federal officials from accepting gifts from foreign governments without the consent of congress. "It does directly have to do with the consent of congress sir,... typically presidents are not supposed to accept gifts from foreign leaders," Collins pressed again. "We got bigger problems in the middle east, I promise you." Collins, still not satisfied with his answer, again asked, "My question is are you okay with it?" "I think I answered that question pretty clearly," McCormick said growing annoyed. He reiterated that the legality of accepting the gift will have to be evaluated and a decision will be reached. "It's an expensive gift, I get it, but it's not on the taxpayers. Is it something that's going to have nefarious software on it, that's going to have to be evaluated," he explained. He couldn't believe it when Collins again asked, "Is that a concern that you have?" Watch McCormick go off at Collins for probing too far to try to get him to criticized the President: Elon Musk folds under Tesla protests? | | ---|---|--- Dear Reader, Have the attacks on Tesla worked? Ever since Elon Musk started DOGE, the radical left has viciously targeted his car company, Tesla. Tesla owners have been harassed, the company has been boycotted and dealerships have even been FIREBOMBED ... Now there are loud calls for Elon to step down from DOGE and reports that he may just do it. Was this coordinated campaign really just about government fraud and waste? We don't think so... DOGE had access to some of the US government's most sensitive data... including the . It's that could not only EXPOSE major corruption within the FDA. But also cost Big Pharma hundreds of billions in ill-gotten profits. Which means they'd do anything, including character assassination, to stop from becoming public knowledge. And now it looks like they may be on the verge of succeeding. Which is why we're exposing everything they're scared of you learning in the ... today. P.S. If they've successfully taken down one of the world's most successful companies, there's no telling what they'll do to . Find out why they're so desperate to stop this secret from getting out by . Trump closes the door on decades of Neo-con "nation builders" once and for all President Trump strongly criticized his predecessors as "neo-conservative nation builders" for wreaking havoc in the middle east rather than helping it during a speech in Saudi Arabia, Tuesday. "The so-called 'nation builders' wrecked far more nations than they built and the interventionists were intervening in complex societies that they did not even understand themselves," Trump said bluntly. Trump's populist agenda for the United States has been marked by a peace through strength foreign policy, aiming to end conflicts rather than starting them and focussing on building and investing in nations rather than bombing them, unlike several of the President's predecessors. Trump had nothing but words of kindness and support for the Saudi leaders during his speech at the Saudi-U.S. Investment Forum, as he aims to secure $1 trillion in U.S. investment from the Gulf nations after successfully landing a $600 billion investment from Saudi Arabia this week. "Peace, prosperity and progress ultimately came not from a radical rejection of your heritage but rather from embracing your national traditions and embracing that heritage you love so dearly," Trump continued. | | POLL Do you agree with Trump about "neo conservatives" and "nation builders? | ? ? ? Kennedy got ready to absolutely torch the guy. After he read the horrendous comments he had one question for the general, "You think you're smarter than the American people, don't you?!" * **TOP NEWS**

"**Texas measles outbreak reaches D-FW, with linked cases in Collin and Rockwall counties** ," Dallas Morning News' **Emily Brindley** \-- "The measles outbreak that began in Gaines County has officially reached the Dallas-Fort Worth area, with two cases now linked to the outbreak.

One measles case in Collin County and one case in Rockwall County are now included in the outbreak numbers, according to [a Tuesday update](https://substack.com/redirect/a3c5c9d2-33cd-4d1f-b1e6-70588225970c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) from the Texas Department of State Health Services.

State officials have publicly reported seven measles cases in Dallas-Fort Worth this year. Until Tuesday, none of them had been linked to the larger outbreak.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/64f74342-0886-45fb-8d9c-6a891ab0363a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
In addition to the two cases now connected to the outbreak, the state public health department has listed five Dallas-Fort Worth measles cases as "not associated" with the outbreak.

An additional measles case [reported in Denton County](https://substack.com/redirect/9a4c85dc-0eaa-4e8b-855e-3b3da435f58f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) has not been included in the state's measles updates.

Texas has reported 717 outbreak cases since January. However, less than 1% of those cases are currently infectious, state officials said Tuesday.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/64f74342-0886-45fb-8d9c-6a891ab0363a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The outbreak has also led to cases in New Mexico and Oklahoma.

In their Tuesday updates, neither New Mexico nor Oklahoma reported any additional measles cases since Friday. [New Mexico](https://substack.com/redirect/f32df4fb-5664-4b58-9e22-32be2b332773?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) had reported 71 cases and [Oklahoma](https://substack.com/redirect/d7cac166-161b-4fe9-be71-29dfff04326f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) had reported 17 cases.

Across the three states, there have been 805 reported cases in the outbreak.

Across Texas, 93 people have been hospitalized in the outbreak. Two children in Texas have died. Both children were unvaccinated and did not have underlying health conditions, according to Texas officials." [DMN](https://substack.com/redirect/53fa9851-527b-4dc5-95ad-54e8e63b0f8d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ($)

* **TOP NEWS**

"**Texas measles outbreak reaches D-FW, with linked cases in Collin and Rockwall counties** ," Dallas Morning News' **Emily Brindley** \-- "The measles outbreak that began in Gaines County has officially reached the Dallas-Fort Worth area, with two cases now linked to the outbreak.

One measles case in Collin County and one case in Rockwall County are now included in the outbreak numbers, according to [a Tuesday update](https://substack.com/redirect/8f4c9a93-47c7-421c-9883-a3322db1791a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) from the Texas Department of State Health Services.

State officials have publicly reported seven measles cases in Dallas-Fort Worth this year. Until Tuesday, none of them had been linked to the larger outbreak.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/345c8b4a-4b06-4ef1-9123-70da7343986e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
In addition to the two cases now connected to the outbreak, the state public health department has listed five Dallas-Fort Worth measles cases as "not associated" with the outbreak.

An additional measles case [reported in Denton County](https://substack.com/redirect/9c3840e0-892e-40bb-8e99-2a0e09560479?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) has not been included in the state's measles updates.

Texas has reported 717 outbreak cases since January. However, less than 1% of those cases are currently infectious, state officials said Tuesday.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/345c8b4a-4b06-4ef1-9123-70da7343986e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The outbreak has also led to cases in New Mexico and Oklahoma.

In their Tuesday updates, neither New Mexico nor Oklahoma reported any additional measles cases since Friday. [New Mexico](https://substack.com/redirect/194e94e0-ccfc-477e-a60d-f2f87fab7ed4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) had reported 71 cases and [Oklahoma](https://substack.com/redirect/c36eceab-5f96-4fcc-bf1f-5dc1af9886eb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) had reported 17 cases.

Across the three states, there have been 805 reported cases in the outbreak.

Across Texas, 93 people have been hospitalized in the outbreak. Two children in Texas have died. Both children were unvaccinated and did not have underlying health conditions, according to Texas officials." [DMN](https://substack.com/redirect/834f31d1-fb7c-4ff5-a926-3d179ed223a0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ($)

TOP NEWS "Texas measles outbreak reaches D-FW, with linked cases in Collin and Rockwall counties ," Dallas Morning News' Emily Brindley \-- "The measles outbreak that began in Gaines County has officially reached the Dallas-Fort Worth area, with two cases now linked to the outbreak. One measles case in Collin County and one case in Rockwall County are now included in the outbreak numbers, according to from the Texas Department of State Health Services. State officials have publicly reported seven measles cases in Dallas-Fort Worth this year. Until Tuesday, none of them had been linked to the larger outbreak. In addition to the two cases now connected to the outbreak, the state public health department has listed five Dallas-Fort Worth measles cases as "not associated" with the outbreak. An additional measles case has not been included in the state's measles updates. Texas has reported 717 outbreak cases since January. However, less than 1% of those cases are currently infectious, state officials said Tuesday. The outbreak has also led to cases in New Mexico and Oklahoma. In their Tuesday updates, neither New Mexico nor Oklahoma reported any additional measles cases since Friday. had reported 71 cases and had reported 17 cases. Across the three states, there have been 805 reported cases in the outbreak. Across Texas, 93 people have been hospitalized in the outbreak. Two children in Texas have died. Both children were unvaccinated and did not have underlying health conditions, according to Texas officials." "**Texas measles outbreak reaches D-FW, with linked cases in Collin and Rockwall counties** ,” Dallas Morning News' **Emily Brindley** \-- "The measles outbreak that began in Gaines County has officially reached the Dallas-Fort Worth area, with two cases now linked to the outbreak.

One measles case in Collin County and one case in Rockwall County are now included in the outbreak numbers, according to [a Tuesday update](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.xjnMFfva-73dHOne5Rc0eHsB1jlrVb0PxTSyHRKb3PQqoB7q72is9ApNwlHcwxc1PMHKOfx6U8a81pXwtgBpIYYghHNuutc0HVte58ny6Ed_cTODO_ykqk8fGXFBGMGFEoGHwmhcrBV8EMC4x2lsAJzej2eRNuSPBu9mwq64ATLPfg_hIx4l8TjyE5Judfv-oJiDeFTo-GRvyIzEcCZPQHQadlRPsVkJnnVMYtbf1EKTFXNrfbsClZGs89FxYPLtd6ts8qRi6ByJTJlNN18QmQz0CRGEpo27WyKxZYT5FgHCyEZGfJzkoyJ7UOeeGJtix2gin05UaOL55j3VMRawUgdBE2_hedpqe946q8N34Rml-g0tnrIb3il_8H-xn4uvsMvsdU-8ZIsTfe4aw4E33c5XEZusBY967Fo678mC8gaAS_I6MF5c1sSosCoAl1hiR8DuyQC73rPNc8Aw5XYD2Al_-MzQD7iHsnrGgBDEnsx8Ze4Sxlgktt0l2dd95EQD/4gg/gOYtg9W2Qiijq9Pbp0L9iQ/h13/h001.2ZlZRR993gOAKRBDAnE6RxKtgbnLgA5DnNEJSzpAxfw) from the Texas Department of State Health Services.

State officials have publicly reported seven measles cases in Dallas-Fort Worth this year. Until Tuesday, none of them had been linked to the larger outbreak.

Each day, the newsletter unpacks one important news story, examining it from all sides of the political spectrum. | TOP NEWS "Texas measles outbreak reaches D-FW, with linked cases in Collin and Rockwall counties ,” Dallas Morning News' Emily Brindley \-- "The measles outbreak that began in Gaines County has officially reached the Dallas-Fort Worth area, with two cases now linked to the outbreak. One measles case in Collin County and one case in Rockwall County are now included in the outbreak numbers, according to from the Texas Department of State Health Services. State officials have publicly reported seven measles cases in Dallas-Fort Worth this year. Until Tuesday, none of them had been linked to the larger outbreak. » In addition to the two cases now connected to the outbreak, the state public health department has listed five Dallas-Fort Worth measles cases as “not associated” with the outbreak. An additional measles case has not been included in the state’s measles updates. Texas has reported 717 outbreak cases since January. However, less than 1% of those cases are currently infectious, state officials said Tuesday. » The outbreak has also led to cases in New Mexico and Oklahoma. In their Tuesday updates, neither New Mexico nor Oklahoma reported any additional measles cases since Friday. had reported 71 cases and had reported 17 cases. Across the three states, there have been 805 reported cases in the outbreak. Across Texas, 93 people have been hospitalized in the outbreak. Two children in Texas have died. Both children were unvaccinated and did not have underlying health conditions, according to Texas officials." body:

| [ ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=3fb60b7494934cbebcc064fa1cd681cd&_e=df0kdsw0Sxr5_js7-X_pvwzI3MoWmZns3OKmPwCgMChIPxPr4mqVGH5IP-ISffZNOqqJQ-TZqhJ2c-CrRcYJWxJmCxWouYnMykITSKvnlWIXti41k17joGa0hZGET6aJjUb8DXXJ-FqkID_vobs9oEz0Q6fJEloJwHZMN6EZDoasmuLyrQXo7tfVkSNwmi3pprAuWWJ3wX_wm19MECr5uYlYgB_m-KDeONBZXpAV1krnhoMK0FooXhpw3BajXfJC1OljWwGooVIsI0qu1jNf7xs7HsbUW56dx9CuTWJgqCCFYAsUPZwKQS8kcLIH2EEMtGd4tQz_uUeOyiaU7q0xrCTKQRCvbh9-SbWNGq56V6bPpgKxg2JkaLhy0IF9liHX5OeRQOxH9kBXXeG1EVmd5t3mg6_XObL6D6xGc7foGc4r4vgjoLyxIczKDzyxpmW-99Ez_amFYoHH6gcjDu9Z6Ob5Z3nVTyFUkS-xHA0jKzT5CgHhaSFs5XdFVf3Z5zhWYPuv2oubRvZ73iMxYpiYHBBuL-YhCgDy94UUFW_APWX86zqMwT0Aw5lv36DjOtoc)
---
Peter,

For years, we have dealt with Radical WOKE Democrats claiming to support the working class.

**THEY LIED.**

President Trump campaigned on cutting taxes for the MILLIONS of Americans who work overtime.

"We are delivering on that promise."__

**I am leading the charge with Senator Roger Marshall to introduce the "Overtime Wages Tax Relief Act."** We want you to keep the hard-earned money YOU EARNED. We are delivering in ways for hardworking Americans that the Radical Leftists never could.

| [ **SUPPORT YOUR MONEY STAYING WITH YOU** ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=3fb60b7494934cbebcc064fa1cd681cd&_e=df0kdsw0Sxr5_js7-X_pvwzI3MoWmZns3OKmPwCgMChIPxPr4mqVGH5IP-ISffZNOqqJQ-TZqhJ2c-CrRcYJWxJmCxWouYnMykITSKvnlWIXti41k17joGa0hZGET6aJjUb8DXXJ-FqkID_vobs9oEz0Q6fJEloJwHZMN6EZDoasmuLyrQXo7tfVkSNwmi3pDqwjkB3LpKif9-NGtpnVvZoEosGmYHFjQ5Ft999f7eWOQgxLP3fq5uTTj7WfZUt9tvEzK_Gltm7qTufozWzpvwoc1DaJVQGvMlfWVF3KS-wQzvJ4xbFpbWX-P0UogazhgUmLY8bqbuV2CMPmEfumx38KFfNAN55r0N36r9YKV6CLtHu-yu59kAMWfu4nICZgHOz8mV3xQNBBB6Pp4sh7AA6PQNgo__82Rk43I73r0tNcR4VYwefe2ywccbWvrx62y88lk_IflGjWo4mh6qT_rGIJo1gZvga8CxaZdA6GUC2-Pn7fnVbsqf92YyJGTb6sdNAlaSMAtQM_ay05d_qXBS96B00ddfJbtGQ77V_149-YzUq3dPXN5jY3E3t4mIQq)
---

My colleague, Senator Justice, said it best: _" This bill is about the folks who stay late, pick up the extra shift, and keep this country running."_

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for re-election so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in the United States Senate. The Radical Left has him circled as a prime target to defeat in the 2026 Midterm Elections. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=3fb60b7494934cbebcc064fa1cd681cd&_e=df0kdsw0Sxr5_js7-X_pvwzI3MoWmZns3OKmPwCgMChIPxPr4mqVGH5IP-ISffZNOqqJQ-TZqhJ2c-CrRcYJWxJmCxWouYnMykITSKvnlWIXti41k17joGa0hZGET6aJjUb8DXXJ-FqkID_vobs9oEz0Q6fJEloJwHZMN6EZDoasmuLyrQXo7tfVkSNwmi3pkmG_UOPAjAiO0gTkDfMrngnNuGlQrlfbGnelpglMVSCjDbqEWizr-PPZbOROGXiHOVSisukP9FO0mTy4Pu3fEW3pkh4Ger_8e83VjTOm5NpaSsdCnE96tWHorT1ZWNuBGKw6rjT-GlVaCKdVfnMcs3aJIymKaTmuqovsl4Y7EaxSlVdCrlxOJqr4aql4MKewGsEQv_OO2Ebxymozkw-mSQChSh20-aISFMFyst34iKwdpLQNFBSbwft3gBBbjcmrIj8cQi6GnD3Imj4C0JuM-9UwKIOmlahVvuEiNRrQpigKkhbmt4PLR4ew21Ctu7U05BMczxu3hK3p6ALcJPAM-1mxqxeo9_GenmZRcOuVXmCdEMjmP6yjDnx-dT2-qCRQ)

I served my community as a pediatrician, and as I listened to my patients and their families struggle with rising costs and limited access to affordable care, I knew I had to do something to give our patients and doctors the tools to keep our families healthy. That’s why I decided to run for office.
In the State legislature, those values led me to force Big Pharma to lower the costs of prescription drugs, expand access to family and sick leave, and pass a first-in-the-nation cap on insulin prices for the Coloradan families.
Then in Congress, I continued to fight for what’s right – affordable healthcare, lower drug prices, and protections for working families.
Now, I’m running to win back CO-08 and finish the work I started fighting for the issues that matter most in our community.
The values my parents instilled in me still shape everything I do, and they are at the heart of this campaign. But this race is going to be one of the most competitive in the country, and I need your support. [_**Can you chip in to help us finish the work we started, Peter? clean_body: Throughout my life, my parents always emphasized two core values: hard work and service to others. I’ve made it my mission to live by those values every day, and now, I need your help to keep going. = | | = I served my community as a pediatrician, and as I listened to my patients and their families struggle with rising costs and limited access to affordable care, I knew I had to do something to give our patients and doctors the tools to keep our families healthy. That’s why I decided to run for office. In the State legislature, those values led me to force Big Pharma to lower the costs of prescription drugs, expand access to family and sick leave, and pass a first-in-the-nation cap on insulin prices for the Coloradan families. Then in Congress, I continued to fight for what’s right – affordable healthcare, lower drug prices, and protections for working families. Now, I’m running to win back CO-08 and finish the work I started fighting for the issues that matter most in our community. The values my parents instilled in me still shape everything I do, and they are at the heart of this campaign. But this race is going to be one of the most competitive in the country, and I need your support. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Thanks, Yadira | | | = Make sure this email goes to your inbox. Add info@caraveoforcongress.com to your address book. This campaign is powered by grassroots donations. You can = to make a donation to support Yadira Caraveo for CO-08. Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. name: Jane Fonda
subject: Meet the youngest candidate we’ve ever endorsed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee

We have a historic opportunity in front of us.

As the Trump administration steamrolls ahead with climate rollbacks and giveaways to Big Oil, local elections are becoming one of the last lines of defense we have left to fight back. **In exactly one week, we have the chance to elect two local leaders who won’t sit on the sidelines and who are ready to take on the climate crisis.** I’m thrilled to introduce two new JanePAC-endorsed climate champions: **Mayor Ed Gainey** , running for re-election in Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania, and **Jorge Sanchez Bautista** , running for the Portland Public School Board — and I hope you’ll join me in helping them win. **[Can you split a $20 donation between these two incredible candidates today to help power their victories on May 20?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107640417/545341341/1489742037?amount=20&refcode=ea.8f773f92-4830-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ms=ea.8f773f92-4830-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhmNzczZjkyLTQ4MzAtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mShZPKapEJaJfHcRQJckBNNcdc76lOD1OBahKGS1xKs=)** 🌍 **Mayor Ed Gainey** is flipping the script on polluters in Pittsburgh. He’s replaced lead pipes, electrified the city’s vehicle fleet, and prioritized powering the city with clean energy. He’s made climate justice a centerpiece of his work — ensuring that every community, especially those hit first and worst, is part of Pittsburgh’s green future.
In 2021, he made history as the first Black mayor of Pittsburgh. Today, he’s fighting to keep climate action at the heart of local government. **Re-electing Mayor Gainey is about more than one city — it’s about building strong firewalls of local leadership to protect all of us from the Trump administration’s anti-climate agenda.**
[**SPLIT A $20 DONATION**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107640420/545341344/1489742037?amount=20&refcode=ea.8f773f92-4830-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ms=ea.8f773f92-4830-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhmNzczZjkyLTQ4MzAtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mShZPKapEJaJfHcRQJckBNNcdc76lOD1OBahKGS1xKs=)

🌍 **Jorge Sanchez Bautista** is the youngest candidate JanePAC has _ever_ endorsed — and one of our most inspiring. Jorge is a high school senior in Portland, Oregon, who is running for the Portland Public School Board to lead the fight for climate justice in our classrooms.
He knows this crisis isn’t just about rising temperatures — it’s about the air students breathe, the buildings they learn in, and the uncertain future they need to prepare for. Jorge is the generation that’s both living and inheriting the climate crisis, and he’s already stepping up to lead with bold ideas, clean energy solutions, and real climate education.
