clean_body: We have a historic opportunity in front of us. | = As the Trump administration steamrolls ahead with climate rollbacks and giveaways to Big Oil, local elections are becoming one of the last lines of defense we have left to fight back. In exactly one week, we have the chance to elect two local leaders who won’t sit on the sidelines and who are ready to take on the climate crisis. I’m thrilled to introduce two new JanePAC-endorsed climate champions: Mayor Ed Gainey , running for re-election in Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania, and Jorge Sanchez Bautista , running for the Portland Public School Board — and I hope you’ll join me in helping them win. = | = = 🌍 Mayor Ed Gainey is flipping the script on polluters in Pittsburgh. He’s replaced lead pipes, electrified the city’s vehicle fleet, and prioritized powering the city with clean energy. He’s made climate justice a centerpiece of his work — ensuring that every community, especially those hit first and worst, is part of Pittsburgh’s green future. In 2021, he made history as the first Black mayor of Pittsburgh. Today, he’s fighting to keep climate action at the heart of local government. Re-electing Mayor Gainey is about more than one city — it’s about building strong firewalls of local leadership to protect all of us from the Trump administration’s anti-climate agenda. = = 🌍 Jorge Sanchez Bautista is the youngest candidate JanePAC has ever endorsed — and one of our most inspiring. Jorge is a high school senior in Portland, Oregon, who is running for the Portland Public School Board to lead the fight for climate justice in our classrooms. He knows this crisis isn’t just about rising temperatures — it’s about the air students breathe, the buildings they learn in, and the uncertain future they need to prepare for. Jorge is the generation that’s both living and inheriting the climate crisis, and he’s already stepping up to lead with bold ideas, clean energy solutions, and real climate education. = Every local win helps build a firewall against the Trump administration’s climate attacks. But these critical races often go overlooked and underfunded, so we rely on people like you, people who truly understand the stakes, to help power their races across the finish line. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Let’s keep building this movement — one bold candidate, one local election at a time. xx Jane = | Follow along: | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Why Stephen Miller is tweeting about me today
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
I rolled out a pretty common sense immigration and border security plan yesterday, and that bald headed prick is pretty wound up about it.
#

Hey Peter, it’s Ruben Gallego.
Maybe you’ve heard of Stephen Miller, maybe you haven’t. This is him:
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/pet_em_immigration_plan/?source=em250513-1-90&akid=3866%2E734936%2Ea8iikA)
Real “hall monitor” energy.
He’s a Trump deputy chief of staff, and he’s right up there on the list of most terrible people ever. Spews the most despicable drivel of anybody in this White House, and I’d be willing to bet that he’s got a hand in all the worst stuff Trump’s done since he took office.
Well, I rolled out a pretty common sense immigration and border security plan yesterday, and that bald headed prick is pretty wound up about it. I don’t really care what he thinks of my plan, though. The people of Arizona elected me to do this, and I’m determined to deliver for them.
We can secure the border, keep communities safe, prevent abuse, stop the cruelty, address root causes at the source, and uphold due process — and we can do all of that without harming our economy or millions of people who just want to work hard and pursue the American Dream.
We can do all that! Seriously! But people like Stephen Miller want to be cruel. They want to split up families. They want to shred the Constitution and turn Trump into a king. We all knew dudes like him when we were kids — the kind of guy who just wanted to be mean for the fun of it. Problem is, those guys usually don’t end up leading the country.
Stephen Miller, Trump, and a lot of the big right-wing voices on immigration don’t want to solve the problem. They want it to get worse and worse so they can take away more and more of our freedoms and accumulate power for themselves. It’s gross, but that’s not how it has to be.
We can fix problems in this country, and we can do it without compromising our values. That’s what I’m trying to do.
Guys like Stephen Miller are standing in our way, and I’m asking you to help me beat them.
[**Please, if you’ve got a minute, sign on to personally endorse my common sense immigration plan.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/pet_em_immigration_plan/?source=em250513-1-90&akid=3866%2E734936%2Ea8iikA)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/pet_em_immigration_plan/?source=em250513-1-90&akid=3866%2E734936%2Ea8iikA)
We really can secure the border, reform the asylum system, expand legal pathways to economic prosperity, bring people out of the shadows, and address the root causes of migration — and we don’t have to be cruel or violate the Constitution to do it.
Thanks for listening, I appreciate it.
Ruben

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts. Or, if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=3866%2E734936%2Ea8iikA). name: GOTV PAC
subject: Where’s your $400 million jet?

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3182025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3182025&amount=25]
Peter ,
Donald Trump just accepted a $400 million luxury jet from Qatar.
Let that sink in.
While the U.S. economy is shrinking, his tariffs are tanking growth, driving up prices, and sending manufacturers into panic mode. His answer? “Deal with it.”
Meanwhile, he’s grinning for the cameras as he takes delivery of a flying palace from a foreign government with a long history of business ties with the Trump family.
This isn’t just unethical. It’s dangerous.
The Emoluments Clause exists for exactly this reason: to stop foreign powers from currying favor by giving U.S. leaders lavish gifts. But Trump’s already shown us he doesn’t think the law applies to him.
All while Americans face higher prices, job losses, and economic uncertainty created by his own policies.
If we let this slide and sit back while billionaires and foreign governments buy influence, we’re not just risking another scandal. We’re risking our democracy.
🔥 GOTV PAC is building the power to hold Trump and his MAGA allies accountable in every competitive race across the country in 2025. But we can’t do it without you.
Will you donate just $15 or more right now to flip and hold critical offices and stop this corruption from becoming the norm? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email05132025&amount=25]

name: Byron Donalds
subject: They almost shut the cameras off
body:
I dropped a nuclear MAGA Truth Bomb on live TV
| | | | |
---
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=1070fbe6efc84e4280ce49bdbb60c9fe&_e=newSWHvIqFwXKrF1THmymQovpCObgaTw4AzSMgQ7V1krbMm_3RvpuuqVQWtGwOu9jbpnXXjeaO6SfLrBxHc3HiAZT0nFY1I3lZwLT-4HWnrC9qeGXg0PPIJ0VKJylWywtVwjGarUePpWzL_cl7SsMpFnJUJkCJ8S-XmDdyCs6MUAmyIJuJIRRF-7R6IrkQ35mWfwO3-6ikrvn4_0TdQsc3QJ9W0QuB6_XQak1e9xXNl2LtEAwfEOirqOoC2RLWPl1NAciii60VjH-HbCTwRZG_eVJ2hDiNWyMFpv6K7uvOsXc4AvHiwJVP6RfYiE45BJrhVmnHAARJlU0LtsBUHZrsJ6ijtRNFsZz6BqNPph5JP-Ng0OYYDUz9d03B62_lx1wZrYRYAyHMl9V_3sbA2pgA%3D%3D)
|
---
What you’re about to read almost got me _**blacklisted**_ from MSNBC.
My name is Byron Donalds, I’m President Trump’s right-hand Florida Man, and I’m the _Public Enemy #1_ of the Fake News.
What happened just the other day on primetime TV sent **[SHOCKWAVES](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=1070fbe6efc84e4280ce49bdbb60c9fe&_e=newSWHvIqFwXKrF1THmymQovpCObgaTw4AzSMgQ7V1krbMm_3RvpuuqVQWtGwOu9jbpnXXjeaO6SfLrBxHc3HiAZT0nFY1I3lZwLT-4HWnrC9qeGXg0PPIJ0VKJylWywtVwjGarUePpWzL_cl7SsMpFnJUJkCJ8S-XmDdyCs6MUAmyIJuJIRRF-7R6IrkQ35mWfwO3-6ikrvn4_0TdQsc3QJ9W0QuB6_XQak1e9xXNl2LtEAwfEOirqOoC2RLWPlZr49l8AsHJg3IRv2UV1JBaRAJik0eeGkNxuT_B5cw2IqeKY226EOWINbx1omffOphCTuhX89o3q251DtUJsNUnObWVx8kvnPnhHPKnV86fn3oG1lEDbu-GA2BGZehSoOHw_1QiE06Y11BjbjTcrOXg%3D%3D)** to every radical-leftist demanding that illegals BELONG in our country.
This is a Nuclear MAGA Truth Bomb that might have destroyed my chances of ever returning:
**Here’s my full statement:**
_“Due process is reserved for AMERICAN CITIZENS._
_Those who enter our country are GUESTS in the US._
_When you illegally enter our country, you aren't even our guest––you broke our law the minute you crossed our border, you are an ILLEGAL ALIEN, and you are subject to DEPORTATION.”_
Thank you for reading my critical message.
Ever since I told them the TRUTH, my campaign shot up to the TOP of their MAGA “Must Go” List.
They’ve rallied all available resources to BURY me on the fundraising front all because I’m Trump’s MOST-WATCHED race.
I’m afraid that if we can’t do a counterattack right here and now, _**[MAGA’s chances in 2026 will begin to look GRIM.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=1070fbe6efc84e4280ce49bdbb60c9fe&_e=newSWHvIqFwXKrF1THmymQovpCObgaTw4AzSMgQ7V1krbMm_3RvpuuqVQWtGwOu9jbpnXXjeaO6SfLrBxHc3HiAZT0nFY1I3lZwLT-4HWnrC9qeGXg0PPIJ0VKJylWywtVwjGarUePpWzL_cl7SsMpFnJUJkCJ8S-XmDdyCs6MUAmyIJuJIRRF-7R6IrkQ35mWfwO3-6ikrvn4_0TdQsc3QJ9W0QuB6_XQak1e9xXNl2LtEAwfEOirqOoC2RLWPlHHv_JIFvp8ux7tTKVdWX6EPJS05xQqQoVk7GAfGjeQbhGezE5rnHkdS5kjNBm8GYaWasRorPPLua8hMet-MsrIZ8HFZaKok0O-0wCBTWyTZsXCv_z9CZnl4VC4b9i57-W0w-aovJVlk_BZsQ5lu-lA%3D%3D)**_

**I’ve been fighting for him and the MAGA Movement since Day One, and as Governor I’ll be his TOP Ally.**
But if we lose Florida, everything we’re working for could collapse overnight.

name: Representative Darin Harbick
subject: May 13th Legislative Update
body:
It’s been a busy couple of weeks here at the Legislature. I wanted to share a few updates on what’s going on in Salem.
---
| | | [](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fcontent.govdelivery.com%2Faccounts%2FORLEG%2Fbulletins%2F3e01f40/1/01010196cbc3cd8c-77358818-ab3b-444c-85fe-105bab9ef19b-000000/bES7g7IlmeOJIIIsjp9mfoVn2d-W15eZAzYzneCetNU=404)
---|---
---
Replies to this message are sent to an unmonitored mailbox.
To contact me, please click here: [Rep.DarinHarbick@oregonlegislature.gov](mailto:Rep.DarinHarbick@oregonlegislature.gov) |
* * *
---
Dear Neighbors,
It’s been a busy couple of weeks here at the Legislature. I wanted to share a few updates on what’s going on in Salem. My focus this session continues to be fighting to get Oregon back on the right track by empowering communities and families and focusing on the challenges that impact your day-to-day life.
Best,
Darin
* * *
---
# Protecting Oregonians From Violent Criminals
On Thursday last week, House Republicans forced a vote on HB 3551, a bill which would require local governments and law enforcement agencies to enforce federal immigration laws for anyone convicted of a violent felony, Class A misdemeanor, or a felony sexual offense. We were forced to do this because Democrat Leadership refused to give the bill a public hearing. I was proud to join my fellow Republicans (and a few Democrats) in voting for the bill to be heard.
As co-chief sponsor of the bill alongside Representatives Yunker and Skarlatos I spoke about how I was disappointed that Democrats blocked such an important piece of legislation from passing. You can see my speech about it below.
[](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Folis.oregonlegislature.gov%2Fliz%2Fmediaplayer%3FclientID=4879615486%26eventID=2025051045%26startStreamAt=7207/1/01010196cbc3cd8c-77358818-ab3b-444c-85fe-105bab9ef19b-000000/zaJp_IiNpIp7AcaJYj8k1IEiBUKPMI5dyBbFff4D5gQ=404 "Representative Harbick's remonstrance on HB 3551")
* * *
---
# Largest Fentanyl Bust in US History: Leader Arrested in Oregon
Last week, federal authorities announced one of the [largest fentanyl busts](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.justice.gov%2Fopa%2Fpr%2Flargest-fentanyl-bust-dea-history-authorities-seize-over-400-kilograms-fentanyl-record/1/01010196cbc3cd8c-77358818-ab3b-444c-85fe-105bab9ef19b-000000/0ZbcSmLhLYhuEP4bjl2Zta0054WP8J3Ou5CmDtbgioU=404) in U.S. history when over 400 kilograms of fentanyl, including three million pills, were seized from the Sinaloa Cartel.
Sixteen people were arrested across five states, including Oregon. Among them was cartel leader Heriberto Salazar Amaya, an illegal immigrant living in Salem, whom authorities say had been removed from the U.S. twice already.
Illegal drug cartels like the Sinaloa Cartel are killing Oregonians with fentanyl at rapidly increasing rates. In 2022, illicitly manufactured fentanyl contributed to [65% of all overdose deaths](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.oregon.gov%2Foha%2FPH%2FPREVENTIONWELLNESS%2FSUBSTANCEUSE%2FOPIOIDS%2FPages%2FFentanylFacts.aspx/1/01010196cbc3cd8c-77358818-ab3b-444c-85fe-105bab9ef19b-000000/JCZKDnYRopaY6eVCgNlPqAdXjs1KfxT2xZBdjqv5XjM=404) in Oregon, making it the deadliest illicit drug in our state.
In 2023, Oregon law enforcement officials seized over 3 million counterfeit pills containing fentanyl. Nearly all these drug seizures occurred along the I-5 corridor within Oregon counties designated as high-intensity drug trafficking areas (HIDTA).
Oregon shouldn’t be a sanctuary for criminals who flood our communities with deadly drugs and violent crime. This should be a wakeup call that if we don’t modernize our sanctuary state laws, Oregon will continue to be a haven for dangerous criminals instead of allowing local law enforcement to take them off our streets.
* * *
---
# Know the Risks
To help protect yourself from an accidental overdose, do not take a pill that has not been prescribed by your doctor. Assume anything you receive elsewhere is counterfeit and contains fentanyl.
Resources are available if you or someone you know is in a crisis. Click on the links below for more information:
* [Never Use Alone Hotline](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fneverusealone.com%2F/1/01010196cbc3cd8c-77358818-ab3b-444c-85fe-105bab9ef19b-000000/TAJUf1sBJdCARcFVPn7peFXIpzqQLyyeR4nB_eTfkIw=404): Call 800-484-3731
* Call or text 988 or chat online at 988lifeline.org for behavioral health crisis
* Lines for Life Recovery Resources
* [Treatment Access Hotline](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.linesforlife.org%2Fget-help-now%2Fservices-and-crisis-lines%2F/1/01010196cbc3cd8c-77358818-ab3b-444c-85fe-105bab9ef19b-000000/-XN4oAnX67m6eQDUog011u5MWz0OrYMnLjXpMHtqcmU=404)
* [Alcohol and Drug Helpline](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.linesforlife.org%2F/1/01010196cbc3cd8c-77358818-ab3b-444c-85fe-105bab9ef19b-000000/cGTq_A_n59WR0PiPkqq3msY6IckOS5ghKcuvF5Fwd90=404): Call 1-800-923-4357 or text Recovery Now to 839863
* Recovery Center Hotline: Call 503-575-3769 or 541-575-3769 for drug possession citations
* [Opioid Treatment Program Directory](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fdpt2.samhsa.gov%2Ftreatment%2Fdirectory.aspx/1/01010196cbc3cd8c-77358818-ab3b-444c-85fe-105bab9ef19b-000000/M-BWaPXNN_vnzfg2HGQVxLMpng7zt6xQoveisJccZ4Y=404)

For more information about illicitly manufactured fentanyl or counterfeit pills, contact the Injury and Violence Prevention Program at [IVPP.General@odhsoha.oregon.gov](mailto:IVPP.General@odhsoha.oregon.gov).
* * *
---
# Wildfire Map Repeal Bill Advances
[Senate Bill 83](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Folis.oregonlegislature.gov%2Fliz%2F2025R1%2FMeasures%2FOverview%2FSB83/1/01010196cbc3cd8c-77358818-ab3b-444c-85fe-105bab9ef19b-000000/jXOBweUdlGhDA7bQvVMj5jRE-aBYp2mfc0J-JkubNJo=404), which repeals the state’s wildfire hazard map and removes the strict regulations that came with it, is one step closer to passage! The legislation closely mirrors House Bill 3944, which was introduced on the House side, and would be a huge victory for rural Oregonians who have fought fervently against these unfair and costly mandates.
The bill had a public hearing in the House Committee on Climate, Energy, and Environment on Tuesday. The immense bipartisan support gives me hope that Oregon is ready to ditch these terrible maps and restore property rights for rural Oregonians.
* * *
---
# Democrats Quash Proposal to Fund Clearing the Backlog of Sex Offenders
Back in 2013, the Legislature passed [House Bill 2549](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Folis.oregonlegislature.gov%2Fliz%2F2013R1%2FMeasures%2FOverview%2FHB2549/1/01010196cbc3cd8c-77358818-ab3b-444c-85fe-105bab9ef19b-000000/ntrob2Yldx6EZOoMWBoporbQ9c4u5-XZ4k5sh2pUuKI=404) to establish rules for registering and classifying sex offenders on the state’s online sex offender registry. Since then, the Legislature has been modifying those requirements.
Currently, individuals who are required to register as a sex-offender in Oregon are categorized into three levels — Level 1 have the lowest threat of reoffending, and Level 3 have the highest threat of reoffending. Current law only requires that Level 3 sex offenders be added to the state’s online sex offender registry.
The State Board of Parole and Post-Prison Supervision oversees the process of registering and categorizing sex offenders. The board claims insufficient funding has caused a massive backlog. There are currently about 12,500 unclassified sex offenders living, working, or going to school in Oregon.
To come up with the funding to clear the backlog, House Republicans proposed [HB 3952](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Folis.oregonlegislature.gov%2Fliz%2F2025R1%2FMeasures%2FOverview%2FHB3952/1/01010196cbc3cd8c-77358818-ab3b-444c-85fe-105bab9ef19b-000000/4TSZwcXhc1nJ5Z-7EU7esivxtoh_4s0JbthcR22_vL0=404), but Democrats sent it to a dead committee. The Board now has to come up with the funding from somewhere else. This hurts Oregonians who have no way of knowing if a sex offender lives in their neighborhood until that backlog is complete.
I will always stand with survivors, and I will continue to advocate that this backlog is sorted and added to the publicly available registry as soon as possible.
* * *
---
# Pastor Kirk Stickler
Last week Pastor Kirk Stickler from Calvary Open Bible Church gave the invocation on the House floor before we carried out our business for the day. Pastor Stickler is not only my constituent, but also family. My son was lucky enough to marry his daughter and we now share two granddaughters. It was great to have him give the opening prayer as well as spend the morning with him.
[](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Folis.oregonlegislature.gov%2Fliz%2Fmediaplayer%3FclientID=4879615486%26eventID=2025051043%26startStreamAt=826/1/01010196cbc3cd8c-77358818-ab3b-444c-85fe-105bab9ef19b-000000/1DMEQXMIuAYRohBnuykkWUvQxYNVfSenrL-JQQwQjIM=404 "Pastor Stickler Opening Ceremony")
* * *
---
# Get Involved
**Register to testify!**
* If there is a bill you are particularly passionate about, you can register to testify either in support or in opposition to the bill.
* Advance registration is required! Registration closes 30 minutes before the hearing is scheduled to begin.
* To register, go to [https://olis.oregonlegislature.gov/liz/2025R1](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Folis.oregonlegislature.gov%2Fliz%2F2025R1/1/01010196cbc3cd8c-77358818-ab3b-444c-85fe-105bab9ef19b-000000/LjEAL4nB7FFSPd1KR2SlEjYD3QNS9t_KQFiCECeplY8=404), select the “Bills” icon on the top right corner of your page, enter the bill number, and select “Register to Testify.” Or, call 1-833-588-4500.
* You will want to fill out the “Public Testimony Registration Form.”
* You will receive an email confirmation with an option to join Microsoft Teams if you can not testify in person.

**Submit Written Testimony!**
* If you prefer not to testify in person, you can also submit written testimony in support or opposition to a bill.
* To submit written testimony, follow the same steps as you would to register to testify in front of the committee, but you will select “Submit Testimony” and fill out the “Written Testimony Submission Form.”
* Written testimony must be submitted up to 48 hours after the committee meeting start time.

Testifying on a bill gives you a voice in Oregon’s legislature. The voice of the people is the cornerstone of democracy! Let yours be heard today.
* * *
---
# Stay in Touch
I am honored to serve you and our community at your State Capitol this session. Please stay in touch and reach out if there are any issues you would like us to work on.
Reach my office!
* Office Phone: 503-986-1412
* Email: Rep.DarinHarbick@oregonlegislature.gov
* Office Address: 900 Court St. NE, H-376 | Salem, OR 97301

* * *
**SUBSCRIBER SERVICES OPTIONS:**
**•** To **stop** receiving this newsletter, **add** new newsletters, or**delete** your subscription services click [Manage Preferences](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fpublic.govdelivery.com%2Faccounts%2FORLEG%2Fsubscriber%2Fnew%3Fpreferences=true/1/01010196cbc3cd8c-77358818-ab3b-444c-85fe-105bab9ef19b-000000/x_gW6jE16jjc2XnNIiKht96WpvG9tIM2ieQHR5aOyhg=404)
**•** For questions about subscriber services, please email [Help](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fsubscriberhelp.govdelivery.com%2F/1/01010196cbc3cd8c-77358818-ab3b-444c-85fe-105bab9ef19b-000000/WUP_QsNAkfzN-LaPILjNrbSz3Ck_vr3ZzaXvYU7GjO4=404) Information provided may not be final and is subject to change.
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com using GovDelivery · 707 17th St, Suite 4000 · Denver, CO 80202 · 1-800-439-1420 | [](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fsubscriberhelp.granicus.com%2F/1/01010196cbc3cd8c-77358818-ab3b-444c-85fe-105bab9ef19b-000000/T070xq9jsdKM6ANvrRpc061sF8J1z7tfvBr4RvXJf7I=404)

name: Cory Booker
subject: For every Musk, there’s a Martin.

body:
The power of the people is greater than the people in power.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107640885/545342736/-667153314?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5527-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTBlOTZjZC00OTMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5dJpEhW2eE0FJqmH1nO4NACfpuBRG3-H9WhfnsWZckk=)
Family,
For every Musk, there's a Martin, a Medgar, a Malcolm — and millions of others who will stand for America even when they try to tear it down.
I believe we are at another turning point in our country. This is not a partisan moment. This is not a left or right moment. **This is a right or wrong moment.**
It's time for everyone to stand up even if your voice shakes. It's time to stand up even if your legs are weary.
We achieved every great thing in this country because average citizens stood up and said enough is enough.
They banded together and bonded together — across gender, race, and even party — and said it's time we unite to bend the arc of the moral universe toward justice.
So for all of those people who are weary and tired and worried, who've been standing and feel like they can't stand anymore, it's time for us to stand up and stand with them.
To stand for health care. To stand for Social Security. To stand for our values.
**[Jacky Rosen and I need you in this fight with us, friend. If you can, will you split $10 between our campaigns so that we can take on all the fights ahead and elect more Democrats to the Senate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107640886/545342737/-667153314?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=10&refcode=jtk5527-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTBlOTZjZC00OTMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5dJpEhW2eE0FJqmH1nO4NACfpuBRG3-H9WhfnsWZckk=)**

clean_body: Fighting back in local communities. | = | Peter, If we want to push back against the growing tide of political extremism, we can’t wait for change to come from the top down. The real fight happens at the local level — in our communities, our towns, and our districts. That’s why the Blue Dog Coalition is focused on place-based politics. We believe representation should reflect the people we serve. Not party extremes, but the real needs of the communities we come from. At a time when the Trump administration is relentlessly targeting Medicaid, Social Security, rural development, our public lands, and clean energy initiatives, it’s never been more important to support representatives like Martin who go to bat for these issues in the Senate every single day. I’m worried. Medicaid, Social Security, basic infrastructure, job opportunities for New Mexicans, and our public lands have never been more at risk than they are now under the current administration.
The Trump administration hopes you’re not paying attention, but they just put forward a budget for our National Parks that is outright _hostile_ to our public lands – one of America’s greatest ideas. In all honesty, it’s probably the _worst_ park service budget I’ve ever seen.
I’m fighting every day to protect public lands, clean energy projects, and the job opportunities they create, as well as the earned benefits, programs, and places — like local libraries — that countless New Mexicans rely on. By helping us meet our fundraising goals, you’re ensuring my team can collect enough resources to beat back the attacks AND continue our fight for New Mexico.

My finance team just told me we’re trailing a bit behind our internal goals for May. This is a problem because what we raise together now will determine my team’s ability to respond to MAGA attacks on our work down the line. I’ll explain more in a moment, but if that’s all you need to hear, = | = I’m worried. Medicaid, Social Security, basic infrastructure, job opportunities for New Mexicans, and our public lands have never been more at risk than they are now under the current administration. The Trump administration hopes you’re not paying attention, but they just put forward a budget for our National Parks that is outright hostile to our public lands – one of America’s greatest ideas. In all honesty, it’s probably the worst park service budget I’ve ever seen. I’m fighting every day to protect public lands, clean energy projects, and the job opportunities they create, as well as the earned benefits, programs, and places — like local libraries — that countless New Mexicans rely on. * * *
Donald Trump’s administration just took another disturbing step to centralize power — **and this time, your personal data is on the line.**
Under DOGE, the Trump administration wants to consolidate unprecedented amounts of federal data into a single system. That includes Social Security numbers, tax filings, immigration records, and even personal medical information.
**It’s a privacy nightmare, and a political weapon in the making.**
Cybersecurity experts and former federal officials are already sounding the alarm: This centralized database would create massive vulnerabilities, especially in the hands of a leader like Trump, who’s shown time and again that he’s willing to abuse power for personal gain.
What happens when a system like this is used to target immigrants, suppress voters, or punish political enemies?
**We’ve seen the warning signs. Now we need to act.**
Democratic Secretaries of State are standing up for our privacy, voting rights, and democracy — and they need backup. Every signature helps us show the public is paying attention.

Republicans are waging an all-out assault on our health care system, our environmental protections, and the rule of law — and I’m doing everything I can to hold them accountable. But I need your help. We’re working to hit a $4,384 mid-month fundraising goal by the end of this week — and every contribution helps us get closer.

name: Dan Goldman
subject: Our pressure is working
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
#
---
Peter, After weeks of pressure from all of us, _Donald Trump actually floated the idea of increasing taxes on the ultra wealthy._ Yes — you read that right. The same guy who spent his first term giving billionaires and mega corporations massive handouts at the expense of the middle class is suddenly changing his tune. Why? **Because our messaging and advocacy is breaking through!** And it’s not just Trump. House Republicans are starting to crack under the pressure of grassroots resistance. Here’s what the GOP House Budget Chair Jodey Arrington had to say about our unified opposition: | | | **“Democrats scare some of my members... They paralyze our conference and, quite frankly, frighten us into inaction.”**
— Rep. Jodey Arrington (R-TX), POLITICO, May 9
---
We’ve put Republicans on the defensive, and they’re cracking. **This is _exactly_ the moment we need to push harder.** But keeping the pressure on means we make sure we have the resources to fight back at every turn.
**[Chip in now to help us keep up the fight and hold the GOP accountable. Momentum is on our side, Peter. clean_body: | Peter, After weeks of pressure from all of us, Donald Trump actually floated the idea of increasing taxes on the ultra wealthy. Yes — you read that right. The same guy who spent his first term giving billionaires and mega corporations massive handouts at the expense of the middle class is suddenly changing his tune. Why? Because our messaging and advocacy is breaking through! And it’s not just Trump. House Republicans are starting to crack under the pressure of grassroots resistance. Here’s what the GOP House Budget Chair Jodey Arrington had to say about our unified opposition: | | | “Democrats scare some of my members... They paralyze our conference and, quite frankly, frighten us into inaction.” — Rep. Jodey Arrington (R-TX), POLITICO, May 9 We’ve put Republicans on the defensive, and they’re cracking. This is exactly the moment we need to push harder. name: John Fetterman
subject: government should give a sh*t about regular people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
| | |
---
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51091?t=1&akid=10091%2E434096%2E9Gxfhu)
Hey Derek, it’s John.
**I need to ask: Is there *anything* I can say to convince you[to toss in a few bucks and help us reach our $20,000 mid-month goal by Thursday at midnight?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51091?t=2&akid=10091%2E434096%2E9Gxfhu)**
What if I told you Republicans are out here trying to cut Social Security – just to hand more tax breaks to their rich buddies?
What if I told you the GOP would rather make it harder for seniors to afford their meds than make things cheaper for you and your family?
Or what if I told you that everything we raise from folks like you will help us keep fighting for a government that actually gives a sh*t about working families?
Look, if you can afford to pitch in $5, it would mean a lot. But if you can't give today, that’s 💯 OK too. I’ll have your back in the Senate either way.
**[But if you * can* help me hit this $20,000 goal by Thursday night, will you toss in $5 now? ](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51092?t=3&akid=10091%2E434096%2E9Gxfhu)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=9&akid=10091%2E434096%2E9Gxfhu)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=10091%2E434096%2E9Gxfhu)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.
clean_body: | | | Hey Derek, it’s John. I need to ask: Is there anything I can say to convince you What if I told you Republicans are out here trying to cut Social Security – just to hand more tax breaks to their rich buddies? What if I told you the GOP would rather make it harder for seniors to afford their meds than make things cheaper for you and your family? Or what if I told you that everything we raise from folks like you will help us keep fighting for a government that actually gives a sht about working families? Look, if you can afford to pitch in $5, it would mean a lot. But if you can't give today, that’s 💯 OK too. I’ll have your back in the Senate either way. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Thanks for your help, John ❤️ | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: It's About To Go Down In T-Town | Tebow, Stakelbeck + More...
body:
Check out this 2 minute video real quick of what is coming to Tulsa: https://youtube.com/live/AVu-bsalsbE One thing I can verify is that being in min
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21397147.11487.1.08d2766285539dfdf48d326e0ff8dd20) |
---
Check out this **2 minute video** real quick of what is coming to Tulsa: [https://youtube.com/live/AVu-bsalsbE](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21397147.11488.1.2742834b9e1a069dbf3fdecac9184f35) One thing _I can verify_ is that being in ministry is sometimes difficult. In fact, the **New York Times** produced a survey about Pastors that indicate somewhere around **1500 leave the ministry** each month in America and _"57% of Pastors would leave ministry if they thought there was somewhere else to go."_ Pastors and Ministry Leaders are always being a blessing to their congregations and communities but sometimes they themsleves are _under appreciated_. Therefore, on June 5 at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21397147.11489.1.74c54d401a4e07b4e7e3f3e2ed0e6438) we will be holding **A NIGHT OF BLESSING** specifically for Pastors and Ministry Leaders. **Tim Tebow** will encourage, **Colton Dixon** will sing, the **food** will be good and **gifts** will be given away. **Dinner is at the Mar-a-lago of Tulsa!** This is a **PRIVATE + FREE** event for Pastors and Ministry Leaders. **However, I have 3 asks:** _First_ , **Share this with your Pastor**! Pastors and Ministry Leaders can RSVP here: [https://www.tickettailor.com/events/sheridanchurch/1665203](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21397147.11490.1.84ce33a302e1653207f20f809b43c6e4) _Second_ , If you are a business owner **consider sponsoring the event**. Sponsors will help cover the costs to be a blessing to the Pastors that will be in attendance. Or if you would like to bless these pastors you can do so by visiting: [www.sheridan.church/give](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21397147.11491.1.d1e8e73b1c6390ffd2ee66d543501b70) To sponsor this event visit [BUSINESS SPONSOR](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21397147.11492.1.d3be6058dcb22cfc8082935db4914f78) or email me at **jlahmeyer@sheridan.church** _Third_ , **Pray for this night**. There might be a Pastor on the verge of calling it quits that just needs a nudge of encouragement to stay in the game. Thank you, Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
| | [ RSVP: NIGHT OF BLESSING ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21397147.11493.1.49929ee1837de7ee391759ac0d090e1e)

## The Reviews Are In!
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21397147.11494.1.e7f01de9ceb5e28915aa4a83fae19f74)
---
Last week was interesting... My **FIRST** book, ["_Chasing After The Wind_ "](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21397147.11495.1.22a73983b1b2d548c6d66aadbceba909) was released for pre-orders. **I have been blown away by the response!** Many have actually started reading the [eBook](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21397147.11496.1.0cd31476acd3a58f065ddf736f7b246f) before the hard copy arrives in the mail and the reviews have been _INCREDIBLE_! If you have not ordered your copy you can still get the **Limited Edition Signed Book** plus the **downloadable eBook** for tablets and phones as well as **theme song** as a bundled package here: _[*"Chasing After The Wind"*](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21397147.11497.1.5acf753f537ad19250897dcacc85cb8a)_ A **BIG** shipment of books arrive this week for me to sign and then they will be sent out. I really want to thank **MLB LEGEND Darryl Strawberry** for writing the Foreword and becoming vulnerable by sharing his story. The Foreword is worth getting the book, I promise. This book is 200 pages and I am confident will change your life as it has mine. In ["Chasing After The Wind"](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21397147.11498.1.180937eaaba44c1ea1f775aaaa276090) I share VERY personal stories and I decided to get real and raw with the heartbreaks and triumphs I have experienced.

---

subject: Sign on to protect Medicaid →
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=VsAWydc8gLER6K8sV7hsuHFDb7zblLu80BzSUGubDnlQneFwgeGVrjILD6O8G96eh%2B0jbvcpgWcHdTQBWPJRtD4jd%2F23BYIuduAzsqZ9JSutbsmcaIdhCJprI3P3bto7L8PNBAsQ1RfvxqZywteOQOhDTSN6mUvs6QD5sw9dPFyX6uOrJQaX3B6t%2BQioUitcCsDj%2BGGdAUkfR%2F6KiqGsKejFEZ63c4UWxy3sjudLGUf%2Br8TSSm1JmzJq2ELLhtvT5v9h4IgVjm5NLx7TdeBbNkEoAwFxhfc6MH%2F46PpTobtJS7%2F2qxHDV8gzhuMvqGnbBFUkcfXwFkUv0MWFUFdWoYaUy7MVp5KDJEUk1wPPPxTRl0f%2FikmgRr%2Fgl9o5t%2BRi%2F3QX1Ixom%2BtYRBxYqo6VfyzY%2FPOhv4ASkgIAC160LF9Cno90Kohaqf85zcgyRUXX)
---
| |
---
It's Raul. Earlier this month, I met with the Democratic Doctors Caucus — because at a time when Republicans are launching coordinated attacks on health care, we believe it’s time to expand it — not cut it. As a physician, I know firsthand that programs like Medicaid are lifelines for millions of Americans, including families right here in CA-25, and I’m going to fight like hell to protect them. [Will you take 30 seconds to sign our petition to defend Medicaid and show House Republicans where we stand?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107642760/545349402/-1910187354?source=SBD_RR_EM_POLL_051325_MEDICAID_60DO60DNTL_D1_S1_RE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmFiOGUxMmItNTIzMC1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IBR5aZ-BdghBXgxrrgp23ztJFbr65C5VcCbWB3jUFts=&emci=011c09d4-5030-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=fab8e12b-5230-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=4131986) | | **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107642762/545349404/-1910187354?source=SBD_RR_EM_POLL_051325_MEDICAID_60DO60DNTL_D1_S1_RE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmFiOGUxMmItNTIzMC1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IBR5aZ-BdghBXgxrrgp23ztJFbr65C5VcCbWB3jUFts=&emci=011c09d4-5030-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=fab8e12b-5230-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=4131986)**

The GOP continues to prioritize tax breaks for billionaires over access to life-saving care. These cuts to Medicaid would take away health care, food security, and peace of mind from millions of Americans who are already struggling to make ends meet.
I’m doing everything I can in Congress to protect Medicaid and ensure the people of our district are heard. But I need you with me. [Sign the petition now to help us send a clear message: we will not let Republicans gut the programs that keep our communities healthy.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107642765/545349406/-1910187354?source=SBD_RR_EM_POLL_051325_MEDICAID_60DO60DNTL_D1_S1_RE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmFiOGUxMmItNTIzMC1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IBR5aZ-BdghBXgxrrgp23ztJFbr65C5VcCbWB3jUFts=&emci=011c09d4-5030-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=fab8e12b-5230-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=4131986)

The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. **Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.**

clean_body: While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | It's Raul. Earlier this month, I met with the Democratic Doctors Caucus — because at a time when Republicans are launching coordinated attacks on health care, we believe it’s time to expand it — not cut it. As a physician, I know firsthand that programs like Medicaid are lifelines for millions of Americans, including families right here in CA-25, and I’m going to fight like hell to protect them. | | The GOP continues to prioritize tax breaks for billionaires over access to life-saving care. These cuts to Medicaid would take away health care, food security, and peace of mind from millions of Americans who are already struggling to make ends meet. I’m doing everything I can in Congress to protect Medicaid and ensure the people of our district are heard. But I need you with me. | — Raul | | | ---|---|--- = The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.** | = = PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: You can also =. Dr. Raul Ruiz for Congress Committee P.O. Box 1566 Indio, CA 92202 United States

name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: Our lands need defenders
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress
body:
Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/lNYIdkhPikOBrh6RGc-KWg2?unsubscribedata=vu%2BdHrgetKwhzEN52TcZojCi3X5kCMQ4je0%2BtXa8HBSGlMxJOMyPRU8V%2BKqZ0vUMc6pZT7mnDg8JRueuJU8vL0bJk5VxtVzARlhbMBB4V8Ye7xY5skevssPfjeOIirW%2BdG41%2Bbh2S8VkdkRJkcqKvcFP%2ByJQ%2BYBC%2FeUydYfEMPCjO8Qt768CMg1z%2FwBi54lKHZSrDOwjaqHBSJ4L5WA4FOmnnjiLb%2BtXSoQwCKa%2B8pg7FiNmnCrivAvtYec3M8mll7hb%2BRVLzQNQVJcOFaZnb9hUA756ESPoxAtaRgjPNA4O%2F81hQf3sHhqRBMMnhv45htcDEI5LhhLOLE0zrmCJgCoexPHQ3sRnNMooyXWom21uxamNTOIpD%2F5Bajaqe4Tr%2BSnf9YMsZuSN6Owbfg%2FrivgWkGlvDDL1HOMxIUcZ1g4%3D)
---
| |
---
Saludos. Our public lands are more than acres of wilderness — they’re living reminders of who we are and what we stand for. That’s why I’m proud to announce the launch of the bipartisan Public Lands Caucus — a coalition I co-founded with Rep. Ryan Zinke to bring Democrats and Republicans together around one unshakable belief: **America’s public lands must be protected and preserved for everyone.** Together, we’re building a new generation of leadership rooted in conservation, access, and respect for the land we all share. **But let’s be clear: we’re also up against powerful forces that want to sell off, carve up and privatize these treasures.** Since day one, Donald Trump and his allies have launched a coordinated assault on our public lands — from slashing budgets for the National Park Service to gutting protections for sacred and historic sites, Trump has decided to put polluters over people. If we don’t speak up now, these special places — and the stories they hold — could be lost forever. clean_body: Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Saludos. Our public lands are more than acres of wilderness — they’re living reminders of who we are and what we stand for. That’s why I’m proud to announce the launch of the bipartisan Public Lands Caucus — a coalition I co-founded with Rep. Ryan Zinke to bring Democrats and Republicans together around one unshakable belief: America’s public lands must be protected and preserved for everyone. Together, we’re building a new generation of leadership rooted in conservation, access, and respect for the land we all share. But let’s be clear: we’re also up against powerful forces that want to sell off, carve up and privatize these treasures. Since day one, Donald Trump and his allies have launched a coordinated assault on our public lands — from slashing budgets for the National Park Service to gutting protections for sacred and historic sites, Trump has decided to put polluters over people. If we don’t speak up now, these special places — and the stories they hold — could be lost forever. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = This isn’t just about politics. It’s about legacy. It’s about standing shoulder to shoulder, across party lines, to protect what’s ours. For our lands, Gabe | | | ---|---|--- = Together, we flipped NM-02 in 2022. Now, Gabe is busy in Congress fighting for reproductive choice, economic opportunity, affordable healthcare, and the best interests of the people. Gabe won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022, and is running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone.** | = = Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: To receive less email from Gabe Vasquez for Congress, . name: Team Kelly
subject: Take a look at this guy:
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Roger Stone. He’s a major Trump loyalist. Trump even commuted Stone’s 40-month prison sentence after a jury found that he had broken the law after the 2016 election.
#

Friend, take a look at this guy:
[](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-may25.akVXmo&refcode=em250513-1-500&t=1&akid=6067%2E6688874%2EzGOkZW)
That’s Roger Stone. He’s a major Trump loyalist. Trump even commuted Stone’s 40-month prison sentence after a jury found that he had broken the law after the 2016 election.
He called for Mark Kelly to be charged with treason and executed last week after Mark introduced a bill to take on Trump’s corruption.
While we’re at it, take a look at this guy:
[](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-may25.akVXmo&refcode=em250513-1-500&t=2&akid=6067%2E6688874%2EzGOkZW)
Elon Musk, richest guy in the world, head of DOGE, and another major Trump loyalist.
Elon called Mark Kelly a traitor to the United States because Mark supports Ukraine (a United States ally) as it defends itself from Russian (not an ally) invasion.
Insinuations of treason and threats of political violence are not welcome in the United States of America. It is not who we are. Full stop.
Unfortunately, threats like these are very real to Mark. He has to take things like this seriously after what happened to Gabby in 2011. It’s a dark reality of political life today, and it is incredibly sad.
But as real as these threats are, they won’t stop Mark from doing the important work of holding the Trump Administration accountable and working to thwart their efforts to tear our democracy apart. Mark is not backing down, and we have to stand by him.
[**Please. If you care about Mark and the role he is playing in the fight against Trump and people like Elon Musk and Roger Stone, make a donation and help him keep going.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-may25.akVXmo&refcode=em250513-1-500&t=3&akid=6067%2E6688874%2EzGOkZW)

He has to take things like this seriously after what happened to Gabby in 2011. It’s a dark reality of political life today, and it is incredibly sad. But as real as these threats are, they won’t stop Mark from doing the important work of holding the Trump Administration accountable and working to thwart their efforts to tear our democracy apart. Mark is not backing down, and we have to stand by him.
